The team strives to build the world’s best products for game production, operation, and insights. Powering many award-winning, loved-by-millions franchise games over mobile, web, and PC.&nbsp;</div> <div>&nbsp;</div> <div> <div><strong>What You’ll Do&nbsp;</strong>&nbsp;</div> <ul> <li>Lead and collaborate with engineers, product teams, and analysts to develop self-serve insight products that are responsive, precise, and scalable at petabyte levels</li> <li>Oversee the entire data product lifecycle, including designing new tracking plans, developing data models, ELT pipelines, and self-serve insight products like Looker explores and dashboards</li> <li>Act as a guardian of data quality, ensuring consistent metric reporting across a wide range of data products</li> <li>Utilize cutting-edge technology stack including BigQuery, dbt and Looker</li> <li>Provide technical leadership and empathize with game product teams and departments to enhance their daily operations and product success</li> <li>Bring expertise in a specific part of the data stack and lifecycle while contributing broadly across all aspects</li> <li>Mentor team members and drive the adoption of best practices within the team</li> </ul> </div> <div><strong>What We’re Looking For &nbsp;</strong></div> <ul> <li>A strong passion for solving complex analytical puzzles</li> <li>Proven ability to translate business needs into advanced analytics solutions</li> <li>Deep expertise with the modern data stack (BigQuery, Snowflake, dbt, Looker, Airflow, GitHub, command line-based workflows)</li> <li>Exceptional SQL skills coupled with at least 5 years of relevant experience in data analytics or engineering roles</li> <li>Solid understanding of data modeling principles (e.g., Kimball methodology, star schemas)</li> <li>A high valuation of business context and the drive to achieve technical excellence</li> <li>An inclination towards collaboration and pride in contributing to high-functioning teams</li> <li>Enjoyment in working within fast-paced, growth-oriented environments</li> <li>A sense of fun at work, with extracurricular interests like Ping Pong or Mario Kart seen as a bonus!</li> </ul> <div>At Scopely, we create games for everyone - and want to ensure that the people behind our games reflect that! &nbsp; We are committed to creating a diverse, supportive work environment where everyone is treated with respect. We are committed to providing equal employment opportunities and welcome individuals from all backgrounds to join us &amp; embrace the adventure! &nbsp;</div><div class="content-conclusion"><p>&nbsp;</p> <h3>About Scopely</h3> <p>Scopely is a leading video game and global interactive entertainment company, home to many of the world’s most beloved and enduring experiences, including two of the most successful mobile games of all-time “MONOPOLY GO!” and “Pokémon GO,” along with “Stumble Guys,” “Star Trek™ Fleet Command,” “MARVEL Strike Force,” “WWE Champions,” the Scrabble® franchise, “Yahtzee® With Buddies,” and many others. Across mobile, web, PC, and console, Scopely creates, develops, publishes, and live-operates one of the most diversified and award-winning portfolios in the games industry — bringing hundreds of millions of players together through a shared love of play.</p> <p>Founded in 2011, Scopely is powered by its exceptional team — including thousands of world-class gamemakers around the globe, a distinctive tenet-driven culture, and its proprietary technology platform, Playgami. Together, these strengths have fueled Scopely’s position as the #1 mobile games company in the U.S. and #2 globally, generating more than $10 billion in lifetime revenue. Whether building global sensations like “MONOPOLY GO!” from the ground up, or expanding through strategic acquisitions, including the FoxNext, GSN, and Niantic games businesses — Scopely consistently delivers experiences players love today and return to for years to come.</p> <p>Recognized multiple times as one of the "100 Most Influential Companies in the World" by TIME magazine and one of Fast Company's "World's Most Innovative Companies" and “Best Workplaces for Innovators,” Scopely believes that video games can be a force for good — creating meaningful connections, vibrant communities, and making life better through play.</p> <p>Scopely has global operations and partners across four continents in more than a dozen countries worldwide. For more information, visit: <a href="https://www.scopely.com/">https://www.scopely.com/</a>.&nbsp;</p> <p>Notice to Candidates: Scopely will never request payment or financial information during the application or hiring process. Please apply only through our official <a href="http://scopely.com">website</a> and verify that all Talent Partner communications come from an email address ending in @<a href="http://scopely.com">scopely.com</a>.</p> <p>Should you have any questions or encounter any fraudulent requests/emails/websites, please immediately contact recruiting@scopely.com. Our job applicant privacy policies are available here: <a href="https://www.scopely.com/en/job-applicant-privacy-notice-for-ca-residents">California Privacy Notice</a> and <a href="https://www.scopely.com/en/eea-and-uk-job-applicant-privacy-notice">EEA/UK Privacy Notice</a>.</p> <p>Employment at Scopely is based solely on a person's merit and qualifications. Scopely does not discriminate against any employee or applicant because of race, creed, color, religion, gender, sexual orientation, gender identity/expression, national origin, disability, age, genetic information, veteran status, marital status, pregnancy or related condition (including breastfeeding), or any other basis protected by law. We also consider qualified applicants with arrest or conviction records, consistent with applicable federal, state and local law.</p></div>

title: Business Data Engineer
full_description: <div class="content-intro"><p>Nex is on a mission to help families rediscover the joy of movement. Created by parents for parents, Nex combines technology and play to deliver fun, social, and interactive experiences powered by natural body motion, encouraging kids and adults to move more, play more, and have fun together. Nex Playground, the company’s award-winning active play system, is purpose-built to get families moving year-round, with safety and privacy as core considerations in its intentional design. It is certified kidSAFE+ COPPA compliant and built to support healthy, active play for all ages and abilities.</p> <p>Nex Playground features a growing library of 50+ experiences, including motion and dance games, fitness and educational experiences, and Nex Originals. Content includes collaborations with partners like Hasbro, Sesame Workshop, and NBCUniversal. Nex has been recognized by Fast Company’s Most Innovative Companies, TIME’s Best Inventions, and Parents’ Best Entertainment System for Families, and has earned Red Dot, IDEA, and Core77 international design awards. We encourage you to explore <a class="c-link" href="https://www.playthatmovesyou.com/p/have-fun" target="_blank" data-stringify-link="https://www.playthatmovesyou.com/p/have-fun" data-sk="tooltip_parent">Have Fun</a>&nbsp;and&nbsp;<a class="c-link" href="https://www.playthatmovesyou.com/p/is-motion-gaming-back" target="_blank" data-stringify-link="https://www.playthatmovesyou.com/p/is-motion-gaming-back" data-sk="tooltip_parent">Is Motion Gaming Back?</a>, as they offer a deeper look into our culture, values, and explain how our approach to motion gaming differs from previous generations.</p> <p>To protect yourself from recruitment scams, please note that Nex communicates through official company emails ending in @nex.inc. If you receive a suspicious email or message, please do not respond and report it immediately to us.</p></div><p><strong>Location: </strong>Seattle, WA or Remote USA<br><strong>Annual Salary: </strong>$140,000 - $170,000 USD<br><strong>Type: </strong>Full-time<br><strong>Reports to: </strong>Director, Analytics</p> <h3><strong>About this Role</strong></h3> <p>Nex’s user base is growing quickly, and the amount of data we’re working with is growing even faster. We are seeking an experienced and dedicated Data Engineer to join our Analytics department and help us streamline, future-proof, and automate our reporting processes as well as our data backend as we move into the next phase of the company’s growth.</p> <p>The ideal candidate for this role loves problem solving and tinkering, and feels the thrill of accomplishment when a long-standing issue or project is resolved. Strong attention to detail and dedicated follow-through are key. If you want to work on a small team, for a growing company, laying down framework that will be used and appreciated by teams across multiple disciplines, we want to hear from you!</p> <h3><strong>Core Responsibilities</strong></h3> <ul> <li><strong>Connect with cross-functional teams</strong>: The data environment we’re building will be used by members of the Accounting, Finance, Supply Chain, and Publishing teams, among others. Meet with them and get to know their needs so we can build things they’ll use for years.</li> <li><strong>Project Management</strong>: Keep track of &amp; prioritize short-term and long-term projects.</li> <li><strong>Build &amp; Support:</strong><span class="Apple-converted-space">&nbsp;</span>Build new and improved ways for us to access &amp; view data, and see to their steady functioning over time.</li> <li><strong>Investigate &amp; Iterate:</strong><span class="Apple-converted-space">&nbsp;</span>Keep an eye on how small improvements can be made to improve the cost and reliability of our data pipeline.</li> </ul> <h3><strong>Required Qualifications</strong></h3> <ul> <li>3+ years of experience as a<span class="Apple-converted-space">&nbsp;</span><strong>Data Engineer</strong><span class="Apple-converted-space">&nbsp;</span>or 5+ years of experience as a<span class="Apple-converted-space">&nbsp;</span><strong>Business Intelligence Engineer.</strong></li> <li>Experience with the AWS suite of tools and solutions to run a data environment end-to-end.</li> <li>Proven ability to work independently, without constant guidance.</li> <li>Comfortable working in ambiguous environments that require&nbsp;iteration &amp; investigation.</li> <li>Strong track record of working with&nbsp;<strong>cross-functional teams</strong>&nbsp;across disciplines such as marketing, product, engineering, and finance/accounting.</li> </ul> <h3><strong>Preferred Qualifications</strong></h3> <ul> <li>Experience automating complex datasets, using SQL, Python, or another similar tool.</li> <li>Experience with building and maintaining APIs to connect data environments and pull raw data from various sources.</li> <li>Previous experience with data environments for digital gaming platforms or subscription services.</li> <li>Ability to thrive and create without the use of AI tools as a baseline.</li> </ul> <h3><strong>What Sets You Apart</strong></h3> <ul> <li>Creative solutions to complex problems</li> <li>Proactive approach to projects</li> <li>Ability to thrive in a fast-paced environment</li> <li>Experience working with teams from different cultures and backgrounds</li> <li>You’re an expert on your own work &amp; can back up your results</li> <li>Good-natured and easy to work with</li> </ul> <p>#LI-Remote</p><div class="content-conclusion"><h3><strong class="bold-text-2">We Offer</strong></h3> <ul class="list-item-16"> <li class="list-item-16">Competitive compensation package.</li> <li class="list-item-23">Flexible working hours and vacation policy.</li> <li class="list-item-23">Product-driven culture that treasures talents and individual growth.</li> <li class="list-item-23">Front-row seat and hands-on experience with cutting edge technologies in the evolving gaming field</li> </ul> <p>Nex is located in&nbsp;<strong>San Jose, California, USA</strong>&nbsp;and&nbsp;<strong>Hong&nbsp;Kong</strong>. Learn more about us at&nbsp;<a href="https://www.nex.inc/who-we-are" target="">nex.inc/who-we-are</a>.<br><br>We encourage applications even if you don’t meet more than 50% of the requirements — we believe that experience comes in many forms!</p> <p data-start="274" data-end="661">Nex is an equal opportunity employer and does not discriminate on the basis of race, color, religion, sex (including pregnancy, childbirth, gender identity, and sexual orientation), national origin, ancestry, age, physical or mental disability, medical condition, genetic information, marital status, military or veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by applicable law. This policy applies to all individuals at every stage of the employment relationship, including all current and prospective employees, and covers all employment decisions including recruitment, hiring, job assignment, promotion, compensation, benefits, training, discipline and termination.</p> <p data-start="667" data-end="811">We are committed to providing a workplace free from discrimination and harassment and to fostering an inclusive environment for all employees.</p></div>

title: Senior Forward Deployed Engineer - Finance AI Enablement
full_description: <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;"><strong>Job Overview:</strong></span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Omada has a dedicated AI Transformation &amp; Enablement organization focused on embedding AI directly into how business functions operate. Rather than acting as a centralized innovation lab disconnected from day-to-day operations, this team deploys senior engineers directly into functions to partner with teams, understand their workflows, and build production AI systems that drive measurable business impact.</span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Finance is the next major deployment.</span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">As the Sr. Forward Deployed Engineer supporting Finance, you will operate as the embedded AI engineering partner for the Finance organization — attending planning reviews, close cycles, forecasting discussions, operational reviews, and executive preparation processes to deeply understand how Finance operates today and how AI can transform it tomorrow. This is a 0→1 build with a team behind you, focused on turning ambiguous, high-value finance problems into production systems used by executives and operators every day. You will own each agent end-to-end: from discovery and prototyping, to shipping, monitoring, and iterating.</span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">You will partner closely with the Sr. Director, Strategic Finance, who owns the Finance AI roadmap and business prioritization, while remaining part of Omada’s AI Transformation &amp; Enablement engineering organization, where you will receive technical leadership, architecture guidance, peer collaboration, and engineering support from other Forward Deployed Engineers solving similar challenges across the company.</span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">This role is highly cross-functional and combines elements of AI engineering, systems integration, workflow automation, product thinking, business partnership, and organizational enablement. You will design, build, deploy, monitor, and continuously improve AI-powered systems that help Finance teams operate more efficiently, improve accuracy and consistency, accelerate decision-making, and scale institutional knowledge.</span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">The systems you build will operate within a highly regulated and compliance-sensitive environment that includes SOX, HIPAA, security, and data governance considerations. As part of the AI Transformation &amp; Enablement organization, you will help shape the standards, governance patterns, and operational practices that define responsible enterprise AI adoption at Omada.</span></p> <p><strong><span style="font-size: 10pt;">What You’ll Own:</span></strong></p> <p><strong><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Finance AI Integration &amp; Knowledge Layer</span></strong></p> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Design and build the Finance-specific AI integration layer that connects AI systems to enterprise finance platforms, operational data, and institutional knowledge sources.</span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">This includes:</span></p> <ul> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Integrating AI systems with platforms such as NetSuite, Adaptive Planning, FloQast, AWS, and internal data warehouses</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Building retrieval and knowledge systems over financial documentation, board materials, KPI definitions, investor communications, and forecasting models</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Developing reusable AI workflow and orchestration patterns for Finance use cases</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Enabling conversational and natural-language interaction with operational and financial data</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Partnering with central Engineering and AI platform teams to adopt and extend shared AI infrastructure patterns</span></li> </ul> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">You will design systems that allow Finance teams to progressively own configuration, evaluation, and operational management of AI workflows over time.</span></p> <p><strong><span style="font-size: 10pt;">AI-Powered Financial Quality &amp; Controls</span></strong></p> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Build AI-enabled quality assurance and validation systems that improve confidence, consistency, and operational rigor across Finance workflows.</span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Examples include:</span></p> <ul> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Metric reconciliation across reporting materials and presentations</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Narrative and KPI consistency validation</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Financial calculation verification</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Reporting integrity and formatting validation</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">AI-assisted review workflows with human-in-the-loop oversight</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Evaluation and auditability patterns supporting SOX-aligned processes where applicable</span></li> </ul> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">You will help establish evaluation frameworks and review processes that ensure AI systems are reliable, measurable, and operationally trustworthy.</span></p> <p><strong><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Operational Intelligence &amp; Automation</span></strong></p> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Develop AI systems that continuously analyze operational and financial processes to surface insights, anomalies, optimization opportunities, and business risks.</span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Areas may include:</span></p> <ul> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Cost and spend monitoring</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Vendor and procurement analysis</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Contract and compliance monitoring</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Pricing and operational trend analysis</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Cloud and AI platform cost optimization</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Automated summarization, alerting, and root-cause analysis</span></li> </ul> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">You will focus on delivering practical AI solutions that improve operational efficiency and support faster, more informed decision-making.</span></p> <p><strong><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Market, Earnings &amp; Strategic Intelligence</span></strong></p> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Build AI-powered intelligence capabilities that help Finance leadership monitor external market activity and prepare executive-level materials more efficiently.</span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Examples include:</span></p> <ul> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Monitoring competitor activity, earnings calls, filings, and analyst commentary</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Supporting benchmarking and market intelligence workflows</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Assisting with earnings preparation, executive Q&amp;A, and board preparation workflows</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Cross-referencing and validating data across financial narratives, trend reporting, and investor-facing materials</span></li> </ul> <p><strong>Financial Workflow &amp; Narrative Automation</strong></p> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Develop AI-enabled workflows that accelerate operational execution and reduce manual effort across recurring Finance processes.</span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Examples may include:</span></p> <ul> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Monthly and quarterly reporting commentary</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Flash reports and KPI summaries</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Forecast and enrollment analysis</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Revenue and operational model validation</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Executive memo and board material drafting support</span></li> </ul> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">You will partner closely with Finance SMEs to ensure workflows remain operationally accurate, transparent, and trusted.</span></p> <p><strong><span style="font-size: 10pt;">AI Evaluation, Enablement &amp; Adoption</span></strong></p> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Enable Finance teams to effectively evaluate, use, and extend AI systems over time.</span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">This includes:</span></p> <ul> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Building evaluation frameworks, regression testing, and quality scorecards</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Establishing operational review and feedback loops</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Training Finance SMEs on AI evaluation and workflow management</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Promoting transparency around AI capabilities, limitations, and reliability</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Helping Finance teams grow long-term AI fluency and operational ownership</span></li> </ul> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Success in this role is not just measured by systems you build, but by how effectively the organization adopts and scales them.</span></p> <p><strong><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Cross-Functional Partnership &amp; Operating Model:</span></strong></p> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">This role operates with two closely connected partnership models by design.</span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">From a business perspective, you will be deeply embedded within the Finance organization and aligned to Finance priorities, workflows, operational rhythms, and strategic initiatives. The Sr. Director, Strategic Finance will own roadmap prioritization and business outcomes for Finance AI initiatives.</span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">From a technical perspective, you will remain part of Omada’s AI Transformation &amp; Enablement engineering organization, where you will collaborate with other Forward Deployed Engineers, participate in shared architectural standards, receive technical mentorship and code review, and contribute reusable patterns that scale across other functions.</span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">You will regularly partner across:</span></p> <ul> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Finance</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Accounting</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">IT</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Security &amp; Compliance</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Data &amp; Engineering</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Business Systems</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Enterprise AI &amp; Automation teams</span></li> </ul> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">This role requires balancing speed, innovation, governance, operational reliability, and stakeholder alignment in a rapidly evolving AI landscape.</span></p> <p><strong><span style="font-size: 10pt;">What Makes This Role Different:</span></strong></p> <ul> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Embedded partnership model: You work directly inside Finance while remaining part of a centralized AI engineering organization</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">High ownership environment: You will own initiatives from discovery through deployment and iteration</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Real operational impact: The systems you build will be used daily by Finance operators and leadership teams</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">AI-first transformation work: This is not incremental automation — this role helps redefine how Finance workflows operate</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Strong executive exposure: You will partner closely with senior leadership across Finance, Technology, IT, and Security</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Builder and enabler: Success is measured not only by what you build, but by how effectively the organization adopts and scales it</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Long-term growth opportunity: This role evolves from hands-on builder into strategic architect and AI transformation leader over time</span></li> </ul> <p><strong>Tools &amp; Technologies:</strong></p> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">We do not expect expertise in every tool on day one, but you should be comfortable learning and working across a modern enterprise AI ecosystem.</span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Examples include:</span></p> <ul> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">AI and orchestration frameworks</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Python services and APIs</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">AWS and cloud-native infrastructure</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Enterprise Finance platforms and operational systems</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Data warehouses and analytics environments</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">AI evaluation and observability tooling</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Workflow automation and integration platforms</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Governance, access control, and enterprise AI operational tooling</span></li> </ul> <p><strong>What Great Looks Like:</strong></p> <ul> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Builds strong trusted partnerships with Finance leaders and subject matter experts</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Delivers production-ready AI systems that create measurable operational impact</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Balances rapid experimentation with enterprise-grade reliability and governance</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Creates AI workflows that are understandable, auditable, and operationally sustainable</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Enables Finance teams to independently evaluate and operate AI-assisted workflows over time</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Operates effectively in ambiguity and turns loosely defined problems into scalable solutions</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Communicates AI capabilities, limitations, and tradeoffs clearly to technical and non-technical audiences</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Contributes reusable patterns and operational practices that scale AI adoption across the organization</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Demonstrates strong judgment in compliance-sensitive environments involving financial and operational data</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Embodies Omada values through collaboration, ownership, adaptability, and execution</span></li> </ul> <p><strong>Candidate Requirements:</strong></p> <p><strong><span style="font-size: 10pt;">AI &amp; Software Engineering</span></strong></p> <ul> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">5+ years of experience building and deploying software, data, automation, or AI-powered applications</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">2+ years of recent hands-on experience building LLM-based or AI-enabled systems in production environments</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Strong experience designing AI workflows including retrieval systems, orchestration patterns, tool usage, evaluation frameworks, and multi-step reasoning systems</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Strong proficiency in Python and experience building production-quality backend services, APIs, integrations, and automation workflows</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Experience integrating enterprise systems and operational data into AI-enabled workflows</span></li> </ul> <p><strong>Enterprise Systems &amp; Data</strong></p> <ul> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Experience working with enterprise business systems such as ERP, planning, financial, or operational platforms</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Experience designing retrieval or contextual knowledge systems across large document and metric corpora</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Familiarity with structured and unstructured enterprise data environments</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Understanding of operational monitoring, evaluation, and observability concepts for AI systems</span></li> </ul> <p><strong>Partnership &amp; Communication</strong></p> <ul> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Proven ability to partner directly with non-technical teams and translate business workflows into scalable technical solutions</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Experience enabling business users through training, documentation, and operational coaching</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Comfortable operating within highly cross-functional and rapidly evolving environments</span></li> </ul> <p><strong>Operating Style</strong></p> <ul> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Thrives in ambiguity and 0→1 environments</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Strong ownership mentality with the ability to independently drive initiatives forward</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Comfortable balancing embedded business partnership with centralized engineering alignment</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Demonstrates strong prioritization and judgment across competing initiatives</span></li> </ul> <p><strong>Governance, Security &amp; Compliance</strong></p> <ul> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Awareness of governance, security, and compliance considerations related to enterprise AI adoption</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Familiarity working within regulated or compliance-sensitive environments involving financial, operational, or healthcare-related data</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Comfortable incorporating human review, evaluation, and auditability into AI workflows</span></li> </ul> <p><strong>Nice to Have:</strong></p> <ul> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Experience applying AI to Finance, Accounting, FP&amp;A, Procurement, Revenue Operations, or operational business workflows</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Experience working with platforms such as NetSuite, Adaptive Planning, FloQast, Workday, or enterprise data warehouse environments</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Experience with AI orchestration frameworks such as LangChain, LangSmith, or similar tooling</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Experience with AWS services, including Bedrock and modern cloud-native architectures</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Experience extracting structured insights from unstructured enterprise documents using AI techniques</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Prior experience operating as an embedded, Forward Deployed, Solutions, or customer-facing engineer</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Strong perspective on responsible enterprise AI adoption and organizational AI enablement</span></li> </ul> <p><strong style="font-size: 14px;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Benefits:</span></strong></p> <ul> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Competitive salary with generous annual cash bonus</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Equity grants</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Remote first work from home culture</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Flexible Time Off to help you rest, recharge, and connect with loved ones</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Generous parental leave</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Health, dental, and vision insurance (and above market employer contributions)</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">401k retirement savings plan</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Lifestyle Spending Account (LSA)</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Mental Health Support Solutions</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">...and more!</span></li> </ul> <p>It takes a village to change health care. As we build together toward our mission, we strive to embody the following values in our day-to-day work. We hope these hold meaning for you as well as you consider Omada!</p> <ul> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Cultivate Trust. We listen closely and we operate with kindness. We provide respectful and candid feedback to each other.</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Seek Context. We ask to understand and we build connections. We do our research up front to move faster down the road.</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Act Boldly. We innovate daily to solve problems, improve processes, and find new opportunities for our members and customers.</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Deliver Results. We reward impact above output. We set a high bar, we’re not afraid to fail, and we take pride in our work.</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Succeed Together. We prioritize Omada’s progress above team or individual. We have fun as we get stuff done, and we celebrate together.&nbsp;</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Remember Why We’re Here. We push through the challenges of changing health care because we know the destination is worth it.</span></li> </ul> <p>About Omada Health: Omada Health (Nasdaq: OMDA) is reverse engineering the way healthcare is delivered in America, putting the space between doctor visits–where health is won or lost–at the center of care. Today's healthcare system poorly serves chronic conditions that require ongoing support outside of the exam room, like obesity, diabetes, hypertension, cholesterol, and musculoskeletal conditions. Omada’s virtual-first model combines human-led care teams, connected devices, and AI-enabled technology to deliver personalized care at scale, including support for GLP-1 therapy. Omada has served more than two million members since launch across 2,000+ employers, health plans, pharmacy benefit managers, and health systems. Learn more at omadahealth.com.</p> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Omada is thrilled to share that we’ve been certified as a Great Place to Work! Please&nbsp;<a href="https://www.greatplacetowork.com/certified-company/7022924">click here</a> for more information.</span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">We carefully hire the best talent we can find, which means actively seeking diversity of beliefs, backgrounds, education, and ways of thinking. We strive to build an inclusive culture where differences are celebrated and leveraged to inform better design and business decisions. Omada is proud to be an equal opportunity workplace and affirmative action employer. We are committed to equal opportunity regardless of race, color, religion, sex, gender identity, national origin, ancestry, citizenship, age, physical or mental disability, legally protected medical condition, family care status, military or veteran status, marital status, domestic partner status, sexual orientation, or any other basis protected by local, state, or federal laws.</span></p> <p>Below is a summary of salary ranges for this role in the following geographies:</p> <p>California, New York State and Washington State Base Compensation Ranges: $142,600 - $178,300*, Colorado Base Compensation Ranges: $136,400 - $170,500*. Other states may vary.</p> <p>This role is also eligible for participation in annual cash bonus and equity grants.&nbsp;</p> <p>*The actual offer, including the compensation package, is determined based on multiple factors, such as the candidate's skills and experience, and other business considerations.</p> <p>Please&nbsp;<a href="https://www.omadahealth.com/applicant-specific-notice">click here </a>for more information on our Candidate Privacy Notice.</p>

title: Forward Deployed Engineer
full_description: <p>Canopy Connect is building the infrastructure that powers best-in-class insurance experiences. We empower consumers to gain value and convenience from their own data, and we enable businesses to securely and quickly support their customers.</p> <p>We're growing quickly and are scaling up. As&nbsp;<strong>Forward Deployed Engineer, </strong>you'll ensure that Canopy Connect’s API customers launch with our product quickly and successfully. This position requires strong technical and communication skills. You will work with companies that range from small startups to large technology unicorns.&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>Responsibilities</strong></p> <ul> <li>Lead end-to-end API onboarding and implementation for new customers, guiding technical teams through setup, testing, and go-live.</li> <li>Serve as primary post-sale contact for strategic enterprise accounts, managing cross-functional relationships across product, engineering, and executive teams.</li> <li>Act as an internal advocate for customer needs, providing structured feedback to product and engineering to inform roadmap priorities.</li> <li>Analyze usage data to identify expansion opportunities and ensure customers realize measurable value from Canopy Connect’s platform.</li> <li>Support contract renewals and growth initiatives in partnership with Sales, Engineering and Leadership.</li> </ul> <p><strong>About you</strong></p> <ul> <li>3-5 years of software engineering experience, preferably with&nbsp;our tech stack: <ul> <li>Node.js + Express</li> <li>React + TailwindCSS + Next.js + React Aria</li> <li>PostgreSQL</li> <li>Design skills in Figma, Adobe XD, Photoshop or similar</li> <li>Amazon Web Services</li> </ul> </li> <li>Proven success managing large or strategic enterprise accounts with complex integration needs.</li> <li>Demonstrated ability to design and operationalize customer success processes in early-stage or scaling organizations.</li> <li>Strong technical acumen and ability to troubleshoot issues related to APIs, data integrations, and authentication workflows.</li> <li>Excellent communication skills with the ability to translate technical concepts for non-technical stakeholders.</li> <li>Experience collaborating closely with engineering and product teams to deliver customer-driven solutions.</li> <li>Understanding of UX principles, workflow optimization, and data security protocols</li> </ul> <p>Please note that we are only accepting candidates who are authorized to work in the United States or Canada.</p> <p>The expected base salary range for this position is: $125k - $150k depending on experience and skills. We may go above this range commensurate with experience.</p><div class="content-conclusion"><hr> <p><strong>Our Benefits</strong></p> <ul> <li><strong>Healthcare</strong>: We offer company-sponsored health, dental and vision insurance for employees and dependents.</li> <li><strong>Equity</strong>: We are a team of owners and we provide our team with generous equity grants.</li> <li><strong>Time to Recharge</strong>: We offer unlimited paid time off. Unplug, recharge, and come back refreshed.</li> <li><strong>Remote Friendly</strong>: We are a fully distributed team. We all work remotely. We offer a $1,000 stipend to equip you with a home office that is comfortable and personalized to your needs.</li> <li><strong>Friday Reimbursed Lunch</strong>: Order lunch on Fridays, and we'll cover it!</li> <li><strong>401K</strong>: We offer a 3.5% match.&nbsp;</li> </ul> <p><strong>Our Core Values</strong></p> <ul> <li><strong>Be Worthy of Trust | </strong>We are building critical infrastructure that processes sensitive data. We earn trust every day by being transparent, honest and clear to all stakeholders.</li> <li><strong>Find a Way |</strong> We seize opportunities and iterate quickly. We refuse to get blocked. We are relentlessly optimistic about possibilities. Tenacious and creative, we find a way.</li> <li><strong>Own It | </strong>We are owners of the product and the company, and we own our successes as well as our failures. We value people who embody extreme ownership.</li> <li><strong>Think “We” Not “I” | </strong>We prioritize the success of the team over individual contributions. The best decisions are made through triangulating the opinions of the team. Productive disagreement leads to good decisions. We don’t tolerate brilliant jerks.</li> <li><strong>Raise the Bar</strong> <strong>|</strong> Our standard is to be the best in the world at what we do. We redefine excellence each day.</li> </ul> <hr> <p>To protect the interests of all parties, Canopy Connect will not accept unsolicited resumes from any source other than directly from a candidate. Any unsolicited resumes sent to Canopy Connect will be considered Canopy Connect property. Canopy Connect will not pay a fee for any placement resulting from the receipt of an unsolicited resume. Canopy Connect will consider any candidate for whom an Agency has submitted an unsolicited resume to have been referred by the Agency free of any charges or fees.</p> <p>&nbsp;</p></div>

title: Forward Deployed Engineer, Data & Analytics
location: Atlanta; Boston; Charlotte; Chicago; Dallas; Los Angeles; New York; San Francisco
full_description: <h3><strong>Company Overview</strong></h3> <p>We are the better way to work in finance. As private equity’s value creation partner, we sit at the heart of PE—where sponsors and CFOs meet. Through financial consulting rooted in data, technology, and AI, we help clients drive value—supporting the office of the CFO to drive end-to-end value creation.</p> <p>If you crave challenging work and are looking to&nbsp;grow, come solve&nbsp;complex&nbsp;issues alongside&nbsp;1,600+ finance &amp; technology experts in&nbsp;a supportive, collaborative&nbsp;environment.&nbsp;</p> <p>Backed&nbsp;by premier private equity firms and headquartered&nbsp;in New York with 11&nbsp;offices&nbsp;around&nbsp;the&nbsp;globe, we are a high-growth, entrepreneurial firm&nbsp;looking&nbsp;for&nbsp;people&nbsp;who&nbsp;want&nbsp;to be part of building&nbsp;something&nbsp;great. Come make your mark.&nbsp;</p> <h3><strong>Data &amp; Analytics</strong></h3> <p>Accordion's Data &amp; Analytics and Engineering team offers cutting-edge, intelligent solutions to a global clientele, leveraging a blend of domain knowledge, sophisticated technology tools, and deep analytics capabilities to tackle complex business challenges.</p> <p>We partner with Private Equity clients and their Portfolio Companies across diverse sectors, including Retail, CPG, Healthcare, Media &amp; Entertainment, Technology, and Logistics.</p> <p>We deliver agentic workflows, and solutions designed to streamline processes and enhance business insights across vast and complex data sets ranging from Sales, Operations, Marketing, Pricing, Customer Strategies, and more.</p> <p>This role can be based in any of our US office locations and has the potential for client travel to be onsite. Ideal candidates should be local to the desired location.</p> <p>This position is not eligible for immigration sponsorship.</p> <h3><strong>About the Role and You</strong></h3> <p>We're looking for a rare combination: a data scientist who thinks like a strategist and a strategist who speaks fluent data. You fall in love with problems and quantify complex situations using math. This isn't a role in building models in isolation—it's about transforming how a business makes decisions, identifying opportunities, and driving growth. You'll be an equal parts analyst, advisor, and architect of our strategic direction.</p> <h3><strong>What You’ll Do</strong></h3> <p>You'll sit at the intersection of data and strategy, turning complex business challenges into quantifiable opportunities. This means diving deep into our numbers to surface insights that others miss, then translating those insights into actionable growth strategies. You'll work directly with leadership to shape major business decisions, from market expansion and pricing strategy to resource allocation and competitive positioning.</p> <p>Your day-to-day will involve identifying the right questions to ask before anyone else thinks of asking them, building the analytical frameworks to answer those questions, and presenting recommendations that fundamentally shift how we operate. You'll own strategic initiatives from conception through execution, measuring impact and iterating as you go. You’ll travel to client sites as needed, leading AI assessment and Strategy Engagements.</p> <h3><strong>What We're Looking For</strong></h3> <p><strong>The Strategic Mindset:</strong> You naturally think several moves ahead. You understand business models, competitive dynamics, and growth levers. You can walk into a room with executives and hold your own in discussions about market strategy, unit economics, and long-term planning. You've seen how businesses succeed and fail, and you know how to spot the difference.</p> <p><strong>The Technical Depth:</strong> You're genuinely strong in quantitative methods—statistics, predictive modeling, optimization, and experimental design. You can wrangle messy data, build robust analyses, and know when a sophisticated model is needed versus when a simple calculation will do. Python, R, and SQL are still in your wheelhouse.</p> <p><strong>The Translation Layer: </strong>You can explain complex analytical concepts to non-technical stakeholders without dumbing them down. You know how to build conviction around data-driven recommendations and can defend your methodology when challenged. You make the quantitative accessible and actionable.</p> <p><strong>The Business Acumen:</strong> You understand P&amp;Ls, growth metrics, customer economics, and operational levers. You've worked closely enough with business teams to know what keeps them up at night and how your analyses can help them sleep better.</p> <h3><strong>Requirements</strong></h3> <ul> <li>5+ years of experience in data science, engineering or data engineering roles with increasing strategic responsibility</li> <li>Strong foundation in data platforms, data science, statistics, machine learning, and quantitative analysis</li> <li>Additional considering will be given to engineers who have a background in data but have yet to work deeply with LLM enabled workflows</li> <li>Experience working directly with business leaders to convey options and tradeoffs to define solution design and scope.</li> <li>Demonstrated experience influencing business strategy through data</li> <li>Track record of identifying and driving growth opportunities</li> <li>Excellent communication skills with technical and executive audiences</li> <li>Proficiency in modern data science tools and languages</li> <li>Understanding of business finance and growth frameworks</li> </ul> <h3><strong>Ideal Background</strong></h3> <p>You might come from management consulting or technical consulting with deep analytical chops, a curiosity for working on business problems, strategic roles at high-growth companies, corporate strategy teams with hands-on data work, or data science roles where you've grown into strategic advisory. What matters most is that you've successfully used data to change how businesses operate and grow.</p> <h3><strong>What Success Looks Like</strong></h3> <p>In your first year, you'll have identified three major strategic opportunities we weren't seeing before, built the analytical infrastructure to evaluate them rigorously, and driven at least one to implementation with measurable business impact. You'll have become a trusted advisor to leadership and the person they turn to when facing the company's thorniest strategic questions.</p> <p>The annual salary for this role ranges from: $145,000 to $195,000 USD + benefits + bonus + <em>overtime eligible (only added for applicable roles</em>) -remove this if not an overtime eligible role. Actual compensation packages are determined by evaluating a wide array of factors unique to each candidate, including but not limited to geographic location, skill set, years and depth of experience, education, certifications, cost of labor and internal equity.</p> <p>Accordion is an Equal Opportunity Employer. We are committed to building a team that represents a variety of backgrounds, perspectives, and skills.&nbsp; We do not discriminate on the basis of race, color, religion, marital status, age, national origin, ancestry, physical or mental disability, medical​​​ condition, pregnancy, genetic information, gender, sexual orientation, gender identity or ​expression, veteran status, or any other status protected under federal, state, or local law.</p> <p>Please note that as per Accordion policy, we do not accept unsolicited resumes from third-party recruiters unless such recruiters are engaged to provide candidates for a specified opening and in alignment with our inclusive diversity values. Any employment agency, person or entity that submits an unsolicited resume does so with the understanding that Accordion will have the right to hire that applicant at its discretion without any fee owed to the submitting employment agency, person or entity.</p> <p><span style="color: rgb(255, 255, 255);">#LI-NG1</span></p>

title: Senior Data Engineer
full_description: <div class="content-intro"><p><strong>We Breathe Life Into Data</strong></p> <p><span style="font-weight: 400;">At Komodo Health, our mission is to reduce the global burden of disease. And we believe that smarter use of data is essential to this mission. That’s why we built the <a href="https://www.komodohealth.com/technology/healthcare-map?hsLang=en" target="_blank">Healthcare Map</a> — the industry’s largest, most complete, precise view of the U.S. healthcare system — by combining de-identified, real-world patient data with innovative algorithms and decades of clinical experience. The Healthcare Map serves as our foundation for a powerful suite of software applications, helping us answer healthcare’s most complex questions for our partners. Across the healthcare ecosystem, we’re helping our clients unlock critical insights to track detailed patient behaviors and treatment patterns, identify gaps in care, address unmet patient needs, and reduce the global burden of disease.&nbsp;</span></p> <p><span style="font-weight: 400;">As we pursue these goals, it remains essential to us that we stay grounded in our values: be awesome, seek growth, deliver “wow,” and enjoy the ride. At Komodo, you will be joining a team of ambitious, supportive Dragons with diverse backgrounds but a shared passion to deliver on our mission to reduce the burden of disease —&nbsp;and enjoy the journey along the way. </span></p></div><p><strong>The Opportunity at Komodo Health</strong></p> <p>Join Komodo Health's Knowledge &amp; Information team and play a critical role in shaping the core data products that fuel our Healthcare Map. This role is essential for transforming massive, complex healthcare datasets into performant, trustworthy, and usable data assets that directly power both customer-facing applications and internal product innovation. By building and scaling our foundational data systems, you will directly enable the transparency and efficiency required to drive better health outcomes across the industry.</p> <p><strong>Mission</strong></p> <p>The Senior Data Engineer will design, build, operate, and improve large-scale data pipelines and foundational data products that power Komodo’s Healthcare Map, analytics products, and downstream AI/ML-enabled use cases. This is a hands-on engineering role focused on processing complex healthcare data at scale, improving reliability and performance, and contributing to the technical direction of core data systems.</p> <p><strong>Looking back on your first 12 months at Komodo Health, you will have…</strong></p> <ul> <li><strong>Architectural Advancement:</strong> Deliver high-impact technical initiatives that improve pipeline performance, scalability, and system efficiency.</li> <li><strong>Platform Hardening:</strong> Improve the reliability, observability, and cost-efficiency of core Data Foundations systems.</li> <li><strong>Cross-Functional Delivery:</strong> Partner with Data Product and Engineering teams to ship scalable, production-grade data solutions.</li> </ul> <p><strong>You will accomplish these outcomes through the following responsibilities…</strong></p> <ul> <li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">Build, operate, and optimize large-scale production data pipelines using Python, SQL, Airflow, cloud infrastructure, and distributed processing frameworks — including robust data quality checks, validation, lineage, observability, monitoring, and alerting.</li> <li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">Design and scale agentic data acquisition and extraction systems for complex, unstructured public data sources; develop LLM-powered Human-in-the-Loop (HITL) pipelines for data extraction and curation.</li> <li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">Transform healthcare claims, EHR, non-claims-based, and reference datasets into trusted, performant Healthcare Map data products and serving-ready data assets.</li> <li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">Contribute to system design, architecture, code quality, testing, documentation, CI/CD, and rotational production support — including debugging complex data, system, and performance issues across computationally intensive workflows.</li> <li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">Partner with Data Product Quality, Product, Platform, and Engineering teams to translate healthcare data needs into scalable technical solutions that enable downstream analytics, product, and AI/ML use cases.</li> </ul> <p><strong>What you bring to Komodo Health:</strong></p> <ul> <li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">Strong hands-on experience building, operating, and debugging production-grade data pipelines at scale in AWS, with sharp instincts for data quality, reliability, root-cause analysis, and production troubleshooting.</li> <li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">Advanced Python and SQL skills; experience with Airflow or similar orchestration tools and Spark or comparable distributed processing frameworks.</li> <li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">Ability to communicate technical trade-offs clearly and collaborate across engineering, product, and data teams.</li> <li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">Comfort using AI-assisted engineering tools for productivity, debugging, documentation, and technical exploration.</li> </ul> <p><strong>AI-Augmented Engineering Expectations:</strong></p> <ul> <li>You will be expected to leverage AI-augmented engineering tools, such as ChatGPT, Gemini, or Claude, to improve productivity and technical decision-making. This may include using AI to generate and refine code, accelerate documentation, automate test case creation, debug complex issues, explore unfamiliar technical concepts, and assess architectural trade-offs and risks.</li> </ul> <p><strong>Additional skills and experience we’d prioritize (nice to have)…</strong></p> <ul> <li>Healthcare data experience is a plus, but not required.</li> <li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">Ability to optimize high-scale data architectures for performance, cost, versioning, and large-volume productization; experience applying AI or agentic workflows to engineering, data quality, delivery, or operations.</li> <li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2">Proven success in high-growth or ambiguous environments that require balancing architecture, speed, and quality.</li> </ul> <p><span style="font-weight: 400;">#LIRemote</span></p> <p><span style="font-weight: 400;">Open to NYC/SF Hybrid or Remote</span></p><div class="content-pay-transparency"><div class="pay-input"><div class="description"><p>The pay range for each job posting reflects a minimum and maximum range of annual base pay that we reasonably expect to pay for this position within the US. We carefully consider multiple business-related factors when determining compensation, including job-related skills, work experience, geographic work location, relevant training and certifications, business needs and market demands.</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p>The starting annual base pay for this role is listed below. This position may be eligible for performance-based bonuses as determined in the Company’s sole discretion and in accordance with a written agreement or plan. This role may also be eligible for equity awards. In addition, this role is eligible for benefits including, but not limited to, comprehensive health, dental, and vision insurance; flexible time off and holidays; 401(k) with company match; disability insurance and life insurance; and leaves of absence in accordance with applicable state and local laws and regulations and company policy.&nbsp;</p></div><div class="title">San Francisco Bay Area and New York City:</div><div class="pay-range"><span>$207,000</span><span class="divider">&mdash;</span><span>$238,000 USD</span></div></div><div class="pay-input"><div class="title">All Other US Locations: </div><div class="pay-range"><span>$180,000</span><span class="divider">&mdash;</span><span>$207,000 USD</span></div></div></div><div class="content-conclusion"><p data-start="513" data-end="581"><strong>Komodo's AI Standard<br></strong></p> <p data-sourcepos="9:1-9:347">At Komodo, we're not just witnessing the AI revolution – we're leading it. This is a pivotal moment in time, where being first to market with AI transforms industries and sets the bar. We've already established industry leadership in leveraging AI to revolutionize healthcare, and we expect every team member to contribute.&nbsp;AI here isn't optional; it's foundational. We expect you to integrate AI into your daily work – from summarizing documents to automating workflows and uncovering insights. This isn't just about efficiency; it's about making every moment more meaningful, building on trust in AI, and driving our collective success.</p> <p><strong><em>Join us in shaping the future of healthcare intelligence.</em><br><br>Where You’ll Work</strong></p> <p>Komodo Health has a hybrid work model with hubs in San Francisco, New York City, and Chicago. Roles vary — some can be performed from anywhere in the country, others are scoped to a specific region, and some are based near one of our hubs. For hub-based Dragons, we're building intentional in-office rhythms alongside the flexibility that's core to how we work. Whatever your setup, expectations will always be clear before you join.</p> <p><strong>Equal Opportunity Statement</strong></p> <p><span style="font-weight: 400;">Komodo Health provides equal employment opportunities to all applicants and employees. We prohibit discrimination and harassment of any type with regard to race, color, religion, age, sex, national origin, disability status, genetics, protected veteran status, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, or any other characteristic protected by federal, state, or local laws.&nbsp;</span></p> <p data-start="279" data-end="506">By submitting your application, you acknowledge that you have read and understand Komodo Health’s&nbsp;<a class="decorated-link" href="https://www.komodohealth.com/privacy-notice-for-employees-and-contractors/" target="_new" data-start="381" data-end="503">Privacy Notice for Employees and Contractors</a>.</p> <p data-start="513" data-end="581"><em>This notice explains how we collect, use, and retain applicant data.</em></p></div>
