You'll contribute to both the underlying platform and the way data is used in our products, working in a modern, cloud native environment where privacy, security, and good data practices are part of how we build.</p> <p style="text-align: center;"><span style="color: rgb(126, 140, 141); font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif;"><em>What you’ll bring to the role</em></span></p> <ul> <li>Technical Expertise: 3+ years building and shipping production grade data systems, with strong SQL skills and proficiency in Python or another object-oriented language (Java, Scala etc.)</li> <li>Familiarity with cloud-native infrastructure - ideally some exposure to Terraform, Kubernetes, or similar IaC and container orchestration tools. We don't expect deep expertise in all of these, but comfort working in this kind of environment matters.</li> <li>Experience designing data APIs or services that expose data to applications, or a strong interest in working across the analytical/operational boundary.</li> <li>A thoughtful approach to data quality, privacy, and security - you understand that how data is used is as important as how it's moved.</li> <li>Strong collaboration skills and comfort working across teams with different priorities — engineers, data scientists, AI engineers, product.</li> <li>A pragmatic, curious mindset - you enjoy keeping up with the field and know when to reach for a new tool versus when to stick with what works.</li> <li>Pipeline Management: Hands on experience with data pipeline tools (Airflow, dbt) and strong ability to optimise for performance and reliability.</li> <li>Quality Focus: Commitment to continuously improving product quality, security, and performance through rigorous testing and code reviews.</li> <li>Documentation: Meticulous approach to creating and maintaining architecture and systems documentation.</li> <li>Collaborative Mindset: Ability to work across teams to understand and address diverse data needs while maintaining data integrity.</li> <li>Growth Orientation: Desire to continually keep up with advancements in data engineering practices and technologies.</li> <li>Problem-Solving: Exceptional analytical skills to troubleshoot complex data issues and implement effective solutions.</li> <li>Independence: Capability to ship medium features independently while contributing to the team's overall objectives.</li> </ul> <p style="text-align: center;"><span style="font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif;"><em><span style="color: rgb(126, 140, 141);">What you’ll be doing in the role</span>&nbsp;</em></span></p> <ul> <li>Build and maintain data pipelines that power analytics, ML workloads, and product-facing applications - from internal databases, SaaS sources, and streaming systems through to the teams and services that consume them.</li> <li>Evolve our data platform alongside cloud platform engineers, using infrastructure-as-code (Terraform) and Kubernetes-based deployments (Argo) to keep the platform scalable, reliable, and self-serve.</li> <li>System Architecture: Design and implement scalable data infrastructure that accommodates our growing data volume and complexity.</li> <li>Develop data services and APIs that expose trusted data to product applications, bridging analytical and operational systems.</li> <li>Own data quality and observability, putting monitoring, testing, and alerting in place so issues are caught early and trust in the data stays high.</li> <li>Partner with AI engineers, data scientists, analysts, and product teams to understand their data needs and design the right solutions – not just the quickest ones.</li> <li>Uphold strong data privacy, security, and compliance practices in everything you build, particularly where data flows into product-facing contexts.</li> <li>Technical Documentation: Create and maintain comprehensive documentation of data flows, models, and systems for knowledge sharing.</li> <li>Security and Compliance: Ensure all data systems adhere to security best practices and compliance requirements.</li> </ul> <p style="text-align: center;"><span style="color: rgb(126, 140, 141); font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif;"><em>Why Prolific is a great place to work</em></span></p> <p><span style="font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif;">We've built a unique platform that connects researchers and companies with a global pool of participants, enabling the collection of high-quality, ethically sourced human behavioral data and feedback. This data is the cornerstone of developing more accurate, nuanced, and aligned AI systems.</span></p> <p><span style="font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif;">We believe that the next leap in AI capabilities won't come solely from scaling existing models, but from integrating diverse human perspectives and behaviors into AI development. By providing this crucial human data infrastructure, Prolific is positioning itself at the forefront of the next wave of AI innovation – one that reflects the breath and the best of humanity.</span></p> <p><span style="font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif;">Working for us will place you at the forefront of AI innovation, providing access to our unique human data platform and opportunities for groundbreaking research. Join us to enjoy a competitive salary, benefits, and remote working within our impactful, mission-driven culture.</span></p> <p style="text-align: center;"><span style="color: rgb(126, 140, 141); font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif;"><em>Links to more information on Prolific</em></span></p> <p style="text-align: center;"><span style="font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif;"><a href="https://www.notion.so/prolific/dbc97f2b3ff24f1bb6fa834a2c9c3283?v=4f874e88e46a4f54afd8bf62f1db19ed&amp;p=9f2c1de05dfa43338d48c20362bfead1&amp;pm=c">Benefits&nbsp;</a></span></p> <p style="text-align: center;"><span style="font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif;"><a href="https://www.notion.so/prolific/dbc97f2b3ff24f1bb6fa834a2c9c3283?v=4f874e88e46a4f54afd8bf62f1db19ed">External Handbook</a>&nbsp;</span></p> <p style="text-align: center;"><span style="font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif;"><a href="https://www.prolific.com/">Website&nbsp;</a></span></p> <p style="text-align: center;"><span style="font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif;"><a href="https://www.youtube.com/@JoinProlific">Youtube</a>&nbsp;</span></p> <p style="text-align: center;"><span style="color: rgb(126, 140, 141); font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif;"><em>Privacy Statement</em></span></p> <p><span style="font-family: tahoma, arial, helvetica, sans-serif;">By submitting your application, you agree that Prolific may collect your personal data for recruiting and global organisation planning. Prolific's <a href="https://www.notion.so/prolific/Policy-Privacy-Notice-for-Candidates-f94a136a67544388b4888bc436451b57">Candidate Privacy Notice</a> explains what personal information Prolific may process, where Prolific may process your personal information, its purposes for processing your personal information, and the rights you can exercise over Prolific use of your personal information.</span></p>

title: Senior Data Engineer - Managed Services
full_description: <div class="content-intro"><p>Are you looking for a role that motivates and challenges you? Are you ready for an opportunity for growth? Do you want to work on teams where people roll up their sleeves to take on tough problems together, and regularly blow the doors off our clients with their outstanding teamwork? If you answered yes to those questions, 3Cloud might just be for you!</p> <p>At 3Cloud, we hire people who aren’t afraid to experiment or fail. We hire people who are willing to give direct and candid feedback to their managers, leaders, and team members. We hire people who jump at those opportunities because they care about our collective growth and success. We hire people who challenge and hold each other accountable for living 3Cloud’s core values because they know that it will result in amazing experiences and solutions for our clients and each other.</p></div><p>Senior Data Engineer - Managed Services<br>Responsibilities<br>• Support of client’s Azure Data platform and Power BI Environment, including response to any escalations while helping to analyze and resolve incidents for customers environment<br>• Consult, develop and advise on solutions in Microsoft Azure with tools such as SSIS, SSRS, SSAS, Synapse, Data Factory, Databricks, Data Lake, Data Warehouse<br>• Consult, develop, and advise on Power BI, including report development and modeling<br>• Consistently learn, apply, and refine skills around data engineering and data analytics<br>• Design and deploy data pipelines, models, and data driven solutions for clients in various industries<br>• Understand and work with customer on licensing involving Microsoft data solutions, and understand the limits/advantages of each licensing platform<br>• Preparing Data Analytic solutions for customers including importing data from multiple sources, performant star schema data models to be ingested via Power BI, and report and dashboard development.<br>• Communicate ticket status information to all associated parties and escalate cases as appropriate<br>• Interact with clients to identify issues, troubleshoot expediently, and follow up on issues via e-mail, ticketing system, and phone calls. Communicate technical issues and solutions with clients in business terms<br>• Configure, administer, tune and develop client’s data environment based on contracted services<br>• Create and maintain updated documentation for each client’s environment<br>• Promote best practices for clients and internally to enhance and improve organizational processes<br>• Participate in recurring discussions with clients to review current issues and to propose possible solutions<br>• Collaborate with team members and client stakeholders to ensure our solutions align to our client’s needs</p> <p>Requirements</p> <ul> <li>Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Mathematics, or related field, or equivalent certification</li> <li>Experience working in a support role and understanding standard support processes (i.e. ITIL)</li> <li>5+ years architecting, implementing, and supporting solutions on the Microsoft Azure and Fabric tool stacks for Data &amp; AI (ADF, SQL DW, Azure Synapse, Azure Databricks, Microsoft Fabric Data Engineering, Microsoft Power BI)</li> <li>Strong proficiency in Enterprise Data Warehousing, Semantic Models, Data Lake Architecture, and Metadata-driven ETL processes is required</li> <li>Working familiarity with DevOps/ DataOps, for example experience delivering work using git-based source control and automated deployment pipelines is preferred</li> <li>Working familiarity with AI/ Machine learning use cases on the Microsoft tool stacks for Data &amp; AI is a plus</li> <li>Strong verbal and written communication skills</li> <li>A passion for problem solving and learning new technologies</li> <li>Client relationship skills and experience managing vendors</li> <li>Ability to work in a fast paced, rapidly changing environment</li> <li>Strong desire for personal development and learning, including commitment to continuously upgrading your technical skills as the data landscape change</li> <li>Work remote, but not alone – with a team filled top to bottom with data analytics professionals</li> </ul> <p><br><br>Don’t meet every single requirement? At 3Cloud we are dedicated to building a diverse, inclusive and authentic workplace, so if you’re excited about this role but your experience doesn’t align perfectly with every qualification in the job description, we encourage you to apply anyway.<br>At this time, we cannot sponsor applicants for work visas.</p> <p><strong>This Job Posting will expire on July 13th, 2026.</strong></p> <p>&nbsp;</p><div class="content-pay-transparency"><div class="pay-input"><div class="description"><hr> <p><strong>3Cloud Total Rewards Highlights Include:</strong> &nbsp;</p> <ul> <li>Flexible work location with a virtual first approach to work! </li> <li>401(K) with match up to 50% of your 6% contributions of eligible pay </li> <li>Generous PTO providing a minimum of 15 days in addition to 9 paid company holidays and 2 floating personal days &nbsp;</li> <li>Two medical plan options to allow you the choice to elect what works best for you!</li> <li>Option for vision and dental coverage </li> <li>100% employer paid coverage for life and disability insurance</li> <li>Paid leave for birth parents and non-birth parents </li> <li>Option for Healthcare FSA, HSA, and Dependent Care FSA</li> <li>$67.00 monthly tech and home office allowance</li> <li>Utilization and/or discretionary bonus eligibility based on role </li> <li>Employee Assistance Program to help with everyday challenges</li> </ul> <p>3Cloud offers competitive compensation. In addition to base pay employees are eligible to receive an annual discretionary/utilization bonus. If you are hired at 3Cloud your final base salary is based on factors such as skills, education, experience and/or geographic location. Please keep in mind that the range mentioned above includes the full base salary range for the role. It is not typical for offers to be made at or near the top of the range.</p></div><div class="title">Base Salary Range</div><div class="pay-range"><span>$96,500</span><span class="divider">&mdash;</span><span>$144,800 USD</span></div></div></div><div class="content-conclusion"><p>Don’t meet every single requirement?&nbsp;At 3Cloud we are dedicated to building a diverse, inclusive and authentic workplace, so if you’re excited about this role but your past experience doesn’t align perfectly with every qualification in the job description, we encourage you to apply anyway.</p> <p><strong>At this time, we cannot sponsor applicants for work visas.</strong></p></div>

title: Senior Data Engineer
full_description: <div class="content-intro"><p><strong>Welcome to Planet. We believe in using space to help life on Earth.</strong></p> <p>Planet designs, builds, and operates the largest constellation of imaging satellites in history. This constellation delivers an unprecedented dataset of empirical information via a revolutionary cloud-based platform to authoritative figures in commercial, environmental, and humanitarian sectors. We are both a space company and data company all rolled into one.</p> <p>Customers and users across the globe use Planet's data to develop new technologies, drive revenue, power research, and solve our world’s toughest obstacles.</p> <p>As we control every component of hardware design, manufacturing, data processing, and software engineering, our office is a truly inspiring mix of experts from a variety of domains.</p> <p>We have a people-centric approach toward culture and community and we strive to iterate in a way that puts our team members first and prepares our company for growth. Join Planet and be a part of our mission to change the way people see the world.</p> <p>Planet is a global company with employees working remotely world wide and joining us from offices in San Francisco, Washington DC, Germany, Austria, Slovenia, and The Netherlands.</p></div><p><strong>About the Role:</strong></p> <p>As a Senior Data Engineer (DE) at Planet, you will own, architect and build production, enterprise-scale data ecosystems using modern cloud technologies, to power mission-critical, customer-facing products. You will act as a strategic partner to cross-functional stakeholders, translating complex requirements into robust, scalable solutions. You will build and design data solutions end to end: from high-level architecture and implementation to CI/CD, orchestration automated QA, and seamless integration into production systems. You’ll be a senior member of the Data Team within the Software Engineering organization, which is made up of data scientists, engineers and analysts working on similar tasks across Planet domains.&nbsp;</p> <p>Your scope will focus on the architecture and evolution of data systems supporting our global monitoring products. These products are vital offerings designed to provide persistent, high-cadence monitoring and active intelligence, particularly for our Defence and Intelligence customers. You will collaborate closely with leadership across Product and Engineering to ensure some of our most sophisticated customers have the data required for global security and rapid decision-making. This role is ideal for an expert data engineer looking to lead the evolution of complex systems and deliver transformative technology to the defense sector. The ideal candidate is an independent operator who thrives in a dynamic, global environment and is deeply passionate about Planet’s mission and national security solutions.</p> <p>This is a full-time, hybrid role which will require you to work from our Washington DC or Denver CO office 3 days per week.</p> <p><strong>Impact You'll Own:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Architect and oversee robust, high-availability data pipelines while establishing the standards for maintaining, troubleshooting, and optimizing existing ecosystems.</li> <li>Collaborate with global product, commercial and engineering leads and peers to design and execute a long-term data strategy for products in your scope.</li> <li>Drive high-level mentorship, technical design reviews, and architectural integrity across the Data Team while setting standards for code quality.</li> </ul> <p><strong>What You Bring:</strong></p> <ul> <li>10+ years of relevant experience in data engineering with a track record of technical leadership.</li> <li>Bachelor’s degree in a relevant field.</li> <li>Expertise in designing and implementing end-to-end data architectures for global-scale, customer-facing solutions, with a focus on data integrity and efficiency.</li> <li>Expert-level proficiency in Python and SQL for complex ETL/ELT pipeline construction, including event-driven data architectures.</li> <li>Proactive, self-starter mindset with the ability to lead problem-solving initiatives in a dynamic, high-stakes environment.</li> <li>Exceptional communication skills, with the ability to translate between technical execution and high-level business requirements.</li> <li>Deep experience in maintaining enterprise-grade, peer-reviewed codebases and advanced CI/CD workflows using GitLab CI, Docker, and Kubernetes.</li> <li>Significant experience with cloud-native architectures (GCP preferred).</li> <li>Experience tuning storage formats such as Parquet to ensure sub-second query performance for consumers.</li> </ul> <p><strong>What Makes You Stand Out:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Experience using modern data tooling (e.g. dbt) for pipeline inputs to customer-facing production systems.</li> <li>Experience leveraging Infrastructure as Code tooling (e.g. Terraform) to manage cloud architecture.</li> <li>Experience architecting solutions for geospatial datasets.</li> <li>Knowledge of earth observation and/or satellite operation concepts.</li> </ul> <p><strong>Application Deadline:</strong></p> <p>October 1, 2026 by 11:59p / 23:59 CET (Central European Time)</p> <p><strong>EAR/ITAR Requirements:</strong></p> <p><em>This position requires access to export-controlled information, and as such, employment (or hiring of a contractor) is contingent upon the candidate’s ability to access all applicable export-controlled information without additional export licensing being required by the Bureau of Industry and Security and/or the Directorate of Defense Trade Controls.</em></p> <p><strong>Benefits While Working at Planet:</strong></p> <p><em>These offerings are dependent on employment type and geographical location, based upon applicable law or company policy.</em></p> <ul> <li>Comprehensive Medical, Dental, and Vision plans</li> <li>Health Savings Account (HSA) with a company contribution</li> <li>Generous Paid Time Off in addition to holidays and company-wide days off&nbsp;</li> <li>16 Weeks of Paid Parental Leave</li> <li>Wellness Program and Employee Assistance Program (EAP)</li> <li>Home Office Reimbursement</li> <li>Monthly Phone and Internet Reimbursement</li> <li>Tuition Reimbursement and access to LinkedIn Learning</li> <li>Equity</li> <li>Commuter Benefits (if local to an office)</li> <li>Volunteering Paid Time Off</li> </ul> <p><strong>Compensation:</strong></p> <p>The US base salary range for this full-time position at the commencement of employment is listed below. Additionally, this role might be eligible for discretionary short-term and long-term incentives (bonus and equity). The final salary range is determined by job related experience, skills and location. The range displays our typical hiring range for new hire salaries in US locations only. Your recruiter can share more about the specific salary range for your preferred location during the hiring process.</p><div class="content-pay-transparency"><div class="pay-input"><div class="title">New York City + California Salary Range</div><div class="pay-range"><span>$172,200</span><span class="divider">&mdash;</span><span>$215,200 USD</span></div></div><div class="pay-input"><div class="title">San Francisco Salary Range</div><div class="pay-range"><span>$182,900</span><span class="divider">&mdash;</span><span>$228,600 USD</span></div></div><div class="pay-input"><div class="title">US National Salary Range</div><div class="pay-range"><span>$160,600</span><span class="divider">&mdash;</span><span>$200,800 USD</span></div></div><div class="pay-input"><div class="title">US National Salary Range</div><div class="pay-range"><span>$160,600</span><span class="divider">&mdash;</span><span>$200,800 USD</span></div></div></div><div class="content-conclusion"><p><strong>San Francisco Fair Chance Ordinance<br></strong>Pursuant to the San Francisco Fair Chance Ordinance, we will consider for employment qualified applicants with arrest and conviction records.<strong><br></strong></p> <p><strong>Why we care so much about Belonging.&nbsp;<br></strong>We’re dedicated to helping the whole Planet, and to do that we must strive to represent all of it within each of our offices and on all of our teams. That’s why Planet is guided by an ultimate north star of Belonging—dreaming big as we approach our ongoing work.&nbsp; If this job intrigues you, but you’re thinking you might not have all the qualifications, please... do apply!&nbsp; At Planet, we are looking for well-rounded people from around the world who can contribute to more ways than just what is listed in this job description.&nbsp; We don’t just fill positions, we aspire to fulfill people’s careers, most excited about folks who are motivated by our underlying humanitarian efforts.&nbsp; We are a few orbits around the sun before we get to where we want to be, so we hope you’re excited to come along for the ride.&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>EEO statement: <br></strong>Planet is committed to building a community where everyone belongs and we invite people from all backgrounds to apply. Planet is an equal opportunity employer, and committed to providing employment opportunities regardless of race, religious creed, color, national origin, ancestry, physical disability, mental disability, medical condition, genetic information, marital status, sex, gender, gender identity, gender expression, pregnancy, childbirth and breastfeeding, age, sexual orientation, military or veteran status, or any other protected classification, in accordance with applicable federal, state, and local laws. <a href="https://www.eeoc.gov/sites/default/files/2023-06/22-088_EEOC_KnowYourRights6.12.pdf">Know Your Rights.</a></p> <p><strong>Accommodations:&nbsp;<br></strong>Planet is an inclusive community and we know that everyone has their own needs. If you have a disability or special need that requires accommodation during the hiring process, please reach out to accommodations@planet.com or contact your recruiter with your request. Your message will be confidential and we will be happy to assist you.</p> <p><strong>Privacy Policy</strong>: By clicking "Apply Now" at the top of this job posting, I acknowledge that I have read the <a href="https://www.planet.com/privacy/#california">Planet Data Privacy Notice for California Staff Members and Applicants</a>, and hereby consent to the collection, processing, use, and storage of my personal information as described therein.</p> <p><strong>Privacy Policy (European Applicants):</strong> By clicking "Apply Now" at the top of this job posting, I acknowledge that I have read the <a href="https://www.planet.com/privacy/">Candidate Privacy Notice GDPR Planet Labs Europe</a>, and hereby consent to the collection, processing, use, and storage of my personal information as described therein.</p> <p><strong>AI in Our Interviewing Process</strong>: Planet is committed to providing an exceptional interview experience for all candidates. We currently use <a href="https://www.metaview.ai/" target="_blank">Metaview</a> to better focus on candidates and less on trying to capture notes. As such, with the candidate's consent, select interviews may be recorded and include a "Planet AI Notetaker" for transcription and summarization purposes. Should an interview involve use of AI interview technologies, the candidate will receive notification and have the ability to opt out both in advance and/or real-time. Opting out will not affect one's candidacy.</p> <p><strong>Candidate AI Policy</strong>: Planet embraces Artificial Intelligence (AI) tools, and we encourage its responsible use. We understand that candidates may use various resources, including AI tools, to <em>prepare</em> for interviews and assessments. However, <em>during any live interview stage or when actively completing assessments for this position, the use of AI tools—e.g. Large Language Models (LLMs), deep fake technology, etc.—is strictly prohibited unless explicitly prompted by an interviewer or assessment instructions</em>. If you are unsure about acceptable use, please contact your recruiter for clarification. If an AI tool or similar technology is desired as an accommodation, please contact accommodations@planet.com with your request for assistance. Your message will be confidential, and we will be happy to assist you. Violation of this policy may result in disqualification of your application.</p></div>

title: Senior Forward Deployed Engineer
full_description: <div class="content-intro"><p><strong>Welcome to Planet. We believe in using space to help life on Earth.</strong></p> <p>Planet designs, builds, and operates the largest constellation of imaging satellites in history. This constellation delivers an unprecedented dataset of empirical information via a revolutionary cloud-based platform to authoritative figures in commercial, environmental, and humanitarian sectors. We are both a space company and data company all rolled into one.</p> <p>Customers and users across the globe use Planet's data to develop new technologies, drive revenue, power research, and solve our world’s toughest obstacles.</p> <p>As we control every component of hardware design, manufacturing, data processing, and software engineering, our office is a truly inspiring mix of experts from a variety of domains.</p> <p>We have a people-centric approach toward culture and community and we strive to iterate in a way that puts our team members first and prepares our company for growth. Join Planet and be a part of our mission to change the way people see the world.</p> <p>Planet is a global company with employees working remotely world wide and joining us from offices in San Francisco, Washington DC, Germany, Austria, Slovenia, and The Netherlands.</p></div><p><strong>About the Role:</strong></p> <p>We are seeking a Senior Forward Deployed Engineer to help develop transformative solutions for our most strategic accounts, starting with our Global Defense and Security customers. In this role, you will work directly with key partners, acting as a senior technical contributor and hands-on builder within a collaborative engineering team. Your mission will be to tackle complex, mission-critical customer challenges by building high-impact software solutions.</p> <p>You will have a high degree of autonomy to design and build what is needed, turning ambiguous requirements into functional and reliable software. Your work will directly contribute to delivering on critical customer commitments and will help inform future product development. This role is ideal for an individual contributor who thrives in dynamic environments and enjoys taking ownership of complex technical problems from design to delivery.</p> <p>This is a full-time, remote position based in the United States. If located near an office, you are expected to work from that office 3 days per week.</p> <p><strong>Impact You'll Own:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Contribute to the full development lifecycle: from discovery and decomposition to designing, building, and deploying bespoke solutions for customer challenges.</li> <li>Design and develop robust, full-stack software, including front-end, back-end, data integration, cloud infrastructure (e.g., AWS), and CI/CD pipelines.</li> <li>Work directly with customers to understand their operational challenges and translate them into clear technical requirements.</li> <li>Identify reusable patterns in customer solutions to inform broader platform development.</li> <li>Leverage the latest AI tooling and an AI-first mindset to drive rapid iteration, deliver value quickly, and adapt to evolving requirements with a bias for action.</li> <li>Mentor other engineers, contribute to code reviews, and help foster a collaborative team environment.</li> <li>Deliver critical commitments on time, understanding their direct impact on customer relationships and business objectives.</li> </ul> <p><strong>What You Bring:</strong></p> <ul> <li>6+ years of relevant work experience in software engineering or in an equivalent technical role.</li> <li>Experience with geospatial software development and concepts (e.g., Rasterio, Fiona, Shapely, OpenLayers, GDAL).</li> <li>AWS or GCP experience.</li> <li>Proficiency in Python.</li> <li>Excellent knowledge of software engineering best practices, including coding standards, code reviews, source control management, and testing methodologies.</li> <li>Excellent customer engagement skills, with the ability to communicate complex technical concepts to diverse audiences.</li> <li>Experience with fast, iterative development cycles and an ability to adapt to shifting requirements.</li> <li>Willingness to travel 30-50% to customer sites within the region.</li> <li>Must have a current active security clearance (TS or TS/TSI).</li> </ul> <p><strong>What Makes You Stand Out:&nbsp;</strong></p> <ul> <li>Experience with JavaScript, Java, Go or C#.</li> </ul> <p><strong>Application Deadline:</strong></p> <p>September 116, 2026 by 11:59p PT</p> <p><strong>Benefits While Working at Planet:</strong></p> <p><em>These offerings are dependent on employment type and geographical location, based upon applicable law or company policy.</em></p> <ul> <li>Comprehensive Medical, Dental, and Vision plans</li> <li>Health Savings Account (HSA) with a company contribution</li> <li>Generous Paid Time Off in addition to holidays and company-wide days off&nbsp;</li> <li>16 Weeks of Paid Parental Leave</li> <li>Wellness Program and Employee Assistance Program (EAP)</li> <li>Home Office Reimbursement</li> <li>Monthly Phone and Internet Reimbursement</li> <li>Tuition Reimbursement and access to LinkedIn Learning</li> <li>Equity</li> <li>Commuter Benefits (if local to an office)</li> <li>Volunteering Paid Time Off</li> </ul> <p><strong>Compensation:</strong></p> <p>The US base salary range for this full-time position at the commencement of employment is listed below.&nbsp; Additionally, this role might be eligible for discretionary short-term and long-term incentives (bonus and equity). The final salary range is determined by job related experience, skills and location.&nbsp; The range displays our typical hiring range for new hire salaries in US locations only.&nbsp; Your recruiter can share more about the specific salary range for your preferred location during the hiring process.</p> <p>#LI-REMOTE</p><div class="content-pay-transparency"><div class="pay-input"><div class="title">New York City + California Salary Range</div><div class="pay-range"><span>$172,200</span><span class="divider">&mdash;</span><span>$215,200 USD</span></div></div><div class="pay-input"><div class="title">San Francisco Salary Range</div><div class="pay-range"><span>$182,900</span><span class="divider">&mdash;</span><span>$228,600 USD</span></div></div><div class="pay-input"><div class="title">US National Salary Range</div><div class="pay-range"><span>$160,600</span><span class="divider">&mdash;</span><span>$200,800 USD</span></div></div></div><div class="content-conclusion"><p><strong>San Francisco Fair Chance Ordinance<br></strong>Pursuant to the San Francisco Fair Chance Ordinance, we will consider for employment qualified applicants with arrest and conviction records.<strong><br></strong></p> <p><strong>Why we care so much about Belonging.&nbsp;<br></strong>We’re dedicated to helping the whole Planet, and to do that we must strive to represent all of it within each of our offices and on all of our teams. That’s why Planet is guided by an ultimate north star of Belonging—dreaming big as we approach our ongoing work.&nbsp; If this job intrigues you, but you’re thinking you might not have all the qualifications, please... do apply!&nbsp; At Planet, we are looking for well-rounded people from around the world who can contribute to more ways than just what is listed in this job description.&nbsp; We don’t just fill positions, we aspire to fulfill people’s careers, most excited about folks who are motivated by our underlying humanitarian efforts.&nbsp; We are a few orbits around the sun before we get to where we want to be, so we hope you’re excited to come along for the ride.&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>EEO statement: <br></strong>Planet is committed to building a community where everyone belongs and we invite people from all backgrounds to apply. Planet is an equal opportunity employer, and committed to providing employment opportunities regardless of race, religious creed, color, national origin, ancestry, physical disability, mental disability, medical condition, genetic information, marital status, sex, gender, gender identity, gender expression, pregnancy, childbirth and breastfeeding, age, sexual orientation, military or veteran status, or any other protected classification, in accordance with applicable federal, state, and local laws. <a href="https://www.eeoc.gov/sites/default/files/2023-06/22-088_EEOC_KnowYourRights6.12.pdf">Know Your Rights.</a></p> <p><strong>Accommodations:&nbsp;<br></strong>Planet is an inclusive community and we know that everyone has their own needs. If you have a disability or special need that requires accommodation during the hiring process, please reach out to accommodations@planet.com or contact your recruiter with your request. Your message will be confidential and we will be happy to assist you.</p> <p><strong>Privacy Policy</strong>: By clicking "Apply Now" at the top of this job posting, I acknowledge that I have read the <a href="https://www.planet.com/privacy/#california">Planet Data Privacy Notice for California Staff Members and Applicants</a>, and hereby consent to the collection, processing, use, and storage of my personal information as described therein.</p> <p><strong>Privacy Policy (European Applicants):</strong> By clicking "Apply Now" at the top of this job posting, I acknowledge that I have read the <a href="https://www.planet.com/privacy/">Candidate Privacy Notice GDPR Planet Labs Europe</a>, and hereby consent to the collection, processing, use, and storage of my personal information as described therein.</p> <p><strong>AI in Our Interviewing Process</strong>: Planet is committed to providing an exceptional interview experience for all candidates. title: Senior Analytics Engineer
full_description: <div class="content-intro"><p><span style="font-size: 12pt;">We&nbsp;take play seriously. We’re looking for curious adventurers ready to find their party, fueled by imagination&nbsp;and drive&nbsp;to build what’s never been built before. At Hasbro and Wizards of the Coast, you’ll collaborate with passionate teams to reimagine our iconic brands and create experiences that spark joy, connection, and community through the magic of play. This is your chance to shape legendary play that lasts a lifetime.</span></p></div><p><span style="font-size: 12pt;">Hasbro is a leading games, IP and toy company whose mission is to create joy and community through the magic of play. With 165 years of expertise, Hasbro delivers groundbreaking play experiences and reaches more than 1 billion fans annually around the world, through physical and digital games, video games, toys, licensed consumer products, location-based entertainment, film, TV and more.</span></p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><span style="font-size: 12pt;">Through its franchise-first approach, Hasbro unlocks value from both new and legacy IP, including MAGIC: THE GATHERING, DUNGEONS &amp; DRAGONS, MONOPOLY, HASBRO GAMES, NERF, TRANSFORMERS, PLAY-DOH and PEPPA PIG, as well as premier partner brands. Powered by its portfolio of thousands of iconic marks and a diversified network of partners and subsidiary studios, Hasbro brings fans together wherever they are, from tabletop to screen.</span></p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><span style="font-size: 12pt;">For more than a decade, Hasbro has been consistently recognized for its corporate citizenship, including being named one of the 100 Best Corporate Citizens by 3BL Media, a 2025 JUST Capital Industry Leader, one of the 50 Most Community-Minded Companies in the U.S. by the Civic 50, and a Brand that Matters by Fast Company. For more information, visit <a href="https://nam11.safelinks.protection.outlook.com/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fcorporate.hasbro.com%2F&amp;data=05%7C02%7CChristian.Porter%40wizards.com%7C1c2f0acd383b4d9e4c5108de85197b24%7C701edd3ec7a84789b1ce8a243620d68f%7C0%7C0%7C639094541651889218%7CUnknown%7CTWFpbGZsb3d8eyJFbXB0eU1hcGkiOnRydWUsIlYiOiIwLjAuMDAwMCIsIlAiOiJXaW4zMiIsIkFOIjoiTWFpbCIsIldUIjoyfQ%3D%3D%7C0%7C%7C%7C&amp;sdata=I%2BUPsw2L44lwcMF%2BB2tJ0pKHlspdHMsqJgCKs9w8oQc%3D&amp;reserved=0">https://corporate.hasbro.com</a> or @Hasbro on LinkedIn.</span></p> <p style="margin: 0.0in 0.0in 8.0pt; line-height: 115%; font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: Aptos, sans-serif;">&nbsp;</p> <p style="margin: 0.0in 0.0in 8.0pt; line-height: 115%; font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: Aptos, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 12pt;">We are growing our&nbsp;<strong>Enterprise Data &amp; Engineering</strong> team!</span></p> <p style="margin: 0.0in 0.0in 8.0pt; line-height: 115%; font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: Aptos, sans-serif;">&nbsp;</p> <p style="margin: 0.0in 0.0in 8.0pt; line-height: 115%; font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: Aptos, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 12pt;">We're looking for a <strong>Senior Analytics Engineer</strong> to help shape how data is transformed, modeled, and structured to power analytics and business decision-making across the enterprise. Are you energized by turning complex data into scalable, trusted, analytics-ready data products that drive real impact?</span></p> <p style="margin: 0.0in 0.0in 8.0pt; line-height: 115%; font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: Aptos, sans-serif;">&nbsp;</p> <p style="margin: 0.0in 0.0in 8.0pt; line-height: 115%; font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: Aptos, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 12pt;">In this high-impact individual contributor role, you will design enterprise data models and semantic layers that define how we measure performance and consume data. Together, we are building production-grade transformation frameworks and curated datasets that ensure reporting and business metrics are accurate, consistent, and performant.</span></p> <p style="margin: 0.0in 0.0in 8.0pt; line-height: 115%; font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: Aptos, sans-serif;">&nbsp;</p> <p style="margin: 0.0in 0.0in 8.0pt; line-height: 115%; font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: Aptos, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 12pt;">We value diverse perspectives and welcome candidates who bring different experiences and approaches to solving complex data challenges.</span></p> <p style="margin: 0.0in 0.0in 8.0pt; line-height: 115%; font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: Aptos, sans-serif;">&nbsp;</p> <p style="margin: 0.0in 0.0in 8.0pt; line-height: 115%; font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: Aptos, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 12pt;"><strong>What You'll Do</strong></span></p> <ul style="margin-top: 0.0in; margin-bottom: 0.0in;" type="disc"> <li style="margin-top: 0.0in; margin-right: 0.0in; margin-bottom: 8.0pt; line-height: 115%; font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: Aptos, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 12pt;">Responsible for the design and evolution of analytics-ready data models, dimensional schemas, and curated datasets.</span></li> <li style="margin-top: 0.0in; margin-right: 0.0in; margin-bottom: 8.0pt; line-height: 115%; font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: Aptos, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 12pt;">Own the development of transformation frameworks using DBT, Databricks, and cloud-native technologies.</span></li> <li style="margin-top: 0.0in; margin-right: 0.0in; margin-bottom: 8.0pt; line-height: 115%; font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: Aptos, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 12pt;">Translate business requirements into scalable, reusable data models that standardize metric definitions across teams.</span></li> <li style="margin-top: 0.0in; margin-right: 0.0in; margin-bottom: 8.0pt; line-height: 115%; font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: Aptos, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 12pt;">Establish and uphold modeling standards, semantic layer governance, naming conventions, documentation practices, and testing frameworks.</span></li> <li style="margin-top: 0.0in; margin-right: 0.0in; margin-bottom: 8.0pt; line-height: 115%; font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: Aptos, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 12pt;">Implement and monitor data quality validation, lineage, and transformation-level controls.</span></li> <li style="margin-top: 0.0in; margin-right: 0.0in; margin-bottom: 8.0pt; line-height: 115%; font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: Aptos, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 12pt;">Partner closely with data engineers to align upstream pipeline design with downstream modeling and consumption needs.</span></li> <li style="margin-top: 0.0in; margin-right: 0.0in; margin-bottom: 8.0pt; line-height: 115%; font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: Aptos, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 12pt;">Collaborate with product managers, analysts, and business partners to ensure data products are intuitive, trusted, and aligned to business definitions.</span></li> <li style="margin-top: 0.0in; margin-right: 0.0in; margin-bottom: 8.0pt; line-height: 115%; font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: Aptos, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 12pt;">Lead analytics engineering initiatives from technical design through deployment and optimization.</span></li> <li style="margin-top: 0.0in; margin-right: 0.0in; margin-bottom: 8.0pt; line-height: 115%; font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: Aptos, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 12pt;">Recognize opportunities to simplify the analytics data landscape as well as improve performance.</span></li> </ul> <p style="margin: 0.0in 0.0in 8.0pt; line-height: 115%; font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: Aptos, sans-serif;">&nbsp;</p> <p style="margin: 0.0in 0.0in 8.0pt; line-height: 115%; font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: Aptos, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 12pt;"><strong>What You'll Bring</strong></span></p> <ul style="margin-top: 0.0in; margin-bottom: 0.0in;" type="disc"> <li style="margin-top: 0.0in; margin-right: 0.0in; margin-bottom: 8.0pt; line-height: 115%; font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: Aptos, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 12pt;">Experience developing and delivering enterprise-scale analytics frameworks and data transformation structures in modern data environments.</span></li> <li style="margin-top: 0.0in; margin-right: 0.0in; margin-bottom: 8.0pt; line-height: 115%; font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: Aptos, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 12pt;">Strong hands-on expertise with SQL, DBT, and Databricks, as well as cloud data platforms such as Azure and/or AWS.</span></li> <li style="margin-top: 0.0in; margin-right: 0.0in; margin-bottom: 8.0pt; line-height: 115%; font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: Aptos, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 12pt;">Proficiency in Python or similar language for transformation logic, automation, and validation workflows.</span></li> <li style="margin-top: 0.0in; margin-right: 0.0in; margin-bottom: 8.0pt; line-height: 115%; font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: Aptos, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 12pt;">Deep understanding of dimensional modeling, semantic layer architecture, and data warehousing standard methodologies.</span></li> <li style="margin-top: 0.0in; margin-right: 0.0in; margin-bottom: 8.0pt; line-height: 115%; font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: Aptos, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 12pt;">Experience implementing data quality frameworks, automated testing, and documentation standards.</span></li> <li style="margin-top: 0.0in; margin-right: 0.0in; margin-bottom: 8.0pt; line-height: 115%; font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: Aptos, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 12pt;">Ability to lead complex workstreams and influence technical decisions without direct authority.</span></li> <li style="margin-top: 0.0in; margin-right: 0.0in; margin-bottom: 8.0pt; line-height: 115%; font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: Aptos, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 12pt;">Strong interpersonal skills, with the ability to translate data concepts into clear business-aligned structures.</span></li> <li style="margin-top: 0.0in; margin-right: 0.0in; margin-bottom: 8.0pt; line-height: 115%; font-size: 12.0pt; font-family: Aptos, sans-serif;"><span style="font-size: 12pt;">Experience supporting advanced analytics or AI-enabled use cases is a plus.</span></li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><span style="font-size: 12pt;"><strong><span style="color: black;">We are an Equal Opportunity / Affirmative Action Employer</span></strong></span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 12pt;">Hasbro is committed to equality of opportunity in all aspects of employment. We are committed to making all employment decisions without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, national origin, age, marital status, or any other legally protected status.</span></p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><span style="font-size: 12pt;">We will ensure that individuals with disabilities are provided reasonable accommodation to participate in the job application or interview process, to perform essential job functions, and to receive other benefits and privileges of employment. If you have a disability and require assistance in this application process and need to request an accommodation, please contact your recruiter or coordinator.</span></p><div class="content-pay-transparency"><div class="pay-input"><div class="description"><p><span style="font-size: 16px;" data-teams="true">The pay transparency range for this role is listed below. The hiring range will vary based on factors such as experience, skills, location and market conditions. Additionally, employees may be eligible for annual and long-term incentives as part of their overall compensation package.</span></p></div><div class="title">Pay Range</div><div class="pay-range"><span>$100,200</span><span class="divider">&mdash;</span><span>$150,200 USD</span></div></div></div><div class="content-conclusion"><p><span style="font-size: 12pt;">Employees may be eligible for annual and long-term incentives as part of their overall compensation package, depending on role, location, and eligibility. Benefits and programs may include:</span></p> <ul> <li style="font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-size: 12pt;">Health &amp; Wellness</span></li> <li style="font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-size: 12pt;">Time Off to Recharge</span></li> <li style="font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-size: 12pt;">Financial Well-being</span></li> <li style="font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-size: 12pt;">Life &amp; Family Support</span></li> <li style="font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-size: 12pt;">Volunteer and Community Initiatives</span></li> <li style="font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-size: 12pt;">Learning &amp; Development&nbsp;</span></li> <li style="font-size: 12pt;"><span style="font-size: 12pt;">Exclusive Perks</span></li> </ul> <p><span style="font-size: 12pt;"></span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 12pt;"><span data-olk-copy-source="MailCompose">Please review our </span><a id="OWAf3b48604-66ff-cab5-fa36-85c2d05d437e" class="OWAAutoLink" href="https://nam11.safelinks.protection.outlook.com/?url=http%3A%2F%2Fdocs.hasbro.com%2Fprivacy%2Fjob-applicant&amp;data=05%7C02%7CMaria.Hughes%40wizards.com%7C73f450b2476e4441be3308dec7006d14%7C701edd3ec7a84789b1ce8a243620d68f%7C0%7C0%7C639167001791388387%7CUnknown%7CTWFpbGZsb3d8eyJFbXB0eU1hcGkiOnRydWUsIlYiOiIwLjAuMDAwMCIsIlAiOiJXaW4zMiIsIkFOIjoiTWFpbCIsIldUIjoyfQ%3D%3D%7C0%7C%7C%7C&amp;sdata=QzsYnPcynaB0OC2yYMSHab2TyW8jOlZQWyr87FBwDt8%3D&amp;reserved=0" data-auth="NotApplicable">Applicant Privacy Notice</a> to learn how we collect, use, and protect your personal information in connection with the application process.&nbsp;</span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 12pt;"><br></span></p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><span style="font-size: 12pt;"></span></p></div>
