Hands-on experience of building such a system is strongly preferred.</li> <li><strong>Cloud &amp; DevOps: </strong>Experience with cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, or Azure) and DevOps practices (CI/CD, containerization, monitoring).</li> <li><strong>Integration Expertise: </strong>Hands-on experience with integrating systems via APIs, webhooks, and data pipelines.</li> <li><strong>Communication:</strong> Excellent communication and project management skills.</li> <li><strong>Analytical Approach: </strong>Ability to use data-driven decision-making, including A/B testing and performance monitoring, to refine solutions.</li> <li><strong>Collaborative Builder:</strong> You thrive in cross-functional environments, working hand-in-hand with PMs and engineers to turn real customer problems into scalable AI solutions.</li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p>Compensation for this position includes a base salary, equity, and a variety of benefits. Actual base salaries will be based on candidate-specific factors, including experience, skillset, and location, and local minimum pay requirements as applicable.</p> <p data-pm-slice="1 1 []">This posting will be used to fill a newly-created role.</p> <p>We have noticed a rise in recruiting impersonations across the industry, where scammers attempt to access candidates' personal and financial information through fake interviews and offers. All Cresta recruiting email communications will always come from the @cresta.ai domain.&nbsp;Any outreach claiming to be from Cresta via other sources should be ignored.&nbsp; If you are uncertain whether you have been contacted by an official Cresta employee, reach out to <a href="mailto:recruiting@cresra.ai">recruiting@cresta.ai</a></p>

title: Senior Forward Deployed Engineer (AI Agent) - UK
full_description: <div class="content-intro"><p>Cresta unlocks the true potential of the customer experience, turning every conversation into a competitive advantage. Cresta’s unified AI platform combines conversational AI agents, real-time human agent augmentation, and comprehensive conversation intelligence to drive revenue and efficiency gains across every channel. The world’s leading companies, including United Airlines, Cox Communications, and Marriott, use Cresta to power world-class customer experiences every day.&nbsp;</p> <p>Born from the Stanford AI Lab, Cresta has raised more than $270 million from the world’s leading investors, including a16z, Greylock, and Sequoia. Cresta’s leadership includes some of the leading minds in AI today. Our CEO, <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/pingwu/">Ping Wu</a>, founded and led Google's Contact Center AI and Vertex AI platforms before joining Cresta to build the future of AI-driven customer experiences.</p> <p>Over the next few years, AI is going to redefine how people all over the world interact with businesses every day. Come build that future at Cresta.</p></div><h4>About the role:</h4> <p>At Cresta, the AI Agent team is on a mission to create state-of-the-art AI Agents that solve practical problems for our customers. We are focused on leveraging the latest technologies in Large Language Models (LLMs) and AI Agent systems, while ensuring that the solutions we develop are cost-effective, secure, and reliable.&nbsp;</p> <p>As an <strong>AI Agent Engineer</strong>, you'll be at the forefront of deploying AI agents that address real-world challenges. In this role, you will work closely with customers as well as our software and machine learning engineers, ensuring high-impact AI Agent deployments and contributing to the continuous improvement of our core AI platform. You’ll develop intelligent AI agents, integrate them seamlessly with external systems and offer hands-on technical expertise to ensure successful deployments.. This position requires strong engineering skills, adaptability, and customer engagement. If you are self-driven, analytical, and eager to leverage AI in practical applications, this role is for you.</p> <p><strong>What You'll Do </strong>:</p> <ul> <li><strong>AI Agent Development:</strong> Develop, configure, deploy, and optimize AI agents using Cresta’s AI platform and tools.</li> <li><strong>System Integration:</strong> Build AI agent integrations with external systems (APIs, databases, CRMs, etc.) to ensure seamless workflow integration.</li> <li><strong>Performance Optimization:</strong> Optimize AI agent performance (e.g. fine-tune prompts and configurations) and troubleshoot issues in complex enterprise environments.</li> <li><strong>Requirements Gathering:</strong> Collaborate with customers and internal stakeholders to gather technical requirements and translate business needs into AI Agent solutions.</li> <li><strong>Demos &amp; Iteration:</strong> Conduct interactive demos and present compelling proof-of-concepts to prospective customers, proactively gather feedback, and iteratively refine solutions to meet objectives.</li> <li><strong>Project Coordination:</strong> Define project milestones, create implementation plans, and coordinate execution with internal teams to ensure on-time delivery. Provide a tight feedback loop to our product and engineering teams — identifying gaps, building custom tooling, and influencing the roadmap through real-world deployment learnings.</li> <li><strong>Partner Cross-Functionally:</strong> Collaborate with PMs to define agent goals, iterate rapidly based on customer feedback, and shape product capabilities that maximize customer ROI.</li> <li><strong>Technical Guidance:</strong> Serve as a trusted technical advisor for the customer, guiding best practices for AI agent adoption and usage. Provide technical guidance on AI agent best practices, including architecture design, security considerations, and scalability planning.</li> </ul> <h4><strong>What We're Looking For:</strong></h4> <ul> <li><strong>Education: </strong>Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field.</li> <li><strong>Experience: </strong>3+ years of experience of full time working experience in software development/ consulting, AI/ML engineering, or system integration, or as FDE</li> <li><strong>Programming Skills:</strong> Proficiency in Python and Golang, with the ability to write clean, efficient code.</li> <li><strong>AI/ML Knowledge: </strong>Familiarity with AI/ML concepts. Hands-on experience with large language models (LLMs), and prompt engineering techniques are strongly preferred.</li> <li><strong>AI Agent Frameworks: </strong>Strong understanding of general AI agent frameworks, function calling, and retrieval-augmented generation (RAG). Hands-on experience of building such a system is strongly preferred.</li> <li><strong>Cloud &amp; DevOps: </strong>Experience with cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, or Azure) and DevOps practices (CI/CD, containerization, monitoring).</li> <li><strong>Integration Expertise: </strong>Hands-on experience with integrating systems via APIs, webhooks, and data pipelines.</li> <li><strong>Communication:</strong> Excellent communication and project management skills.</li> <li><strong>Analytical Approach: </strong>Ability to use data-driven decision-making, including A/B testing and performance monitoring, to refine solutions.</li> <li><strong>Collaborative Builder:</strong> You thrive in cross-functional environments, working hand-in-hand with PMs and engineers to turn real customer problems into scalable AI solutions.</li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p>Compensation for this position includes a base salary, equity, and a variety of benefits. Actual base salaries will be based on candidate-specific factors, including experience, skillset, and location, and local minimum pay requirements as applicable.</p> <p data-pm-slice="1 1 []">This posting will be used to fill a newly-created role.</p> <p>We have noticed a rise in recruiting impersonations across the industry, where scammers attempt to access candidates' personal and financial information through fake interviews and offers. All Cresta recruiting email communications will always come from the @cresta.ai domain.&nbsp;Any outreach claiming to be from Cresta via other sources should be ignored.&nbsp; If you are uncertain whether you have been contacted by an official Cresta employee, reach out to <a href="mailto:recruiting@cresra.ai">recruiting@cresta.ai</a></p>

title: Forward Deployed Engineer - Applied AI
location: Gallup, New Mexico, United States; Michigan, United States; Missouri, United States; San Francisco; West Virginia, United States
full_description: <p><strong>About Wonderschool</strong><br>Wonderschool’s mission is to ensure every child has access to early childhood education that helps them realize their full potential. We empower small business owners, childcare providers, to launch and grow in-home programs through cutting-edge software, personalized coaching, and responsive support. We also partner with governments to modernize public childcare infrastructure. Our team is small, fast-moving, and deeply motivated by the impact we create in families and communities across the country.</p> <p><strong>About the Role</strong><br>We are looking for a Forward Deployed AI Engineer to lead product development on some of the most strategically important initiatives at Wonderschool. You’ll spend your time working directly with customers (traveling as needed), uncovering pain points, and building AI-powered solutions that drive measurable impact across revenue, operational efficiency, and user experience. You’ll act like a founder inside the company: identifying problems, shipping code, driving adoption, and iterating quickly based on what you learn. This role blends engineering, product, operations, and business leadership, and is ideal for someone who has launched products, acquired users, and driven growth independently. You will work closely with our sales, onboarding, and account management teams to automate workflows, build better customer experiences, and unlock new growth.</p> <p>This role is inspired by best-in-class FDSEs at companies like Palantir and is perfect for builders who love solving real-world problems in the field, not from behind a desk.</p> <p><strong>What You’ll Do</strong><br>Work directly with users and internal teams to identify high-leverage problems and ship product solutions. Write production code (approximately 50% of your time) and ship weekly improvements across the customer journey. Use tools like Widesurf, Cursor, and other AI accelerators to increase your velocity and quality of output. Build and deploy AI-powered tooling that eliminates manual effort and improves the experience for providers, parents, and government partners. Automate onboarding flows, proposal generation, reporting processes, and other operational workflows. Own full loops: talk to users, design solutions, write code, test, deploy, and monitor adoption. Prioritize based on business impact and collaborate across teams to drive measurable results.</p> <p><strong>What Success Looks Like</strong><br>You uncover user pain points faster than anyone else and consistently ship solutions that address them. You deploy AI-infused internal tools or product experiences that improve core metrics (conversion, retention, revenue). You fully own feedback loops, from discovery to deployment, and iterate rapidly. Internal teams rely on your tools to operate faster and with fewer resources. You’re moving fast, staying close to the customer, and operating with very little hand-holding.</p> <p><strong>Who You Are</strong><br>A builder and founder at heart, you’ve started a company, built products that got users, or made revenue independently. Comfortable talking to users weekly and distilling insight into product decisions. Technical enough to ship production code on your own, experience with Python, JavaScript, or similar languages. Experienced using AI/LLMs and developer tools like Windsurf and Cursor to move faster and smarter. Business-minded, you’ve worked in consulting, managed a P&amp;L, or attended business school and know how to prioritize based on ROI. Comfortable operating in ambiguity and energized by a high-trust, high-impact, in-person environment.</p> <p><strong>Why Join Us</strong><br>Make a direct impact on families, small business owners, and communities. Operate with founder-like ownership on the company’s most important priorities. Join a small, fast-moving team with a bias for action. Talk to users, ship weekly, and see your work go live and drive real-world outcomes. Help reimagine early education and child care for the modern era.</p> <p><strong>Location</strong></p> <p>In-person, 5-6 days a week. This role requires regular client travel.</p>

title: Staff Data Engineer
full_description: <h2><strong>About Shift5</strong></h2> <p data-path-to-node="3">Shift5 is building the data platform for onboard operational technology (OT). We deliver cybersecurity, predictive maintenance, and compliance capabilities that enable defense and commercial fleets to operate with greater readiness, resilience, and mission assurance.</p> <p data-path-to-node="4">We are seeking a <strong data-path-to-node="4" data-index-in-node="17">Staff Data Engineer</strong> to join our growing Product Engineering team. In this role, your primary responsibility will be to design, build, and maintain data processing, storage, and integration pipelines while acting as a force-multiplier for your team. You will report to our Off Vehicle Manager, Software Engineering, and operate in a team-based environment with engineers, product managers, program managers, and designers to conceive, implement, and shape major features. You’ll be a major factor in generating high-impact products that literally save lives.</p> <h2><strong>What You'll Do</strong></h2> <ul> <li data-path-to-node="6,0,0"><strong data-path-to-node="6,0,0" data-index-in-node="0">Design &amp; Build Pipelines:</strong> Design, build, and maintain robust, scalable batch and streaming data processing, storage, and integration pipelines using technologies such as Apache Airflow or Benthos.</li> <li> <p data-path-to-node="6,1,0"><strong data-path-to-node="6,1,0" data-index-in-node="0">Feature Ownership &amp; Leadership:</strong> Interpret requirements and design specifications, taking full ownership of building features from the ground up. Mentor and lead the rest of your team to deliver the right solutions.</p> </li> <li> <p data-path-to-node="6,2,0"><strong data-path-to-node="6,2,0" data-index-in-node="0">Write Quality Code:</strong> Write clean, well-documented, scalable, extensible, and testable code to ensure application quality and maintainability.</p> </li> <li> <p data-path-to-node="6,3,0"><strong data-path-to-node="6,3,0" data-index-in-node="0">Cross-Functional Collaboration:</strong> Partner with data scientists and engineers to create semantic data models representing complex vehicular systems, and integrate applications cleanly across other Shift5 componentry.</p> </li> <li> <p data-path-to-node="6,4,0"><strong data-path-to-node="6,4,0" data-index-in-node="0">Support Stakeholders:</strong> Build scalable data products for data scientists, transportation engineers, and executives to drive insights and decision-making.</p> </li> <li> <p data-path-to-node="6,5,0"><strong data-path-to-node="6,5,0" data-index-in-node="0">Cloud Optimization:</strong> Create efficient, reliable, cost-effective, dynamically scalable, and observable solutions utilizing AWS cloud services.</p> </li> <li> <p data-path-to-node="6,6,0"><strong data-path-to-node="6,6,0" data-index-in-node="0">Data Analysis &amp; Quality:</strong> Analyze complex data sets to create data ontologies, verify data quality/integrity, and ensure data accuracy throughout pipelines.</p> </li> <li> <p data-path-to-node="6,7,0"><strong data-path-to-node="6,7,0" data-index-in-node="0">Field Support:</strong> Support the design process and occasionally travel to customer sites (estimated a few times per year) to collaborate with Field Engineers on data integration and deployment.</p> </li> </ul> <h2 data-path-to-node="8">What Success Looks Like</h2> <ul> <li data-path-to-node="8,0,0"><strong data-path-to-node="8,0,0" data-index-in-node="0">High-Impact Delivery:</strong> You successfully deliver scalable, observable, supportable, and reliable data processing applications that empower customers to run smarter, safer fleets.</li> <li> <p data-path-to-node="8,1,0"><strong data-path-to-node="8,1,0" data-index-in-node="0">End-to-End Ownership:</strong> You confidently steer complex data applications from scratch—including requirements gathering, design, planning, and implementation—in a fast-paced environment.</p> </li> <li> <p data-path-to-node="8,2,0"><strong data-path-to-node="8,2,0" data-index-in-node="0">Collaborative Impact:</strong> You actively shape product design alongside multidisciplinary teams, acting as a technical leader and force-multiplier for your peers.</p> </li> <li> <p data-path-to-node="8,3,0"><strong data-path-to-node="8,3,0" data-index-in-node="0">Adaptability:</strong> You efficiently multitask and smoothly accommodate changing priorities on demand to meet the dynamic needs of a scaling company.</p> </li> </ul> <h2 data-path-to-node="10">What We’re Looking For</h2> <p data-path-to-node="10"><strong data-path-to-node="10" data-index-in-node="0">Required:</strong></p> <ul data-path-to-node="11"> <li> <p data-path-to-node="11,0,0"><strong data-path-to-node="11,0,0" data-index-in-node="0">Engineering Experience:</strong> 6+ years of software/data engineering experience with a deep understanding of software engineering practices and concepts.</p> </li> <li> <p data-path-to-node="11,1,0"><strong data-path-to-node="11,1,0" data-index-in-node="0">Core Languages:</strong> 6+ years of experience with a major programming language (GoLang, Java, or Python).</p> </li> <li> <p data-path-to-node="11,2,0"><strong data-path-to-node="11,2,0" data-index-in-node="0">Databases &amp; Big Data:</strong> 6+ years of relational database experience (PostgreSQL, MySQL, Oracle, etc.) alongside 6+ years of experience with Big Data (Hadoop, Spark) and Data Modeling.</p> </li> <li> <p data-path-to-node="11,3,0"><strong data-path-to-node="11,3,0" data-index-in-node="0">Cloud &amp; Containers:</strong> 4+ years of experience with containerization and cloud services (Docker, Kubernetes) and cloud monitoring tools.</p> </li> <li> <p data-path-to-node="11,4,0"><strong data-path-to-node="11,4,0" data-index-in-node="0">Data Pipelines &amp; Stack:</strong> Expertise with batch and streaming data pipelines (Apache Airflow, Benthos) and familiarity with modern data stack components (ingestion, transformation, orchestration).</p> </li> </ul> <p data-path-to-node="12"><strong data-path-to-node="12" data-index-in-node="0">Preferred:</strong></p> <ul> <li><strong>U.S. citizenship</strong>&nbsp;required and ability to obtain a security clearance.&nbsp;</li> <li> <p title: Senior Data Engineer
full_description: <div class="content-intro"><p><strong>Who We Are</strong><br>Kargo creates powerful moments of connection between brands and consumers to build businesses. Every day, our 600+ employees work to radically raise the bar on what agentic AI, CTV, eCommerce, social, and mobile can do to deliver unique ad experiences across the world’s most premium platforms. Taking a creative science approach to all we do, we continuously innovate solutions that outperform industry benchmarks and client expectations. Now 20+ years strong, Kargo has offices in NYC, Chicago, LA, &nbsp;Dallas, Sydney, Auckland, London and Waterford, Ireland.&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>Who We Hire</strong><br>Techies who want to build the future. Creatives who want to design it better.&nbsp;<br>Communicators to win business. Collaborators to build it. Data pros who turn numbers into insights. Product builders who turn ideas into innovations. Anyone eager to be on a team that doesn’t stop to ask what’s next, because they’re&nbsp;<br>already building it.&nbsp;</p></div><p><strong>Mission</strong></p> <p>The Senior Data Engineer exists to build and scale the data infrastructure that powers Kargo's targeting, identity, and measurement capabilities. This role owns hands-on implementation of the pipelines, systems, and tooling that turn raw data into competitive advantage — at speed and at scale. When this role is firing, data flows reliably, engineering teams move faster, and Kargo's data products are built on a foundation that can handle whatever comes next.</p> <p class="p1"><strong><em>This is a remote role in London, UK.&nbsp;</em></strong></p> <p><strong>Outcomes — What Success Looks Like in 6–12 Months</strong></p> <ul> <li><strong>Core ETL/ELT pipelines are optimized and operationally reliable</strong> — Existing pipelines are assessed, bottlenecks are addressed, and data flows with documented SLAs; incidents are caught proactively, not reactively</li> <li><strong>New datasets are onboarded and powering targeting capabilities</strong> — At least one meaningful new data source is integrated end-to-end, with targeting or measurement use cases activated and performing against defined KPIs</li> <li><strong>CI/CD practices are adopted and accelerating team velocity</strong> — ArgoCD-based deployment pipelines are in place and the team is shipping with greater speed and fewer rollback events as a result</li> <li><strong>Privacy-compliant data methodologies are implemented and documented</strong> — Modern approaches to identity and targeting that meet GDPR/CCPA standards are built into the stack, not bolted on after the fact</li> <li><strong>Technical documentation is thorough and actually used</strong> — Implementation docs, runbooks, and best practices are written clearly enough that a new engineer can onboard to a system without a walkthrough</li> </ul> <p><strong>Skills — Core Technical Capabilities</strong></p> <p><strong>Required</strong></p> <ul> <li>Deep proficiency in Python and Spark for building and optimizing large-scale data pipelines; strong grasp of data structuring for performance and efficiency</li> <li>Hands-on experience with Airflow for orchestrating complex data workflows, and Apache Iceberg for table format management at scale</li> <li>Extensive AWS experience including EKS, Docker, and Kubernetes; comfortable owning infrastructure deployment and scaling decisions</li> <li>CI/CD fluency — ArgoCD, automated testing pipelines, and monitoring via Prometheus; treats deployment reliability as a first-class concern</li> <li>Familiarity with analytical warehousing in Snowflake or ClickHouse — SQL optimization, cost management, and performance tuning</li> <li>Working knowledge of identity, privacy, and targeting methodologies in ad tech — understands how data flows through the ecosystem and where privacy constraints apply</li> </ul> <p><strong>Preferred</strong></p> <ul> <li>Experience with real-time streaming technologies — Kafka, Flink — for latency-sensitive data processing use cases</li> <li>Familiarity with Aerospike or similar low-latency key-value stores used in high-throughput targeting systems</li> </ul> <p><strong>Competencies — Behaviors We Like to See</strong></p> <p><strong>Hands-On Ownership</strong></p> <ul> <li>Drives implementation independently from ambiguous brief to working system — doesn't wait for perfect specs to start building</li> <li>Takes operational responsibility for the systems they build; monitors, iterates, and improves without being prompted</li> </ul> <p><strong>Rigorous Problem-Solving</strong></p> <ul> <li>Brings structured thinking to complex, multi-system challenges; breaks down problems clearly before reaching for a solution</li> <li>Optimizes for the right outcome — performance, cost, reliability — not just the fastest path to "done"</li> </ul> <p><strong>Technical Collaboration</strong></p> <ul> <li>Contributes actively in design and brainstorming sessions; brings strong opinions and is equally willing to update them when better ideas emerge</li> <li>Communicates technical decisions clearly to both engineering peers and non-technical stakeholders without oversimplifying</li> </ul> <p><strong>Documentation and Knowledge Sharing</strong></p> <ul> <li>Writes documentation that actually gets used — clear, thorough, and maintained as systems evolve</li> <li>Treats onboarding others as part of the job; leaves systems better understood than they found them</li> </ul><div class="content-conclusion"><p><strong>Our Laurels</strong></p> <ul> <li>AdAge Best Places to Work&nbsp;</li> <li>ThinkLA Partner of the Year</li> <li>Built In Best Places to Work&nbsp;</li> <li>Cynopsis 2025 Top Women in Media - Jeannine Shao Collins</li> <li>Martech Breakthrough Awards - Best Overall Adtech Company</li> <li>Digiday Media Awards Best Event</li> <li>Cynopsis Media Impact Awards-Best CTV Platform</li> <li>Martech Breakthrough Awards-CTV Innovation</li> <li>Adweek Media Plan of the Year Awards - Best Use of Insights</li> </ul> <p><strong>Follow Our Lead</strong></p> <ul> <li>Big Picture:&nbsp; <a href="kargo.com">kargo.com</a></li> <li>The Latest:&nbsp; Instagram (@kargomobile) and LinkedIn (Kargo)</li> </ul> <p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal leading-[1.7]"><em>Kargo is an Equal Opportunity Employer. We are committed to building an inclusive and diverse workplace where all employees and applicants are treated with respect and dignity. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, color, ethnic origin, religion or belief, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, age, disability, marital or family status, national origin, veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by applicable local, state, or federal law. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment.</em></p> <p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal leading-[1.7]"><em>Pursuant to applicable fair chance laws, including the San Francisco Fair Chance Ordinance and the Los Angeles Fair Chance Initiative for Hiring, Kargo will consider qualified applicants with arrest and conviction records for employment.</em></p></div>

title: Data Engineer
full_description: <div class="content-intro"><p><strong>Who We Are:<br></strong>Galaxy is a global leader in digital assets and data center infrastructure, delivering solutions that accelerate progress in finance and artificial intelligence. We believe that blockchain and digital asset innovation will transform how value moves through the world – and we’re building the products and services to make that future a reality.<br>&nbsp;<br>Our institutional digital assets platform spans trading, investment banking, asset management, staking, self-custody, and tokenization technology. We also invest in and operate cutting-edge data center infrastructure to power AI and high-performance computing, addressing the growing demand for scalable energy and compute in the U.S.<br>&nbsp;<br>We work at the intersection of finance and technology, helping institutions, startups, and developers navigate a digitally native economy. Led by CEO and Founder Michael Novogratz, our team blends deep crypto expertise with institutional experience and a shared commitment to shaping the future of Web3 and AI.<br>&nbsp;<br>Galaxy is headquartered in New York City, with offices across North America, Europe, the Middle East, and Asia.<br>&nbsp;<br>To learn more about our businesses and products, visit www.galaxy.com.</p> <p><strong>What We Value:</strong></p> <p>We are a diverse team of free thinkers, and fast movers united to help investors and creators energize the global economy. We are looking for individuals&nbsp;who&nbsp;thrive in a culture of builders and overachievers&nbsp;and&nbsp;embrace high performance, transparent feedback, and a mission-first approach. Our culture shapes our way of working and gets us where we want to be.</p> <ul> <li><em>Seek Excellence.</em></li> <li><em>Be Selective To Be Effective.</em></li> <li><em>Be Highly Aligned, Loosely Coupled.</em></li> <li><em>Disagree Transparently.</em></li> <li><em>Encourage Independent Decision-Making.</em></li> <li><em>Build Dream Teams.</em></li> </ul></div><p style="text-align: left;"><strong>Who You Are:</strong></p> <p><span class="TextRun SCXW41094707 BCX0" lang="EN-US" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW41094707 BCX0">You're a hands-on engineer with several years of experience building and operating production data platforms. You're fluent in Python or Java and comfortable across the modern data stack — AWS, Kubernetes, Terraform, Kafka, and Databricks/Spark. You care about reliability and developer experience, write clean and well-tested code, and&nbsp;</span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW41094707 BCX0">like enabling other teams to move fast on infrastructure you own. You're curious about crypto and energized by working at the intersection of finance and emerging technology.</span></span><span class="EOP SCXW41094707 BCX0" data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p> <p Our culture shapes our way of working and gets us where we want to be.</p> <ul> <li><em>Seek Excellence.</em></li> <li><em>Be Selective To Be Effective.</em></li> <li><em>Be Highly Aligned, Loosely Coupled.</em></li> <li><em>Disagree Transparently.</em></li> <li><em>Encourage Independent Decision-Making.</em></li> <li><em>Build Dream Teams.</em></li> </ul></div><p style="text-align: left;"><strong>Who You Are:</strong></p> <p>The Member of Technical Staff, Forward Deployed Lead is the de facto CEO of their pod within Galaxy Edge — a small, senior team focused on one client engagement or one innovation bet. In this role, you will own product direction, technical standards, client relationships, and account growth, working alongside a dedicated Delivery Lead who handles timelines and execution. You will rotate between our two verticals — Forward Deployed Product &amp; Engineering and R&amp;D &amp; Innovation — carrying hard-won market and technical context across the boundary. You will partner closely with Tier-1 financial institution stakeholders from engineers to C-suite executives, translating their needs in custody, settlement, tokenization, and trading into buildable roadmaps. This is a deliberately hybrid role requiring a hands-on startup CTO mindset combined with the commercial instinct to grow accounts and turn delivered trust into the next engagement.</p> <p style="text-align: left;"><strong>What You’ll Do:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Own product and technical direction: translate institutional needs — custody, settlement, tokenization, trading, and regulatory context — into a buildable roadmap; set the technical bar, make hard design calls, and stay in the code when it matters</li> <li>Drive commercial and account growth: run your account like a business, identify expansion opportunities, advise senior client stakeholders (CTO, COO, Head of Digital Assets), and convert delivered trust into the next engagement</li> <li>Lead client and executive relationships: run discovery from engineers to the C-suite, define success in their terms (adoption, risk, cost, time-to-value), and navigate complex regulated organizations to alignment</li> <li>Rotate into R&amp;D and Innovation: lead 0-to-1 product creation on frontier blockchain and AI, and codify learnings into reusable components and playbooks that feed back into client delivery</li> <li>Serve as the voice of the customer back into Galaxy’s product organization, translating delivered insights into what the firm builds next</li> <li>Embrace and champion the thoughtful adoption of AI to improve team performance and business outcomes.</li> <li>Leverage AI tools (e.g., generative AI, automation platforms, data copilots) to improve productivity, decision-making, and output quality in your day-to-day work.</li> </ul> <p style="text-align: left;"><strong>What We’re Looking For:</strong></p> <ul style="text-align: left;"> <li>Proven track record of owning outcomes end to end in ambiguous, high-stakes settings</li> <li>Real technical depth — you’ve shipped production software and can lead engineers credibly</li> <li>Commercial instinct — you’ve turned delivered work into expanded scope or revenue</li> <li>Executive presence — fluent from a whiteboard to a C-suite briefing</li> <li>Founder-grade agency and low ego — you find a path when none is obvious and care about the outcome, not the credit</li> <li>Typically 6+ years across forward-deployed/solutions engineering, technical PM, and client-facing delivery; shape of ownership matters more than years</li> This person should be comfortable working in a fast-paced environment and have the ability and “grit” necessary to manage multiple high priority tasks.</p> <p style="text-align: left;"><strong>What You’ll Do:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Architect and own the FP&amp;A insights data warehouse, establishing the single source of truth for firmwide management reporting, PnL analytics, budgeting, KPI multiple reporting cadences (daily, weekly, quarterly).</li> <li>Implement automated reconciliation frameworks ensuring data integrity across FP&amp;A reporting systems, reducing manual processes and operational risk.</li> <li>Manage cross-functional initiatives partnering with Technology teams to modernize legacy FP&amp;A Excel and Python models, defining technical requirements and architectural standards.</li> <li>Integrate best practices in data governance, version control, and testing across all FP&amp;A technical development workflows.</li> <li>Provide easily accessible data for wider team, to support ad-hoc analyses for the business and CFO’s organization.</li> <li>Embrace and champion the thoughtful adoption of AI to improve team performance and business outcomes.</li> <li>Leverage AI tools (e.g., generative AI, automation platforms, data copilots) to improve productivity, decision-making, and output quality in your day-to-day work.</li> </ul> <p style="text-align: left;"><strong>What We’re Looking For:</strong></p> <ul> <li>6+ years of progressive data engineering experience with deep expertise in Python and SQL</li> <li>We are open to hiring either a VP or Director for this position <ul> <li>VP: base salary range $175,000-$200,000, discretionary annual bonus on top</li> <li>Dir: base salary range $225,000-$250,000, discretionary annual bonus on top</li> </ul> </li> <li>Familiarity of various asset classes (FX, futures, options, etc.) and how to model their economic impact on a firm (PnL and capital).</li> <li>Strong analytical skills and experience working with large, unstructured datasets including data pipeline development to support insight generation</li> <li>Intellectually curious self-starter, comfortable in ambiguity and a fast-paced environment</li> <li>Highly detailed oriented with excellent communication skills</li> </ul> <p style="text-align: left;"><strong>Bonus Points:</strong><em>&nbsp;</em></p> <ul> <li>Experience with Databricks / Spark / Docker</li> <li>An understanding of data visualization tools – PowerBI, Tableau, etc.</li> <li>Knowledge of cryptocurrency</li> <li>Experience working at a high growth startup / tech company a plus</li> </ul> <p><strong>What We Offer:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Competitive base salary and discretionary bonus</li> <li>Flexible Time Off (i.e. unlimited paid vacation days)</li> <li>Company paid Holidays (11)</li> <li>Company paid sick leave</li> <li>Company-paid health and protective benefits for employees, partners, and other dependents</li> <li>3% 401(k) company contribution</li> <li> <div id="message-list_1770824396.129119" data-qa="virtual-list-item" data-item-key="1770824396.129119"> <div data-qa="message_container" data-qa-unprocessed="false" benefits for US employees</div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </li> <li>Generous paid Parental Leave</li> <li>Free virtual coaching and counseling sessions through Headspace</li> <li>Opportunities to learn about the Crypto industry</li> <li>Free daily snacks in-office</li> <li>Smart, entrepreneurial, and fun colleagues</li> <li>Employee Resource Groups</li> </ul> <p>Benefits may vary depending on location.</p> <p><em>Apply now and join us on our mission to engineer a new economic paradigm.</em></p><div class="content-pay-transparency"><div class="pay-input"><div class="description"><p>The base salary ranges included below will be commensurate with candidate experience, expertise and local market.
