title: Forward Deployed Engineer
full_description: <p><span style="font-size: 14pt;"><strong>Forward Deployed Engineer</strong></span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">At Dexory, we believe that real-time data will revolutionise the logistics industry. We are building the ultimate data insights platform that provides companies with unprecedented access to their operations through autonomous data capture and digital twins.</span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">As a <strong>Forward Deployed Engineer</strong> at Dexory, you will sit inside the engineering organisation as an intelligent interface layer between our various engineering teams. Dexory operates with a global fleet of autonomous robots, supported by a 24/7 first-line support team. The Forward Deployed Engineer sits above that layer, taking ownership of complex, ambiguous issues and driving them to resolution or to the right team. You will be one of Dexory’s first Forward Deployed Engineers, representing Dexory at the highest level in customer environments and helping to define how this function operates as we scale.</span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">This is a technically demanding role for someone who is as comfortable spotting patterns across weeks of telemetry data as they are at supporting a new customer deployment on the ground. You will query data across logs, databases, and observability tooling, interpret point cloud scan data, and navigate Grafana, AWS, and a range of robotics-specific tooling to investigate issues and understand their root cause. Crucially, you will also use what you learn to improve things — identifying recurring failure modes, feeding structured insights back into the engineering teams, and raising the platform’s reliability across our global fleet. You will also support new customer deployments end-to-end, bridging WMS and network integration questions with robot operational and perception configuration requirements.</span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">The right person is defined by their investigative instinct and technical curiosity, not their robotics or logistics background. Domain knowledge is built on the job through close collaboration with the engineering teams.</span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;"><strong>&nbsp;</strong></span></p> <h3><span style="font-size: 10pt;"><strong>Key Responsibilities</strong></span></h3> <ul> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;"><strong>Cross-functional Triage &amp; Investigation: </strong>Receive escalated issues from the first-line support team and investigate independently before routing to the relevant engineering teams. Query telemetry data, robot logs, AWS infrastructure, internal tooling and databases — including scan and point cloud data where relevant — to narrow the blast radius of a problem and form a view on root cause before pulling in specialist teams.</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;"><strong>Observability &amp; Monitoring: </strong>Navigate Grafana dashboards and internal tooling to monitor fleet and site health. Build or extend dashboards and alerting that improve visibility into system performance across deployed sites. Use telemetry data proactively to identify issues before they surface as customer complaints.</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;"><strong>New Customer Deployment Support: </strong>Work within customer systems to provide white glove deployment support for the Dexory platform end-to-end, covering WMS and ERP integration queries, network and connectivity requirements, robot operational setup, and perception feature configuration. Act as the cross-functional point of contact who can answer or route questions across the full Dexory system.</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;"><strong>Intelligent Escalation &amp; Routing: </strong>Own the escalation path from first-line support through to the right engineering team. Ensure that when specialist engineers are brought in, they receive a well-structured summary of what has already been investigated, what has been ruled out, and the most likely failure domain.</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;"><strong>Customer Communication: </strong>Act as a trusted technical advisor to strategic customers throughout deployment and into long-term steady-state operation. Build strong, lasting relationships with customer engineering and operations stakeholders, proactively identifying new opportunities to drive value throughout the lifecycle of an engagement. Run technical workshops and training sessions that drive lasting adoption. Produce clear, professional documentation covering deployment architectures, integration designs, and operational runbooks.</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;"><strong>Product &amp; Engineering Feedback: </strong>Identify recurring failure patterns across sites and translate them into structured product and engineering feedback. Contribute to internal knowledge bases and runbooks that reduce investigation time for future issues.</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;"><strong>Tooling &amp; Automation: </strong>Write scripts and tooling that automate repetitive investigation or deployment tasks. Contribute to reusable frameworks that improve the efficiency and consistency of the FDE function as the team grows.</span></li> </ul> <h3>&nbsp;</h3> <h3><span style="font-size: 10pt;"><strong>Required Qualifications &amp; Experience</strong></span></h3> <ul> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">4–5+ years of professional solutions engineering or technical operations experience, with a demonstrated ability to advise customer setups and investigate and diagnose complex, multi-system problems independently.</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Strong data querying skills: comfortable writing SQL, navigating time-series telemetry data, and pulling structured insight from large, noisy datasets.</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Hands-on experience with observability tooling such as Grafana, including building dashboards and using metrics data to diagnose production issues.</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Comfortable working in Linux environments: SSH, bash scripting, log analysis, and networking fundamentals.</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Experience with cloud infrastructure (AWS or equivalent), containerised deployments with Docker and Kubernetes, and modern data pipeline tooling.</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Proficiency in Python or an equivalent scripting language for investigation tooling, automation, and data analysis.</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Hands-on experience with AI-assisted development tooling (Anthropic, Google Gemini, OpenAI, or similar).</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Strong cross-functional communication skills: able to summarise a complex technical investigation clearly for both engineering teams and customer stakeholders.</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">High agency with an ability to navigate ambiguity. Comfortable forming and defending an independent view in complex, multi-system situations and driving issues to resolution without close direction.</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt; font-weight: bold;"><strong><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Willingness and ability to travel internationally to customer sites across Dexory’s global deployment footprint.</span></strong></li> </ul> <h3>&nbsp;</h3> <h3><span style="font-size: 10pt;"><strong>Nice to Have</strong></span></h3> <ul> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Familiarity with robotics systems, ROS2, or point cloud / LiDAR data, or genuine curiosity and aptitude to learn quickly on the job.</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Experience with robotics visualisation tooling.</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">WMS or ERP integration experience (SAP, Manhattan, Oracle WMS, or similar).</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Exposure to real-time messaging protocols such as Zenoh, MQTT, or gRPC.</span></li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Consulting or structured delivery experience, with familiarity with the discipline of client accountability and project-based delivery.</span></li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>Benefits</strong></p> <p>Starting from the interview process and continuing into your career with us, you will be working by our four Operating Principles:</p> <ul> <li>Performance: High standards, outstanding results,</li> <li>Impact: Big challenges, bigger results</li> <li>Commitment: All in, every time</li> <li>One team: One mission, shared success</li> </ul> <p>Joining our team and company isn't just about expertise; it's about embracing uncertainty with ambition. We're crafting world-changing solutions, fueled by a passion to redefine what's possible. We will look for you to help create and shape the future of logistics solutions through our products, our culture and our shared vision.&nbsp;</p> <p>You will also receive:</p> <ul> <li>Private healthcare via Bupa with 24/7 medical helpline&nbsp;</li> <li>Life insurance</li> <li>Income protection&nbsp;</li> <li>Pension: 4+% employee with option to opt into salary exchange, 5% employer</li> <li>Employee Assistance Programme - mental wellbeing, financial and legal advice/support&nbsp;</li> <li>25 holidays per year&nbsp;</li> <li>Full meals onsite in Wallingford</li> <li>Fun team events on and offsite, snacks of all kinds in the office&nbsp;</li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>AAP/EEO Statement &nbsp;</strong></p> <p>Dexory provides equal employment opportunities to all employees and applicants for employment. It prohibits discrimination and harassment of any type without regard to race, colour, religion, age, sex, national origin, disability status, genetics, protected veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by local laws. This policy applies to all terms and conditions of employment, including recruiting, hiring, placement, promotion, termination, layoff, recall, transfer, leaves of absence, compensation and training</p>

title: Data Engineer
location: Los Angeles; New York; Remote; San Francisco
full_description: <div class="jobs-box--fadein jobs-box--full-width jobs-box--with-cta-large jobs-description jobs-description--reformatted "> <article class="jobs-description__container m4"> <div class="jobs-description__content jobs-description-content "> <div id="job-details" class="jobs-box__html-content jobs-description-content__text t-14 t-normal jobs-description-content__text--stretch" data-artdeco-is-focused="true"> <p><strong>Who We Are</strong></p> <p>EDO is the TV outcomes company. Our leading measurement platform connects convergent TV airings to the ad-driven consumer behaviors most predictive of future sales. EDO empowers the advertising industry to maximize media impact, optimize creative performance, and know the fair value of every impression — across linear and streaming for an increasingly programmatic world. By combining immediate engagement signals with world-class decision science and vertical AI, EDO equips industry leaders with syndicated, investment-grade data that aligns media to business results — with detailed competitive, category, and historical insights. Leading brands, agencies, networks, streamers, and studios trust EDO’s TV intelligence to know what works.</p> <p>EDO is headquartered in New York City and Los Angeles with an office space in San Francisco. We recognize the benefits of hybrid working, and want to create the best balance to ensure we can continue working together effectively. <strong>For those who reside full-time in NYC, SF, or LA: we have a hybrid work policy of three days in the office and two remote work days.&nbsp;</strong><br><br>To learn more about the work we do at EDO, please visit <a href="https://www.edo.com/about-us/press"><strong>EDO Press</strong></a>.</p> <h4><strong>The Role</strong></h4> <p>As a Data Engineer at EDO, you will join a team of talented engineers working closely with Data Scientists to build and scale our next-generation Ad EnGage data pipeline. This pipeline measures and optimizes the effectiveness of advertising by combining and analyzing a wide range of datasets, including advertising occurrence data, outcome data, identity resolution data, and more. Our clients rely on these insights to make critical decisions about their advertising strategy.</p> <p>You will work with large-scale datasets (hundreds of TBs to petabyte-scale systems) using a modern data stack centered on AWS, Airflow, dbt, and Snowflake. You’ll contribute to building reliable, high-quality data pipelines and improving the performance, scalability, and observability of our data platform.</p> <p><strong>What We Are Looking For </strong></p> <ul> <li>3-6 years of experience as a Data Engineer.&nbsp;</li> <li>Hands-on experience with cloud data platforms (Snowflake or Redshift preferred).</li> <li>Strong understanding of data warehousing concepts and cloud infrastructure (AWS preferred).</li> <li>Experience building and maintaining ETL/ELT pipelines using tools such as Airflow and dbt.</li> <li>Strong SQL skills, including query optimization, data modeling, and working with large datasets.</li> <li>Proficiency in at least one scripting language, preferably Python.</li> <li>Hands-on experience with large-scale, complex data pipelines operating at billions to trillions of rows of data.&nbsp;</li> <li>Ability to work independently on well-scoped projects, collaborate with cross-functional partners, and deliver production-ready solutions.</li> </ul> <p><strong>Compensation and Benefits</strong></p> <p>EDO offers a competitive compensation package. Components of compensation include:</p> <ul> <li>Mid-stage equity and competitive salary</li> <li>Flexible Time Off</li> <li>Medical, dental and vision coverage: EDO provides full coverage for individual medical plans and partial coverage for dependent or family plans.</li> <li>401(k) plan, FSA, HSA</li> <li>Commuter Benefits</li> <li>When in an office, employee meals, snacks, and more</li> </ul> <p>In compliance with New York and California Pay Transparency Law, the salary range for this position is $120,000 to $160,000 plus equity. We note the salary information as a general guideline only, as actual compensation may vary from posting. We will consider various factors to determine the offer for this role, including the scope and responsibilities of the position, relevant work experience, key skills, training, and business considerations.</p> <p>EDO is an Equal Opportunity Employer. We do not discriminate based on race, color, ethnicity, ancestry, national origin, religion, sex, gender, gender identity, gender expression, sexual orientation, age, disability, veteran status, genetic information, marital status, or any legally protected status. All your information will be kept confidential according to EEO guidelines.</p> </div> </div> </article> </div>

title: Senior Data Engineer
location: Los Angeles; New York; Remote; San Francisco
full_description: <div class="jobs-box--fadein jobs-box--full-width jobs-box--with-cta-large jobs-description jobs-description--reformatted "> <article class="jobs-description__container m4"> <div class="jobs-description__content jobs-description-content "> <div id="job-details" class="jobs-box__html-content jobs-description-content__text t-14 t-normal jobs-description-content__text--stretch" data-artdeco-is-focused="true"> <p><strong>Who We Are</strong></p> <p>EDO is the TV outcomes company. Our leading measurement platform connects convergent TV airings to the ad-driven consumer behaviors most predictive of future sales. EDO empowers the advertising industry to maximize media impact, optimize creative performance, and know the fair value of every impression — across linear and streaming for an increasingly programmatic world. By combining immediate engagement signals with world-class decision science and vertical AI, EDO equips industry leaders with syndicated, investment-grade data that aligns media to business results — with detailed competitive, category, and historical insights. Leading brands, agencies, networks, streamers, and studios trust EDO’s TV intelligence to know what works.</p> <p>EDO is headquartered in New York City and Los Angeles with an office space in San Francisco. We recognize the benefits of hybrid working, and want to create the best balance to ensure we can continue working together effectively. <strong>For those who reside full-time in NYC, SF, or LA: we have a hybrid work policy of three days in the office and two remote work days.&nbsp;</strong><br><br>To learn more about the work we do at EDO, please visit <a href="https://www.edo.com/about-us/press"><strong>EDO Press</strong></a>.</p> <h4><strong>The Role</strong></h4> <p>As a Senior Data Engineer at EDO, you will join a team of talented Data Engineers working closely with Data Scientists to build out our next generation Ad EnGage data pipeline. This pipeline measures and optimizes the effectiveness of advertising by combining and analyzing dozens of sources of advertising occurrence data, advertising outcome data, identity resolution data, and various other types of data. Our clients use these insights to make critical business decisions about their advertising strategy. You will work with large data sets (trillions of rows and hundreds of TB of data) using a modern tech stack centered on AWS, Airflow, DBT, and Snowflake.</p> <p><strong>What We Are Looking For&nbsp;</strong></p> <ul> <li>6+ years of data engineering experience and three years of hands-on experience with cloud data platforms (preferably Snowflake or Redshift).</li> <li>Good working knowledge of data warehousing platforms (such as Snowflake, Redshift, etc), cloud computing (such as AWS), and ETL/data pipeline technologies (such as Airflow, DBT).</li> <li>Production experience building and operating complex and scalable data pipelines that optimize on data quality and are resilient to poor quality data sources.</li> <li>Strong experience with orchestration tools (Airflow strongly preferred) and dbt, including pipeline design, scheduling strategies, and failure recovery patterns</li> <li>Strong expertise in SQL, including query optimization/performance tuning, data modeling, schema design, and scalable data architecture.</li> <li>Proficiency in at least one scripting language, with Python preferred.</li> <li>Ability to work independently on loosely defined projects—gathering requirements and making architectural decisions that balance engineering constraints with business needs, while driving projects through to completion and production.</li> </ul> <p>Bonus points:</p> <ul> <li>Previous industry experience working with TV or other advertising data is a plus.</li> <li>Familiarity with data security, privacy, including handling sensitive enterprise data, PII, and compliance-driven pipelines.</li> <li>Exposure to Data Clean Room concepts/implementation and Clean Room platforms like LiveRamp, Snowflake or Databricks.</li> <li>Exposure to identity/entity resolution and/or householding concepts/implementation.</li> <li>A strong understanding of software engineering practices, principles, and fundamentals.</li> </ul> <p><strong>Compensation and Benefits</strong></p> <p>EDO offers a competitive compensation package. Components of compensation include:</p> <ul> <li>Mid-stage equity and competitive salary</li> <li>Flexible Time Off</li> <li>Medical, dental and vision coverage: EDO provides full coverage for individual medical plans and partial coverage for dependent or family plans.</li> <li>401(k) plan, FSA, HSA</li> <li>Commuter Benefits</li> <li>When in an office, employee meals, snacks, and more</li> </ul> <p>In compliance with New York and California Pay Transparency Law, the salary range for this position is $160,000 to $190,000 plus equity. We note the salary information as a general guideline only, as actual compensation may vary from posting. We will consider various factors to determine the offer for this role, including the scope and responsibilities of the position, relevant work experience, key skills, training, and business considerations.</p> <p>EDO is an Equal Opportunity Employer. We do not discriminate based on race, color, ethnicity, ancestry, national origin, religion, sex, gender, gender identity, gender expression, sexual orientation, age, disability, veteran status, genetic information, marital status, or any legally protected status. All your information will be kept confidential according to EEO guidelines.</p> </div> </div> </article> </div>

At Valtech, we recognize that talent comes in many forms, and we value diverse perspectives and a willingness to learn.</span></span><span class="EOP SCXW105898609 BCX0" data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></strong></p> <h3><strong><span data-contrast="auto">Commitment to reaching all kinds of people</span></strong><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></h3> <p><span data-contrast="auto">We design experiences that work for all kinds of people - and that starts with our own teams. At Valtech, we’re intentional about building an inclusive culture where everyone feels supported to grow, thrive and achieve their goals. No matter your background, you belong here. </span><a href="https://www.valtech.com/about/diversity-inclusion/" target="_blank"><span data-contrast="none"><span data-ccp-charstyle="Hyperlink">Explore our Diversity &amp; Inclusion site</span></span></a><span data-contrast="auto">&nbsp;to see how we’re creating a more equitable Valtech for all.</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p> <h3><strong><span data-contrast="auto">The benefits&nbsp;</span></strong><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></h3> <p><span data-contrast="auto">This is a full time position based in the UK.&nbsp;</span></p> <p><span data-contrast="auto">Beyond a competitive compensation package, we offer:</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p> <ul> <li><span data-contrast="auto">Flexibility, with remote and hybrid work options (country-dependent)</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></li> <li><span data-contrast="auto">Career advancement, with international mobility and professional development programs</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></li> <li><span data-contrast="auto">Learning and development, with access to cutting-edge tools, training and industry experts</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></li> </ul> <p><span data-contrast="auto">Our benefits are tailored to each location. Your Talent Partner will provide full details during the hiring process.</span> <span data-contrast="auto">&nbsp;</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p> <h3><strong><span data-contrast="auto">Your application process</span></strong></h3> <p><span data-contrast="auto">Once you apply, our Talent Acquisition team will review your application. Your CV should cover key information on relevant experiences and expertise. We do not require information such as age, gender, marital status, or a headshot in your application. We review all candidates based on skills, experience, and potential.</span></p> <p><span data-contrast="auto">⚠️ Beware of recruitment fraud!</span></p> <p><span data-contrast="auto">We are committed to inclusion and accessibility. If you need reasonable accommodations during the interview process, please either indicate it in your application or let your Talent Partner know.</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p> <p><strong><span data-contrast="auto">About Valtech</span></strong></p> <p><span data-contrast="auto">Valtech is the experience innovation company that exists to unlock a better way to experience the world. By blending crafts, categories, and cultures, we help brands unlock new value in an increasingly digital world.</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p> <p><span data-contrast="auto">At the intersection of data, AI, creativity, and technology, we drive transformation for leading organizations, including L’Oréal, Mars, Audi, P&amp;G, Volkswagen Dolby, and more.</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p> <p><span data-contrast="auto">At Valtech, we don’t just talk about transformation. We make it happen. Our people are the heart of our success, and we foster a workplace where everyone has the support to thrive, grow and innovate.</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p> <p><span data-contrast="auto">Are you ready to create what’s next? Join us.</span></p>

title: Data Engineer

Pour nos collaborateurs, nous offrons des opportunités de développement, une culture fondée sur des valeurs, une carrière internationale et la possibilité de façonner l’avenir de l’expérience client.</span></span><span class="EOP Selected SCXW119582339 BCX0" data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p> <h3><span class="TextRun SCXW129089968 BCX0" lang="EN-US" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun SpellingErrorV2Themed SCXW129089968 BCX0">Opportunité</span></span><span class="EOP Selected SCXW129089968 BCX0" data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></h3> <p><span data-contrast="auto">À&nbsp;Valtech, vous trouverez un environnement propice à l’apprentissage continu, à l’impact concret et à la croissance professionnelle. secteurs d'activité.</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p> <p><span data-contrast="auto">Nous&nbsp;sommes&nbsp;fiers&nbsp;de:</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p> <ul> <li class="PDq2pG_selectionAnchorContainer" data-section-id="1jm5u0h" data-start="48" data-end="63"><strong data-start="51" data-end="63">Le poste</strong></h2> <p data-start="65" data-end="426"><strong data-start="65" data-end="195">Veuillez noter que nous acceptons uniquement les candidatures provenant des provinces de l’Ontario et du Québec pour ce poste.</strong> Pour les candidats basés au Québec, une excellente maîtrise de l’anglais est requise, puisque le poste implique une collaboration régulière avec des équipes situées dans le reste des Amériques ainsi qu’occasionnellement en Europe.</p> <h2 data-section-id="nsez0z" data-start="428" data-end="452"><strong data-start="431" data-end="452">Ce que vous ferez</strong></h2> <h3 data-section-id="br01wd" data-start="454" data-end="494"><strong data-start="458" data-end="494">Leadership en ingénierie de l’IA</strong></h3> <ul data-start="496" data-end="1319"> <li data-section-id="17nz33g" data-start="496" data-end="663">Diriger la conception et le déploiement d’applications d’IA d’entreprise, de copilotes, d’assistants intelligents et de solutions basées sur des agents (Agentic AI).</li> <li data-section-id="m1agvc" data-start="664" data-end="799">Définir des stratégies d’implémentation alignant les capacités de l’IA avec les objectifs d’affaires et les besoins des utilisateurs.</li> <li data-section-id="iec0rt" data-start="800" data-end="995">Accompagner les équipes dans la conception de flux de travail IA évolutifs, de systèmes de recherche d’information (retrieval), de couches d’orchestration et d’expériences intégrant des outils.</li> <li data-section-id="z1uxnr" data-start="996" data-end="1227">Promouvoir les meilleures pratiques en matière de prompt engineering, de génération augmentée par récupération (RAG), d’appel d’outils (tool calling), de gestion du contexte, de tests, d’observabilité et d’évaluation des modèles.</li> <li data-section-id="1q5yio7" data-start="1228" data-end="1319">Garantir des implémentations IA de haute qualité, sécurisées, maintenables et évolutives.</li> </ul> <h3 data-section-id="3o7mvv" data-start="1321" data-end="1377"><strong data-start="1325" data-end="1377">Relation client et gestion des parties prenantes</strong></h3> <ul data-start="1379" data-end="1934"> <li data-section-id="dfj84r" data-start="1379" data-end="1520">Collaborer avec les clients afin de comprendre leurs enjeux d’affaires et d’identifier des opportunités de création de valeur grâce à l’IA.</li> <li data-section-id="5nu2o2" data-start="1521" data-end="1638">Transformer des besoins parfois ambigus en approches d’implémentation concrètes et en feuilles de route techniques.</li> <li data-section-id="15rrn8n" data-start="1639" data-end="1768">Agir en tant que conseiller de confiance lors d’ateliers, de sessions de découverte et de présentations auprès de la direction.</li> <li data-section-id="1fverr" data-start="1769" data-end="1934">Travailler en étroite collaboration avec les Data Scientists, Data Engineers, Architectes, Analytics Engineers, équipes Produit et autres parties prenantes métier.</li> </ul> <h2 data-section-id="1m8hwu0" data-start="1936" data-end="1966"><strong data-start="1939" data-end="1966">Qualifications requises</strong></h2> <ul data-start="1968" data-end="3005"> <li data-section-id="1tk2w52" data-start="1968" data-end="2129">Plus de 7 ans d’expérience en ingénierie logicielle, ingénierie de l’IA, ingénierie en apprentissage automatique (Machine Learning) ou dans un domaine connexe.</li> <li data-section-id="tlfguq" data-start="2130" data-end="2245">Au moins 2 ans d’expérience dans la direction d’équipes techniques ou la gestion de professionnels en ingénierie.</li> <li data-section-id="1exxex8" data-start="2246" data-end="2418">Solide expérience dans le développement et le déploiement en production d’applications alimentées par l’IA et de solutions basées sur les grands modèles de langage (LLM).</li> <li data-section-id="1ibb87p" data-start="2419" data-end="2768">Expérience pratique dans la conception et l’implémentation de : <ul data-start="2487" data-end="2768"> <li data-section-id="1fj6rel" data-start="2487" data-end="2533">Applications d’IA générative (Generative AI)</li> <li data-section-id="1a250y3" data-start="2536" data-end="2584">Flux de travail agentiques (Agentic Workflows)</li> <li data-section-id="jwzhd1" data-start="2587" data-end="2645">Solutions de génération augmentée par récupération (RAG)</li> <li data-section-id="60k5pk" data-start="2648" data-end="2732">Mécanismes d’appel d’outils (Tool Calling) et modèles d’orchestration de workflows</li> <li data-section-id="gxcfco" data-start="2735" data-end="2768">Intégrations basées sur des API</li> </ul> </li> <li data-section-id="1p27b5k" data-start="2769" data-end="2818">Excellente maîtrise du développement en Python.</li> <li data-section-id="uh3ru0" data-start="2819" data-end="2853">Expérience avec Microsoft Azure.</li> <li data-section-id="1b57j2o" data-start="2854" data-end="2925">Expérience des plateformes et services d’IA infonuagiques (Cloud AI).</li> <li data-section-id="11obvac" data-start="2926" data-end="3005">Excellentes compétences en communication et en gestion des parties prenantes.</li> </ul> <hr> <h3 class="PDq2pG_selectionAnchorContainer" data-section-id="1dubrra" data-start="0" data-end="33"><strong data-start="4" data-end="33">Qualifications souhaitées</strong></h3> <ul data-start="35" data-end="639"> <li data-section-id="7m64a2" data-start="35" data-end="175">Expérience dans la livraison de solutions d’IA au sein d’un cabinet de conseil, d’une agence numérique ou d’un environnement d’entreprise.</li> <li data-section-id="1sb5r80" data-start="176" data-end="306">Expérience dans la gestion simultanée de plusieurs projets ou flux de travail auprès de différents clients ou unités d’affaires.</li> <li data-section-id="n1kgnc" data-start="307" data-end="458">Bonne connaissance de la gouvernance de l’IA, des pratiques d’IA responsable, ainsi que des enjeux liés à la sécurité et à la protection des données.</li> <li data-section-id="5x3oq5" data-start="459" data-end="547">Connaissance des cadres d’évaluation des applications d’IA et des systèmes agentiques.</li> <li data-section-id="17babnb" data-start="548" data-end="639">Expérience de collaboration avec des équipes d’ingénierie internationales et distribuées.</li> </ul> <h2 data-section-id="1tip4wp" data-start="641" data-end="689"><strong data-start="644" data-end="689">À quoi ressemble la réussite dans ce rôle</strong></h2> <ul data-start="691" data-end="1259"> <li data-section-id="wmcu0u" data-start="691" data-end="814">Concevoir et livrer des solutions d’IA évolutives, prêtes pour la production et générant une valeur d’affaires mesurable.</li> <li data-section-id="j7muzt" data-start="815" data-end="932">Développer des équipes d’ingénierie IA performantes grâce au coaching, au mentorat et au développement des talents.</li> <li data-section-id="1srx3w1" data-start="933" data-end="1037">Promouvoir des modèles d’implémentation réutilisables ainsi que les meilleures pratiques d’ingénierie.</li> <li data-section-id="5qvvzf" data-start="1038" data-end="1131">Garantir une adoption fiable, sécurisée et responsable de l’IA dans l’ensemble des projets.</li> <li data-section-id="pgaklc" data-start="1132" data-end="1259">Renforcer le positionnement de Valtech comme leader de la transformation numérique propulsée par l’intelligence artificielle.</li> </ul> <p data-start="1261" data-end="1588">Si vous ne répondez pas à l’ensemble des qualifications mentionnées ou si certaines expériences vous manquent, nous vous encourageons tout de même à postuler. Chez Valtech, nous savons que le talent peut prendre de nombreuses formes. Nous valorisons les parcours diversifiés, les perspectives variées et la volonté d’apprendre.</p> <h3 class="PDq2pG_selectionAnchorContainer" data-section-id="1fq4amq" data-start="0" data-end="48"><strong data-start="4" data-end="48">Notre engagement envers tous les talents</strong></h3> <p data-start="50" data-end="528">Nous concevons des expériences qui répondent aux besoins de tous, et cela commence par nos propres équipes. Chez Valtech, nous nous engageons à bâtir une culture inclusive où chacun se sent soutenu pour évoluer, s’épanouir et atteindre ses objectifs. Quel que soit votre parcours, vous avez votre place chez nous. Découvrez notre site consacré à la <strong data-start="399" data-end="429">Diversité et à l’Inclusion</strong> pour en savoir plus sur la manière dont nous construisons une entreprise plus équitable pour tous.</p> <hr data-start="530" data-end="533"> <h2 data-section-id="13pyppf" data-start="535" data-end="555"><strong data-start="538" data-end="555">Les avantages</strong></h2> <p data-start="557" data-end="739">Il s'agit d'un poste à temps plein basé à <strong data-start="599" data-end="611">Montréal</strong> ou <strong data-start="615" data-end="626">Toronto</strong>. Le salaire annuel offert se situe entre <strong data-start="668" data-end="696">95 000 $ et 130 000 $ CA</strong>, selon l'expérience et le lieu de travail.</p> <p data-start="741" data-end="871">Valtech offre un programme complet d'avantages sociaux, accessible après <strong data-start="814" data-end="847">trois mois de service continu</strong>, comprenant notamment :</p> <ul data-start="873" data-end="2938"> <li data-section-id="vclnzv" data-start="873" data-end="1181">Un régime d'assurance complet vous permettant de choisir la formule la mieux adaptée à vos besoins (<strong data-start="975" data-end="999">Or, Argent ou Bronze</strong>). L'employeur peut prendre en charge jusqu'à <strong data-start="1045" data-end="1053">80 %</strong> de votre couverture selon l'option choisie. Ce régime comprend notamment une assurance invalidité de courte et de longue durée.</li> <li data-section-id="wva5xp" data-start="1183" data-end="1546"><strong data-start="1185" data-end="1218">Dialogue, offert par Sun Life</strong>, donne accès à des services de santé virtuels vous permettant de consulter un professionnel de la santé pour des urgences, le renouvellement d'ordonnances et bien plus encore. Vous bénéficiez également d'un <strong data-start="1426" data-end="1484">Programme d'aide aux employés et à leur famille (PAEF)</strong> ainsi que d'un programme complet de soutien en santé mentale.</li> <li data-section-id="ku9cam" data-start="1548" data-end="1824">Un <strong data-start="1553" data-end="1597">Compte de dépenses personnelles de 500 $</strong>, pouvant être utilisé pour le remboursement de frais de santé, un abonnement à un centre sportif, des titres de transport en commun, des fournitures de bureau ou des cotisations à votre <strong data-start="1784" data-end="1792">REER</strong> par l'intermédiaire de Valtech.</li> <li data-section-id="19vwzks" data-start="1826" data-end="2271">Un régime d'épargne-retraite dans lequel <strong data-start="1869" data-end="1947">Valtech verse une contribution équivalente à 100 % de vos cotisations REER</strong>, par l'intermédiaire d'un <strong data-start="1974" data-end="2038">Régime de participation différée aux bénéfices (RPDB / DPSP)</strong>, jusqu'à concurrence de <strong data-start="2063" data-end="2070">4 %</strong>. Vous pouvez commencer à cotiser à votre REER dès votre arrivée, et au RPDB après trois mois de service. Les droits acquis sur les cotisations de l'employeur sont obtenus après <strong data-start="2248" data-end="2270">24 mois de service</strong>.</li> <li data-section-id="1qhkfwp" data-start="2273" data-end="2565">Des <strong data-start="2279" data-end="2301">vacances flexibles</strong>, conformément à la politique de Valtech, afin de favoriser un bon équilibre entre vie professionnelle et vie personnelle. Cinq jours sont disponibles pendant la période de probation, puis un nombre de jours calculé au prorata est accordé pour le reste de l'année.</li> <li data-section-id="1j6lq07" data-start="2567" data-end="2678">Une <strong data-start="2573" data-end="2630">allocation technologique personnelle de 30 $ par mois</strong>, offerte à chaque employé dès son premier jour.</li> <li data-section-id="to9egu" data-start="2680" data-end="2938">Une fermeture de l'entreprise durant les <strong data-start="2723" data-end="2747">fêtes de fin d'année</strong>, ainsi qu'un horaire flexible tout au long de l'année, vous permettant notamment de profiter des vendredis après-midi ensoleillés, à condition que vos heures hebdomadaires soient effectuées.</li> </ul> <hr data-start="2940" data-end="2943"> <h2 data-section-id="171qebl" data-start="2945" data-end="2982"><strong data-start="2948" data-end="2982">Votre processus de candidature</strong></h2> <p data-start="2984" data-end="3203">Une fois votre candidature soumise, notre équipe <strong data-start="3033" data-end="3055">Talent Acquisition</strong> l'examinera avec attention. Si votre profil correspond aux exigences du poste, nous vous contacterons afin de vous présenter les prochaines étapes.</p> <p data-start="3205" data-end="3474">Votre CV doit mettre en avant vos expériences pertinentes et votre expertise. Nous ne demandons pas d'informations telles que l'âge, le genre, l'état civil ou une photo. Toutes les candidatures sont évaluées sur la base des compétences, de l'expérience et du potentiel.</p> <p data-start="3476" data-end="3609">⚠️ <strong data-start="3479" data-end="3521">Attention aux fraudes au recrutement :</strong> veuillez communiquer uniquement avec des adresses électroniques officielles de Valtech.</p> <p data-start="3611" data-end="3855">Nous nous engageons à offrir un processus de recrutement inclusif et accessible. Si vous avez besoin de mesures d'adaptation raisonnables durant les entretiens, veuillez l'indiquer dans votre candidature ou en informer votre <strong data-start="3836" data-end="3854">Talent Partner</strong>.</p> <hr data-start="3857" data-end="3860"> <h2 data-section-id="fvvo04" data-start="3862" data-end="3888"><strong data-start="3865" data-end="3888">À propos de Valtech</strong></h2> <p data-start="3890" data-end="4043">Valtech est une entreprise d'<strong data-start="3919" data-end="3950">innovation par l'expérience</strong> dont la mission est de réinventer la manière dont les individus interagissent avec le monde.</p> <p data-start="4045" data-end="4221">En combinant les expertises, les disciplines et les cultures, nous aidons les plus grandes marques à créer de nouvelles sources de valeur dans un monde toujours plus numérique.</p> <p data-start="4223" data-end="4468">À la croisée des <strong data-start="4240" data-end="4322">données, de l'intelligence artificielle, de la créativité et de la technologie</strong>, nous accompagnons la transformation d'organisations de premier plan telles que <strong data-start="4403" data-end="4450">L'Oréal, Mars, Audi, P&amp;G, Volkswagen, Dolby</strong> et bien d'autres.</p> <p data-start="4470" data-end="4733">Chez Valtech, nous ne nous contentons pas de parler de transformation : <strong data-start="4542" data-end="4566">nous la concrétisons</strong>. Nos collaborateurs sont au cœur de notre réussite, et nous cultivons un environnement de travail où chacun dispose des moyens de s'épanouir, de grandir et d'innover.</p> <p data-start="4735" data-end="4793" data-is-last-node="" data-is-only-node=""><strong data-start="4735" data-end="4793" data-is-last-node="">Prêt(e) à créer ce qui vient ensuite ? Rejoignez-nous.</strong></p> <hr>

agentic systems.</li> <li>Experience supporting distributed, international engineering teams.</li> </ul> <hr> <h2>What Success Looks Like</h2> <ul> <li>Delivering scalable, production-ready AI The employer may contribute up to 80% of your coverage depending on the selected module. This plan includes <strong>short- and long-term disability coverage</strong>.</li> <li><strong>Dialogue via Sun Life</strong> provides virtual healthcare services, allowing you to consult with a healthcare professional for emergencies, prescription renewals, and more. You also have access to the <strong>Employee and Family Assistance Program</strong>, as well as a <strong>complete mental health support program</strong>.</li> <li>A <strong>$500 Personal Spending Account</strong>, which can be used for healthcare reimbursements, gym memberships, public transit passes, office supplies, or contributions to your RRSP through Valtech.</li> <li>A <strong>retirement plan</strong> where Valtech will match 100% of your RRSP contributions through a Deferred Profit Sharing Plan (DPSP), up to a maximum of 4%. You can start contributing to your RRSP immediately, and to the DPSP after 3 months. The vesting of the DPSP will be after a 24 months of service.&nbsp;</li> <li>Access to a <strong>flexible vacation under Valtech's policy</strong> to support your work-life balance, with 5 days available during your probation period and a prorated amount calculated for the remainder of the year.</li> <li><strong>Personal Technology Reimbursement</strong> – $30/month for every employee-offered on day 1.&nbsp;</li> <li>We close during the <strong>winter holidays</strong> and <strong>offer flexible scheduling</strong> throughout the year, so you can enjoy those sunny Friday afternoons—provided your weekly hours are completed.</li> </ul> <h3><strong><span data-contrast="auto">Your application process</span></strong></h3> <p><span data-contrast="auto">Once you apply, our Talent Acquisition team will review your application. &nbsp;Lead complex data engineering workstreams across multiple business areas, source systems, domains, or stakeholder groups.<br>• &nbsp; &nbsp;Define data engineering approaches that align business needs, source-system realities, platform constraints, transformation patterns, and downstream consumption requirements.<br>• &nbsp; &nbsp;Translate ambiguous stakeholder needs into structured pipeline strategies, ingestion patterns, transformation designs, curated data layers, and actionable recommendations.<br>• &nbsp; &nbsp;Guide the design and implementation of scalable ingestion, transformation, and serving patterns across cloud warehouses, lakehouses, and analytical environments.<br>• &nbsp; &nbsp;Contribute to hiring, onboarding, capability development, and team maturity within the data engineering practice.<br>• &nbsp; &nbsp;Follow established governance, privacy, security, and data-quality standards across the work of the team.<br></span></p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <h3><strong><span data-contrast="auto">Must have qualifications</span></strong></h3> <p><span data-contrast="auto">To be considered for this role, you must meet the following essential qualifications:</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p> <p><span data-contrast="auto">• &nbsp; Upper-intermediate English level</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p> <p><span data-contrast="auto">• &nbsp; Technical Requirements: Microsoft Fabric, Microsoft Foundry, APIM Gateway, App Insights, and Cosmos DB.</span></p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <h3><strong><span data-contrast="auto">Commitment to reaching all kinds of people</span></strong><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></h3> <p><span data-contrast="auto">We design experiences that work for all kinds of people - and that starts with our own teams. Join us.</span></p>

la province de Québec pour ce poste. La maîtrise de l’anglais est nécessaire, car le poste implique une collaboration avec des équipes situées dans le reste des Amériques et occasionnellement en Europe.</p> <p class="isSelectedEnd">Nous recherchons un(e) ingénieur(e) Forward Deployed (FDE) possédant une expertise approfondie de Google Cloud et de l’IA appliquée afin de travailler directement avec nos clients d’entreprise et de transformer les capacités d’IA de pointe en systèmes prêts pour la production. Ce rôle s’adresse à un(e) ingénieur(e) à l’aise dans des environnements ambigus, capable de coder aux côtés des équipes clients et de prendre en charge des initiatives IA de bout en bout — de la découverte technique à l’architecture, au développement, au déploiement et à la transition opérationnelle.</p> <p class="isSelectedEnd">Le ou la candidat(e) idéal(e) a déjà livré des solutions d’IA agentique sur Google Cloud, maîtrise Vertex AI et Gemini, et est à l’aise avec l’architecture de systèmes multi-agents, les pipelines RAG et les intégrations par appels d’outils dans des environnements d’entreprise complexes. Vous agirez comme un(e) bâtisseur(se) intégré(e) — et non comme un(e) conseiller(ère) — en écrivant du code de production, en déboguant des systèmes en direct et en co-développant avec l’équipe d’ingénierie du client afin d’instaurer les meilleures pratiques d’ingénierie de niveau Google et d’accélérer l’adoption de l’IA.</p> <p>Ce poste est entièrement à distance et peut nécessiter des déplacements occasionnels.</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><span data-contrast="auto">Responsabilités&nbsp;du poste</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <ul> <li class="isSelectedEnd">S’intégrer aux équipes d’ingénierie des clients et diriger des ateliers de découverte technique avec les parties prenantes d’affaires, les responsables de l’ingénierie et les équipes de sécurité afin de transformer des problèmes d’affaires ambigus en architectures IA claires et en plans de livraison concrets.</li> <li class="isSelectedEnd">Architecturer, développer et livrer des solutions d’IA agentique prêtes pour la production sur Google Cloud — incluant des systèmes multi-agents, des serveurs MCP, des sous-agents, des compétences, des connecteurs, des wrappers agentiques et des garde-fous de sécurité — permettant aux clients de passer des projets pilotes à une valeur d’affaires mesurable.</li> <li class="isSelectedEnd">Concevoir et mettre en œuvre des pipelines de génération augmentée par récupération (RAG) et des architectures d’ancrage contextuel, incluant les stratégies de segmentation (chunking), les bases de données vectorielles et l’optimisation des embeddings afin de réduire les hallucinations et d’assurer la qualité des réponses.</li> <li class="isSelectedEnd">Construire la « couche connective » entre les produits IA de Google et l’infrastructure des clients, y compris les API, les silos de données hérités, la gestion des identités et les périmètres de sécurité.</li> <li class="isSelectedEnd">Mettre en œuvre des modèles multi-agents tels que ReAct, l’auto-réflexion et la délégation hiérarchique à l’aide de frameworks comme Google Agent Development Kit (ADK) ou LangGraph.</li> <li class="isSelectedEnd">Créer des pipelines d’évaluation haute performance et des cadres d’observabilité pour les systèmes agentiques, avec une attention particulière portée à la précision, à la sécurité, à la latence, au coût par requête et au nombre de jetons par seconde.</li> <li class="isSelectedEnd">Déboguer la logique des agents et optimiser la sélection des outils dans des environnements en production à fort trafic, notamment en retraçant les identifiants de conversation et de requête à travers des microservices afin de résoudre les défaillances de production.</li> <li class="isSelectedEnd">Co-développer avec les équipes d’ingénierie des clients et agir comme promoteur(trice) actif(ve) du développement assisté par IA, en introduisant et en opérationnalisant des outils de programmation IA afin d’accélérer la livraison et d’élever les pratiques d’ingénierie.</li> <li class="isSelectedEnd">Assurer un transfert structuré vers l’équipe du client, garantissant la prise en charge à long terme, la documentation et l’adoption par les utilisateurs finaux après la fin du mandat.</li> <li>Rédiger et maintenir à jour la documentation technique, les registres de décisions d’architecture et les résultats d’évaluation pour tous les mandats assignés.</li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><span data-contrast="auto">&nbsp;</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p> <h3><strong><span data-contrast="auto">Qualifications&nbsp;requises</span></strong><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></h3> <p><span data-contrast="auto">Afin d’être éligible à ce poste, vous devez posséder les qualifications essentielles&nbsp;suivantes:</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p> <ul> <li><span data-contrast="auto">Baccalauréat en génie, en informatique, dans un domaine connexe, ou expérience pratique équivalente.</span></li> <li><span data-contrast="auto">Plus de 5 ans d’expérience en développement logiciel avec Python, TypeScript ou des langages comparables, avec une expérience démontrée de livraison de code prêt pour la production à des clients internes ou externes.</span></li> <li><span data-contrast="auto">Expérience pratique dans l’architecture et le déploiement de systèmes d’IA sur Google Cloud Platform (GCP), incluant :</span> <ul> <li><span data-contrast="auto">Vertex AI — Vertex AI — déploiement de modèles, flux de fine-tuning, évaluation et observabilité au niveau de la plateforme.</span></li> <li><span data-contrast="auto">Modèles Gemini — Modèles Gemini — ingénierie de prompts, sorties structurées, appels de fonctions/outils et cas d’utilisation multimodaux.</span></li> <li><span data-contrast="auto">BigQuery et Cloud Storage — BigQuery et Cloud Storage — comme sources de données et d’ancrage contextuel pour les charges de travail IA.</span></li> <li><span data-contrast="auto">Cloud Run, Cloud Functions et Pub/Sub — Cloud Run, Cloud Functions et Pub/Sub — pour le déploiement et l’orchestration de services agentiques.</span></li> <li><span data-contrast="auto">Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform — conception, configuration et déploiement d’agents de niveau entreprise, ancrage sur les sources de données des clients, intégration d’outils et de connecteurs</span></li> </ul> </li> <li><span data-contrast="auto">Expérience démontrée dans le développement de solutions agentiques et alimentées par l’IA en production, incluant :</span> <ul> <li><span data-contrast="auto">Développement d’applications LLM — Développement d’applications LLM — ingénierie de prompts, développement d’agents et cadres d’évaluation.</span></li> <li><span data-contrast="auto">Architectures RAG — Architectures RAG — bases de données vectorielles, stratégies de segmentation (chunking) et évaluation de la récupération d’information.</span></li> <li><span data-contrast="auto">Pipelines de données — Pipelines de données — ingestion de données structurées et non structurées pour alimenter des solutions IA de niveau entreprise.</span></li> </ul> </li> <li><span data-contrast="auto">Expérience dans le déploiement de ressources cloud à l’aide de Terraform ou d’outils similaires d’infrastructure as code.</span></li> <li><span data-contrast="auto">Expérience dans la direction d’ateliers de découverte technique avec des parties prenantes d’affaires et des équipes d’ingénierie afin de définir les exigences IA et de transformer des objectifs d’affaires ambigus en feuilles de route techniques.</span></li> <li><span data-contrast="auto">Expérience dans l’intégration de systèmes d’IA avec l’infrastructure TI d’entreprise, incluant des API authentifiées, des systèmes de données hérités et des périmètres de sécurité corporatifs.</span></li> <li><span data-contrast="auto">Capacité à voyager jusqu’à 50 % du temps sur les sites des clients.</span></li> <li><span data-contrast="auto">Maîtrise de l’IA appliquée à la productivité</span></li> <li><span data-contrast="auto">Excellentes aptitudes en communication, incluant la capacité d’expliquer des concepts complexes d’IA et d’architecture à des ingénieurs hautement techniques ainsi qu’à des dirigeants non techniques.</span></li> </ul> <p><span data-contrast="auto">&nbsp;</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p> <h3><strong><span data-contrast="auto">Qualifications&nbsp;souhaitées</span></strong><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></h3> <ul> <li><span data-contrast="auto">Maîtrise ou doctorat en IA, en informatique, en apprentissage automatique ou dans un domaine technique connexe.</span></li> <li><span data-contrast="auto">Expérience dans la mise en œuvre de systèmes multi-agents à l’aide de frameworks tels que Google Agent Development Kit (ADK), LangGraph ou CrewAI, ainsi que de modèles d’agents complexes incluant ReAct, l’auto-réflexion et la délégation hiérarchique.</span></li> <li><span data-contrast="auto">Expérience pratique dans la conception et le déploiement de serveurs Model Context Protocol (MCP), de protocoles d’appel d’outils et d’écosystèmes de connecteurs pour les systèmes agentiques.</span></li> <li><span data-contrast="auto">Connaissance des métriques opérationnelles « natives aux LLM » (jetons/seconde, coût par requête, délai avant le premier jeton) et des techniques d’optimisation de la gestion d’état, du traçage granulaire et de la propagation des identifiants de conversation à travers des microservices.</span></li> <li><span data-contrast="auto">Expérience démontrée dans le dépannage de systèmes d’IA en production à fort trafic pendant des périodes critiques.</span></li> <li><span data-contrast="auto">Expérience dans l’architecture de solutions IA au sein d’infrastructures complexes, incluant la souveraineté des données, la gouvernance sécurisée et les environnements isolés (« air-gapped ») ou réglementés.</span></li> <li><span data-contrast="auto">Expérience dans la conception d’interfaces destinées aux utilisateurs pour les systèmes IA et agentiques, avec une attention particulière portée à l’ingénierie du contexte, à la transparence et à l’explicabilité.</span></li> <li><span data-contrast="auto">Expérience dans la direction d’initiatives à l’échelle organisationnelle (p. ex. migrations vers de nouvelles piles IA, programmes d’accélération de la vélocité en ingénierie) générant des améliorations mesurables de la productivité des équipes d’ingénierie et des résultats d’affaires.</span></li> <li><span data-contrast="auto">Expérience comme promoteur(trice) du développement logiciel assisté par IA, incluant l’introduction d’assistants de codage IA auprès des équipes d’ingénierie d’entreprise et le développement de meilleures pratiques internes pour leur utilisation.</span></li> <li><span data-contrast="auto">Certifications Google Cloud :</span> <ul> <li><span data-contrast="auto">Google Cloud Professional Machine Learning Engineer</span></li> <li><span data-contrast="auto">Google Cloud Professional Cloud Architect</span></li> <li><span data-contrast="auto">Google Cloud Professional Data Engineer</span></li> </ul> </li> <li><span data-contrast="auto">Connaissance du développement d’applications full stack et de la conception d’API REST/GraphQL.</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></li> </ul> <p><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p> <p><strong><span data-contrast="auto">Si vous ne possédez pas toutes les qualifications mentionnées ou si vous avez des lacunes dans votre parcours, nous vous encourageons à postuler. À&nbsp;Valtech, nous reconnaissons la richesse des talents et valorisons la pluralité des perspectives ainsi que la soif d’apprendre.</span></strong><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p> <p><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p> <h3><strong><span data-contrast="auto">Engagement pour&nbsp;l’inclusion</span></strong><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></h3> <p><span data-contrast="auto">Nous concevons des expériences qui conviennent à toutes les personnes — et cela commence par nos équipes. À&nbsp;Valtech, nous avons à cœur de bâtir une culture inclusive où chaque individu se sent soutenu pour grandir, s'épanouir et atteindre ses objectifs. Quel que soit votre parcours, vous avez votre place.&nbsp;</span><a href="https://www.valtech.com/about/diversity-inclusion/"><span data-contrast="none"><span data-ccp-charstyle="Hyperlink">Explorez notre site Diversité et Inclusion</span></span></a><span data-contrast="auto">&nbsp;pour&nbsp;en savoir plus sur nos actions en faveur d’un&nbsp;Valtech&nbsp;plus équitable.</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p> <p><span data-contrast="auto">&nbsp;</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p> <h3><strong><span data-contrast="auto">Bénéfices&nbsp;et&nbsp;avantages</span></strong><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></h3> <p><span data-contrast="auto">Il s’agit d’un poste en&nbsp;</span><span class="Y2IQFc" lang="fr">à temps plein.</span></p> <div id="tw-images"></div> <p data-start="116" data-end="220">Valtech offre un programme d’avantages sociaux complet, en vigueur après trois mois de service continu :</p> <ul> <li data-start="224" data-end="521">Un <strong>régime d’assurance complet</strong>, avec la possibilité de choisir le module qui répond le mieux à vos besoins — Or, Argent ou Bronze. Selon le module sélectionné, l’employeur peut contribuer jusqu’à 80 % de votre couverture. Ce régime comprend des assurances invalidité <strong>de courte et de longue durée</strong>.</li> <li data-start="524" data-end="873"><strong>Dialogue via Sun Life</strong> vous donne accès à des services de soins de santé virtuels, vous permettant de consulter un professionnel de la santé pour des urgences, des renouvellements d’ordonnance, et plus encore. Vous avez également accès au <strong>Programme d’aide aux employés et à leur famill</strong>e, ainsi qu’à un programme complet de soutien en santé mentale.</li> <li data-start="876" data-end="1134">Un <strong>Compte de dépenses</strong> personnel de $500, pouvant être utilisé pour des remboursements de soins de santé, des abonnements au gym, des passes de transport en commun, des fournitures de bureau ou des contributions à votre REER par l’intermédiaire de Valtech.</li> <li data-start="1137" data-end="1489">Un <strong>régime de retraite</strong> dans lequel Valtech égalera 100% de vos contributions à votre REER par l’entremise d’un Régime de participation différée aux bénéfices (RPDB), jusqu’à un maximum de 4 %. Vous pouvez commencer à cotiser à votre REER immédiatement, et au RPDB après 3 mois. L’acquisition des droits du RPDB est complétée après 24 mois de service.</li> <li data-start="1492" data-end="1740">L’accès à un <strong>programme de vacances flexibles</strong> selon la politique de Valtech pour soutenir votre équilibre travail-vie personnelle, comprenant 5 jours disponibles pendant votre période de probation et un montant au prorata pour le reste de l’année.</li> <li data-start="1743" data-end="1845">Un<strong> remboursement de technologie personnelle</strong> — $30/mois offert à chaque employé dès le premier jour.</li> <li data-start="1848" data-end="2076">Nous fermons durant les <strong>vacances d’hiver</strong> et offrons des<strong> horaires flexibles </strong>tout au long de l’année, afin que vous puissiez profiter des après-midi ensoleillées du vendredi — pourvu que vos heures hebdomadaires soient complétées.</li> </ul> <p><span data-contrast="auto">&nbsp;</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p> <h3><strong><span data-contrast="auto">Processus de&nbsp;recrutement</span></strong><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></h3> <p><span data-contrast="auto">Une&nbsp;fois&nbsp;votre&nbsp;candidature&nbsp;envoyée,&nbsp;notre&nbsp;équipe Talent Acquisition&nbsp;l’examinera&nbsp;sous&nbsp;quelques&nbsp;jours. Si&nbsp;vos&nbsp;compétences&nbsp;et&nbsp;votre&nbsp;expérience&nbsp;correspondent au poste, nous vous&nbsp;contacterons&nbsp;pour les&nbsp;prochaines&nbsp;étapes.</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p> <p><span data-contrast="auto">⚠️&nbsp;&nbsp;</span><span data-contrast="auto">Attention&nbsp;aux fraudes : n’interagissez qu’avec des adresses&nbsp;e-mail&nbsp;officielles se terminant par @valtech.com.</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p> <p><span data-contrast="auto">Nous&nbsp;nous&nbsp;engageons&nbsp;en&nbsp;faveur&nbsp;de&nbsp;l’inclusion&nbsp;et de&nbsp;l’accessibilité. Si vous&nbsp;avez&nbsp;besoin&nbsp;d’un&nbsp;aménagement&nbsp;raisonnable&nbsp;pendant le processus de&nbsp;recrutement,&nbsp;veuillez&nbsp;l’indiquer&nbsp;dans&nbsp;votre&nbsp;candidature&nbsp;ou&nbsp;en&nbsp;informer&nbsp;votre&nbsp;Talent Partner.</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p> <p><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p> <h3><strong><span data-contrast="auto">À&nbsp;propos&nbsp;de Valtech</span></strong><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></h3> <p><span data-contrast="auto">Valtech est&nbsp;une&nbsp;entreprise&nbsp;d’innovation&nbsp;et&nbsp;d’expérience&nbsp;qui a pour vocation&nbsp;d’offrir&nbsp;une&nbsp;meilleure&nbsp;façon&nbsp;d'appréhender&nbsp;le monde. En&nbsp;combinant&nbsp;expertises,&nbsp;secteurs&nbsp;et cultures, nous&nbsp;aidons&nbsp;les marques à&nbsp;créer&nbsp;de la&nbsp;valeur&nbsp;dans un monde de plus&nbsp;en&nbsp;plus digital.</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p> <p><span data-contrast="auto">À&nbsp;l’intersection&nbsp;des données, de&nbsp;l’IA, de la&nbsp;créativité&nbsp;et de la&nbsp;technologie, nous&nbsp;accompagnons&nbsp;la transformation de&nbsp;grandes&nbsp;entreprises&nbsp;telles&nbsp;que&nbsp;L’Oréal, Mars, Audi, P&amp;G, Volkswagen Dolby, et bien&nbsp;d’autres.</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p> <p><span data-contrast="auto">À Valtech, la transformation ne se&nbsp;limite&nbsp;pas aux&nbsp;discours. Nous la&nbsp;concrétisons. Nos&nbsp;collaborateurs&nbsp;sont&nbsp;au&nbsp;cœur&nbsp;de&nbsp;notre&nbsp;succès, et nous&nbsp;cultivons&nbsp;un&nbsp;environnement&nbsp;où&nbsp;chaque&nbsp;talent&nbsp;peut&nbsp;s’épanouir,&nbsp;évoluer&nbsp;et&nbsp;innover.</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p> <p><span data-contrast="auto">Prêt·e&nbsp;à imaginer la&nbsp;suite ?&nbsp;Rejoignez-nous.</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p> <p><span data-contrast="auto">Conformément à la loi allemande sur l'égalité de traitement et à son équivalent français, les offres d'emploi doivent être publiées de manière non sexiste. Nous utilisons la mention pour préciser que ce poste est ouvert à tous les genres dans ces pays, même si le titre du poste lui-même peut être traduit ou interprété comme « masculin » en allemand ou en français.</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p>

defining AI-ready or agentic-ready enterprise architectures.</li> </ul> </div> <p><strong><span class="TextRun MacChromeBold SCXW105898609 BCX0" lang="EN-US" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW105898609 BCX0">If you do not meet all the listed qualifications or have gaps in your experience, we still encourage you to apply. At Valtech, we recognize that talent comes in many forms, and we value diverse perspectives and a willingness to learn.</span></span><span class="EOP SCXW105898609 BCX0" data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></strong></p> <h3><strong><span data-contrast="auto">Commitment to reaching all kinds of people</span></strong><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></h3> <p><span data-contrast="auto">We design experiences that work for all kinds of people - and that starts with our own teams. At Valtech, we’re intentional about building an inclusive culture where everyone feels supported to grow, thrive and achieve their goals. No matter your background, you belong here. </span><a href="https://www.valtech.com/about/diversity-inclusion/" target="_blank"><span data-contrast="none"><span data-ccp-charstyle="Hyperlink">Explore our Diversity &amp; Inclusion site</span></span></a><span data-contrast="auto">&nbsp;to see how we’re creating a more equitable Valtech for all.</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p> <h3><strong><span data-contrast="auto">The benefits </span></strong><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></h3> <p><span data-contrast="auto">This is a <strong>full-time</strong> position based in Montreal and Toronto.&nbsp;The offered salary range is <strong>$110,000 to $150,000 </strong>annually, depending on experience and location.</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p> <p>Valtech offers a comprehensive benefits package effective after three months of continuous service:</p> <ul> <li>A <strong>comprehensive insurance plan</strong>, where you can choose the module that best suits your needs—Gold, Silver, or Bronze. The employer may contribute up to 80% of your coverage depending on the selected module. This plan includes <strong>short- and long-term disability coverage</strong>.</li> <li><strong>Dialogue via Sun Life</strong> provides virtual healthcare services, allowing you to consult with a healthcare professional for emergencies, prescription renewals, and more. You also have access to the <strong>Employee and Family Assistance Program</strong>, as well as a <strong>complete mental health support program</strong>.</li> <li>A <strong>$500 Personal Spending Account</strong>, which can be used for healthcare reimbursements, gym memberships, public transit passes, office supplies, or contributions to your RRSP through Valtech.</li> <li>A <strong>retirement plan</strong> where Valtech will match 100% of your RRSP contributions through a Deferred Profit Sharing Plan (DPSP), up to a maximum of 4%. You can start contributing to your RRSP immediately, and to the DPSP after 3 months. The vesting of the DPSP will be after a 24 months of service.&nbsp;</li> <li>Access to a <strong>flexible vacation under Valtech's policy</strong> to support your work-life balance, with 5 days available during your probation period and a prorated amount calculated for the remainder of the year.</li> <li><strong>Personal Technology Reimbursement</strong> – $30/month for every employee-offered on day 1.&nbsp;</li> <li>We close during the <strong>winter holidays</strong> and <strong>offer flexible scheduling</strong> throughout the year, so you can enjoy those sunny Friday afternoons—provided your weekly hours are completed.</li> </ul> <h3><strong><span data-contrast="auto">Your application process</span></strong></h3> <p><span data-contrast="auto">Once you apply, our Talent Acquisition team will review your application. If your skills and experience align with the role, we’ll reach out for next steps.</span><span data-ccp-props="{}"> <span data-teams="true">Your CV should cover key information on relevant experiences and expertise. We do not require information such as age, gender, marital status, or a headshot in your application. We review all candidates based on skills, experience, and potential.</span></span></p> <p><span data-contrast="auto">⚠️ Beware of recruitment fraud: Only engage with official Valtech email addresses.</span></p> <p><span data-contrast="auto">We are committed to inclusion and accessibility. If you need reasonable accommodations during the interview process, please either indicate it in your application or let your Talent Partner know.</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p> <h3><strong><span data-contrast="auto">About Valtech</span></strong></h3> <p><span data-contrast="auto">Valtech is the experience innovation company that exists to unlock a better way to experience the world. This includes developing reliable&nbsp;</span><span data-contrast="auto">batch, streaming, and near-real-time pipelines</span><span data-contrast="auto">&nbsp;using technologies such as Spark and Delta Lake, and building ingestion, transformation, and curation workflows for both structured and unstructured data.</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335551550&quot;:0,&quot;335551620&quot;:0,&quot;335559740&quot;:300}">&nbsp;</span></p> <p><span data-contrast="auto">You will implement modern data architectures including&nbsp;</span><span data-contrast="auto">lakehouse&nbsp;patterns and medallion layering (bronze, silver, gold)</span><span data-contrast="auto">, ensuring systems are reusable, scalable, and aligned with enterprise needs.</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335551550&quot;:0,&quot;335551620&quot;:0,&quot;335559740&quot;:300}">&nbsp;</span></p> <h4><strong><span data-contrast="none"><span data-ccp-parastyle="heading 3">Enable AI, GenAI &amp; Data Products</span></span></strong><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;134245418&quot;:true,&quot;134245529&quot;:true,&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335551550&quot;:0,&quot;335551620&quot;:0,&quot;335559738&quot;:160,&quot;335559739&quot;:80,&quot;335559740&quot;:300}">&nbsp;</span></h4> <p><span data-contrast="auto">Deliver high-quality datasets that support analytics, machine learning, causal modeling, and optimization systems. You will enable data pipelines for&nbsp;</span><span data-contrast="auto">GenAI&nbsp;use&nbsp;cases</span><span data-contrast="auto">&nbsp;(including LLMs, RAG pipelines, and vector-based data flows), as well as agent-based architectures and intelligent workflows, ensuring that data is model-ready and production-grade.</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335551550&quot;:0,&quot;335551620&quot;:0,&quot;335559740&quot;:300}">&nbsp;</span></p> <h4><strong><span data-contrast="none"><span data-ccp-parastyle="heading 3">Data Modeling, Orchestration &amp; Automation</span></span></strong><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;134245418&quot;:true,&quot;134245529&quot;:true,&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335551550&quot;:0,&quot;335551620&quot;:0,&quot;335559738&quot;:160,&quot;335559739&quot;:80,&quot;335559740&quot;:300}">&nbsp;</span></h4> <p><span data-contrast="auto">Design scalable&nbsp;</span><span data-contrast="auto">logical and physical data models</span><span data-contrast="auto">&nbsp;for analytical and operational use cases, ensuring consistency across domains. Orchestrate workflows using tools such as Airflow,&nbsp;dbt,&nbsp;Lakeflow, or equivalents, with&nbsp;strong&nbsp;focus on automation, reliability, and maintainability of end-to-end pipelines.</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335551550&quot;:0,&quot;335551620&quot;:0,&quot;335559740&quot;:300}">&nbsp;</span></p> <h4><strong><span data-contrast="none"><span data-ccp-parastyle="heading 3">Architecture, Governance &amp; Observability</span></span></strong><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;134245418&quot;:true,&quot;134245529&quot;:true,&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335551550&quot;:0,&quot;335551620&quot;:0,&quot;335559738&quot;:160,&quot;335559739&quot;:80,&quot;335559740&quot;:300}">&nbsp;</span></h4> <p><span data-contrast="auto">Apply modern architecture patterns including&nbsp;</span><span data-contrast="auto">event-driven and streaming architectures</span><span data-contrast="auto">, and ensure adherence to best practices in&nbsp;</span><span data-contrast="auto">data governance, lineage, quality, and access control (RBAC/ABAC)</span><span data-contrast="auto">.</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335551550&quot;:0,&quot;335551620&quot;:0,&quot;335559740&quot;:300}">&nbsp;</span></p> <p><span data-contrast="auto">Establish strong&nbsp;</span><span data-contrast="auto">data observability</span><span data-contrast="auto">, including monitoring of data freshness, pipeline reliability, and SLA adherence, ensuring systems&nbsp;remain&nbsp;trustworthy and&nbsp;production-ready.</span> <span data-ccp-props="{&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335551550&quot;:0,&quot;335551620&quot;:0,&quot;335559740&quot;:300}">&nbsp;</span></p> <h4><strong><span data-contrast="none"><span data-ccp-parastyle="heading 3">Data Serving, Integration &amp; Optimization</span></span></strong><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;134245418&quot;:true,&quot;134245529&quot;:true,&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335551550&quot;:0,&quot;335551620&quot;:0,&quot;335559738&quot;:160,&quot;335559739&quot;:80,&quot;335559740&quot;:300}">&nbsp;</span></h4> <p><span data-contrast="auto">Enable&nbsp;</span><span data-contrast="auto">data serving layers</span><span data-contrast="auto">&nbsp;(APIs, feature inputs, analytical endpoints) to support downstream systems, including ML and AI platforms. Support&nbsp;adoption&nbsp;of data products and contribute to best practices across the data and AI ecosystem.</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335551550&quot;:0,&quot;335551620&quot;:0,&quot;335559740&quot;:300}">&nbsp;</span></p> <h3><strong><span data-contrast="auto">Must have qualifications</span></strong></h3> <h4><strong><span data-contrast="none"><span data-ccp-parastyle="heading 3">Technical skills</span></span></strong><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;134245418&quot;:true,&quot;134245529&quot;:true,&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335551550&quot;:0,&quot;335551620&quot;:0,&quot;335559738&quot;:160,&quot;335559739&quot;:80,&quot;335559740&quot;:300}">&nbsp;</span></h4> <p><span data-contrast="auto">Strong hands-on experience with&nbsp;</span><span data-contrast="auto">Apache Spark and Delta Lake</span><span data-contrast="auto">, and strong programming skills in&nbsp;</span><span data-contrast="auto">Python and SQL</span><span data-contrast="auto">. Proven experience building&nbsp;</span><span data-contrast="auto">batch&nbsp;and streaming data pipelines</span><span data-contrast="auto">&nbsp;and production-grade data platforms, with&nbsp;solid&nbsp;understanding of&nbsp;</span><span data-contrast="auto">data modeling, data quality, and governance principles</span><span data-contrast="auto">.</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335551550&quot;:0,&quot;335551620&quot;:0,&quot;335559740&quot;:300}">&nbsp;</span></p> <h4><strong><span data-contrast="none"><span data-ccp-parastyle="heading 3">Cloud &amp; Platforms (Key Requirement)</span></span></strong><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;134245418&quot;:true,&quot;134245529&quot;:true,&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335551550&quot;:0,&quot;335551620&quot;:0,&quot;335559738&quot;:160,&quot;335559739&quot;:80,&quot;335559740&quot;:300}">&nbsp;</span></h4> <p><span data-contrast="auto">Experience with one or more major cloud platforms, with preference for&nbsp;</span><span data-contrast="auto">Microsoft Azure / Fabric</span><span data-contrast="auto">, as well as AWS or GCP. Familiarity with modern data platforms such as&nbsp;</span><span data-contrast="auto">Databricks and Snowflake</span><span data-contrast="auto">&nbsp;is expected.</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335551550&quot;:0,&quot;335551620&quot;:0,&quot;335559740&quot;:300}">&nbsp;</span></p> <h4><strong><span data-contrast="none"><span data-ccp-parastyle="heading 3">Architecture &amp; Systems Thinking</span></span></strong><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;134245418&quot;:true,&quot;134245529&quot;:true,&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335551550&quot;:0,&quot;335551620&quot;:0,&quot;335559738&quot;:160,&quot;335559739&quot;:80,&quot;335559740&quot;:300}">&nbsp;</span></h4> <p><span data-contrast="auto">Experience with&nbsp;</span><span data-contrast="auto">lakehouse&nbsp;architectures and distributed data systems</span><span data-contrast="auto">, and&nbsp;strong&nbsp;understanding of scalability, reliability, and performance considerations in data pipelines.</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335551550&quot;:0,&quot;335551620&quot;:0,&quot;335559740&quot;:300}">&nbsp;</span></p> <h4><strong><span data-contrast="none"><span data-ccp-parastyle="heading 3">Mindset</span></span></strong><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;134245418&quot;:true,&quot;134245529&quot;:true,&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335551550&quot;:0,&quot;335551620&quot;:0,&quot;335559738&quot;:160,&quot;335559739&quot;:80,&quot;335559740&quot;:300}">&nbsp;</span></h4> <p><span data-contrast="auto">Strong problem-solving skills focused on scalability and reliability, with a collaborative approach to working in cross-functional teams. Experience in&nbsp;</span><span data-contrast="auto">Agile or consulting environments</span><span data-contrast="auto">&nbsp;is beneficial.</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335551550&quot;:0,&quot;335551620&quot;:0,&quot;335559740&quot;:300}">&nbsp;</span></p> <h3><strong><span data-contrast="auto">Nice to have qualifications&nbsp;</span></strong><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></h3> <p><span data-contrast="auto">Experience with&nbsp;</span><span data-contrast="auto">GenAI and AI data systems</span><span data-contrast="auto">&nbsp;(e.g., RAG pipelines, vector databases, LLM data preparation), as well as CI/CD for data pipelines and infrastructure-as-code tools such as Terraform, ARM, or CloudFormation.</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335551550&quot;:0,&quot;335551620&quot;:0,&quot;335559740&quot;:300}">&nbsp;</span></p> <p><span data-contrast="auto">Additional&nbsp;exposure to&nbsp;</span><span data-contrast="auto">streaming technologies (e.g., Kafka)</span><span data-contrast="auto">, Spark optimization, or advanced analytics and ML workloads (including causal or experimentation platforms) is valuable. Experience building&nbsp;</span><span data-contrast="auto">data products or large-scale analytics platforms</span><span data-contrast="auto">&nbsp;is also beneficial.</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335551550&quot;:0,&quot;335551620&quot;:0,&quot;335559740&quot;:300}">&nbsp;</span></p> <h3><strong><span data-contrast="auto">Commitment to reaching all kinds of people</span></strong><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></h3> <p><span data-contrast="auto">We design experiences that work for all kinds of people - and that starts with our own teams.
