No matter your background, you belong here. </span><a href="https://www.valtech.com/about/diversity-inclusion/" target="_blank"><span data-contrast="none"><span data-ccp-charstyle="Hyperlink">Explore our Diversity &amp; Inclusion site</span></span></a><span data-contrast="auto">&nbsp;to see how we’re creating a more equitable Valtech for all.</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p> <h3><strong><span data-contrast="auto">The benefits </span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></strong></h3> <p><span data-contrast="auto">This is a&nbsp;position based in Portugal.</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p> <p><span data-contrast="auto">Beyond a competitive compensation package, we offer:</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p> <ul> <li><span data-contrast="auto">Flexibility, with remote and hybrid work options (country-dependent)</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></li> <li><span data-contrast="auto">Career advancement, with international mobility and professional development programs</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></li> <li><span data-contrast="auto">Learning and development, with access to cutting-edge tools, training and industry experts</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></li> </ul> <p><span data-contrast="auto">Our benefits are tailored to each location. It's not an option, it's a necessity!</p> </li> </ul> <ul> <li> <p><strong>Free beverages</strong><br>Enjoy free coffee, drinks, and snacks at work, or join one of our famous company dinners.</p> </li> <li> <p><strong>Events</strong><br>We enjoy spending time together, not only at work. There are plenty of cool events to join and to get to know your colleagues.</p> </li> <li> <p><strong>Competitive conditions</strong><br>Besides a competitive salary and 24 days of vacation, you will join annual company events with the whole team.</p> </li> <li><strong>Challenging projects</strong><br>Ready for a challenge? We guarantee you'll find challenging projects at Valtech!<br><br></li> <li><strong>Cool colleagues</strong><br>What's the most important thing in a job? Cool colleagues with whom you spent most of the time during the week. We have a lot of them!<br><br></li> <li><strong>Honest feedback</strong><br>Honesty, openness and respect are among our core values. We encourage an open feedback culture in order to build trust and grow together.</li> </ul> <p><strong><span data-contrast="auto">Your application process</span></strong></p> <p><span data-contrast="auto">Once you apply, our Talent Acquisition team will review your application. Your CV should cover key information on relevant experiences and expertise. We do not require information such as age, gender, marital status, or a headshot in your application. We review all candidates based on skills, experience, and potential.</span></p> <p><span data-contrast="auto">⚠️ Beware of recruitment fraud!</span></p> <p><span data-contrast="auto">We are committed to inclusion and accessibility. By blending crafts, categories, and cultures, we help brands unlock new value in an increasingly digital world.</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p> <p><span data-contrast="auto">At the intersection of data, AI, creativity, and technology, we drive transformation for leading organizations, including L’Oréal, Mars, Audi, P&amp;G, Volkswagen Dolby, and more.</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p> <p><span data-contrast="auto">At Valtech, we don’t just talk about transformation. We make it happen. Our people are the heart of our success, and we foster a workplace where everyone has the support to thrive, grow and innovate.</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p> <p><span data-contrast="auto">Are you ready to create what’s next? Join us.</span></p>

No matter your background, you belong here. </span><a href="https://www.valtech.com/about/diversity-inclusion/" target="_blank"><span data-contrast="none"><span data-ccp-charstyle="Hyperlink">Explore our Diversity &amp; paternity leave support</li> </ul> <h4><strong>Personal and professional development:</strong></h4> <ul> <li>Internal workshops &amp; learning initiatives</li> <li>Professional certifications reimbursement</li> <li>Participation in professional local &amp; global communities</li> <li>Growth Framework to manage expectations and define the steps to move towards the selected career</li> <li>Mentoring program with the ability to become a mentor or a mentee to grow to a higher position</li> </ul> <p>Valtech Poland has a system of progressive benefit packages –&nbsp;<strong>the longer you stay with the company, the more benefits you get!</strong></p> <p><span data-contrast="auto">Beyond a competitive compensation p</span><span data-contrast="auto">ackage, we offer:</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p> <ul> <li><span data-contrast="auto">Flexibility, with remote and hybrid work options (country-dependent)</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></li> <li><span data-contrast="auto">Career advancement, with international mobility and professional development programs</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></li> <li><span data-contrast="auto">Learning and development, with access to cutting-edge tools, training and industry experts</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></li> </ul> <h3><strong><span data-contrast="auto">Your application process</span></strong></h3> <p><span data-contrast="auto">Once you apply, our Talent Acquisition team will review your application. We review all candidates based on skills, experience, and potential.</span></p> <p><span data-contrast="auto">⚠️ Beware of recruitment fraud!</span></p> <p><span data-contrast="auto">We are committed to inclusion and accessibility. If you need reasonable accommodations during the interview process, please either indicate it in your application or let your Talent Partner know.</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p> <h3><strong><span data-contrast="auto">About Valtech</span></strong></h3> <p><span data-contrast="auto">Valtech is the experience innovation company that exists to unlock a better way to experience the world. Our people are the heart of our success, and we foster a workplace where everyone has the support to thrive, grow and innovate.</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p> <p><span data-contrast="auto">Are you ready to create what’s next? Join us.</span></p>

Experience building&nbsp;</span><span data-contrast="auto">data products or large-scale analytics platforms</span><span data-contrast="auto">&nbsp;is also beneficial.</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335551550&quot;:0,&quot;335551620&quot;:0,&quot;335559740&quot;:300}">&nbsp;</span></p> <h3><strong><span data-contrast="auto">Commitment to reaching all kinds of people</span></strong><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></h3> <p><span data-contrast="auto">We design experiences that work for all kinds of people - and that starts with our own teams. At Valtech, we’re intentional about building an inclusive culture where everyone feels supported to grow, thrive and achieve their goals. No matter your background, you belong here. </span><a href="https://www.valtech.com/about/diversity-inclusion/" target="_blank"><span data-contrast="none"><span data-ccp-charstyle="Hyperlink">Explore our Diversity &amp; Inclusion site</span></span></a><span data-contrast="auto">&nbsp;to see how we’re creating a more equitable Valtech for all.</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p> <h3><strong><span data-contrast="auto">The benefits </span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></strong></h3> <p><span data-contrast="auto">Beyond a competitive compensation package, we offer:</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p> <ul> <li><span data-contrast="auto">Flexibility, with hybrid work options and 25 vacation days&nbsp;</span>for a healthy work-life balance.</li> <li>Co-subsidized transportation &amp; Multisport cards.</li> <li>Premium health insurance for fast and easy access to top healthcare services.</li> <li>Training policy for technical and other skills-related events, courses and certifications.</li> <li>Personal career development roadmap guided by performance evaluations.</li> <li>Self-care program offering psychological consultations &amp; discussions for you and the team.</li> <li>Cozy office space designed for comfort and productivity.</li> <li>Exciting team events and company gatherings.</li> </ul> <h3><strong><span data-contrast="auto">Your application process</span></strong></h3> <p><span data-contrast="auto">Once you apply, our Talent Acquisition team will review your application. Your CV should cover key information on relevant experiences and expertise. We do not require information such as age, gender, marital status, or a headshot in your application. We review all candidates based on skills, experience, and potential.</span></p> <p><span data-contrast="auto">⚠️ Beware of recruitment fraud!</span></p> <p><span data-contrast="auto">We are committed to inclusion and accessibility. If you need reasonable accommodations during the interview process, please either indicate it in your application or let your Talent Partner know.</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p> <h3><strong><span data-contrast="auto">About Valtech</span></strong></h3> <p><span data-contrast="auto">Valtech is the experience innovation company that exists to unlock a better way to experience the world. By blending crafts, categories, and cultures, we help brands unlock new value in an increasingly digital world.</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p> <p><span data-contrast="auto">At the intersection of data, AI, creativity, and technology, we drive transformation for leading organizations, including L’Oréal, Mars, Audi, P&amp;G, Volkswagen Dolby, and more.</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p> <p><span data-contrast="auto">At Valtech, we don’t just talk about transformation. We make it happen. Our people are the heart of our success, and we foster a workplace where everyone has the support to thrive, grow and innovate.</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p> <p><span data-contrast="auto">Are you ready to create what’s next? Join us.</span></p>

Familiarity with modern data platforms such as&nbsp;</span><span data-contrast="auto">Databricks and Snowflake</span><span data-contrast="auto">&nbsp;is expected.</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335551550&quot;:0,&quot;335551620&quot;:0,&quot;335559740&quot;:300}">&nbsp;</span></p> <h4><strong><span data-contrast="none"><span data-ccp-parastyle="heading 3">Architecture &amp; Systems Thinking</span></span></strong><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;134245418&quot;:true,&quot;134245529&quot;:true,&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335551550&quot;:0,&quot;335551620&quot;:0,&quot;335559738&quot;:160,&quot;335559739&quot;:80,&quot;335559740&quot;:300}">&nbsp;</span></h4> <p><span data-contrast="auto">Experience with&nbsp;</span><span data-contrast="auto">lakehouse&nbsp;architectures and distributed data systems</span><span data-contrast="auto">, and&nbsp;strong&nbsp;understanding of scalability, reliability, and performance considerations in data pipelines.</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335551550&quot;:0,&quot;335551620&quot;:0,&quot;335559740&quot;:300}">&nbsp;</span></p> <h4><strong><span data-contrast="none"><span data-ccp-parastyle="heading 3">Mindset</span></span></strong><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;134245418&quot;:true,&quot;134245529&quot;:true,&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335551550&quot;:0,&quot;335551620&quot;:0,&quot;335559738&quot;:160,&quot;335559739&quot;:80,&quot;335559740&quot;:300}">&nbsp;</span></h4> <p><span data-contrast="auto">Strong problem-solving skills focused on scalability and reliability, with a collaborative approach to working in cross-functional teams. Experience building&nbsp;</span><span data-contrast="auto">data products or large-scale analytics platforms</span><span data-contrast="auto">&nbsp;is also beneficial.</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335551550&quot;:0,&quot;335551620&quot;:0,&quot;335559740&quot;:300}">&nbsp;</span></p> <h3><strong><span data-contrast="auto">Commitment to reaching all kinds of people</span></strong><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></h3> <p><span data-contrast="auto">We design experiences that work for all kinds of people - and that starts with our own teams. At Valtech, we’re intentional about building an inclusive culture where everyone feels supported to grow, thrive and achieve their goals. No matter your background, you belong here. </span><a href="https://www.valtech.com/about/diversity-inclusion/" target="_blank"><span data-contrast="none"><span data-ccp-charstyle="Hyperlink">Explore our Diversity &amp; Inclusion site</span></span></a><span data-contrast="auto">&nbsp;to see how we’re creating a more equitable Valtech for all.</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p> <h3><strong><span data-contrast="auto">The benefits </span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></strong></h3> <p><span data-contrast="auto">This is a Full time&nbsp;position based in&nbsp;<strong>Ukraine</strong>.&nbsp;</span></p> <p><span data-contrast="auto">Beyond a competitive compensation package, we offer:</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p> <ul> <li><strong>Mental and physical health:</strong> <ul> <li>Medical insurance&nbsp;</li> <li>Sports reimbursement budget&nbsp;</li> <li>Home office support&nbsp;</li> <li>A number of free psychological and legal consultations&nbsp;</li> <li>Maternity and paternity leave support&nbsp;<br><br></li> </ul> </li> <li><strong>Personal and professional development:</strong> <ul> <li>Internal workshops and learning initiatives&nbsp;</li> <li>English language classes compensation&nbsp;</li> <li>Professional certifications reimbursement&nbsp;</li> <li>Participation in professional local and global communities</li> <li>Growth Framework to manage expectations and define the steps to move towards the selected career&nbsp;</li> <li>Mentoring program with the ability to become a mentor or a mentee to grow to a higher position&nbsp;</li> <li>Valtech Ukraine has a system of progressive benefits packages in place —&nbsp;<strong>the longer you stay with the company — the more benefits you get.</strong>&nbsp;</li> </ul> </li> </ul> <h3><strong><span data-contrast="auto">Your application process</span></strong></h3> <p><span data-contrast="auto">Once you apply, our Talent Acquisition team will review your application. Your CV should cover key information on relevant experiences and expertise. We do not require information such as age, gender, marital status, or a headshot in your application. We review all candidates based on skills, experience, and potential.</span></p> <p><span data-contrast="auto">⚠️ Beware of recruitment fraud!</span></p> <p><span data-contrast="auto">We are committed to inclusion and accessibility. If you need reasonable accommodations during the interview process, please either indicate it in your application or let your Talent Partner know.</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p> <h3><strong><span data-contrast="auto">About Valtech</span></strong></h3> <p><span data-contrast="auto">Valtech is the experience innovation company that exists to unlock a better way to experience the world. By blending crafts, categories, and cultures, we help brands unlock new value in an increasingly digital world.</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p> <p><span data-contrast="auto">At the intersection of data, AI, creativity, and technology, we drive transformation for leading organizations, including L’Oréal, Mars, Audi, P&amp;G, Volkswagen Dolby, and more.</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p> <p><span data-contrast="auto">At Valtech, we don’t just talk about transformation. We make it happen. Our people are the heart of our success, and we foster a workplace where everyone has the support to thrive, grow and innovate.</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p> <p><span data-contrast="auto">Are you ready to create what’s next? Join us.</span></p>

Continuously&nbsp;monitor&nbsp;and&nbsp;optimize&nbsp;pipelines and infrastructure for&nbsp;</span><span data-contrast="auto">performance, scalability, and cost efficiency</span><span data-contrast="auto">.</span> <span data-ccp-props="{&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335551550&quot;:0,&quot;335551620&quot;:0,&quot;335559740&quot;:300}">&nbsp;</span></p> <h4><strong><span data-contrast="none"><span data-ccp-parastyle="heading 3">Collaboration</span></span></strong><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;134245418&quot;:true,&quot;134245529&quot;:true,&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335551550&quot;:0,&quot;335551620&quot;:0,&quot;335559738&quot;:160,&quot;335559739&quot;:80,&quot;335559740&quot;:300}">&nbsp;</span></h4> <p><span data-contrast="auto">Work closely with data scientists, ML engineers, analysts, and business stakeholders to translate requirements into robust data solutions. Support&nbsp;adoption&nbsp;of data products and contribute to best practices across the data and AI ecosystem.</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335551550&quot;:0,&quot;335551620&quot;:0,&quot;335559740&quot;:300}">&nbsp;</span></p> <h3><strong><span data-contrast="auto">Must have qualifications</span></strong></h3> <h4><strong><span data-contrast="none"><span data-ccp-parastyle="heading 3">Technical skills</span></span></strong><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;134245418&quot;:true,&quot;134245529&quot;:true,&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335551550&quot;:0,&quot;335551620&quot;:0,&quot;335559738&quot;:160,&quot;335559739&quot;:80,&quot;335559740&quot;:300}">&nbsp;</span></h4> <p><span data-contrast="auto">Strong hands-on experience with&nbsp;</span><span data-contrast="auto">Apache Spark and Delta Lake</span><span data-contrast="auto">, and strong programming skills in&nbsp;</span><span data-contrast="auto">Python and SQL</span><span data-contrast="auto">. This role requires someone who thrives in a proactive environment and can deliver impactful solutions in cybersecurity analytics and anomaly detection.</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;335559738&quot;:240,&quot;335559739&quot;:240}">&nbsp;</span></p> <p><span data-contrast="auto">The ideal candidate will have experience in developing dashboards and insights to detect and visualize security threats, including executive-level dashboards. Comfort with Looker Core,&nbsp;BigQuery,&nbsp;SQL, and Python&nbsp;is&nbsp;essential, along with familiarity in&nbsp;Machine&nbsp;Learning for anomaly detection, alerting mechanisms, and data manipulation.</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;335559738&quot;:240,&quot;335559739&quot;:240}">&nbsp;</span></p> <p><strong><span data-contrast="auto">This position is onsite in Greater New York City area 3 days per week, and remote 2 days per week.</span></strong><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;335559738&quot;:240,&quot;335559739&quot;:240}">&nbsp;</span></p> <p><strong><span data-contrast="auto">Role responsibilities</span></strong></p> <ul> <li>Drive projects independently, ensuring timely delivery and high-quality outcomes.&nbsp;</li> <li>Lead and execute projects related to cybersecurity, including anomaly detection in data to identify potential security threats.&nbsp;</li> <li>Develop dashboards and visuals for operational and executive use, leveraging Looker Core and BigQuery.&nbsp;</li> <li>Implement alerting systems to proactively detect anomalies and security issues.&nbsp;</li> <li>Design and implement data ingestion and transformation pipelines leveraging Google Cloud Dataflow / Apache Beam and BigQuery for analytics and large-scale querying.&nbsp;</li> <li>Implement Machine Learning models (specifically leveraging BigQuery ML or Vertex AI) to identify statistical outliers, potential intrusions, and fraudulent patterns in network traffic.&nbsp;</li> <li>Build fault-tolerant, self-healing, adaptive, and highly accurate streaming and batch data pipelines on GCP.&nbsp;</li> <li>Perform data manipulation and analysis to support threat detection and reporting.&nbsp;</li> <li>Collaborate closely with cross-functional teams to ensure data quality, availability, and reliability across cloud environments.&nbsp;</li> <li>Develop and maintain technical documentation for all assigned systems and projects.&nbsp;</li> </ul> <h3><strong><span data-contrast="auto">Must have qualifications</span></strong></h3> <p><span data-contrast="auto">To be considered for this role, you must meet the following essential qualifications:</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p> <ul> <li><span data-contrast="auto">Candidates must be legally authorized to work in the United States and must hold either U.S. citizenship or lawful permanent resident (Green Card) status.</span></li> <li><span data-contrast="auto">Strong expertise in:&nbsp;</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span> <ul> <li>Python - for building data pipelines, processing tasks, and automation&nbsp;</li> <li>SQL - Advanced SQL capabilities (nested fields, analytic functions).&nbsp;</li> </ul> </li> <li>Hands-on experience with Core GCP Data Stack:&nbsp; <ul> <li>BigQuery: Expert-level SQL, performance tuning, and specifically BigQuery ML (BQML) for implementing logistic regression or k-means clustering on data in-place.&nbsp;</li> <li>Dataflow (Apache Beam): Strong proficiency in writing data pipelines (Python or Java) handling windowing, watermarks, and triggers for streaming data.&nbsp;</li> <li>Pub/Sub: Experience with event-driven architecture and message queuing.&nbsp;</li> </ul> </li> <li>Hands-on experience with Visualization &amp; BI: &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; <ul> <li>Looker Core – Advanced proficiency in LookML (not just drag-and-drop), including derived tables, explores, and Liquid syntax.&nbsp;</li> <li>Semantic Modeling: Develop robust LookML models to create a trusted layer of data governance, ensuring metrics are consistent across the organization.&nbsp;</li> <li>Dashboard Creation: Design intuitive, high-impact dashboards in Looker for two distinct audiences: Operational teams (real-time threat monitoring) and Executives (risk posture and compliance reporting&nbsp;</li> </ul> </li> <li>Familiarity with Alerting Frameworks&nbsp;</li> <li>Ability to work independently and drive projects solo with minimal supervision&nbsp;</li> <li>Outstanding soft and communication skills&nbsp;</li> </ul> <h3><strong><span data-contrast="auto">Nice to have qualifications </span></strong><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></h3> <ul> <li style="font-weight: bold;"><strong>Google Cloud Professional Data Engineer certification&nbsp;</strong></li> <li style="font-weight: bold;"><strong>Google Professional Machine Learning Engineer certification&nbsp;</strong></li> <li>Google Cloud Professional Cloud Architect certification &nbsp;</li> <li>Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in a quantitative or technical field (e.g., Computer Science, Engineering, Statistics) &nbsp; &nbsp;</li> <li>Working knowledge of cloud architecture components in GCP &nbsp;</li> <li>Proficiency in Big Data environments and tools such as Spark, Hive, Impala, Pig, etc. &nbsp;</li> <li>Proficiency in Terraform&nbsp;</li> <li>Familiarity with front and back-end web application stacks and frameworks, and API design and usage (REST/GraphQL) &nbsp; &nbsp;</li> <li>Experience leading and managing technical data/analytics/machine learning projects &nbsp;&nbsp;</li> </ul> <p><strong><span class="TextRun MacChromeBold SCXW105898609 BCX0" lang="EN-US" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW105898609 BCX0">If you do not meet all the listed qualifications or have gaps in your experience, we still encourage you to apply. At Valtech, we recognize that talent comes in many forms, and we value diverse perspectives and a willingness to learn.</span></span><span class="EOP SCXW105898609 BCX0" data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;<br><br></span></strong></p> <h3><strong><span data-contrast="auto">The benefits </span></strong><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></h3> <p><span data-contrast="auto">This is a <strong>full-time</strong> position based in New York, United States. title: Data Engineer
full_description: <div class="content-intro"><div>Pie's mission is to empower small businesses to thrive by making commercial insurance affordable and as easy as pie. We leverage technology to transform how small businesses buy and experience commercial insurance.</div> <div> <div>&nbsp;</div> <div>Like our small business customers, we are a diverse team of builders, dreamers, and entrepreneurs who are driven by&nbsp;<a class="postings-link" href="https://pieinsurance.com/culture">core values and operating principles</a>&nbsp;that guide every decision we make.</div> </div></div><p>This is a hands-on engineering role — you'll be writing production Python and SQL, building Airflow DAGs, and contributing to our Data Vault 2.0 warehouse alongside a team of senior and staff engineers.</p> <p>You'll work on the data infrastructure that powers how Pie quotes, underwrites, and services small business insurance customers. The pipelines and models you build feed everything from pricing to financial reporting, which means correctness and reliability matter.</p> <p>You'll be expected to develop deep domain expertise in insurance and the Pie business over time. Engineers who succeed here understand premium, loss, and policy lifecycle as well as they understand Snowflake.</p> <h3><strong>How You’ll Do It</strong></h3> <ul> <li>Design, build, and maintain data pipelines that deliver accurate, trusted data with the freshness our stakeholders depend on.</li> <li>Contribute to data modeling decisions within our Data Vault 2.0 warehouse that balance raw fidelity in the vault with the consumption patterns of downstream marts and analytics.</li> <li>Administer and optimize Snowflake across warehouse sizing, query performance, access controls, RBAC and user/role management, and ongoing cost tuning.</li> <li>Build and maintain resilient Airflow DAGs and CI/CD pipelines that make deployments predictable, repeatable, and safe to roll back.</li> <li>Implement automated testing (unit, integration, and data quality) so issues are caught in CI before they reach production.</li> <li>Provide mission-critical production support and ensure data reliability through proactive observability tuning, comprehensive incident response, and continuous feedback loops that integrate production insights back into pre-load validation and CI/CD pipelines.</li> <li>Leverage AI-powered tools (e.g., Claude Code, Cursor, Snowflake Cortex) to accelerate code generation, automate documentation, and improve code quality.</li> <li>Work with stakeholders across Executive, Product, Engineering, and business teams to translate the "why" behind a request into a technical solution that meets the business need.</li> <li>Run technical projects end-to-end with guidance from senior engineers — scoping with stakeholders, documenting requirements, and explaining technical trade-offs.</li> <li>Follow and contribute to best practices for data governance, privacy, and security, including the change management and validation discipline required for SOX-relevant reporting.</li> <li>Take an active part in the operational responsibilities of running our data infrastructure, with a focus on reliability, cost efficiency, and observability.</li> </ul> <h3><strong>The Right Stuff</strong></h3> <ul> <li>Minimum 2+ years experience as a software engineer or data engineer with a focus on data systems.</li> <li>Advanced proficiency writing complex SQL and manipulating large structured and semi-structured datasets.</li> <li>Proficiency in Python for building production-grade data pipelines.</li> <li>Working knowledge of Snowflake or comparable cloud warehouse — comfortable with warehouse management, access controls, and query performance. Exposure to RBAC and cost governance is a plus.</li> <li>Experience working with data models in cloud data warehouses such as Snowflake, Redshift, or BigQuery. Familiarity with Data Vault 2.0 or dimensional modeling is a plus, willingness to learn Data Vault is required.</li> <li>Demonstrated experience using testing frameworks to validate data and code in a production environment.</li> <li>Hands-on experience with data observability tooling.</li> <li>Proficiency using AI coding assistants (e.g., Claude Code, Cursor, Snowflake Cortex) as a core part of your development workflow.</li> <li>Experience running technical projects end-to-end with guidance from senior engineers — scoping, documenting, and communicating with stakeholders.</li> <li>Comfort working in a regulated environment (e.g., SOX-relevant financial reporting).</li> <li>Willingness to develop deep domain expertise in insurance and the Pie business over time. The best data engineers here understand premium, loss, and policy lifecycle as well as they understand Snowflake.</li> </ul> <p><strong>The use of AI in Application Review:</strong> To support a fair, efficient, and consistent hiring process, we use AI-powered tools to assist in the initial screening of applications. These tools help us identify qualifications and prior work experiences that align with the requirements of the role. We may also use AI assistant video tools during interviews to support note-taking and candidate evaluation. All AI-powered outputs are still subject to human oversight and decision-making at multiple stages of the process. By submitting your application, you acknowledge and consent to Pie utilizing these AI technologies to assist in our evaluation process.</p><div class="content-pay-transparency"><div class="pay-input"><div class="title">Base Compensation Range</div><div class="pay-range"><span>$115,000</span><span class="divider">&mdash;</span><span>$145,000 USD</span></div></div></div><div class="content-conclusion"><h3><strong>Compensation &amp; Benefits&nbsp;</strong></h3> <ul> <li style="font-weight: 400;"><span style="font-weight: 400;">Competitive cash compensation</span></li> <li style="font-weight: 400;"><span style="font-weight: 400;">Comprehensive health plans</span></li> <li style="font-weight: 400;"><span style="font-weight: 400;">Generous PTO</span></li> <li style="font-weight: 400;"><span style="font-weight: 400;">Future focused 401k match</span></li> <li style="font-weight: 400;"><span style="font-weight: 400;">Generous parental and caregiver leave</span></li> <li style="font-weight: 400;"><span style="font-weight: 400;">Our </span><a href="https://pieinsurance.com/culture/"><span style="font-weight: 400;">core values</span></a><span style="font-weight: 400;"> are more than just a poster on the wall; they’re tangibly reflected in our work&nbsp;</span></li> </ul> <p><strong>Making every part of working with us "Easy as Pie"</strong> - including our offer process. When we find someone we'd like as a Pie-oneer (a member of our team), we move quickly to put together a fair offer based on your skills, experience, location, and compensation expectations.</p> <p><span style="font-weight: 400;">Each year Pie reviews company performance and may grant discretionary bonuses to eligible team members.</span></p> <h3><strong>Location Information&nbsp;</strong></h3> <p>Unless otherwise specified, this role is remote. Remote team members must live and work in the United States (<em data-start="218" data-end="240" data-is-only-node="">territories excluded</em>) and have access to reliable, high-speed internet.</p> <h3><strong>Additional Information</strong></h3> <p><em><span style="font-weight: 400;">Pie Insurance is an equal opportunity employer. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, marital status, age, disability, national or ethnic origin, military service status, citizenship, or other protected characteristic.</span></em></p> <p><em><span style="font-weight: 400;">Pie Insurance participates in the E-Verify program. title: Senior Data Analytics Engineer
full_description: <p><strong>Why us?&nbsp;</strong></p> <p><em data-stringify-type="italic">Insurify is one of the America’s fastest-growing MIT FinTech startups and has been recognized as one of Inc. 5,000’s fastest-growing private companies in America in 2025, 2024, 2023, 2022 and 2021, Forbes Fintech 50 List for 2023, 2022, and 2021, Forbes Next Billion Dollar Startups of 2022 global and Top 100 InsurTech company. We’re changing the way millions of people compare, buy and manage insurance with artificial intelligence, technology, and superior product design.<br><br></em><em data-stringify-type="italic">Our company vision is to be recognized as the preeminent and most trusted digital agent for insurance comparison, purchase, and management. Our team is critical to achieving our vision and fostering the right culture is essential to our team’s success.</em></p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>How you will make an impact:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Lead cross-functional projects from ideation to execution with a high degree of independence and maximum impact</li> <li>Solve high velocity, high impact analytics problems</li> <li>Scale the business using data</li> <li>Work on a mix of analytics engineering, business analytics, and data science using SQL and Python</li> <li>Build scalable data infrastructure that solves real problems</li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>Sample projects:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Operate and improve a data product to serve evolving business needs</li> <li>Refactor data system to scale with increased volume and new requirements</li> <li>Build new data pipelines to support tracking of new business initiatives&nbsp;</li> <li>Champion usage of new tools and systems to improve team processes</li> <li>Improve the prediction accuracy of our customer acquisition machine-learning bidding algorithms</li> <li>Perform customer segmentation analysis to discover where to improve Insurify products</li> <li>Improve alerting systems to help us triage data quality issues at scale</li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>Key Skills + Background</strong></p> <ul> <li>3-4 years of experience, record of impact and success in a similar role (Analytics or Data Engineering, Data Science, Data Analysis)</li> <li>Expertise in and real-world experience with SQL</li> <li>Exposure to data warehousing and ETL concepts&nbsp;</li> <li>Strong quantitative and programming skills - Python (preferred) R, Rust, Go, Ruby, C++ also good</li> <li>Bachelors / Masters in Mathematics, Engineering, CS, Economics, or other technical major</li> <li>Quick learning ability and a drive suitable for the startup hustle.</li> <li>A positive team player with a solid work ethic who is ready to pivot between projects, learn from mistakes, always move forward, and help build the next big thing in insurance!</li> </ul> <p><strong><br>Benefits</strong></p> <ul> <li>Employee stock options</li> <li>25 days annual leave</li> <li>Enhanced private medical, dental and vision insurance plans</li> <li>Yearly wellbeing budget or Multisport card</li> <li>Personal budget for learning and books</li> <li>Employee Assistance Program and other wellbeing perks</li> <li>Office kitchen and fun area with snacks and beverages</li> <li>Regular social events</li> <li>Friendly office culture</li> <li>Hybrid office</li> </ul><div class="content-conclusion"><div><em>We are proud to be </em><strong><em>an Equal Employment Opportunity and Affirmative Action employer.</em></strong></div></div>

title: Analytics Engineer (DBT, BigQuery)
full_description: <div class="ace-line"> <div class="ace-line" data-node-type="line"> <div class="page" data-page-number="1" data-loaded="true"> <div class="textLayer">&nbsp;</div> </div> </div> </div> <p><strong>WHAT IS BOX?</strong></p> <p>Box (NYSE:BOX) is the leader in Intelligent Content Management. Our platform enables organizations to fuel collaboration, manage the entire content lifecycle, secure critical content, and transform business workflows with enterprise AI. We help companies thrive in the new AI-first era of business. Founded in 2005, Box simplifies work for leading global organizations, including JLL, Morgan Stanley, and Nationwide. Box is headquartered in Redwood City, CA, with offices across the United States, Europe, and Asia.</p> <p>By joining Box, you will have the unique opportunity to continue driving our platform forward. Content powers how we work. It’s the billions of files and information flowing across teams, departments, and key business processes every single day: contracts, invoices, employee records, financials, product specs, marketing assets, and more. Our mission is to bring intelligence to the world of content management and empower our customers to completely transform workflows across their organizations. With the combination of AI and enterprise content, the opportunity has never been greater to transform how the world works together and at Box you will be on the front lines of this massive shift.</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>WHY BOX NEEDS YOU</strong></p> <p>Business Analytics at Box is growing, and with it the need for a consistent and trusted data foundation for decision-making at scale. As an Analytics Engineer you will develop and own that foundation: well-designed data models and pipelines, governed metric definitions, systematic testing and quality monitoring, and standards that enable the team to build on it consistently. You will also build workflows and automations that let our data products meet our stakeholders where they are, from Slack to Salesforce.</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>WHAT YOU'LL DO</strong></p> <ul> <li> <p>Evolve our dbt project toward modular, documented and tested data models organized in clear layers, from raw sources to marts</p> </li> <li> <p>Shape our semantic layer from its early stages: define how metrics are modeled and governed, and drive its adoption</p> </li> <li> <p>Shape the data modeling standards and conventions for the Business Analytics team, and uphold them through code review, pairing, and documentation</p> </li> <li> <p>Partner with Data Scientists and Data Analysts to design the datasets their analyses, dashboards, and ML models are built on</p> </li> <li> <p>Build out our data testing practices and enforce them in CI, implement observability over our data</p> </li> <li> <p>Diagnose upstream data issues and drive them to resolution by partnering with Data Engineering and Enterprise Systems teams</p> </li> <li> <p>Build and maintain the Prefect workflows that put our data and models to work</p> </li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>WHO YOU ARE</strong></p> <ul> <li> <p>3+ years of experience in analytics engineering, data engineering or a comparable data role, working with large amounts of data</p> </li> <li> <p>Expert in SQL - able to write and review complex queries with confidence</p> </li> <li> <p>Solid understanding of data modeling principles and hands-on experience with dbt or a comparable transformation framework</p> </li> <li> <p>Engineering discipline applied to analytics code: version control, code review, testing, and CI are your defaults, and you can bring a team along to work the same way</p> </li> <li> <p>Comfortable with Python, with experience in a workflow orchestration tool (Prefect, Airflow, Dagster)</p> </li> <li> <p>Experience with a cloud data warehouse; BigQuery is a plus</p> </li> <li> <p>Experience supporting and working with cross-functional teams in a dynamic environment</p> </li> <li> <p>A proactive mindset - you look for improvements before anyone asks, and you challenge the status quo when you see a better way</p> </li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>BENEFITS</strong><br>Check out the <a href="https://careers.box.com/en/life-at-box/" target="_blank" data-attrib-id="link-5bdab7d9-385c-4446-83cf-46c01577c385"><u>overview of Life at Box</u></a> which include general perks and benefits.</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p>Box lives its values, with community and in-person collaboration being a core part of our culture. Boxers are expected to work from their assigned office a minimum of 3 days per week. Your Recruiter will share more about how we work and company culture during the hiring process.</p> <p>At Box, we believe unique and diverse experiences benefit our culture, our products, our customers, our company, and our world. We aim to recruit a passionate, high-performing workforce that reflects the world we live in.<strong> </strong>If you are head-over-heels about this role but unsure if you meet all the requirements, we encourage you to apply!</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>EQUAL OPPORTUNITY</strong></p> <p>We are an equal opportunity employer and value diversity at our company. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, religion, color, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, age, marital status, veteran status, disability, and any other protected ground of discrimination under applicable human rights legislation.</p> <p>For details on how we protect your information when you apply, please see our <a href="https://cloud.app.box.com/v/BoxPersonnelPrivacyNotice" target="_blank" data-attrib-id="link-0a851a0c-ace5-49d6-85f3-26e3848831ae"><u>Personnel Privacy Notice</u></a>.</p> <p>For more details on how Box Poland protects your information, please see our <a href="https://cloud.box.com/s/tyclibn73pmofpdub2x65639ykknbiwj" target="_blank" data-attrib-id="link-f6301c2f-1637-4faa-9199-0feaad11ec67"><u>Supplemental Personnel and Candidate Privacy Notice</u></a>.&nbsp;</p> <p>#LI-Hybrid</p> <p class="p3">&nbsp;</p>

Our platform enables organizations to fuel collaboration, manage the entire content lifecycle, secure critical content, and transform business workflows with enterprise AI. across teams and other functions, build best practices across the organization&nbsp;</p> </li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>WHO YOU ARE</strong></p> <ul> <li> <p>3+ Years of relevant industry or of the programming languages: Scala, Java</p> </li> <li> <p>Experience with scripting language: Python, NodeJS</p> </li> <li> <p>Experience with GCP (BigQuery, Dataproc, Dataflow/Fusion)</p> </li> <li> <p>Experience with big data tools: Hadoop, Spark, Kafka, etc</p> </li> <li> <p>Strong analytic skills related to working with structured and unstructured datasets</p> </li> <li> <p>Experience supporting and working with cross-functional teams in a dynamic environment</p> </li> <li> <p>Familiarity with Virtualization/container&nbsp;abstractions&nbsp;and orchestration (Kubernetes, Docker, etc.)</p> </li> <li> <p>Familiarity with Visualization software: Tableau</p> </li> <li> <p>Familiarity with frontend web framework: React</p> </li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>BENEFITS</strong><br>Check out the <a href="https://careers.box.com/en/life-at-box/" target="_blank" data-attrib-id="link-b61f0db5-0548-4250-a484-76420896de86">overview of Life at Box</a> We do not discriminate on the basis of race, religion, color, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, age, marital status, veteran status, disability, and any other protected ground of discrimination under applicable human rights legislation.</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p>For details on how we protect your information when you apply, please see our <a href="https://cloud.app.box.com/v/BoxPersonnelPrivacyNotice" target="_blank" data-attrib-id="link-4df2d2d2-8ee8-48cc-94c4-0df1bdf563cd">Personnel Privacy Notice</a>.</p> <p>For more details on how Box Poland protects your information, please see our <a href="https://cloud.box.com/s/tyclibn73pmofpdub2x65639ykknbiwj" target="_blank" data-attrib-id="link-a5d559af-6b3d-4790-8f28-beeb6c09338f">Supplemental Personnel and Candidate Privacy Notice</a>.&nbsp;</p> <p>#LI-Hybrid</p> <p>#LI-KS2</p> </div> </div> </div> </div>

title: Senior / Staff Data Engineer
location: New York, NY (Hybrid); Redwood City, CA (Hybrid)
full_description: <div class="content-intro"><p>Biohub is the first large-scale initiative bringing frontier AI models, massive compute, and frontier experimental capabilities under one roof. We're building a general-purpose system to accelerate scientific discovery, integrating frontier AI models, biological foundation models, and lab capabilities, with the ultimate goal of curing disease. Our technology powers scientists around the world, translating AI capabilities into tools that accelerate research everywhere.</p></div><h2><span style="color: rgb(40, 40, 39); font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">The Team</span></h2> <p>Biohub is a 501(c)(3) biomedical research organization building the first large-scale scientific initiative combining frontier AI with frontier biology to solve disease. We build the technology to help scientists around the world use AI-powered biology to study how cells operate, organize, and work as part of systems to understand why disease happens and how to correct it. With our compute capacity, AI research and engineering, and state-of-the-art technology for measuring, imaging, and programming biology, we are enabling scientists worldwide to use AI-powered biology to advance our understanding of human health.</p> <h2><span style="color: rgb(40, 40, 39); font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">The Opportunity</span></h2> <p>The role is part of the Data Engineering team, which focuses on owning the strategy, sourcing and implementation for data supporting AI research and development. Our goal is to maximize the speed, agility, and capability of biological AI research by connecting public data resources and Biohub's experimental platforms to AI systems. The data that trains biological frontier models comes in dozens of modalities (sequences, images, spatial coordinates, time series, molecular structures, metadata, publication artifacts) each with its own noise characteristics, biases, and information content. The question of how to represent this data for learning is one of the most important open problems in biological AI.</p> <p>As a senior / staff data engineer at Biohub, you'll be designing systems that ingest data from public repositories, transform heterogeneous biological formats into AI-ready datasets, combine that with proprietary datasets, and deliver training datasets to researchers pushing the boundaries of what's possible in biological AI. The infrastructure you build will directly shape what our models can learn.</p> <p>We're a small team with significant resources and long time horizons. We use AI tools aggressively in our own work—Claude Code, agents for workflow automation, LLMs for metadata extraction. We care about code quality, operational reliability, and building systems that scale. And we care about the biology: we want engineers who can recognize when a pipeline output is technically correct but scientifically wrong.</p> <p>If you want to work at the intersection of large-scale infrastructure and frontier science, with real autonomy and the chance to build something genuinely new, we'd like to talk.</p> <h2><span style="color: rgb(40, 40, 39); font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">What You'll Do</span></h2> <ul> <li>Design and build data pipelines that process genomic and imaging data at petabyte scale</li> <li>Solve performance and bandwidth challenges with creative engineering</li> <li>Build agent-based systems for automated dataset curation, quality control, and workflow generation</li> <li>Create tooling for data cataloging and registration that makes datasets discoverable and accessible</li> <li>Collaborate with AI Research teams to translate model requirements into data specifications, and with our scientists to integrate public and internal data into large-scale ai-ready datasets&nbsp;</li> <li>Improve pipeline reliability and observability, working toward 99%+ success rates without manual intervention&nbsp;</li> </ul> <h2><span style="color: rgb(40, 40, 39); font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">What You'll Bring</span></h2> <ul> <li>8+ years experience building reliable, operable data systems at petabyte scale</li> <li>Strong software engineering fundamentals&nbsp;</li> <li>Experience deploying distributed computing frameworks like Databricks, Spark, or Ray for large-scale data processing</li> <li>Experience building and deploying large scale data platform solutions using infrastructure as code like Terraform or CDK</li> <li>Experience with cloud infrastructure (AWS preferred) and on prem infrastructure</li> <li>Comfort with ambiguity; ability to make progress when requirements are evolving</li> <li>Interest in AI-native development practices and tooling</li> <li>Nice to have: Background in computational biology, bioinformatics, or life sciences and experience with genomics datasets and formats (FASTQ, BAM, VCF) or imaging formats (OME-Zarr, HDF5)&nbsp;</li> </ul> <h2><span style="color: rgb(40, 40, 39); font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Compensation</span><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><br></span></h2> <div id="message-list_1776970235.934109"> <div> <div> <div> <div> <div> <div> <div> <div> <div> <div> <div>The future anticipated Redwood City, CA, and New York City, NY base pay range for a role in this field is <span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">$241,000–$338,000</span> annually. Compensation ranges will vary based on job-related skills, level of experience, and knowledge. Actual placement in range is based on job-related skills and experience, as evaluated throughout the interview process.</div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> </div> <h2><span style="color: rgb(40, 40, 39); font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Better Together</span></h2> <p><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">As we grow, we’re excited to strengthen in-person connections and cultivate a collaborative, team-oriented environment. This role is a hybrid position requiring you to be onsite for at least 60% of the working month, approximately 3 days a week, with specific in-office days determined by the team’s manager. The exact schedule will be at the hiring manager's discretion and communicated during the interview process.</span></p> <h2><span style="color: rgb(223, 22, 33); font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="color: rgb(40, 40, 39);"><strong>Benefits for the Whole You</strong></span>&nbsp;</span></h2> <p><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">We’re thankful to have an incredible team behind our work. To honor their commitment, we offer a wide range of benefits to support the people who make all we do possible.&nbsp;</span></p> <ul> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Provides a generous employer match on employee 401(k) contributions to support planning for the future.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Paid time off to volunteer at an organization of your choice.&nbsp;</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Funding for select family-forming benefits.&nbsp;</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Relocation support for employees who need assistance moving</span></li> </ul> <p><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">If you’re interested in a role but your previous experience doesn’t perfectly align with each qualification in the job description, we still encourage you to apply as you may be the perfect fit for this or another role.</span></p> <p><span style="font-weight: 400; color: #7e8c8d;">#LI-Hybrid #LI-Onsite</span></p>

title: Principal Data Engineer
full_description: <p>We are building the Data Hub, a centralized data platform responsible for consolidating legacy data infrastructure, establishing enterprise-grade data foundations, and enabling advanced analytics and AI capabilities across Precision AQ.</p> <p>The Principal Data Engineer is a senior technical leader and hands-on contributor responsible for the design, implementation, optimization, and operation of the Data Hub’s core platform capabilities. This role sits at the intersection of data engineering, platform engineering, DevOps, architecture, and data governance. You will help define the technical direction of the platform while remaining actively involved in designing solutions, building infrastructure, reviewing code, troubleshooting production issues, and improving engineering practices.</p> <p>This is not a management role. While you will mentor and guide junior engineers, analytics engineers, and platform contributors, you will not have direct reports. We are looking for an experienced practitioner who enjoys solving complex technical challenges, setting high engineering standards, and leading through expertise and influence rather than organizational hierarchy.</p> <p>As a member of the Data Hub leadership team, you will contribute to technology strategy, roadmap prioritization, architecture governance, vendor evaluation, and executive reporting while remaining deeply engaged in day-to-day engineering activities.</p> <p><strong>Main duties and responsibilities&nbsp;</strong></p> <ol> <li><strong> </strong><strong>Infrastructure and Platform Engineering</strong></li> </ol> <ul> <li>Design, build, and maintain scalable, secure, and reliable cloud-native data platform infrastructure.</li> <li>Develop infrastructure-as-code, CI/CD pipelines, deployment automation, and environment management processes.</li> <li>Partner with Corporate IT, Security, and platform vendors to ensure compliance, reliability, and operational excellence.</li> <li>Improve platform observability through monitoring, alerting, logging, and performance tracking.</li> </ul> <ol> <li><strong> </strong><strong>Data Architecture and Modelling</strong></li> </ol> <ul> <li>Design scalable data models supporting analytics, reporting, AI/ML, and operational use cases.</li> <li>Define and evolve data architecture standards, patterns, and best practices across the Data Hub ecosystem.</li> <li>Ensure data solutions align with governance, lineage, security, and regulatory requirements.</li> <li>Guide engineering teams in implementing maintainable and extensible data structures.</li> </ul> <ol> <li><strong> </strong><strong>Data Engineering and Solution Delivery</strong></li> </ol> <ul> <li>Build and optimize data ingestion, transformation, and delivery pipelines across multiple business domains.</li> <li>Lead technical design reviews and contribute directly to implementation of complex data engineering initiatives.</li> <li>Collaborate with Product, Analytics, AI/ML, and business stakeholders to translate requirements into scalable technical solutions.</li> <li>Provide hands-on support for critical platform initiatives, migrations, and modernization programs.</li> </ul> <ol> <li><strong> </strong><strong>DevOps and Engineering Excellence</strong></li> </ol> <ul> <li>Establish and enforce software engineering, GitOps, DevOps, testing, and deployment standards.</li> <li>Drive automation across development, deployment, monitoring, and operational processes.</li> <li>Promote best practices for code quality, documentation, technical debt management, and release management.</li> <li>Conduct architecture reviews and code reviews to ensure consistency and maintainability.</li> </ul> <ol> <li><strong> </strong><strong>Quality, Performance, and Reliability Optimization</strong></li> </ol> <ul> <li>Identify and resolve performance bottlenecks across pipelines, databases, and infrastructure.</li> <li>Define and implement data quality frameworks, automated validation processes, and operational controls.</li> <li>Optimize platform cost, scalability, reliability, and processing efficiency.</li> <li>Lead root-cause analysis and remediation efforts for production incidents and operational challenges.</li> </ul> <ol> <li><strong> </strong><strong>Technical Leadership and Mentorship</strong></li> </ol> <ul> <li>Mentor Data Engineers, Analytics Engineers, and other technical contributors through coaching, code reviews, pair programming, and design guidance.</li> <li>Act as a trusted technical advisor across multiple teams and business units.</li> <li>Share knowledge, develop engineering standards, and promote continuous improvement across the Data Hub organization.</li> <li>Help elevate the technical capabilities of the broader engineering team.</li> </ul> <ol> <li><strong> </strong><strong>Strategic Planning and Cross-Functional Collaboration</strong></li> </ol> <ul> <li>Participate in Data Hub leadership activities, including roadmap planning, prioritization discussions, technology evaluations, and executive reporting.</li> <li>Provide technical recommendations on platform investments, vendor selection, architecture direction, and engineering standards.</li> <li>Collaborate closely with Data Product Management, AI/ML teams, business stakeholders, and Corporate IT to ensure alignment between business priorities and technical execution.</li> </ul> <p><strong>Education and Experience</strong></p> <p><strong>Education: </strong>Bachelor’s degree in computer science, engineering, Information Systems, or related field. Equivalent experience considered. Advance degree preferred but not required.</p> <p><strong>Required:</strong></p> <ul> <li>8+ years of experience in Data Engineering, Platform Engineering, Infrastructure Engineering, or related technical disciplines.</li> <li>Demonstrated expertise designing and implementing modern cloud-based data platforms.</li> <li>Strong hands-on experience with data warehousing, orchestration, transformation, and DevOps technologies.</li> <li>Experience building and optimizing large-scale data pipelines and data models.</li> <li>Deep understanding of software engineering principles, infrastructure automation, and production operations.</li> <li>Experience operating in highly regulated, compliance-sensitive, or enterprise environments.</li> <li>Proven track record of leading technical initiatives through influence rather than direct authority.</li> </ul> <p><strong>Preferred:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Experience within healthcare, life sciences, pharmaceutical, or analytics organizations.</li> <li>Experience supporting AI/ML platforms, MLOps capabilities, feature stores, or model deployment frameworks.</li> <li>Familiarity with claims, formulary, commercial, or real-world evidence datasets.</li> <li>Experience leading enterprise-scale data migrations, modernization programs, or platform consolidations.</li> <li>Exposure to global engineering teams and distributed delivery models.</li> </ul> <p><strong>Knowledge, Skills and Competencies</strong></p> <p><strong>Technical Expertise</strong></p> <ul> <li>Advanced knowledge of cloud data platforms, modern data architecture, and platform engineering.</li> <li>Deep expertise in data modelling, query optimization, and analytical data design.</li> <li>Ability to evaluate and select appropriate technologies, frameworks, and architectural approaches.</li> <li>Expert-level SQL and strong Python skills.</li> </ul> <p><strong>Infrastructure and DevOps</strong></p> <ul> <li>Strong understanding of CI/CD, GitOps, Infrastructure-as-Code, containerization, and deployment automation.</li> <li>Experience implementing operational monitoring, incident management, alerting, and observability solutions.</li> <li>Knowledge of security, access management, and platform governance best practices.</li> <li>Strong understanding of scalability, resilience, and performance engineering.</li> </ul> <p><strong>Leadership and Influence</strong></p> <ul> <li>Leads through credibility, expertise, and collaboration rather than formal authority.&nbsp;Strong mentoring and coaching capabilities.</li> <li>Comfortable facilitating technical discussions and driving consensus among diverse stakeholders and ability to influence architecture and technology decisions across teams.</li> </ul> <p><strong>Communication and Collaboration</strong></p> <ul> <li>Excellent written and verbal communication skills and able to communicate complex technical concepts to both technical and non-technical audiences.</li> <li>Effective stakeholder management across engineering, product, business, and executive teams.&nbsp;Strong decision-making and prioritization skills in ambiguous environments.</li> </ul> <p><strong>Technical Environment</strong></p> <p>You will work across a modern data and AI ecosystem that may include:</p> <ul> <li>Data Platforms: Snowflake, AWS Redshift, S3</li> <li>Transformation: dbt, Matillion</li> <li>Orchestration: Airflow, Dagster</li> <li>Data Governance: Snowflake Horizon</li> <li>Data Quality: dbt tests, Elementary</li> <li>Infrastructure &amp; DevOps: Terraform, GitHub Actions, Azure DevOps</li> <li>AI/ML: Snowpark ML, MLflow, Snowflake Feature Store, LangChain</li> <li>Languages: SQL, Python</li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p>&nbsp;</p><div title: Senior Clinical Data Engineer
full_description: <p><strong>Position Summary:</strong></p> <p>The Senior Clinical Data Engineer leads the strategic development and optimization of clinical data systems to support regulatory compliance, advanced analytics, and operational excellence across global trials. This role drives enterprise-level data standardization initiatives,&nbsp; and architects scalable validation frameworks to proactively address systemic data issues. With deep expertise in Python, R, SQL, and SAS, the engineer builds and maintains modular codebases, sets coding standards, and mentors junior engineers. The role also oversees regulatory alignment with GCP and FDA 21 CFR Part 11, establishing robust documentation and audit trail protocols. Through dynamic dashboards and analytics tools, the engineer delivers actionable insights into trial performance and data quality. As a strategic liaison across Biostatistics, Clinical Operations, and Regulatory Affairs, the engineer translates clinical requirements into scalable technical solutions and leads the design of secure, high-performance databases and ETL pipelines integrating data from diverse clinical systems.</p> <p><strong>Essential functions of the job include but are not limited to:</strong></p> <p><strong>Data Standardization &amp; Mapping</strong> -&nbsp; Spearhead the development of enterprise-level data mapping strategies that transform raw clinical data into standardized formats for high-impact analytics. Lead the adoption and governance of data standards across programs to ensure regulatory alignment and consistency.&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>Data Quality Assurance</strong> - Design and implement robust, scalable validation frameworks that proactively detect and resolve systemic data issues. Serve as a strategic partner to Clinical Data Managers and cross-functional teams, driving continuous improvement in data integrity across global trials</p> <p><strong>Programming &amp; Scripting</strong> - Architect and maintain advanced, modular codebases using Python, R, SQL, and SAS to support complex data engineering workflows. Establish coding standards and mentor junior engineers in automation, reproducibility, and performance optimization. Example use cases includes edit checks, reconciliations, exception listings, programmed protocol deviations, resource projections based on site data entry volume</p> <p><strong>Regulatory Compliance &amp; Documentation</strong> - Lead compliance initiatives to ensure all data systems and workflows meet GCP, FDA 21 CFR Part 11, and evolving global regulatory requirements. Define documentation protocols and oversee audit trail governance to support inspection readiness and transparency</p> <p><strong>Reporting &amp; Visualization</strong> - Develop and operationalize dynamic dashboards and analytics tools that provide real-time insights into data quality, trial progress, and operational KPIs. Translate complex datasets into actionable intelligence for clinical and regulatory stakeholders.</p> <p><strong>Collaboration &amp; Cross-Functional Support</strong> - Act as a strategic liaison between Clinical Data Engineering and Biostatistics, Clinical Operations, and Regulatory Affairs. Translate clinical and scientific requirements into scalable technical solutions that support study execution and data delivery.</p> <p><strong>Database Design &amp; Optimization</strong> - Lead the design and optimization of secure, high-performance relational databases and data lakes. Ensure infrastructure scalability, query efficiency, and data governance for large-scale clinical datasets</p> <p><strong>Qualifications:&nbsp;</strong></p> <ul> <li>Bachelor’s Degree in a relevant field (life sciences, statistics, data management, clinical operations) or relevant/equivalent combination of education, training, and experience</li> <li>Minimum 6 years experience in clinical monitoring, clinical trial management&nbsp;&nbsp;or equivalent</li> <li>Advanced programming and automation skills; database design; dashboard development; CDISC governance.</li> </ul> <p><strong>Other Required:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Highly effective oral and written communication skills with the ability to communicate effectively with project team members</li> <li>Excellent organizational and time management skills</li> <li>Ability to work in a team or independently as required</li> <li>Demonstrated ability to learn how to extract pertinent information from protocols, electronic study data systems and clinical systems</li> <li>Proficiency in statistical analysis and data monitoring tools.</li> <li>Detail-oriented with strong analytical and problem-solving skills</li> <li>Demonstrated experience with integrated risk planning &amp; management</li> <li>Ability to mentor junior team members</li> </ul> <p><strong>Preferred:</strong></p> <ul> <li>CRO experience as a Clinical Data Engineer or Programmer</li> </ul> <p><strong>Skills:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Strong analytical and problem-solving skills with attention to data quality and integrity.</li> <li>Ability to work with large, complex datasets from multiple sources.</li> <li>Effective communication skills to collaborate with cross-functional teams.</li> <li>Knowledge of data governance, privacy, and security best practices in clinical research.</li> </ul> <p><strong>Competencies </strong></p> <ul> <li>Collaboration: Works effectively with clinical, statistical, and technical teams to align data strategies with study goals.</li> <li>Accountability: Takes ownership of data engineering deliverables and ensures timely, high-quality outputs.</li> <li>Adaptability: Thrives in a fast-paced, evolving environment with shifting priorities and timelines.</li> <li>Compliance-Oriented: Maintains a strong focus on regulatory compliance and data traceability.</li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p><div class="content-conclusion"><hr> <p>Any data provided as a part of this application will be stored in accordance with our&nbsp;<a title: Data Engineer
full_description: <h3><strong>About Pedestal Health</strong></h3> <p>Pedestal Health (formerly Target RWE) combines deep health system partnerships, longitudinal data curation at scale, and modern study design to build continuous, high-quality evidence for life sciences organizations. The company partners with pharmaceutical and biotech companies, providers and payers to generate rigorous, multimodal evidence that supports clinical, regulatory and strategic decision-making across the full lifecycle of care. Pedestal Health is committed to advancing medical decision making to improve outcomes for patients. Pedestal Health is a Highlander Health company. Learn more at<a href="http://pedestalhealth.com/">&nbsp;pedestalhealth.com</a>.</p> <h3><strong>The Role</strong></h3> <p>We are seeking a talented <strong>Data Engineer </strong>to join our Technology team. In this role, you will develop, create, and modify computer application software and databases to drive operational efficiency and improve business processes. You will collaborate closely with stakeholders to analyze user needs, design custom software solutions, and implement scalable, reliable applications that support Pedestal Health’s mission.</p> <h3><strong>What You’ll Do</strong></h3> <ul> <li>Design and implement data pipelines and software solutions that promote operational efficiency and scalability.</li> <li>Analyze business requirements and work with stakeholders to translate needs into technical solutions.</li> <li>Write clean, maintainable code primarily in Python, with a strong emphasis on SQL for data manipulation and transformation.</li> <li>Support and optimize cloud-based data infrastructure (AWS preferred).</li> <li>Develop and modify databases to support internal applications.</li> <li>Collaborate with operations and product teams to support deployment, testing, and maintenance.</li> <li>Help troubleshoot production issues and contribute to ongoing improvement efforts.</li> <li>Stay up to date on relevant tools, technologies, and best practices.</li> </ul> <h3><strong>What You’ll Bring</strong></h3> <ul> <li>3+ years of software development experience, ideally in data engineering, data platform development, or backend systems.</li> <li>Strong proficiency in SQL and Python.</li> <li>Experience with cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, or Azure) and working in cloud-native environments.</li> <li>Familiarity with version control and CI/CD tools (e.g., GitLab, GitHub Actions).</li> <li>Strong problem-solving and communication skills.</li> <li>Ability to work independently and manage tasks with moderate supervision.</li> </ul> <h3><strong>Nice to Have&nbsp;</strong></h3> <ul> <li>Experience working with or developing machine learning pipelines or models.</li> <li>Exposure to Generative AI or LLM frameworks (e.g., Langchain, LangGraph).</li> <li>Knowledge of distributed computing concepts or tools (e.g., Spark, Dask).</li> <li>Background in healthcare, life sciences, or clinical data.</li> <li>Bachelor’s degree in computer science, engineering, or a related field (or equivalent practical experience).</li> </ul> <p>If you are ready to be part of a team where your work truly matters - where your expertise is valued, your growth is supported and your contributions help shape the future of healthcare, Pedestal Health is the place for you. We’re building something meaningful together, and we’d love for you to be a part of it.&nbsp;</p> <h3><strong>What we offer you</strong></h3> <ul> <li>Hybrid work — 3 days/week in our brand-new office!</li> <li>Comprehensive health, dental, and vision for you and your family</li> <li>401(k) with company match</li> <li>Generous PTO and company holidays</li> <li>Paid parental leave<strong><em>&nbsp;</em></strong></li> </ul> <div class="job__description body"> <div> <p>Hybrid role: Located in Research Triangle Park, North Carolina</p> <p>If you are ready to be part of a team where your work truly matters—where your expertise is valued, your growth is supported, and your contributions help shape the future of healthcare—Pedestal Health is the place for you. We’re building something meaningful together, and we’d love for you to be a part of it.</p> <p><em>Pedestal Health is an equal opportunity employer and seeks candidates from diverse backgrounds and abilities.</em></p> </div> </div>

title: Forward Deployed AI Engineer

full_description: <div class="content-intro"><h1><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><strong><span style="font-size: 24pt;">About Turing</span></strong></span></h1> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Based in San Francisco, California, Turing is the world’s leading research accelerator for frontier AI labs and a trusted partner for global enterprises looking to deploy advanced AI systems. Turing accelerates frontier research with high-quality data, specialized talent, and training pipelines that advance thinking, reasoning, coding, multimodality, and STEM. For enterprises, Turing builds proprietary intelligence systems that integrate AI into mission-critical workflows, unlock transformative outcomes, and drive lasting competitive advantage.</span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Recognized by Forbes, The Information, and Fast Company among the world’s top innovators, Turing’s leadership team includes AI technologists from Meta, Google, Microsoft, Apple, Amazon, McKinsey, Bain, Stanford, Caltech, and MIT. In this role, you’ll partner directly with customers to design, build, and deploy intelligent applications using Python, Langchain/LangGraph, and large language models. You’ll bridge engineering excellence with customer empathy to solve high-impact real-world problems.</p> <p>This is a <strong>hands-on engineering role</strong> embedded within customer projects—ideal for engineers who enjoy ownership, love solving hard problems, and thrive in dynamic, technical environments.</p> <h2><strong>Key Responsibilities</strong></h2> <ul> <li>Lead the end-to-end deployment of GenAI applications for customers—from discovery to delivery.<br><br></li> <li>Architect and implement robust, scalable solutions using Python, Langchain/LangGraph, and LLM frameworks.<br><br></li> <li>Act as a trusted technical advisor to customers, understanding their needs and crafting tailored AI solutions.<br><br></li> <li>Collaborate closely with product, ML, and engineering teams to influence roadmap and core platform capabilities.<br><br></li> <li>Write clean, maintainable code and build reusable modules to streamline future deployments.<br><br></li> <li>Operate across cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, GCP) to ensure secure, performant infrastructure.<br><br></li> <li>Continuously improve deployment tools, pipelines, and methodologies to reduce time-to-value.<br><br></li> </ul> <h2><strong>Required Qualifications</strong></h2> <ul> <li><strong>5–8+ years</strong> of experience in software engineering or solutions engineering, ideally in a customer-facing capacity.<br><br></li> <li>Proven expertise in <strong>Python</strong>, <strong>Langchain</strong>, <strong>LangGraph</strong>, and <strong>SQL</strong>.<br><br></li> <li>Deep experience with <strong>engineering architecture</strong>, including APIs, microservices, and event-driven systems.<br><br></li> <li>Demonstrated success in <strong>designing and deploying GenAI applications</strong> into production environments.<br><br></li> <li>Strong proficiency with <strong>cloud services</strong> such as <strong>AWS</strong>, <strong>GCP</strong>, and/or <strong>Azure</strong>.<br><br></li> <li>Excellent communication skills, with the ability to translate technical complexity to customer-facing narratives.<br><br></li> <li>Comfortable working autonomously and managing multiple deployment tracks in parallel.<br><br></li> </ul> <h2><strong>Preferred Qualifications</strong></h2> <ul> <li>Familiarity with CI/CD, infrastructure-as-code (Terraform, Pulumi), and container orchestration (Docker, Kubernetes).<br><br></li> <li>Background in LLM fine-tuning, retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), or AI/ML operations.<br><br></li> <li>Previous experience in a startup, consulting, or fast-paced customer-obsessed environment.<br><br></li> </ul> <h2><strong>Education</strong></h2> <ul> <li>Bachelor's, Master's, or Ph.D. in <strong>Computer Science</strong>, <strong>Engineering</strong>, or a related technical field.</li> </ul> <h2><strong>Compensation Details</strong></h2> <ul> <li>Salary Range: 180-230k+&nbsp;</li> </ul><div class="content-conclusion"><h2><strong>Values</strong></h2> <ul> <li> <p><strong>We are client first</strong>: We put our clients at the center of everything we do, because their success is the ultimate measure of our value.</p> </li> <li> <p><strong>We work at Start-Up Speed: </strong>We move fast, stay agile and favor action because momentum is the foundation of perfection</p> </li> <li> <p><strong>We are AI forward: </strong>We help our clients build the future of Al and implement it in our own roles and workflow to amplify productivity.</p> </li> </ul> <h2><strong>Advantages of joining Turing</strong></h2> <div> <ul> <li> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Amazing work culture (Super collaborative &amp; supportive work environment; 5 days a week)</span></p> </li> <li experience)</span></p> </li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Competitive compensation</span></p> </li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"> <p><span style="font-size:
