title: Principal Forward Deployed AI Engineer
full_description: <div class="content-intro"><h1><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><strong><span style="font-size: 24pt;">About Turing</span></strong></span></h1> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Based in San Francisco, California, Turing is the world’s leading research accelerator for frontier AI labs and a trusted partner for global enterprises looking to deploy advanced AI systems. Turing accelerates frontier research with high-quality data, specialized talent, and training pipelines that advance thinking, reasoning, coding, multimodality, and STEM. For enterprises, Turing builds proprietary intelligence systems that integrate AI into mission-critical workflows, unlock transformative outcomes, and drive lasting competitive advantage.</span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Recognized by Forbes, The Information, and Fast Company among the world’s top innovators, Turing’s leadership team includes AI technologists from Meta, Google, Microsoft, Apple, Amazon, McKinsey, Bain, Stanford, Caltech, and MIT. Learn more at<a class="c-link c-link--underline" href="http://www.turing.com/" target="_blank" data-stringify-link="http://www.turing.com" data-sk="tooltip_parent">&nbsp;www.turing.com</a></span></p></div><h2><strong>About the role</strong></h2> <p>Turing is looking for people with LLM experience to join us in solving business problems for our Fortune 500 customers. You will be a key member of the Turing GenAI delivery organization and part of a GenAI project. You will be required to work with a team of other Turing engineers across different skill sets. In the past, the Turing GenAI delivery organization has implemented industry leading multi-agent LLM systems, RAG systems, and Open Source LLM deployments for major enterprises.&nbsp;</p> <h2><strong>Required skills</strong></h2> <ul> <li>8 + years of professional, hands-on engineering experience, including 4–6+ years specializing in building and deploying AI/ML models and systems.</li> <li>1+ year of experience in developing Generative AI (LLM) applications using techniques like prompt engineering, RAG, and/or agents.</li> <li>Expert in architecting GenAI applications/systems using various frameworks &amp; cloud services</li> <li>Good proficiency in using various cloud services from Azure, GCP, or AWS for building the GenAI applications</li> <li>Expert proficiency in programming skills in Python, Langchain/Langgraph and SQL is a must.</li> <li>Experience in driving the engineering team toward a technical roadmap.</li> <li>Excellent communication skills to effectively collaborate with business SMEs</li> </ul> <h2><strong>Roles &amp; Responsibilities</strong></h2> <ul> <li><strong>Build the technical roadmap </strong>given a business requirement and own the delivery of the same.</li> <li><strong>Lead the engineering team </strong>toward a technical roadmap and ensure timely execution of the roadmap to achieve customer satisfaction.&nbsp;</li> <li><strong>Develop and optimize LLM-based solutions</strong>: Lead the design, training, fine-tuning, and deployment of large language models, leveraging techniques like prompt engineering, retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), and agent-based architectures.</li> <li><strong>Codebase ownership</strong>: Maintain high-quality, efficient code in Python (using frameworks like LangChain/LangGraph) and SQL, focusing on reusable components, scalability, and performance best practices.</li> <li><strong>Cloud integration</strong>: Aide in deployment of GenAI applications on cloud platforms (Azure, GCP, or AWS), optimizing resource usage and ensuring robust CI/CD processes.</li> <li><strong>Cross-functional collaboration</strong>: Work closely with product owners, data scientists, and business SMEs to define project requirements, translate technical details, and deliver impactful AI products.</li> <li><strong>Mentoring and guidance</strong>: Provide technical leadership and knowledge-sharing to the engineering team, fostering best practices in machine learning and large language model development.</li> <li><strong>Continuous innovation</strong>: Stay abreast of the latest advancements in LLM research and generative AI, proposing and experimenting with emerging techniques to drive ongoing improvements in model performance.</li> </ul> <h2><strong>Education</strong></h2> <ul> <li>Bachelor's, Master's, or Ph.D. in <strong>Computer Science</strong>, <strong>Engineering</strong>, or a related technical field.</li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p>&nbsp;</p><div class="content-conclusion"><h2><strong>Values</strong></h2> <ul> <li> <p><strong>We are client first</strong>: We put our clients at the center of everything we do, because their success is the ultimate measure of our value.</p> </li> <li> <p><strong>We work at Start-Up Speed: </strong>We move fast, stay agile and favor action because momentum is the foundation of perfection</p> </li> <li> <p><strong>We are AI forward: </strong>We help our clients build the future of Al and implement it in our own roles and workflow to amplify productivity.</p> </li> </ul> <h2><strong>Advantages of joining Turing</strong></h2> <div> <ul> <li> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Amazing work culture (Super collaborative &amp; supportive work environment; 5 days a week)</span></p> </li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Awesome colleagues (Surround yourself with top talent from Meta, Google, LinkedIn etc. as well as people with deep startup experience)</span></p> </li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Competitive compensation</span></p> </li> <li style="font-size: 10pt;"> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Flexible working hours</span></p> </li> </ul> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;"><strong data-stringify-type="bold">Don’t meet every single requirement?</strong>&nbsp;Studies have shown that women and people of color are less likely to apply to jobs unless they meet every single qualification.&nbsp;Turing is proud to be an equal opportunity employer. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, religion, color, national origin, gender, gender identity, sexual orientation, age, marital status, disability, protected veteran status, or any other legally protected characteristics.&nbsp;At Turing we are dedicated to building a diverse, inclusive and authentic workplace&nbsp;&nbsp;and celebrate authenticity, so if you’re excited about this role but your past experience doesn’t align perfectly with every qualification in the job description, we encourage you to apply anyways. You may be just the right candidate for this or other roles.</span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;">For applicants from the European Union, please review&nbsp;<a href="https://www.turing.com/policy" target="_blank">Turing's GDPR notice here</a>.</span></p> </div> <div> <p>&nbsp;</p> </div></div>

That combination of transparency and mutual respect is what makes the work here feel worth doing.</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;134233117&quot;:false,&quot;134233118&quot;:false,&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335551550&quot;:1,&quot;335551620&quot;:1,&quot;335559737&quot;:0,&quot;335559738&quot;:0,&quot;335559739&quot;:160,&quot;335559740&quot;:276}">&nbsp;</span></span></li> <li style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;"><strong><span data-contrast="none">Experience a High-Performance Culture and Clear Purpose:&nbsp;</span></strong><span data-contrast="none">We are results-driven and&nbsp;clear about what that means: our&nbsp;goals are specific, accountability is shared, and every team member can see how their work connects to&nbsp;our mission. When we hit milestones, we celebrate them together. When we fall short, we learn and move forward.</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;134233117&quot;:false,&quot;134233118&quot;:false,&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335551550&quot;:1,&quot;335551620&quot;:1,&quot;335559737&quot;:0,&quot;335559738&quot;:0,&quot;335559739&quot;:160,&quot;335559740&quot;:276}">&nbsp;</span></span></li> </ul></div><p><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;"><strong><span class="TextRun SCXW142697793 BCX0" lang="EN" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW142697793 BCX0">Location: </span></span></strong><span class="TextRun SCXW142697793 BCX0" lang="EN" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW142697793 BCX0">Remote in these states: AL, AZ, CA, CO, FL, GA, KS, KY, IA, ID, IL, IN, LA, MA, ME, MI, MN, MO, NC, NH, NJ, NV, NY, OH, OK, OR, PA, RI, SC, TN, TX, UT, VA, VT, WA, WI</span></span><span class="TextRun SCXW142697793 BCX0" lang="EN-US" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW142697793 BCX0"> </span></span><span class="EOP Selected SCXW142697793 BCX0" data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></span></p> <p><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;"><strong><span data-contrast="auto">Role Description:</span></strong><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;335559738&quot;:240,&quot;335559739&quot;:120}">&nbsp;</span></span></p> <p><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;"><span data-contrast="auto">ShipBob&nbsp;is a global&nbsp;logistics&nbsp;technology company powering e-commerce fulfillment for thousands of brands. Our People team manages the workforce infrastructure that keeps&nbsp;ShipBob&nbsp;running, and&nbsp;we’re&nbsp;ready to fundamentally change how that infrastructure works.</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;335559739&quot;:120}">&nbsp;</span></span></p> <p><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;"><span data-contrast="auto">We’re&nbsp;hiring a Forward Deployed Engineer III (AI) embedded directly within the People team. This is not a traditional engineering role. It is a role for someone who knows enterprise HR systems from the inside, has built AI-assisted automations that run in production, and has the&nbsp;process&nbsp;instincts and data governance discipline to transform how an HR function&nbsp;operates, responsibly. This role reports to the Senior Director, Total&nbsp;Rewards&nbsp;&amp; HR&nbsp;Systems.</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;335559739&quot;:120}">&nbsp;</span></span></p> <p><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;"><span data-contrast="auto">You will spend your first&nbsp;60 days&nbsp;listening, mapping, and diagnosing. Then you will&nbsp;build. You will own the full lifecycle of every automation, from workflow map to production deployment to handoff documentation, working closely with our Central Data team and Legal to ensure sensitive data is handled with the care it deserves. This role reports to the Senior Director, Total Rewards &amp; HR Systems.</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;335559739&quot;:120}">&nbsp;</span></span></p> <p><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;"><strong><span data-contrast="auto">What&nbsp;you’ll&nbsp;do:</span></strong><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;335559738&quot;:240,&quot;335559739&quot;:120}">&nbsp;</span></span></p> <ul> <li style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;"><span data-contrast="auto">Employee lifecycle automation: new hires, role changes, terminations, transfers, and leave.&nbsp;Eliminate&nbsp;the manual coordination that currently runs on emails and spreadsheets by building automated task orchestration with SLAs, escalation paths, and audit-ready logs.</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></span></li> <li style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;"><span data-contrast="auto">Comp planning infrastructure hardening: access controls, versioning, approval workflows, and AI-assisted benchmarking across our&nbsp;SecureSheets&nbsp;environment.</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></span></li> <li style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;"><span data-contrast="auto">Build a unified People analytics layer connecting ADP Workforce Now, Greenhouse, and Lattice into a governed data model that gives People leaders real workforce intelligence.</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></span></li> <li style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;"><span data-contrast="auto">Performance and goals connectivity: build the data infrastructure that links performance data in Lattice to workforce decisions.</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></span></li> <li style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;"><span data-contrast="auto">Spend your first&nbsp;60 days&nbsp;embedded across every&nbsp;People&nbsp;sub-function, listening, mapping, and building a prioritized automation backlog that you own and execute against.</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></span></li> <li style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;"><span data-contrast="auto">Establish logging, monitoring, and alerting infrastructure for all&nbsp;automations. Publish reusable modules to the Automation Hub.</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></span></li> <li style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;"><span data-contrast="auto">Document all production automations to&nbsp;handoff-ready standard. Ensure every automation touching sensitive data has Legal sign-off and&nbsp;complies with&nbsp;HIPAA and PII governance requirements.</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></span></li> <li style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;"><span data-contrast="auto">Additional&nbsp;duties and&nbsp;responsibilities&nbsp;as necessary.</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></span></li> </ul> <p><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;"><strong><span data-contrast="auto">What&nbsp;you’ll&nbsp;bring to the table:</span></strong><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;335559738&quot;:240,&quot;335559739&quot;:120}">&nbsp;</span></span></p> <ul> <li style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;"><span data-contrast="auto">5-8 years working with enterprise HR systems (ADP, Workday, SuccessFactors, or equivalent) at an integration or implementation level, not just as an end user.</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></span></li> <li style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;"><span data-contrast="auto">Demonstrated experience building and deploying AI-assisted workflows in production. Not demos,&nbsp;not proofs of concept,&nbsp;but things that run.</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></span></li> <li style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;"><span data-contrast="auto">Sound&nbsp;API integration skills: you have built RESTful integrations from scratch, handled auth and error states, and built things that do not break silently.</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></span></li> <li style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;"><span data-contrast="auto">Real&nbsp;depth in&nbsp;access control design for sensitive data. class="content-pay-transparency"><div class="pay-input"><div class="title">U.S pay range </div><div class="pay-range"><span>$130,000</span><span class="divider">&mdash;</span><span>$150,000 USD</span></div></div></div><div class="content-conclusion"><p><strong></strong></p> <p><strong>About Us</strong></p> <p><span data-olk-copy-source="MessageBody">Diligent is the AI leader in governance, risk and compliance (GRC) SaaS solutions, helping more than 1 million users and 700,000 board members to clarify risk and elevate governance. The Diligent One Platform gives practitioners, the C-Suite and the board a consolidated view of their entire GRC practice so they can more effectively manage risk, build greater resilience and make better decisions, faster.&nbsp;</span></p> <div><span data-teams="true">At Diligent, we're building the future with people who think boldly and move fast. &nbsp;Whether you're designing systems that leverage large language models or part of a team reimaging workflows with AI, you'll help us unlock entirely new ways of working and thinking. &nbsp;Curiosity is in our DNA, we look for individuals willing to ask the big questions and experiment fearlessly - those who embrace change not as a challenge, but as an opportunity. &nbsp;The future belongs to those who keep learning, and we are building it together. &nbsp;At Diligent, you’re not just building the future - you’re an agent of positive change, joining a global community on a mission to make an impact.</span></div> <p>Learn more at&nbsp;diligent.com or follow us on&nbsp;<u><a id="OWA170dad44-6a69-e1e1-d720-601cd59ec77c" class="x_x_x_OWAAutoLink" href="https://www.linkedin.com/company/diligent-board-member-services/mycompany/verification/" data-outlook-id="c606bc91-5052-4d3a-a1d1-ed00ede365d9" data-linkindex="1" data-auth="NotApplicable">LinkedIn</a></u>&nbsp;and&nbsp;<u><a id="OWA153deb8c-7641-f6fc-97cb-65df680002a3" class="x_x_x_OWAAutoLink" href="https://www.facebook.com/DiligentCorporation/" data-outlook-id="07f4e461-6294-4482-a624-e58c27cd6199" data-linkindex="2" data-auth="NotApplicable">Facebook</a></u></p> <p><strong></strong></p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>What Diligent Offers You</strong>&nbsp;</p> <ul> <li><strong>Creativity is ingrained in our culture.</strong> We are innovative collaborators by nature. We thrive in exploring how things can be differently both in our internal processes and to help our clients</li> <li><strong>We care about our people.&nbsp;</strong>Diligent offers a flexible work environment, global days of service, comprehensive health benefits, meeting free days, generous time off policy and wellness programs&nbsp;to name a few</li> <li><strong>We have teams all over the world</strong>. We may be headquartered in New York City, but we have office hubs in Washington D.C., Vancouver, London, Galway, Budapest, Munich, Bengaluru, Singapore, and Sydney.</li> <li><strong>Diversity is important to us.</strong> Growing, maintaining and promoting a diverse team is a top priority for us. We foster and encourage diversity through our Employee Resource Groups and provide access to resources and education to support the education of our team, facilitate dialogue, and foster understanding.</li> </ul> <p>Diligent created the modern governance movement. Our world-changing idea is to empower leaders with the technology, insights and connections they need to drive greater impact and accountability – to lead with purpose. Our employees are passionate, smart, and creative people who not only want to help build the software company of the future, but who want to make the world a more sustainable, equitable and better place.&nbsp;</p> <p>Headquartered in New York, Diligent has offices in Washington D.C.,&nbsp; London, Galway, Budapest, Vancouver, Bengaluru, Munich, Singapore and Sydney. &nbsp;To foster strong collaboration and connection, this role will follow a hybrid work model. If you are within a commuting distance to one of our Diligent office locations, you will be expected to&nbsp;<strong>work onsite at least 50% of the time.</strong>&nbsp;We believe that in-person engagement helps drive innovation, teamwork, and a strong sense of community.</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><sub>We are a drug free workplace. Diligent is proud to be an equal opportunity employer. We do not discriminate based on race, color, religious creed, sex, national origin, ancestry, citizenship status, pregnancy, childbirth, physical disability, mental disability, age, military status, protected veteran status, marital status, registered domestic partner or civil union status, gender (including sex stereotyping and gender identity or expression), medical condition (including, but not limited to, cancer related or HIV/AIDS related), genetic information, or sexual orientation in accordance with applicable federal, state and local laws.&nbsp;We also consider qualified applicants regardless of criminal histories, consistent with legal requirements. See also&nbsp;Diligent's <a href="https://www.diligent.com/company/eeo-policy/">EEO Policy</a> and <a href="https://www.diligent.com/-/media/project/diligent/master/eeo-is-the-law-poster-eeocselfprintposter-and-ofccp-supplement-from-20170719.pdf?rev=96fafda8-f51d-44b6-a380-9af42898f526&amp;hash=614AE342F4AB51A091EA3E15F84F7E49" target="_blank">Know Your Rights</a>.&nbsp;We are committed to providing reasonable accommodations for qualified individuals with disabilities and disabled veterans in our job application procedures. If you need assistance or an accommodation due to a disability, you may contact us at <a href="mailto:recruitment@diligent.com">recruitment@diligent.com</a>.</sub></p> <p><sub><strong>To all recruitment agencies:</strong> Diligent does not accept unsolicited agency resumes. Please do not forward resumes to our jobs alias, Diligent employees or any other organization location. Diligent is not responsible for any fees related to unsolicited resumes.</sub></p></div>

title: Forward Deployed Engineer
full_description: <p><span data-contrast="none">Most AI roles keep you at arm’s length from the people the agents are supposed to help. This one puts you in the room with them.</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;335559738&quot;:80,&quot;335559739&quot;:120}">&nbsp;</span></p> <p><span data-contrast="none">We’re&nbsp;building AI agents for risk managers, internal auditors, and compliance professionals,&nbsp;not assistants that surface suggestions, but agents that own complex, multi-step workflows end to end. Agents that an audit team can hand a task to and trust it will come back done. Getting from a promising agent prototype to something a Chief Audit Officer depends on is a completely different discipline to building the prototype.&nbsp;That’s&nbsp;what this role is about.</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;335559738&quot;:80,&quot;335559739&quot;:120}">&nbsp;</span></p> <p><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p> <p><strong><span data-contrast="none">As a Forward Deployed Engineer,&nbsp;roughly 80%&nbsp;of your time is with our biggest enterprise customers across Europe and the US.&nbsp;You’re&nbsp;embedded in their environments,&nbsp;sitting with internal audit teams as they plan an audit programme, with risk functions assessing their control landscape, with compliance teams navigating regulatory obligations.&nbsp;You’re&nbsp;not there to show them what the agents already do.&nbsp;You’re&nbsp;there to understand their world well enough to discover what the agents need to do next.</span></strong><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p> <p><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p> <p><span data-contrast="none">You run discovery workshops,&nbsp;identify&nbsp;which workflows are genuinely ripe for agentic automation, prototype rapidly, test with real practitioners, and stay until the agent is reliable enough to be trusted.</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;335559738&quot;:80,&quot;335559739&quot;:120}">&nbsp;</span></p> <p><span data-contrast="none">The other 20% is feeding everything&nbsp;you’ve&nbsp;learned back into the platform. The goal&nbsp;isn’t&nbsp;to accumulate bespoke agent builds,&nbsp;it’s&nbsp;to&nbsp;identify&nbsp;the patterns across risk and audit functions that should be generalised, so every&nbsp;subsequent&nbsp;engagement is&nbsp;faster&nbsp;and the agents get better for everyone.</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;335559738&quot;:80,&quot;335559739&quot;:120}">&nbsp;</span></p> <p><span data-contrast="none">You sit in Product with a matrix into&nbsp;Engineering&nbsp;,&nbsp;which means you shape both the agent roadmap and the technical decisions that make agents work in production.</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;335559738&quot;:80,&quot;335559739&quot;:120}">&nbsp;</span></p> <p><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;335559738&quot;:80,&quot;335559739&quot;:200,&quot;335572079&quot;:2,&quot;335572080&quot;:4,&quot;335572081&quot;:13421772,&quot;469789806&quot;:&quot;single&quot;}">&nbsp;</span></p> <p><strong><span data-contrast="none">This is not a sales role and&nbsp;it’s&nbsp;not consulting.</span></strong><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;335559738&quot;:80,&quot;335559739&quot;:80}">&nbsp;</span></p> <p><span data-contrast="none">You write code. You build evaluation infrastructure. You design golden datasets grounded in real audit and risk workflows. You catch agent regressions before a customer’s compliance team does.&nbsp;You’re&nbsp;accountable for outcomes.</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;335559738&quot;:80,&quot;335559739&quot;:120}">&nbsp;</span></p> <p><strong><span data-contrast="none"><span data-ccp-parastyle="heading 1">The Hard Parts of Agentic AI Are Your Domain</span></span></strong><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;335559738&quot;:400,&quot;335559739&quot;:160,&quot;335572079&quot;:8,&quot;335572080&quot;:6,&quot;335572081&quot;:12086318,&quot;469789806&quot;:&quot;single&quot;}">&nbsp;</span></p> <p><span data-contrast="none">Silent regressions when a model updates. Context window degradation across long audit workflows. Prompt instability under varied user inputs. Non-deterministic outputs in environments where a compliance officer needs to explain every decision to a regulator. You know these failure&nbsp;modes&nbsp;and you know how to build the guardrails, tracing, and evaluation infrastructure that prevents them.</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;335559738&quot;:80,&quot;335559739&quot;:120}">&nbsp;</span></p> <p><strong><span data-contrast="none"><span data-ccp-parastyle="heading 1">The Customer Environment</span></span></strong><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;335559738&quot;:400,&quot;335559739&quot;:160,&quot;335572079&quot;:8,&quot;335572080&quot;:6,&quot;335572081&quot;:12086318,&quot;469789806&quot;:&quot;single&quot;}">&nbsp;</span></p> <p><span data-contrast="none">Enterprise GRC,&nbsp;global banks,&nbsp;large regulated&nbsp;corporates, sophisticated internal audit and risk functions across Europe and the US. You&nbsp;don’t&nbsp;need a compliance background, but you need the curiosity to learn it fast and the presence to earn trust with senior risk and audit professionals. These are people whose professional reputations depend on getting this right;&nbsp;that’s&nbsp;a good reason to make the agents&nbsp;actually reliable.</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;335559738&quot;:80,&quot;335559739&quot;:120}">&nbsp;</span></p> <p><span data-contrast="none">Travel is a meaningful part of this role.&nbsp;You’ll&nbsp;be on-site regularly with enterprise customers across EU and US markets. If&nbsp;you’re&nbsp;energised by variety,&nbsp;different industries, different regulatory cultures,&nbsp;different stages&nbsp;of agent maturity&nbsp;-&nbsp;this will suit you well.</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;335559738&quot;:80,&quot;335559739&quot;:120}">&nbsp;</span></p> <p data-ccp-border-bottom="1.3333333333333333px solid #2e6cb8" data-ccp-padding-bottom="8px"><strong><span data-contrast="none"><span data-ccp-parastyle="heading 1">These are the essentials&nbsp;</span><span data-ccp-parastyle="heading 1">you’ll</span><span data-ccp-parastyle="heading 1">&nbsp;need to get The Diligent One Platform gives practitioners, the C-Suite and the board a consolidated view of their entire GRC practice so they can more effectively manage risk, build greater resilience and make better decisions, faster.&nbsp;</span></p> <div><span data-teams="true">At Diligent, we're building the future with people who think boldly and move fast. &nbsp;Whether you're designing systems that leverage large language models or part of a team reimaging workflows with AI, you'll help us unlock entirely new ways of working and thinking. &nbsp;Curiosity is in our DNA, we look for individuals willing to ask the big questions and experiment fearlessly - those who embrace change not as a challenge, but as an opportunity. &nbsp;The future belongs to those who keep learning, and we are building it together. &nbsp;At Diligent, you’re not just building the future - you’re an agent of positive change, joining a global community on a mission to make an impact.</span></div> <p>Learn more at&nbsp;diligent.com or follow us on&nbsp;<u><a id="OWA170dad44-6a69-e1e1-d720-601cd59ec77c" class="x_x_x_OWAAutoLink" href="https://www.linkedin.com/company/diligent-board-member-services/mycompany/verification/" data-outlook-id="c606bc91-5052-4d3a-a1d1-ed00ede365d9" data-linkindex="1" data-auth="NotApplicable">LinkedIn</a></u>&nbsp;and&nbsp;<u><a id="OWA153deb8c-7641-f6fc-97cb-65df680002a3" class="x_x_x_OWAAutoLink" href="https://www.facebook.com/DiligentCorporation/" data-outlook-id="07f4e461-6294-4482-a624-e58c27cd6199" data-linkindex="2" data-auth="NotApplicable">Facebook</a></u></p> <p><strong></strong></p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>What Diligent Offers You</strong>&nbsp;</p> <ul> <li><strong>Creativity is ingrained in our culture.</strong> We are innovative collaborators by nature. We thrive in exploring how things can be differently both in our internal processes and to help our clients</li> <li><strong>We care about our people.&nbsp;</strong>Diligent offers a flexible work environment, global days of service, comprehensive health benefits, meeting free days, generous time off policy and wellness programs&nbsp;to name a few</li> <li><strong>We have teams all over the world</strong>. We may be headquartered in New York City, but we have office hubs in Washington D.C., Vancouver, London, Galway, Budapest, Munich, Bengaluru, Singapore, and Sydney.</li> <li><strong>Diversity is important to us.</strong> Growing, maintaining and promoting a diverse team is a top priority for us. We foster and encourage diversity through our Employee Resource Groups and provide access to resources and education to support the education of our team, facilitate dialogue, and foster understanding.</li> </ul> <p>Diligent created the modern governance movement. Our world-changing idea is to empower leaders with the technology, insights and connections they need to drive greater impact and accountability – to lead with purpose. Our employees are passionate, smart, and creative people who not only want to help build the software company of the future, but who want to make the world a more sustainable, equitable and better place.&nbsp;</p> <p>Headquartered in New York, Diligent has offices in Washington D.C.,&nbsp; London, Galway, Budapest, Vancouver, Bengaluru, Munich, Singapore and Sydney. &nbsp;To foster strong collaboration and connection, this role will follow a hybrid work model. If you are within a commuting distance to one of our Diligent office locations, you will be expected to&nbsp;<strong>work onsite at least 50% of the time.</strong>&nbsp;We believe that in-person engagement helps drive innovation, teamwork, and a strong sense of community.</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><sub>We are a drug free workplace. Diligent is proud to be an equal opportunity employer. We do not discriminate based on race, color, religious creed, sex, national origin, ancestry, citizenship status, pregnancy, childbirth, physical disability, mental disability, age, military status, protected veteran status, marital status, registered domestic partner or civil union status, gender (including sex stereotyping and gender identity or expression), medical condition (including, but not limited to, cancer related or HIV/AIDS related), genetic information, or sexual orientation in accordance with applicable federal, state and local laws.&nbsp;We also consider qualified applicants regardless of criminal histories, consistent with legal requirements. See also&nbsp;Diligent's <a href="https://www.diligent.com/company/eeo-policy/">EEO Policy</a> and <a href="https://www.diligent.com/-/media/project/diligent/master/eeo-is-the-law-poster-eeocselfprintposter-and-ofccp-supplement-from-20170719.pdf?rev=96fafda8-f51d-44b6-a380-9af42898f526&amp;hash=614AE342F4AB51A091EA3E15F84F7E49" target="_blank">Know Your Rights</a>.&nbsp;We are committed to providing reasonable accommodations for qualified individuals with disabilities and disabled veterans in our job application procedures. If you need assistance or an accommodation due to a disability, you may contact us at <a href="mailto:recruitment@diligent.com">recruitment@diligent.com</a>.</sub></p> <p><sub><strong>To all recruitment agencies:</strong> Diligent does not accept unsolicited agency resumes. Please do not forward resumes to our jobs alias, Diligent employees or any other organization location. Diligent is not responsible for any fees related to unsolicited resumes.</sub></p></div>

title: Forward Deployed Engineer - Agentic AI
full_description: <p><strong><span data-contrast="none">EU or US · Travel&nbsp;required&nbsp;across both regions</span></strong><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;335559739&quot;:320}">&nbsp;</span></p> <p><span data-contrast="none">Most AI roles keep you at arm’s length from the people the agents are supposed to help. This one puts you in the room with them.</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;335559738&quot;:80,&quot;335559739&quot;:120}">&nbsp;</span></p> <p><span data-contrast="none">We’re&nbsp;building AI agents for risk managers, internal auditors, and compliance professionals,&nbsp;not assistants that surface suggestions, but agents that own complex, multi-step workflows end to end. Agents that an audit team can hand a task to and trust it will come back done. Getting from a promising agent prototype to something a Chief Audit Officer depends on is a completely different discipline to building the prototype.&nbsp;That’s&nbsp;what this role is about.</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;335559738&quot;:80,&quot;335559739&quot;:120}">&nbsp;</span></p> <p><strong><span data-contrast="none">As a Forward Deployed Engineer,&nbsp;roughly 80%&nbsp;of your time is with our biggest enterprise customers across Europe and the US.&nbsp;You’re&nbsp;embedded in their environments,&nbsp;sitting with internal audit teams as they plan an audit programme, with risk functions assessing their control landscape, with compliance teams navigating regulatory obligations.&nbsp;You’re&nbsp;not there to show them what the agents already do.&nbsp;You’re&nbsp;there to understand their world well enough to discover what the agents need to do next.</span></strong><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p> <p><span data-contrast="none">You run discovery workshops,&nbsp;identify&nbsp;which workflows are genuinely ripe for agentic automation, prototype rapidly, test with real practitioners, and stay until the agent is reliable enough to be trusted.</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;335559738&quot;:80,&quot;335559739&quot;:120}">&nbsp;</span></p> <p><span data-contrast="none">The other 20% is feeding everything&nbsp;you’ve&nbsp;learned back into the platform. The goal&nbsp;isn’t&nbsp;to accumulate bespoke agent builds,&nbsp;it’s&nbsp;to&nbsp;identify&nbsp;the patterns across risk and audit functions that should be generalised, so every&nbsp;subsequent&nbsp;engagement is&nbsp;faster&nbsp;and the agents get better for everyone.</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;335559738&quot;:80,&quot;335559739&quot;:120}">&nbsp;</span></p> <p><span data-contrast="none">You sit in Product with a matrix into&nbsp;Engineering&nbsp;,&nbsp;which means you shape both the agent roadmap and the technical decisions that make agents work in production.</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;335559738&quot;:80,&quot;335559739&quot;:120}">&nbsp;</span></p> <p><strong><span data-contrast="none">This is not a sales role and&nbsp;it’s&nbsp;not consulting.</span></strong><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;335559738&quot;:80,&quot;335559739&quot;:80}">&nbsp;</span></p> <p><span data-contrast="none">You write code. You build evaluation infrastructure. You design golden datasets grounded in real audit and risk workflows. You catch agent regressions before a customer’s compliance team does.&nbsp;You’re&nbsp;accountable for outcomes.</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;335559738&quot;:80,&quot;335559739&quot;:120}">&nbsp;</span></p> <p><strong><span data-contrast="none"><span data-ccp-parastyle="heading 1">The Hard Parts of Agentic AI Are Your Domain</span></span></strong><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;335559738&quot;:400,&quot;335559739&quot;:160,&quot;335572079&quot;:8,&quot;335572080&quot;:6,&quot;335572081&quot;:12086318,&quot;469789806&quot;:&quot;single&quot;}">&nbsp;</span></p> <p><span data-contrast="none">Silent regressions when a model updates. Context window degradation across long audit workflows. Prompt instability under varied user inputs. Non-deterministic outputs in environments where a compliance officer needs to explain every decision to a regulator. You know these failure&nbsp;modes&nbsp;and you know how to build the guardrails, tracing, and evaluation infrastructure that prevents them.</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;335559738&quot;:80,&quot;335559739&quot;:120}">&nbsp;</span></p> <p><strong><span data-contrast="none"><span data-ccp-parastyle="heading 1">The Customer Environment</span></span></strong><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;335559738&quot;:400,&quot;335559739&quot;:160,&quot;335572079&quot;:8,&quot;335572080&quot;:6,&quot;335572081&quot;:12086318,&quot;469789806&quot;:&quot;single&quot;}">&nbsp;</span></p> <p><span data-contrast="none">Enterprise GRC,&nbsp;global banks,&nbsp;large regulated&nbsp;corporates, sophisticated internal audit and risk functions across Europe and the US. You&nbsp;don’t&nbsp;need a compliance background, but you need the curiosity to learn it fast and the presence to earn trust with senior risk and audit professionals. These are people whose professional reputations depend on getting this right;&nbsp;that’s&nbsp;a good reason to make the agents&nbsp;actually reliable.</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;335559738&quot;:80,&quot;335559739&quot;:120}">&nbsp;</span></p> <p><span data-contrast="none">Travel is a meaningful part of this role.&nbsp;You’ll&nbsp;be on-site regularly with enterprise customers across EU and US markets. If&nbsp;you’re&nbsp;energised by variety,&nbsp;different industries, different regulatory cultures,&nbsp;different stages&nbsp;of agent maturity&nbsp;-&nbsp;this will suit you well.</span><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;335559738&quot;:80,&quot;335559739&quot;:120}">&nbsp;</span></p> <p data-ccp-border-bottom="1.3333333333333333px solid #2e6cb8" data-ccp-padding-bottom="8px"><strong><span title: Technical Director, Data Engineering
full_description: <p><span data-olk-copy-source="MessageBody">Diligent is looking for a Technical Director of Data Engineering to help design and build the next generation of data and AI infrastructure powering our products and internal platforms.</span></p> <p>This is not a traditional management role. We are looking for an experienced builder; someone who still enjoys writing code, debugging distributed systems, evaluating frameworks, and getting hands-on with architecture and implementation.</p> <p>You will work across large-scale ingestion pipelines, search systems, AI/LLM infrastructure, event-driven architectures, vector databases, analytics platforms, and real-time data processing. You should be equally comfortable discussing high-level architecture with senior leadership and diving into a failing Kubernetes pod or optimizing a Spark job.</p> <p>The ideal candidate has strong opinions informed by real-world experience, understands tradeoffs deeply, and can move quickly without creating unnecessary complexity.</p> <h3>What You’ll Do</h3> <ul> <li> <p>Design and build scalable data platforms and distributed processing systems</p> </li> <li> <p>Develop modern ingestion, transformation, and retrieval pipelines for structured and unstructured data</p> </li> <li> <p>Build systems supporting AI/LLM applications, semantic search, RAG pipelines, vector search, and agentic workflows</p> </li> <li> <p>Work hands-on with engineering teams to implement production-grade solutions rather than producing slideware</p> </li> <li> <p>Evaluate and standardize frameworks, tooling, and infrastructure patterns across teams</p> </li> <li> <p>Improve performance, reliability, observability, and cost efficiency of data systems</p> </li> <li> <p>Partner with product and platform engineering teams to accelerate delivery of AI-native capabilities</p> </li> <li> <p>Drive pragmatic engineering decisions balancing speed, maintainability, and operational simplicity</p> </li> <li> <p>Mentor engineers technically through design reviews, architecture guidance, and pair debugging</p> </li> <li> <p>Help establish engineering standards around CI/CD, testing, data quality, monitoring, and operational excellence</p> </li> </ul> <h3>What We’re Looking For</h3> <h3>Strong Hands-On Engineering Experience</h3> <p>Candidates should have significant real-world experience building and operating production systems using many of the following:</p> <h4>Data &amp; Distributed Systems</h4> <ul> <li> <p>Airflow</p> </li> <li> <p>Elasticsearch / OpenSearch</p> </li> <li> <p>Vector databases and semantic retrieval systems</p> </li> <li> <p>MongoDB, PostgreSQL, DynamoDB, or similar platforms</p> </li> </ul> <h4>Cloud &amp; Infrastructure</h4> <ul> <li> <p>AWS</p> </li> <li> <p>AWS CDK</p> </li> <li> <p>Serverless architectures</p> </li> <li> <p>Distributed observability and monitoring stacks</p> </li> </ul> <h4>AI / Search / Modern Data Applications</h4> <ul> <li> <p>LLM integration patterns</p> </li> <li> <p>RAG architectures</p> </li> <li> <p>Embeddings and vector search</p> </li> <li> <p>MCP servers and AI orchestration frameworks</p> </li> <li> <p>LangChain, LlamaIndex, DSPy, or similar ecosystems</p> </li> <li> <p>AI evaluation, tracing, and observability tooling</p> </li> <li> <p>Search relevance and ranking systems</p> </li> </ul> <h4>Backend Engineering</h4> <ul> <li> <p>Python strongly preferred</p> </li> <li> <p>Experience with Java, Go, or TypeScript is a plus</p> </li> <li> <p>API design and distributed service architectures</p> </li> <li> <p>Event-driven and asynchronous systems</p> </li> </ul> <h2>The Right Candidate</h2> <ul> <li> <p>Still enjoys building and debugging systems directly</p> </li> <li> <p>Has strong technical depth, not just architectural vocabulary</p> </li> <li> <p>Comfortable operating in ambiguity and fast-moving environments</p> </li> <li> <p>Understands how to simplify systems instead of endlessly abstracting them</p> </li> <li> <p>Has experience modernizing legacy platforms and evolving architectures incrementally</p> </li> <li> <p>Can distinguish between engineering fundamentals and hype cycles</p> </li> <li> <p>Values shipping working systems over theoretical perfection</p> </li> </ul> <h3>What Success Looks Like</h3> <ul> <li> <p>Engineering teams can move faster because the underlying platforms are reliable and scalable</p> </li> <li> <p>AI and data systems become production-grade rather than experimental prototypes</p> </li> <li> <p>Infrastructure costs and operational complexity are reduced through better architecture</p> </li> <li> <p>Search, ingestion, and retrieval systems improve significantly in performance and relevance</p> </li> <li> <p>Teams adopt consistent, maintainable technical patterns without excessive bureaucracy</p> </li> </ul> <h3>Nice to Have</h3> <ul> <li> <p>Experience with large-scale news, document, or regulatory data pipelines</p> </li> <li> <p>Experience with search relevancy tuning and semantic retrieval</p> </li> <li> <p>Exposure to governance, compliance, risk, or enterprise SaaS platforms</p> </li> <li> <p>Familiarity with modern AI engineering workflows and agentic systems</p> </li> <li> <p>Experience supporting both startup-speed execution and enterprise-scale operations</p> </li> </ul> <div>&nbsp;</div><div class="content-pay-transparency"><div class="pay-input"><div class="title">Pay Range</div><div class="pay-range"><span>$180,000</span><span class="divider">&mdash;</span><span>$210,000 CAD</span></div></div></div><div class="content-conclusion"><p><strong></strong></p> <p><strong>About Us</strong></p> <p><span data-olk-copy-source="MessageBody">Diligent is the AI leader in governance, risk and compliance (GRC) SaaS solutions, helping more than 1 million users and 700,000 board members to clarify risk and elevate governance. The Diligent One Platform gives practitioners, the C-Suite and the board a consolidated view of their entire GRC practice so they can more effectively manage risk, build greater resilience and make better decisions, faster.&nbsp;</span></p> <div><span data-teams="true">At Diligent, we're building the future with people who think boldly and move fast. &nbsp;Whether you're designing systems that leverage large language models or part of a team reimaging workflows with AI, you'll help us unlock entirely new ways of working and thinking. &nbsp;Curiosity is in our DNA, we look for individuals willing to ask the big questions and experiment fearlessly - those who embrace change not as a challenge, but as an opportunity. &nbsp;The future belongs to those who keep learning, and we are building it together. &nbsp;At Diligent, you’re not just building the future - you’re an agent of positive change, joining a global community on a mission to make an impact.</span></div> <p>Learn more at&nbsp;diligent.com or follow us on&nbsp;<u><a id="OWA170dad44-6a69-e1e1-d720-601cd59ec77c" class="x_x_x_OWAAutoLink" href="https://www.linkedin.com/company/diligent-board-member-services/mycompany/verification/" data-outlook-id="c606bc91-5052-4d3a-a1d1-ed00ede365d9" data-linkindex="1" data-auth="NotApplicable">LinkedIn</a></u>&nbsp;and&nbsp;<u><a id="OWA153deb8c-7641-f6fc-97cb-65df680002a3" class="x_x_x_OWAAutoLink" href="https://www.facebook.com/DiligentCorporation/" data-outlook-id="07f4e461-6294-4482-a624-e58c27cd6199" data-linkindex="2" data-auth="NotApplicable">Facebook</a></u></p> <p><strong></strong></p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>What Diligent Offers You</strong>&nbsp;</p> <ul> <li><strong>Creativity is ingrained in our culture.</strong> We are innovative collaborators by nature. We thrive in exploring how things can be differently both in our internal processes and to help our clients</li> <li><strong>We care about our people.&nbsp;</strong>Diligent offers a flexible work environment, global days of service, comprehensive health benefits, meeting free days, generous time off policy and wellness programs&nbsp;to name a few</li> <li><strong>We have teams all over the world</strong>. We may be headquartered in New York City, but we have office hubs in Washington D.C., Vancouver, London, Galway, Budapest, Munich, Bengaluru, Singapore, and Sydney.</li> <li><strong>Diversity is important to us.</strong> Growing, maintaining and promoting a diverse team is a top priority for us. We foster and encourage diversity through our Employee Resource Groups and provide access to resources and education to support the education of our team, facilitate dialogue, and foster understanding.</li> </ul> <p>Diligent created the modern governance movement. Our world-changing idea is to empower leaders with the technology, insights and connections they need to drive greater impact and accountability – to lead with purpose. Our employees are passionate, smart, and creative people who not only want to help build the software company of the future, but who want to make the world a more sustainable, equitable and better place.&nbsp;</p> <p>Headquartered in New York, Diligent has offices in Washington D.C.,&nbsp; London, Galway, Budapest, Vancouver, Bengaluru, Munich, Singapore and Sydney. &nbsp;To foster strong collaboration and connection, this role will follow a hybrid work model. If you are within a commuting distance to one of our Diligent office locations, you will be expected to&nbsp;<strong>work onsite at least 50% of the time.</strong>&nbsp;We believe that in-person engagement helps drive innovation, teamwork, and a strong sense of community.</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><sub>We are a drug free workplace. Diligent is proud to be an equal opportunity employer. We do not discriminate based on race, color, religious creed, sex, national origin, ancestry, citizenship status, pregnancy, childbirth, physical disability, mental disability, age, military status, protected veteran status, marital status, registered domestic partner or civil union status, gender (including sex stereotyping and gender identity or expression), medical condition (including, but not limited to, cancer related or HIV/AIDS related), genetic information, or sexual orientation in accordance with applicable federal, state and local laws.&nbsp;We also consider qualified applicants regardless of criminal histories, consistent with legal requirements. See also&nbsp;Diligent's <a href="https://www.diligent.com/company/eeo-policy/">EEO Policy</a> and <a href="https://www.diligent.com/-/media/project/diligent/master/eeo-is-the-law-poster-eeocselfprintposter-and-ofccp-supplement-from-20170719.pdf?rev=96fafda8-f51d-44b6-a380-9af42898f526&amp;hash=614AE342F4AB51A091EA3E15F84F7E49" target="_blank">Know Your Rights</a>.&nbsp;We are committed to providing reasonable accommodations for qualified individuals with disabilities and disabled veterans in our job application procedures. If you need assistance or an accommodation due to a disability, you may contact us at <a href="mailto:recruitment@diligent.com">recruitment@diligent.com</a>.</sub></p> <p><sub><strong>To all recruitment agencies:</strong> Diligent does not accept unsolicited agency resumes. Please do not forward resumes to our jobs alias, Diligent employees or any other organization location. Diligent is not responsible for any fees related to unsolicited resumes.</sub></p></div>
