class="content-pay-transparency"><div class="pay-input"><div class="title">U.S pay range </div><div class="pay-range"><span>$130,000</span><span class="divider">&mdash;</span><span>$150,000 USD</span></div></div></div><div class="content-conclusion"><p><strong></strong></p> <p><strong>About Us</strong></p> <p><span data-olk-copy-source="MessageBody">Diligent is the AI leader in governance, risk and compliance (GRC) SaaS solutions, helping more than 1 million users and 700,000 board members to clarify risk and elevate governance. The Diligent One Platform gives practitioners, the C-Suite and the board a consolidated view of their entire GRC practice so they can more effectively manage risk, build greater resilience and make better decisions, faster.&nbsp;</span></p> <div><span data-teams="true">At Diligent, we're building the future with people who think boldly and move fast. &nbsp;Whether you're designing systems that leverage large language models or part of a team reimaging workflows with AI, you'll help us unlock entirely new ways of working and thinking. &nbsp;Curiosity is in our DNA, we look for individuals willing to ask the big questions and experiment fearlessly - those who embrace change not as a challenge, but as an opportunity. &nbsp;The future belongs to those who keep learning, and we are building it together. &nbsp;At Diligent, you’re not just building the future - you’re an agent of positive change, joining a global community on a mission to make an impact.</span></div> <p>Learn more at&nbsp;diligent.com or follow us on&nbsp;<u><a id="OWA170dad44-6a69-e1e1-d720-601cd59ec77c" class="x_x_x_OWAAutoLink" href="https://www.linkedin.com/company/diligent-board-member-services/mycompany/verification/" data-outlook-id="c606bc91-5052-4d3a-a1d1-ed00ede365d9" data-linkindex="1" data-auth="NotApplicable">LinkedIn</a></u>&nbsp;and&nbsp;<u><a id="OWA153deb8c-7641-f6fc-97cb-65df680002a3" class="x_x_x_OWAAutoLink" href="https://www.facebook.com/DiligentCorporation/" data-outlook-id="07f4e461-6294-4482-a624-e58c27cd6199" data-linkindex="2" data-auth="NotApplicable">Facebook</a></u></p> <p><strong></strong></p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>What Diligent Offers You</strong>&nbsp;</p> <ul> <li><strong>Creativity is ingrained in our culture.</strong> We are innovative collaborators by nature. We thrive in exploring how things can be differently both in our internal processes and to help our clients</li> <li><strong>We care about our people.&nbsp;</strong>Diligent offers a flexible work environment, global days of service, comprehensive health benefits, meeting free days, generous time off policy and wellness programs&nbsp;to name a few</li> <li><strong>We have teams all over the world</strong>. We may be headquartered in New York City, but we have office hubs in Washington D.C., Vancouver, London, Galway, Budapest, Munich, Bengaluru, Singapore, and Sydney.</li> <li><strong>Diversity is important to us.</strong> Growing, maintaining and promoting a diverse team is a top priority for us. We foster and encourage diversity through our Employee Resource Groups and provide access to resources and education to support the education of our team, facilitate dialogue, and foster understanding.</li> </ul> <p>Diligent created the modern governance movement. Our world-changing idea is to empower leaders with the technology, insights and connections they need to drive greater impact and accountability – to lead with purpose. Our employees are passionate, smart, and creative people who not only want to help build the software company of the future, but who want to make the world a more sustainable, equitable and better place.&nbsp;</p> <p>Headquartered in New York, Diligent has offices in Washington D.C.,&nbsp; London, Galway, Budapest, Vancouver, Bengaluru, Munich, Singapore and Sydney. &nbsp;To foster strong collaboration and connection, this role will follow a hybrid work model. If you are within a commuting distance to one of our Diligent office locations, you will be expected to&nbsp;<strong>work onsite at least 50% of the time.</strong>&nbsp;We believe that in-person engagement helps drive innovation, teamwork, and a strong sense of community.</p> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><sub>We are a drug free workplace. Diligent is proud to be an equal opportunity employer. We do not discriminate based on race, color, religious creed, sex, national origin, ancestry, citizenship status, pregnancy, childbirth, physical disability, mental disability, age, military status, protected veteran status, marital status, registered domestic partner or civil union status, gender (including sex stereotyping and gender identity or expression), medical condition (including, but not limited to, cancer related or HIV/AIDS related), genetic information, or sexual orientation in accordance with applicable federal, state and local laws.&nbsp;We also consider qualified applicants regardless of criminal histories, consistent with legal requirements. See also&nbsp;Diligent's <a href="https://www.diligent.com/company/eeo-policy/">EEO Policy</a> and <a href="https://www.diligent.com/-/media/project/diligent/master/eeo-is-the-law-poster-eeocselfprintposter-and-ofccp-supplement-from-20170719.pdf?rev=96fafda8-f51d-44b6-a380-9af42898f526&amp;hash=614AE342F4AB51A091EA3E15F84F7E49" target="_blank">Know Your Rights</a>.&nbsp;We are committed to providing reasonable accommodations for qualified individuals with disabilities and disabled veterans in our job application procedures. If you need assistance or an accommodation due to a disability, you may contact us at <a href="mailto:recruitment@diligent.com">recruitment@diligent.com</a>.</sub></p> <p><sub><strong>To all recruitment agencies:</strong> Diligent does not accept unsolicited agency resumes. Please do not forward resumes to our jobs alias, Diligent employees or any other organization location. Diligent is not responsible for any fees related to unsolicited resumes.</sub></p></div>

title: Senior Data Engineer
full_description: <div class="content-intro"><p><strong>About Wurl, LLC.</strong></p> <p>At Wurl, our mission is to create innovative technologies and services that help accelerate the shift to streaming. At our core, we are innovators focused on driving the streaming industry forward with technologies that help connect viewers to the right content and ads. Our technology and data-driven solutions help companies reach new audiences, engage high-value viewers, and ultimately increase their revenue.</p> <p>In 2022, Wurl was acquired by AppLovin (Nasdaq: APP), a leading marketing platform, giving our employees the best of both worlds: the dynamic environment of a 150+ person startup as well as the stability of a high-growth public tech company. We invest in providing a culture that fosters passion, drives excellence, and encourages collaboration to drive innovation. Wurl is a fully-remote company that has been globally recognized for our people and technology, having been named a Great Place to Work by Fortune in 2022, 2023, and 2024; an Ad Tech Company of the Year finalist by the UK Business Tech Awards in 2023; a BIG Innovation Awards winner in 2024 and 2025; and the “Innovation in Advertising” winner by the StreamTV Awards in 2024.</p> <p>&nbsp;</p></div><p>Wurl is seeking an experienced, detail-oriented data engineer with experience in big data and an understanding of ETL processes and data governance. Wurl’s position in the video and ad delivery ecosystem generates large quantities of data that needs to be carefully ETLed and managed. We’re looking for a Senior data engineer that can help evolve, productize and maintain the processes that control our data ETL and data governance processes.&nbsp;</p> <p>The ideal candidate is experienced with Big Data, SQL, Snowflake, DataBricks and AWS. Experience with OTT video, ad insertion processes, DataDog is advantageous but not mandatory.&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>Responsibilities:</strong>&nbsp;</p> <ul> <li>Evolve and streamline Wurl’s data ETL processes, Business Intelligence dashboards (internal and external) enhancement, data workflows (with emphasis on scale, security, maintainability, and validation), data warehousing processes, and internal/external monitoring, alarming, and reporting.&nbsp;</li> <li>Act as a data team representative and gather requirements from the internal customers such as data science, sales team, etc.&nbsp;</li> </ul> <p><strong>Qualifications:</strong></p> <ul> <li>5+ years experience with data warehouses.</li> <li>Python and extra strong SQL skills.&nbsp;</li> <li>Bachelors or Masters in Computer Science or equivalent.&nbsp;</li> <li>Proven experience building, deploying, and operating large-scale ETL/ELT processes, implementing CI/CD pipelines, and orchestrating data workflows using Apache Airflow.&nbsp;&nbsp;</li> <li>RBAC/security experience.&nbsp;</li> <li>Strong engineering leadership skills.&nbsp;</li> <li>Understanding of professional coding practices, versioning systems, bug tracking, agile processes, etc.</li> <li>Experience with SaaS offerings: Snowflake. Containerization, serverless processes, microservice architectures, etc.&nbsp;</li> <li>Experience with effective usage of AI powered code editors, e.g., Cursor.</li> <li>Nice to have: Databricks experience. Experience with streaming ad delivery, ad campaigns, supply and demand connectivity, OTT streaming formats (HLS, DASH), SSAI architectures.</li> <li>Effective communication skills and team player.</li> <li>Location: US remote.</li> </ul> <p><strong>What We Offer:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Competitive Salary &amp; Bonus</li> <li>Strong Medical, Dental and Vision Benefits, 100% paid by Wurl&nbsp;</li> <li>Remote first policy&nbsp;</li> <li>Flexible, unlimited&nbsp; Time Off&nbsp;</li> <li>10 US Holidays&nbsp;</li> <li>401(k) Matching</li> <li>Pre-Tax Savings Plans, HSA &amp; FSA with matching funds</li> <li>Ginger, Aaptiv and Headspace subscriptions for mental and physical wellness</li> <li>OneMedical subscription for 24/7 convenient medical care</li> <li>Paid Maternity and Parental Leave for all family additions</li> <li>Discounted PetPlan and easy at home access to Covid testing with empowerDX&nbsp;&nbsp;</li> </ul><div class="content-pay-transparency"><div class="pay-input"><div class="description"><p>AppLovin provides a competitive total compensation package with a pay for performance rewards approach. Total compensation at AppLovin is based on a number of factors including market location and may vary depending on job-related knowledge, skills, and experience. Depending on the position offered, equity, and other forms of incentive compensation (as applicable) may be provided as part of a total compensation package, in addition to dental, vision, and other benefits.</p> <p><strong>Other Types of Pay:</strong> Bonus eligible</p> <p><strong>Health Insurance: </strong>Medical, Dental, Vision, Life, Disability</p> <p><strong>Retirement Benefits:</strong> 401(k) Retirement Plan</p> <p><strong>Paid Time Off:</strong> Unlimited Discretionary Time Off</p> <p><strong>Paid Holidays:</strong> 10 paid holidays per year</p> <p><strong>Paid Sick Leave:</strong> 80 hours per year</p> <p><strong>Method of Application:</strong> Apply online</p> <p><strong>Application Window:</strong> The application window is expected to close within 30 days of the posting date.</p> <p>All questions or concerns about this posting should be directed to peopleops@applovin.com.</p></div><div class="title">USA Base Pay Range: CA, NY, WA States</div><div class="pay-range"><span>$183,000</span><span class="divider">&mdash;</span><span>$275,000 USD</span></div></div><div class="pay-input"><div class="title">USA Base Pay Range: all other States (excludes CA, NY, WA)</div><div class="pay-range"><span>$166,000</span><span class="divider">&mdash;</span><span>$250,000 USD</span></div></div></div><div class="content-conclusion"><div style="line-height: 1;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">AppLovin is proud to be an equal opportunity employer that is committed to inclusion and diversity. All applicants will be considered for employment without attention to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, veteran or disability status, or other legally protected characteristics. Learn more about EEO rights as an applicant&nbsp;<a class="postings-link" href="https://www.eeoc.gov/employers/eeo-law-poster" target="_blank">here</a>.</span></div> <div style="line-height: 1;">&nbsp;</div> <div style="line-height: 1;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">I</span><span style="font-size: 10pt;">f you need assistance and/or a reasonable accommodation due to a disability during the application or recruiting process, please send us a request at jobs@applovin.com</span></div> <div style="line-height: 1;">&nbsp;</div> <div style="line-height: 1;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">AppLovin will consider for employment all qualified applicants with criminal histories in a manner consistent with applicable law.&nbsp; If you’re applying for a position in California, learn more <a class="postings-link" href="https://calcivilrights.ca.gov/fair-chance-act/" target="_blank">here</a>.</span></div> <div style="line-height: 1;">&nbsp;</div> <div style="line-height: 1;"><span style="font-size: 10pt;">Please read our&nbsp;<a class="postings-link" href="https://www.applovin.com/global-applicant-privacy-notice/" target="_blank">Global Applicant Privacy Notice</a>&nbsp;to learn more about how AppLovin processes your personal information.</span></div></div>

title: Associate Data Engineer
full_description: <div class="content-intro"><p><strong>About WPP Media</strong></p> <p>WPP is the trusted growth partner for the world’s leading brands. With exceptional talent, trusted data and intelligence, and world-class partnerships – all united by our pioneering agentic marketing platform, WPP Open – we help clients navigate change, capture opportunity, and deliver transformational growth. </p> <p>WPP Media is WPP's AI-driven media operating unit, bringing together media, data, and partnerships to deliver creative personalisation at scale. Connected through WPP Open and powered by Open Intelligence, clients see exactly where, how, and why their media investment is working.</p> <p>For more information, visit <a href="wppmedia.com">wppmedia.com</a>.</p></div><p><strong>Job Title:</strong> Associate Data Engineer<br><strong>Company:</strong> WPP Media South Africa<br><strong>Location:</strong> Johannesburg, South Africa<br><strong>Reports To:</strong> Senior Data Specialist</p> <p><strong>About the Role</strong><br>The Associate Data Engineer is a technical role focused on the architecture, automation, and reliability of WPP’s media data ecosystem. Moving beyond front-end visualization, this role is responsible for building and maintaining the "data pipes" that collect, clean, and transport data from diverse AdTech/MarTech platforms into centralized environments. You will leverage your background in Application Development to move the agency away from manual reporting toward a scalable, code-based analytics environment.</p> <p><strong>Core Responsibilities</strong><br><strong>1. Pipeline Engineering &amp; Automation (Primary Focus)</strong><br>• &nbsp; &nbsp;Design, build, and maintain automated data pipelines using Adverity, Supermetrics, Fivetran and Python to eliminate manual reporting cycles.<br>• &nbsp; &nbsp;Map and automate complex workflows between SharePoint, BigQuery, and Power BI to ensure 100% data availability.<br>• &nbsp; &nbsp;Use Google Apps Script and VBA Macros to innovate and streamline internal business processes and reporting templates.<br><strong>2. ETL, Data Modeling &amp; SQL Optimization</strong><br>• &nbsp; &nbsp;Develop and optimize SQL logic within GCP BigQuery to ingest, clean, and structure large-scale marketing datasets.<br>• &nbsp; &nbsp;Implement dbt (Data Build Tool) fundamentals to ensure data transformations are modular, version-controlled, and tested.<br>• &nbsp; &nbsp;Apply Dimensional Modeling (Kimball) to structure data for maximum efficiency and reduced cloud processing costs.<br><strong>3. Media Intelligence &amp; Visualization</strong><br>• &nbsp; &nbsp;Design and maintain interactive dashboards in Power BI (Advanced DAX) and Looker Studio for internal and external stakeholders.<br>• &nbsp; &nbsp;Integrate data from Google Marketing Platform, Meta, Amazon, TikTok, and other major AdTech stacks.<br>• &nbsp; &nbsp;Support strategic analysis using specialized media tools including Nielsen and Telmar for cross-channel spend and reach-based planning.<br><strong>4. Data Governance &amp; Quality Assurance</strong><br>• &nbsp; &nbsp;Implement automated validation rules and "Data Health" alerts to identify discrepancies before they reach the client.<br>• &nbsp; &nbsp;Oversee data accuracy, completeness, and naming convention consistency across all platforms.</p> <p><strong>Qualifications &amp; Technical Requirements</strong><br>• &nbsp; &nbsp;Education Bachelor’s Degree in Computer Science, Data Science, Statistics, Engineering, or related quantitative discipline (preferred).<br>• &nbsp; &nbsp;Experience 2–4 years’ experience in data analysis, reporting automation, or data operations within a media, marketing, or digital environment.</p> <p><strong>Technical Competencies</strong><br><strong>SQL &amp; Data Transformation</strong><br>• &nbsp; &nbsp;Strong working proficiency in SQL (joins, aggregations, window functions)<br>• &nbsp; &nbsp;Experience transforming and structuring multi-source datasets for reporting<br>• &nbsp; &nbsp;Exposure to data modelling principles (fact/dimension concepts)<br>• &nbsp; &nbsp;Data Transformation using DBT and best practices<br><strong>Data Integration &amp; Automation</strong><br>• &nbsp; &nbsp;Experience maintaining and configuring automated data pipelines (Adverity, Supermetrics, API connectors)<br>• &nbsp; &nbsp;Exposure to scripting for automation (Python, VBA, or Google Apps Script)<br>• &nbsp; &nbsp;Demonstrated ability to reduce manual reporting through automation<br><strong>Cloud &amp; Data Platforms</strong><br>• &nbsp; &nbsp;Working knowledge of Google Cloud (BigQuery querying and dataset management)<br>• &nbsp; &nbsp;Experience integrating AdTech and MarTech data into centralised reporting environments<br><strong>BI &amp; Reporting Enablement</strong><br>• &nbsp; &nbsp;Advanced Power BI or Looker Studio development (data modelling + refresh logic)<br>• &nbsp; &nbsp;Advanced Excel proficiency (complex formulas, pivots, automation)<br>• &nbsp; &nbsp;Ability to structure scalable reporting templates<br><strong>Business &amp; Communication Skills</strong><br>• &nbsp; &nbsp;Ability to translate technical outputs into actionable insights<br>• &nbsp; &nbsp;Comfortable engaging with cross-functional stakeholders<br>• &nbsp; &nbsp;Experience supporting finance, planning, and strategy teams with data outputs</p><div class="content-conclusion"><p></p> <p><span class="TextRun SCXW227196529 BCX8" lang="EN-CA" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW227196529 BCX8">Please read our <a href="https://www.wppmedia.com/pages/privacy-policy#:~:text=WPP%20Media%20Privacy%20Notice%20for%20Recruitment">Privacy Notice</a></span></span><span class="TextRun SCXW227196529 BCX8" lang="EN-CA" data-contrast="auto">&nbsp;<span class="NormalTextRun SCXW227196529 BCX8">for more information on how we process the information you provide.</span></span><span class="EOP SCXW227196529 BCX8" data-ccp-props="{&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335559739&quot;:0,&quot;335559740&quot;:276}">&nbsp;</span></p></div>

title: Data Engineer - Manager
full_description: <div class="content-intro"><p><strong>About WPP Media</strong></p> <p>WPP is the trusted growth partner for the world’s leading brands. With exceptional talent, trusted data and intelligence, and world-class partnerships – all united by our pioneering agentic marketing platform, WPP Open – we help clients navigate change, capture opportunity, and deliver transformational growth. </p> <p>WPP Media is WPP's AI-driven media operating unit, bringing together media, data, and partnerships to deliver creative personalisation at scale. Connected through WPP Open and powered by Open Intelligence, clients see exactly where, how, and why their media investment is working.</p> <p>For more information, visit <a href="wppmedia.com">wppmedia.com</a>.</p></div><p><strong>About&nbsp;WPP Media</strong></p> <p>WPP is the creative transformation company. We use the power of creativity to build better futures for our people, planet, clients and communities. For more information, visit wpp.com.</p> <p>WPP Media is WPP’s global media collective. In a world where media is everywhere and in everything, we bring the best platform, people, and partners together to create limitless opportunities for growth. For more information, visit wppmedia.com</p> <p><strong>About&nbsp;WPP Media&nbsp;Data, Technology and Analytics&nbsp;(DTA):&nbsp;A Leading&nbsp;WPP Media&nbsp;Brand</strong></p> <p>DTA is WPP’s global data products and technology arm. We’re on a mission to transform marketing by building the fastest, most connected data platform that bridges marketing strategy to scaled activation.</p> <p>We work with agencies and clients to transform the value of data by bringing together technology, data and analytics capabilities. We deliver this through the Open Media Studio, an AI-enabled media and data platform for the next era of advertising.</p> <p>We’re endlessly curious. Our team of thinkers, builders, creators and problem solvers are over 1,000 strong, across 20 markets around the world.</p> <p><strong>Role Summary and Impact</strong></p> <p>As a Data Engineer, you will be a hands-on technical contributor within the Data, Technology &amp; Analytics team, responsible for designing, developing, and automating robust data solutions for our diverse client base. You will play a critical role in building and maintaining the data infrastructure that powers our insights and analytics.</p> <p>You will work extensively with the Measure data platform – a unified system for data connection, ingestion, transformation, and reporting – built on a robust technology stack including Adverity, GCP, and PowerBI. This role involves actively contributing to client projects that aggregate diverse data sources into a single, unified view, ensuring data integrity and consistency to enable comprehensive insights and custom visualisations. You will apply and help champion data engineering best practices throughout the data lifecycle.</p> <p><strong>In this role you will:</strong></p> <ul> <li><strong>Develop Data Solutions</strong>:&nbsp;Design, build, and implement robust data engineering solutions and data pipelines within the DTA team, ensuring high standards for data quality, reliability, and performance.</li> <li><strong>Data Pipeline &amp; Transformation:</strong>&nbsp;Develop, maintain, and optimize efficient, scalable, and reliable data pipelines (ETL/ELT) for ingesting, transforming, and loading diverse data sources into our data platforms, primarily BigQuery.</li> <li><strong>Platform Expertise:</strong>&nbsp;Work with and contribute to the Measure data platform, utilizing tools like Adverity, Google Cloud Platform (GCP), BigQuery, and dbt to create and enhance data architectures.</li> <li><strong>Collaboration &amp; Requirements:</strong>&nbsp;Collaborate effectively with BI specialists, analytics teams, and planning teams to understand business requirements and translate them into technical data engineering specifications.</li> <li><strong>Data Integrity &amp; Quality:</strong>&nbsp;Write and optimize complex SQL queries, implement data validation rules, and support monitoring processes to ensure the accuracy, completeness, and consistency of data assets.</li> <li><strong>Innovation &amp; Best Practices:</strong>&nbsp;Stay up-to-date with new data engineering trends and technologies, contributing to the adoption of best practices and continuous improvement of our data capabilities.</li> <li><strong>Performance Optimization:</strong>&nbsp;Assist in troubleshooting and optimizing data pipeline and database performance for large datasets and complex transformations.</li> <li><strong>Maintain an understanding</strong>&nbsp;of digital advertising and ad serving technology (e.g., ad serving, vendor ad servers, web analytics, attribution), pursuing advanced accreditation where relevant.</li> </ul> <p><strong>Skills and Experience</strong></p> <p>At&nbsp;WPP Media, we believe in the power of our culture and our people. It’s what elevates us to deliver exceptional experiences for both our clients and each other. In this role it will be critical to embrace&nbsp;WPP &amp;&nbsp;WPP Media’s&nbsp;shared&nbsp;core&nbsp;values:</p> <p>Essential</p> <ul> <li>Hands-on experience in data engineering, analytics engineering, or a closely related data field.</li> <li>Practical experience with cloud data platforms, specifically Google Cloud Platform (GCP) services (e.g., BigQuery, Cloud Storage, Cloud Functions, Composer).</li> <li>Strong proficiency in SQL for data manipulation, transformation, and analysis.</li> <li>Experience in designing, building, and maintaining data pipelines (ETL/ELT).</li> <li>Experience with data transformation tools like dbt (Data Build Tool).</li> <li>Experience working with data ingestion tools (e.g., Adverity or similar ETL platforms).</li> <li>Understanding of data modeling techniques (e.g., star schema, snowflake schema).</li> <li>Experience working with digital marketing, media campaign data, ad serving technologies, and/or web analytics data.</li> <li>Good communication skills, with the ability to articulate technical concepts and contribute to team discussions.</li> <li>Proactive and eager to learn new technologies and apply best practices in data engineering.</li> </ul> <p>Desirable:</p> <ul> <li>Familiarity with a scripting language like Python for data automation and manipulation.</li> <li>Understanding of Infrastructure as Code (IaC) principles.</li> <li>Exposure to CI/CD practices for data pipelines.</li> <li>Experience with project management tools such as Jira and Confluence.</li> <li>Basic understanding of data governance principles.</li> <li>Experience working with dashboarding tools (PowerBi preferred)</li> </ul> <p><strong>Life at&nbsp;WPP Media&nbsp;&amp; Benefits</strong></p> <p>Our passion for shaping the next era of media includes investing in our employees to help them do their best work, and we’re just as committed to employee growth as we are to responsible media investment.&nbsp;WPP Media&nbsp;employees can tap into the global&nbsp;WPP Media&nbsp;&amp; WPP networks to pursue their passions, grow their networks, and learn at the cutting edge of marketing and advertising. We have a variety of employee resource groups and host frequent in-office events showcasing team wins, sharing thought leadership, and celebrating holidays and milestone events. Our benefits include competitive medical, group retirement plans, vision, and dental insurance, significant paid time off, preferential partner discounts, and employee mental health awareness days.&nbsp;&nbsp;</p> <p>WPP Media&nbsp;is an equal opportunity employer and considers applicants for all positions without discrimination or regard to&nbsp;particular characteristics. We are committed to fostering a culture of respect in which everyone feels they belong and has the same opportunities to progress in their careers.<br><br>We believe the best work happens when we're together, fostering creativity, collaboration, and connection. That's why we’ve adopted a hybrid approach, with teams in the office around four days a week. If you require accommodations or flexibility, please discuss this with the hiring team during the interview process.</p> <p><em>Please note this is a UK based role and requires individuals to have the right to work in this location</em></p><div class="content-conclusion"><p></p> <p><span class="TextRun SCXW227196529 BCX8" lang="EN-CA" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW227196529 BCX8">Please read our <a href="https://www.wppmedia.com/pages/privacy-policy#:~:text=WPP%20Media%20Privacy%20Notice%20for%20Recruitment">Privacy Notice</a></span></span><span class="TextRun SCXW227196529 BCX8" lang="EN-CA" data-contrast="auto">&nbsp;<span class="NormalTextRun SCXW227196529 BCX8">for more information on how we process the information you provide.</span></span><span class="EOP SCXW227196529 BCX8" data-ccp-props="{&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335559739&quot;:0,&quot;335559740&quot;:276}">&nbsp;</span></p></div>

title: Junior Data Engineer - GCP
full_description: <div class="content-intro"><p><strong>About WPP Media</strong></p> <p>WPP is the trusted growth partner for the world’s leading brands. With exceptional talent, trusted data and intelligence, and world-class partnerships – all united by our pioneering agentic marketing platform, WPP Open – we help clients navigate change, capture opportunity, and deliver transformational growth. </p> <p>WPP Media is WPP's AI-driven media operating unit, bringing together media, data, and partnerships to deliver creative personalisation at scale. Connected through WPP Open and powered by Open Intelligence, clients see exactly where, how, and why their media investment is working.</p> <p>For more information, visit <a href="wppmedia.com">wppmedia.com</a>.</p></div><p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>1344 - Data Engineer</strong></p> <p><strong>Role Summary and Impact</strong></p> <p>This role forms part of a data engineering team&nbsp;assigned to&nbsp;one of WPP’s major global clients, who&nbsp;will be building and maintaining a global data warehouse, automated reports, and data provisioning applications to ensure that media and marketing stakeholders the&nbsp;world over&nbsp;will&nbsp;have access to the right data and insights to inform their marketing decisions. &nbsp;</p> <p>The team’s primary responsibility is to&nbsp;build and&nbsp;maintain&nbsp;a global Google Cloud based reporting solution, which automates the collection and transformation of disparate marketing data into&nbsp;a single source&nbsp;of truth. Not only does that mean running and&nbsp;maintaining&nbsp;the solution that already exists, but also continually improving it to incorporate new data sources, and to derive new insights, to support ever-evolving business demands.&nbsp;</p> <p>As a Data Engineer your primary responsibility will be to support campaign reporting by creating and maintaining infrastructure supporting timely, accurate and meaningful data deliverables &amp; reporting. You will serve as a leader and exemplar of data engineering best practices and thought. In doing so you will exhibit a foundational understanding of cloud technology and key data engineering skills and knowledge to help your team build their career in this fast evolving, and in demand, industry.&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>Some of the things&nbsp;we’d&nbsp;like you to do:</strong>&nbsp;</p> <ul> <li>Deploy data collectors in Adverity to gather data from media, agency system, and other sources&nbsp;</li> <li>Develop and expand on existing data “recipes” and transformations in SQL via DBT run on Google Cloud Platform&nbsp;</li> <li>Development and maintain data quality checks and procedures, helping stakeholders overcome data issues before they impact the quality of the reporting solution&nbsp;</li> <li>Support the translation of user requirements and business needs into technical specifications&nbsp;</li> <li>Be a proficient user of Google Cloud Platform and associated technologies, ensuring your work incorporates industry best practice</li> <li>Monitor automated jobs, troubleshooting data issues as-and-when they arise&nbsp;</li> <li>Support other members of the team responsible for “last mile” transformation and visualization of data within Google Data Studio reports and dashboards&nbsp;</li> <li>Serve as a technical and professional leader for junior staff&nbsp;</li> <li>Provide hands-on support to users of reporting solutions, helping the wider team triage and respond to user queries in a timely manner&nbsp;</li> <li>Attend internal stakeholder meetings, presenting your solutions and providing updates on your work.&nbsp;</li> <li>Support the development strong working relationships with third-party data providers that we rely on for access to necessary data&nbsp;</li> </ul> <p><strong>Skills and Experience</strong></p> <p><strong>Required</strong><strong>&nbsp;</strong></p> <ul> <li>Experience in data engineering, preferably handling advertising media or marketing data&nbsp;</li> <li>Experience in GCP</li> <li>Professional experience with SQL, preferably deployed via DBT&nbsp;</li> <li>Analytically minded, enabling you to understand and overcome technically complex challenges, and to tell compelling stories with data&nbsp;</li> <li>Strong organizational skills and attention to detail, including the ability to manage multiple tasks in a fairly autonomous way&nbsp;</li> <li>Strong spoken and written communication skills, ensuring your thoughts and needs are heard and understood&nbsp;</li> <li>An ability to demonstrate a passion for the digital marketing ecosystem, and an understanding of the role that data plays within it&nbsp;</li> <li>Delivers best results when working in a team environment, and an ability to partner effectively with people of varying degrees of technical capability&nbsp;</li> </ul> <p><strong>Desirable</strong><strong>&nbsp;</strong></p> <ul> <li>Previous&nbsp;experience working with data and technology&nbsp;</li> <li>Experience with digital marketing platforms and the data they generate, in particular Google Marketing Platform, Facebook, Tiktok etc.</li> <li>An understanding of how data is tracked and exchanged in the process of digital advertising (e.g. role of ad servers and other third-party tech vendors)&nbsp;</li> <li>Experience using or building reports with business intelligence software, ideally Microsoft PowerBI&nbsp;</li> <li>Work experience within a marketing organization, preferably at a media agency or related company (e.g. publisher, ad tech, client marketing org)&nbsp;</li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;<strong>Life at WPP Media &amp; Benefits</strong></p> <p>Our passion for shaping the next era of media is powered by our commitment to Be Extraordinary, investing in our employees to inspire transformational creativity. We also Lead Optimistically,&nbsp;firmly believing&nbsp;in and Championing Growth and Development for every individual. This commitment allows WPP Media employees to&nbsp;leverage&nbsp;the extensive global WPP Media &amp; WPP networks to pursue their passions, build vital professional connections, and learn at the&nbsp;cutting edge&nbsp;of marketing and advertising.&nbsp;</p> <p>We Create an Open environment built on trust and respect, where everyone feels they belong and has opportunities to progress. This inclusive culture is fostered through a variety of employee resource groups and frequent in-office events&nbsp;showcasing&nbsp;team wins, sharing thought leadership, and celebrating holidays and milestone events. Our comprehensive benefits package reflects this commitment, including competitive medical, group retirement plans, vision, and dental insurance, significant paid time off, preferential partner discounts, and employee mental health awareness days.&nbsp;</p> <p>WPP Media is an equal opportunity employer and considers applicants for all positions without discrimination or regard to characteristics. We believe the best work happens when we're together, fostering creativity, collaboration, and connection in this open and supportive environment. That's why we’ve adopted a hybrid approach, with teams in the office around four days a week. If you&nbsp;require&nbsp;accommodations or flexibility, please discuss this with the hiring team during the interview process.&nbsp;</p> <p>Please read our Privacy Notice (<a href="https://www.wppmedia.com/pages/privacy-policy">https://www.wppmedia.com/pages/privacy-policy</a>) for more information on how we process the information you provide.&nbsp;</p> <p>While we appreciate all applications received, only those candidates selected for an interview will be contacted.&nbsp;</p> <p>#Li-Promoted</p><div class="content-conclusion"><p></p> <p><span class="TextRun SCXW227196529 BCX8" lang="EN-CA" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW227196529 BCX8">Please read our <a href="https://www.wppmedia.com/pages/privacy-policy#:~:text=WPP%20Media%20Privacy%20Notice%20for%20Recruitment">Privacy Notice</a></span></span><span class="TextRun SCXW227196529 BCX8" lang="EN-CA" data-contrast="auto">&nbsp;<span class="NormalTextRun SCXW227196529 BCX8">for more information on how we process the information you provide.</span></span><span class="EOP SCXW227196529 BCX8" data-ccp-props="{&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335559739&quot;:0,&quot;335559740&quot;:276}">&nbsp;</span></p></div>

title: Lead Data Engineer
full_description: <div class="content-intro"><p><strong>About WPP Media</strong></p> <p>WPP is the trusted growth partner for the world’s leading brands. With exceptional talent, trusted data and intelligence, and world-class partnerships – all united by our pioneering agentic marketing platform, WPP Open – we help clients navigate change, capture opportunity, and deliver transformational growth. </p> <p>WPP Media is WPP's AI-driven media operating unit, bringing together media, data, and partnerships to deliver creative personalisation at scale. Connected through WPP Open and powered by Open Intelligence, clients see exactly where, how, and why their media investment is working.</p> <p>For more information, visit <a href="wppmedia.com">wppmedia.com</a>.</p></div><p></p> <p>Choreograph, part of WPP, is on a mission to transform marketing by building the fastest, most connected data platform that bridges marketing strategy to scaled activation. We work with agencies and clients to transform the value of data by bringing together technology, data and analytics capabilities. We deliver this through the Open Media Studio, an AI-enabled media and data platform for the next era of advertising. We're endlessly curious. Our team of thinkers, builders, creators and problem solvers are over 1,000 strong, across 20 markets around the world.</p> <hr> <p>Lead Data Engineer</p> <p>The Lead Data Engineer is a senior technical leadership role within Choreograph's Australia-based team, responsible for driving the strategic development of cloud engineering capabilities and building data infrastructure that delivers real, measurable outcomes for clients. Reporting to the General Manager of Tech and Data, this role sits at the heart of Choreograph's mission to transform the value of data for agencies and clients across the marketing ecosystem. The successful candidate will lead the design and delivery of advanced Google Cloud Platform solutions spanning Marketing Analytics, Data Analytics and Marketing Mix Modelling, setting the technical direction and standards that keep Choreograph at the cutting edge of the industry. Success in this role means scalable, resilient data infrastructure, a high-performing engineering team, and data solutions that consistently drive significant commercial value for clients.</p> <ul> <li>Leads the design and build of complex cloud engineering solutions across a range of media use cases, from digital analytics and data warehousing through to machine learning, generative AI and marketing mix modelling</li> <li>Collaborates across Business Intelligence, Marketing Science, architecture and project management teams to translate business needs into robust technical specifications and solutions</li> <li>Accountable for championing infrastructure as code, CI/CD best practices and cloud security standards across all data engineering initiatives in Australia</li> <li>Plays a central mentoring and coaching role within the data engineering team, guiding professional development and upholding high standards of collective output</li> <li>Contributes to the continuous evolution of Choreograph's engineering practice by evaluating emerging technologies, staying current with industry trends and advocating for innovation</li> </ul> <hr> <p>What You'll Bring</p> <ul> <li>Extensive experience designing and building Google Cloud Platform solutions, specifically within Marketing Analytics, Data Analytics and Machine Learning domains</li> <li>Deep expertise in data warehousing principles and ETL development using tools including BigQuery, Dataflow and Cloud Composer</li> <li>Strong proficiency in Python, including Apache Airflow and Apache Beam, and SQL, with a track record of delivering production-grade solutions</li> <li>Hands-on experience with GCP tools including BigQuery, Cloud Storage, Cloud Run, Cloud Functions and Cloud Composer</li> <li>Thorough knowledge of CI/CD pipelines and DevOps best practices, including Terraform and GitHub Actions</li> <li>Solid understanding of networking, security and performance optimisation within cloud environments</li> <li>Proven ability to communicate complex technical concepts clearly across cross-functional and matrixed teams, building consensus and managing stakeholder relationships effectively</li> <li>Experience defining and delivering Quality Assurance, User Acceptance Testing and data validation processes</li> </ul> <p>Bonus Points If You Have</p> <ul> <li>A Google Cloud Certification such as Professional Data Engineer, Professional ML Engineer or Professional Cloud Architect</li> <li>Knowledge of digital marketing and advertising concepts and tools</li> <li>Experience guiding teams through organisational change and technology adoption processes</li> <li>A background in Computer Science, Information Technology or a related technical discipline</li> </ul> <hr> <p>Life at WPP Media &amp; Benefits</p> <p>Our passion for shaping the next era of media is powered by our commitment to Be Extraordinary, investing in our employees to inspire transformational creativity. We also Lead Optimistically, firmly believing in and Championing Growth and Development for every individual. This commitment allows WPP Media employees to leverage the extensive global WPP Media &amp; WPP networks to pursue their passions, build vital professional connections, and learn at the cutting edge of marketing and advertising.</p> <p>We Create an Open environment built on trust and respect, where everyone feels they belong and has opportunities to progress. This inclusive culture is fostered through a variety of employee resource groups and frequent in-office events showcasing team wins, sharing thought leadership, and celebrating holidays and milestone events.</p> <p>WPP Media is an equal opportunity employer and considers applicants for all positions without discrimination or regard to characteristics. We believe the best work happens when we're together, fostering creativity, collaboration, and connection in this open and supportive environment. If you require accommodations or flexibility, please discuss this with the hiring team during the interview process.</p> <p>Please read our Privacy Notice (<a href="https://www.wppmedia.com/pages/privacy-policy" target="_blank">https://www.wppmedia.com/pages/privacy-policy</a>) for more information on how we process the information you provide.</p> <p>While we appreciate all applications received, only those candidates selected for an interview will be contacted.</p> <p>#LI-PROMOTED</p><div class="content-conclusion"><p></p> <p><span class="TextRun SCXW227196529 BCX8" lang="EN-CA" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW227196529 BCX8">Please read our <a href="https://www.wppmedia.com/pages/privacy-policy#:~:text=WPP%20Media%20Privacy%20Notice%20for%20Recruitment">Privacy Notice</a></span></span><span class="TextRun SCXW227196529 BCX8" lang="EN-CA" data-contrast="auto">&nbsp;<span class="NormalTextRun SCXW227196529 BCX8">for more information on how we process the information you provide.</span></span><span class="EOP SCXW227196529 BCX8" data-ccp-props="{&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335559739&quot;:0,&quot;335559740&quot;:276}">&nbsp;</span></p></div>

title: Manager-Data Engineer
full_description: <div class="content-intro"><p><strong>About WPP Media</strong></p> <p>WPP is the trusted growth partner for the world’s leading brands. With exceptional talent, trusted data and intelligence, and world-class partnerships – all united by our pioneering agentic marketing platform, WPP Open – we help clients navigate change, capture opportunity, and deliver transformational growth. </p> <p>WPP Media is WPP's AI-driven media operating unit, bringing together media, data, and partnerships to deliver creative personalisation at scale. Connected through WPP Open and powered by Open Intelligence, clients see exactly where, how, and why their media investment is working.</p> <p>For more information, visit <a href="wppmedia.com">wppmedia.com</a>.</p></div><p><strong>About WPP Media&nbsp;</strong></p> <p>WPP is the creative transformation company. We use the power of creativity to build better futures for our people, planet, clients and communities. For more information, visit wpp.com.&nbsp;</p> <p>WPP Media is WPP’s global media collective. In a world where media is everywhere and in everything, we bring the best platform, people, and partners together to create limitless opportunities for growth. For more information, visit wppmedia.com&nbsp;</p> <p>At WPP Media, we believe in the power of our culture and our people. It’s what elevates us to deliver exceptional experiences for both our clients and each other. In this role it will be critical to embrace WPP &amp; WPP Media’s shared core values:&nbsp;</p> <ul> <li>Be <strong>Extraordinary</strong> by Leading Collectively to Inspire transformational Creativity.&nbsp;</li> <li>Create an <strong>Open </strong>environment by Balancing People and Client Experiences by Cultivating Trust.&nbsp;</li> <li>Lead <strong>Optimistically</strong> by Championing Growth and Development to Mobilize the Enterprise.&nbsp;</li> </ul> <p><strong>Some of the things we’d like you to do:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Lead the maintenance and expansion of WPP’s Measure reporting platform to suit the needs of the client’s reporting and needs</li> <li>Leverage <strong>Google Cloud Platform</strong> applications and features to transfer data into client environments (Azure, GCP, others), improving performance, and ensuring high quality of data and service in support of this initiative</li> <li>Deploy and troubleshoot data collectors in Adverity to gather data from media, agency system, and other sources</li> <li>Develop and expand on existing data “recipes” and transformations in <strong>SQL via DBT</strong> run on Google Cloud Platform, borrowing and lending scripts from/to a central repository</li> </ul> <ul> <li>Development and maintain data quality checks and procedures, helping stakeholders overcome data issues before they impact the quality of the reporting solution</li> </ul> <ul> <li>Work with the program lead to maintaining a development roadmap of new ad platforms, reports, and provisioning destinations</li> <li>Lead a team of two junior engineers to handle support tickets, address and troubleshoot issues, and help them grow their career</li> <li>Be a proficient user of Google Cloud Platform and associated technologies, ensuring your work incorporates industry best practice</li> <li>Monitor automated jobs, troubleshooting data issues as-and-when they arise</li> <li>Support other members of the team responsible for “last mile” transformation and visualization of data within Google Data Studio reports and dashboards</li> <li>Serve as a technical and professional leader for junior staff</li> <li>Provide hands-on support to users of reporting solutions, helping the wider team triage and respond to user queries in a timely manner</li> <li>Attending internal stakeholder meetings, presenting your solutions, and providing updates on your work.</li> <li>Support the development of strong working relationships with third-party data providers that we rely on for access to necessary data</li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p><strong>A bit about yourself<em>:</em></strong></p> <p>Required</p> <ul> <li>Bachelor degree in Science or Engineering</li> <li>5+ years experience in data engineering, preferably handling advertising media or marketing data</li> <li>Professional experience with SQL, preferably deployed via DBT</li> <li>Analytically minded, enabling you to understand and overcome technically complex challenges, and to tell compelling stories with data</li> <li>Strong organizational skills and attention to detail, including the ability to manage multiple tasks in an autonomous way</li> <li>Strong spoken and written communication skills, ensuring your thoughts and needs are heard and understood</li> <li>An ability to demonstrate a passion for the digital marketing ecosystem, and an understanding of the role that data plays within it</li> <li>Delivers best results when working in a team environment, and an ability to partner effectively with people of varying degrees of technical capability</li> </ul> <p><strong><span data-contrast="auto">Life at WPP Media &amp; Benefits</span></strong><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p> <p><span data-contrast="auto">Our passion for shaping the next era of media includes investing in our employees to help them do their best work, and we’re just as committed to employee growth as we are to responsible media investment. WPP Media employees can tap into the global WPP Media &amp; WPP networks to pursue their passions, grow their networks, and learn at the cutting edge of marketing and advertising. We have a variety of employee resource groups and host frequent in-office events showcasing team wins, sharing thought leadership, and celebrating holidays and milestone events. Our benefits include competitive medical, group retirement plans, vision, and dental insurance, significant paid time off, preferential partner discounts, and employee mental health awareness days.</span><span data-contrast="auto"> </span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p> <p><span data-contrast="none">WPP Media is an equal opportunity employer and considers applicants for all positions without discrimination or regard to characteristics. We are committed to fostering a culture of respect in which everyone feels they belong and has the same opportunities to progress in their careers.</span></p> <p><span data-contrast="none">We believe the best work happens when we're together, fostering creativity, collaboration, and connection. That's why we’ve adopted a hybrid approach, with teams in the office around four days a week. If you require accommodations or flexibility, please discuss this with the hiring team during the interview process.</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p><div class="content-conclusion"><p></p> <p><span class="TextRun SCXW227196529 BCX8" lang="EN-CA" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW227196529 BCX8">Please read our <a href="https://www.wppmedia.com/pages/privacy-policy#:~:text=WPP%20Media%20Privacy%20Notice%20for%20Recruitment">Privacy Notice</a></span></span><span class="TextRun SCXW227196529 BCX8" lang="EN-CA" data-contrast="auto">&nbsp;<span class="NormalTextRun SCXW227196529 BCX8">for more information on how we process the information you provide.</span></span><span class="EOP SCXW227196529 BCX8" data-ccp-props="{&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335559739&quot;:0,&quot;335559740&quot;:276}">&nbsp;</span></p></div>

title: Senior Data Engineer
full_description: <div class="content-intro"><p><strong>About WPP Media</strong></p> <p>WPP is the trusted growth partner for the world’s leading brands. With exceptional talent, trusted data and intelligence, and world-class partnerships – all united by our pioneering agentic marketing platform, WPP Open – we help clients navigate change, capture opportunity, and deliver transformational growth. </p> <p>WPP Media is WPP's AI-driven media operating unit, bringing together media, data, and partnerships to deliver creative personalisation at scale. Connected through WPP Open and powered by Open Intelligence, clients see exactly where, how, and why their media investment is working.</p> <p>For more information, visit <a href="wppmedia.com">wppmedia.com</a>.</p></div><p><strong>About WPP Media&nbsp;</strong></p> <p>WPP is the creative transformation company. We use the power of creativity to build better futures for our people, planet, clients and communities. For more information, visit wpp.com.&nbsp;</p> <p>WPP Media is WPP’s global media collective. In a world where media is everywhere and in everything, we bring the best platform, people, and partners together to create limitless opportunities for growth. For more information, visit wppmedia.com&nbsp;</p> <p>At WPP Media, we believe in the power of our culture and our people. It’s what elevates us to deliver exceptional experiences for both our clients and each other. In this role it will be critical to embrace WPP &amp; WPP Media’s shared core values:&nbsp;</p> <ul> <li>Be <strong>Extraordinary</strong> by Leading Collectively to Inspire transformational Creativity.&nbsp;</li> <li>Create an <strong>Open </strong>environment by Balancing People and Client Experiences by Cultivating Trust.&nbsp;</li> <li>Lead <strong>Optimistically</strong> by Championing Growth and Development to Mobilize the Enterprise.&nbsp;</li> </ul> <p><strong>Senior Data Engineer</strong></p> <p>This role will serve as core member of a data engineering team assigned to one of WPP’s major global clients, who will be maintaining and expanding upon a global data warehouse, automated reports, and data provisioning applications to ensure that media and marketing stakeholders the world will have access to the right data and insights to inform their marketing decisions.&nbsp;&nbsp;</p> <p>WPP has developed the Measure platform, a stack of standardized technologies (Adverity for collection, DBT for modelling, Google Cloud Platform for orchestration, computing, and storage, and Microsoft PowerBI for visualization) and templates to speed the deployment and simplify support for automated reporting and analytics tools.</p> <p>The team’s primary responsibility is to build and maintain a global Measure-based reporting solution, leveraging existing templates where applicable and building custom collectors, data models, cloud architectures, and/or visualizations when required. The team will automate the collection and transformation of disparate marketing data into a single source of truth, continually improving it to incorporate new data sources, and to derive new insights, to support ever-evolving business demands.</p> <p>As an Senior Data Engineer, your primary responsibilities will include deploying and troubleshooting standardized Adverity data collection templates,&nbsp; QAing landed versus source data using self-developed scripts and manual processes, gathering platform and ad account parameters from upstream stakeholders, working within and contributing to the team building the data warehousing solution, &nbsp;adhering to technical standards and best practices, and contributing to the documentation of custom work.</p> <p>In doing so you will exhibit a foundational understanding of cloud technology and key data engineering skills and knowledge to help your team in this fast-evolving and in-demand industry.</p> <p><strong>Some of the things we’d like you to do:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Deploy data collectors in <strong>Adverity</strong> to gather data from media, agency system, and other sources</li> </ul> <ul> <li>Development and maintain data quality checks and procedures, helping stakeholders overcome data issues before they impact the quality of the reporting solution</li> </ul> <ul> <li>Support the translation of user requirements and business needs into technical specifications</li> <li>Be a proficient user of <strong>Google Cloud Platform</strong> and associated technologies, ensuring your work incorporates industry best practice</li> <li>Monitor automated jobs, troubleshooting data issues as-and-when they arise</li> <li>Support other members of the team responsible for “last mile” transformation and visualization of data within Google Data Studio reports and dashboards</li> <li>Serve as a technical and professional leader for junior staff</li> <li>Provide hands-on support to users of reporting solutions, helping the wider team triage and respond to user queries in a timely manner</li> <li>Attending internal stakeholder meetings, presenting your solutions, and providing updates on your work.</li> <li>Support the development strong working relationships with third-party data providers that we rely on for access to necessary data.</li> </ul> <p><strong>A bit about yourself<em>:</em></strong></p> <p>Required</p> <ul> <li>Bachelor degree in Science or Engineering</li> <li><strong>3+ years’ experience</strong> (professional or academic) in data engineering, preferably handling advertising media or marketing data</li> <li>Professional experience with <strong>SQL</strong>, preferably deployed via <strong>DBT</strong></li> <li>Analytically minded, enabling you to understand and overcome technically complex challenges, and to tell compelling stories with data</li> <li>Strong organizational skills and attention to detail, including the ability to manage multiple tasks in an autonomous way</li> <li>Strong spoken and written communication skills, ensuring your thoughts and needs are heard and understood</li> <li>An ability to demonstrate a passion for the digital marketing ecosystem, and an understanding of the role that data plays within it</li> <li>Delivers best results when working in a team environment, and an ability to partner effectively with people of varying degrees of technical capability</li> </ul> <p>&nbsp;</p> <p>Desirable</p> <ul> <li>Previous experience working with data and technology</li> <li>Experience with digital marketing platforms and the data they generate, in particular Google Marketing Platform, Facebook, Tiktok etc.&nbsp;&nbsp;</li> <li>An understanding of how data is tracked and exchanged in the process of digital advertising (e.g. role of ad servers and other third-party tech vendors)</li> <li>Experience using or building reports with business intelligence software, ideally Microsoft PowerBI</li> <li>Work experience within a marketing organization, preferably at a media agency or related company (e.g. publisher, ad tech, client marketing org)</li> </ul> <h1>&nbsp;</h1> <p><strong><span data-contrast="auto">Life at WPP Media &amp; Benefits</span></strong><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p> <p><span data-contrast="auto">Our passion for shaping the next era of media includes investing in our employees to help them do their best work, and we’re just as committed to employee growth as we are to responsible media investment. WPP Media employees can tap into the global WPP Media &amp; WPP networks to pursue their passions, grow their networks, and learn at the cutting edge of marketing and advertising. We have a variety of employee resource groups and host frequent in-office events showcasing team wins, sharing thought leadership, and celebrating holidays and milestone events. Our benefits include competitive medical, group retirement plans, vision, and dental insurance, significant paid time off, preferential partner discounts, and employee mental health awareness days.</span><span data-contrast="auto"> </span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p> <p><span data-contrast="none">WPP Media is an equal opportunity employer and considers applicants for all positions without discrimination or regard to characteristics. We are committed to fostering a culture of respect in which everyone feels they belong and has the same opportunities to progress in their careers.</span></p> <p><span data-contrast="none">We believe the best work happens when we're together, fostering creativity, collaboration, and connection. That's why we’ve adopted a hybrid approach, with teams in the office around four days a week. If you require accommodations or flexibility, please discuss this with the hiring team during the interview process.</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p><div class="content-conclusion"><p></p> <p><span class="TextRun SCXW227196529 BCX8" lang="EN-CA" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW227196529 BCX8">Please read our <a href="https://www.wppmedia.com/pages/privacy-policy#:~:text=WPP%20Media%20Privacy%20Notice%20for%20Recruitment">Privacy Notice</a></span></span><span class="TextRun SCXW227196529 BCX8" lang="EN-CA" data-contrast="auto">&nbsp;<span class="NormalTextRun SCXW227196529 BCX8">for more information on how we process the information you provide.</span></span><span class="EOP SCXW227196529 BCX8" data-ccp-props="{&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335559739&quot;:0,&quot;335559740&quot;:276}">&nbsp;</span></p></div>

title: Senior Autonomy Simulation & Data Engineer (Python / C++)
full_description: <p><strong><span data-contrast="auto">About the Company</span></strong></p> <p><span data-contrast="auto">At Torc, we have always believed that autonomous vehicle technology will transform how we travel, move freight, and do business.</span>&nbsp;</p> <p><span data-contrast="auto">A leader in autonomous driving since 2007, Torc has spent over a decade commercializing our solutions with experienced partners. </span><a href="https://torc.ai/daimler-testing-automated-trucks-public/"><span data-contrast="none"><span data-ccp-charstyle="Hyperlink">Now a part of the Daimler family</span></span></a><span data-contrast="auto">, we are focused solely on developing software for automated trucks to transform how the world moves freight.</span>&nbsp;</p> <p><span data-contrast="auto">Join us and catapult your career with the company that helped pioneer autonomous technology, and the first AV software company with the vision to partner directly with a truck manufacturer.</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p> <p data-section-id="1saqlln" data-start="4890" data-end="4913"><strong data-start="4894" data-end="4911">Meet the Team</strong></p> <p>Join our SW Systems and Safety - Behaviors &amp; Autonomy Team, where we build the data and software infrastructure that powers autonomy system evaluation and decision-making.</p> <p>We are seeking a Senior Autonomy Software Systems Engineer who thrives in a hands-on environment building data pipelines, processing large datasets, and developing tools that directly impact how autonomous systems are evaluated and improved.</p> <p>This role is focused on execution — writing production-quality Python (and some C++) code, working with cloud-based data, and building systems that enable large-scale analysis of autonomy data across mapping, simulation, and real-world environments.</p> <p data-section-id="wmsz6i" data-start="5578" data-end="5608"><strong data-start="5582" data-end="5606">What You’ll Be Doing</strong></p> <ul data-start="5610" data-end="6465"> <li data-section-id="1iyqvgr" data-start="5610" data-end="5722"> <p>Build and maintain Python-based data pipelines to ingest, process, and analyze large-scale autonomy datasets</p> </li> <li data-section-id="1ujqabp" data-start="5723" data-end="5821"> <p>Develop tools to extract and manipulate data from cloud-based storage systems (AWS, GCP, etc.)</p> </li> <li data-section-id="cg4mzi" data-start="5822" data-end="5923"> <p>Work with HD/SD map data, vehicle telemetry, and simulation outputs to support autonomy workflows</p> </li> <li data-section-id="uidn0m" data-start="5924" data-end="6012"> <p>Write performant and scalable code for data processing, transformation, and analysis</p> </li> <li data-section-id="uufdrh" data-start="6013" data-end="6106"> <p>Collaborate with systems, mapping, and AI/ML teams to support data-driven decision making</p> </li> <li data-section-id="1q24hh0" data-start="6107" data-end="6207"> <p>Develop scripts and tools to support scenario generation, ODD analysis, and validation workflows</p> </li> <li data-section-id="vagzvq" data-start="6208" data-end="6281"> <p>Optimize data workflows for performance, scalability, and reliability</p> </li> <li data-section-id="ev37lu" data-start="6282" data-end="6378"> <p>Contribute to system-level debugging by analyzing data and identifying root causes of issues</p> </li> <li data-section-id="nycqgc" data-start="6379" data-end="6465"> <p>Support integration of data pipelines into broader autonomy and validation systems</p> </li> </ul> <p data-section-id="1q9ev9h" data-start="6472" data-end="6509"><strong data-start="6476" data-end="6507">What You’ll Need to Succeed</strong></p> <ul data-start="6511" data-end="7058"> <li data-section-id="1it5kd" data-start="6511" data-end="6632"> <p>BS + 6+ years, MS + 3+ years, or PhD + 1+ years in Computer Science, Software Engineering, Robotics, or related field</p> </li> <li data-section-id="1pdd1tt" data-start="6633" data-end="6698"> <p>Strong proficiency in Python for production-level development</p> </li> <li data-section-id="1hvsmai" data-start="6699" data-end="6775"> <p>Experience working with large-scale datasets and data processing systems</p> </li> <li data-section-id="7acvjo" data-start="6776" data-end="6861"> <p>Experience with cloud environments and distributed data systems (AWS, GCP, Azure)</p> </li> <li>Familiarity with SD/HD maps, geospatial data, or spatial data processing</li> <li data-section-id="18no761" data-start="6862" data-end="6923"> <p>Experience writing clean, maintainable, and scalable code</p> </li> <li data-section-id="1s9r09h" data-start="6924" data-end="6990"> <p>Strong debugging and problem-solving skills in complex systems</p> </li> <li data-section-id="qumcyb" data-start="6991" data-end="7058"> <p>Experience working in cross-functional engineering environments</p> </li> </ul> <p data-section-id="1jac1zw" data-start="7065" data-end="7087"><strong data-start="7069" data-end="7085">Bonus Points</strong></p> <ul data-start="7089" data-end="7479"> <li data-section-id="1shohs5" data-start="7089" data-end="7134"> <p>Experience with C++ in production systems</p> </li> <li data-section-id="sxsq45" data-start="7135" data-end="7201"> <p>Experience working with autonomy, robotics, or mapping systems</p> </li> <li data-section-id="24p2eq" data-start="7276" data-end="7345"> <p>Experience with data pipelines, ETL systems, or ML data workflows</p> </li> <li data-section-id="l95qpf" data-start="7346" data-end="7401"> <p>Exposure to ROS/ROS2 or similar robotics frameworks</p> </li> <li data-section-id="nz8z" data-start="7402" data-end="7479"> <p>Experience with containerization (Docker) and distributed compute systems</p> </li> </ul> <p><strong><span data-contrast="auto">Perks of Being a Full-time Torc’r</span></strong>&nbsp;<br><span data-contrast="auto">Torc cares about our team&nbsp;members&nbsp;and we strive to provide benefits and resources to support their health, work/life balance, and future. Our culture is collaborative, energetic, and team focused. title: Software Engineer, I - Data Engineering
full_description: <p><strong><span data-contrast="auto">About the Company</span></strong><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p> <p><span data-contrast="auto">At Torc, we have always believed that autonomous vehicle technology will transform how we travel, move freight, and do business.</span>&nbsp;<br><span data-contrast="auto">A leader in autonomous driving since 2007, Torc has spent over a decade commercializing our solutions with experienced partners. </span><a href="https://torc.ai/daimler-testing-automated-trucks-public/"><span data-contrast="none"><span data-ccp-charstyle="Hyperlink">Now a part of the Daimler family</span></span></a><span data-contrast="auto">, we are focused solely on developing software for automated trucks to transform how the world moves freight.</span>&nbsp;<br><span data-contrast="auto">Join us and catapult your career with the company that helped pioneer autonomous technology, and the first AV software company with the vision to partner directly with a truck manufacturer.</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p> <p><strong><span data-contrast="none">Meet the Team</span></strong><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p> <p><span data-ccp-props="{}">Torc’s Data Engineering team is a highly collaborative group focused on building secure, scalable systems that let customers work with data easily and confidently. We operate as a distributed, remote-first team, ensuring everyone has equal access to information and collaboration. Our work includes frequent touchpoints—daily standups, planning sessions, and ad hoc discussions over Zoom or Slack. Because we own our services end-to-end, each engineer participates in a business hour on call rotation. We prioritize healthy work/life balance and sustainable development over heroic efforts.</span></p> <p><strong><span data-contrast="none">What&nbsp;You’ll&nbsp;Do</span></strong><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p> <p><span data-ccp-props="{}"></span></p> <p data-pm-slice="1 1 []">We are looking for a Software Engineer who is eager to learn and grow while helping build and support Linux- and cloud-based data systems. In this role, you’ll work closely with experienced engineers to contribute to AWS-based data ingestion, ETL, and storage solutions that enable analytics, simulation, and ML training across the company.&nbsp;</p> <ul> <li> <p>Create robust and resilient pipelines to process massive daily volumes of data created by vehicle fleets and simulation environments&nbsp;</p> </li> <li> <p>Build and support scalable pipelines as part of Torc’s Data Factory to deliver data for ML training at scale</p> </li> <li> <p>Scale Torc’s data lake through a distributed storage system, data crawling and discovery&nbsp;</p> </li> <li> <p>Promote and protect the integrity of data through validation, versioning, data provenance, and governance</p> </li> <li> <p>Support the expansion of Torc’s data lake through acquisition of additional data sets from internal and external sources&nbsp;</p> </li> <li> <p>Assist in the development and delivery of cloud-based solutions</p> </li> <li> <p>Collaborate with teams specializing in perception, planning, control, mapping and vehicle testing to develop solutions that support product delivery&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</p> </li> <li> <p>Support the implementation of emerging cloud-based capabilities that can extend our technology stack and improve our ability to build, deploy and test safety-critical software for self-driving vehicles</p> </li> <li> <p>Participate in the team’s on-call rotation to support our deployed systems during business hours&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</p> </li> </ul> <p>Here’s a list of some of the technologies we use to make all the above happen:&nbsp;</p> <ul> <li> <p>Managed services powered by AWS (Lambda, SFN, Batch, EventBridge, Athena, Glue)&nbsp;</p> </li> <li> <p>Linux / Bash</p> </li> <li> <p>Docker&nbsp;</p> </li> <li> <p>Terraform&nbsp;</p> </li> <li> <p>Python&nbsp;</p> </li> <li> <p>React/Javascript</p> </li> <li> <p>On-Call Tooling (Datadog, AWS Cloudwatch)</p> </li> <li> <p>Databricks</p> </li> </ul> <p><span data-ccp-props="{}"></span></p> <p><strong><span data-contrast="none">What&nbsp;You’ll&nbsp;Need to Succeed</span></strong><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p> <p><span data-ccp-props="{}"></span></p> <ul data-pm-slice="3 3 []"> <li> <p>BS/MS Degree in Computer Engineering, Computer Science, or related field&nbsp;&nbsp;</p> </li> <li> <p>Experience writing code using Python</p> </li> <li> <p>Practical experience with Docker and containerization</p> </li> <li> <p>A strong commitment to test-driven development patterns, continuous integration and delivery, and infrastructure as code&nbsp;</p> </li> <li> <p>Experience with Linux and general bash scripting</p> </li> <li> <p>Experience deploying, troubleshooting, monitoring and maintaining Linux systems</p> </li> </ul> <p><span data-ccp-props="{}"></span></p> <p><strong><span data-contrast="none">Bonus Points</span></strong>&nbsp;</p> <p></p> <ul data-pm-slice="3 3 []"> <li> <p>Strong organizational, time management, and communication skills working with a team orientation and collaborative style&nbsp;&nbsp;</p> </li> <li> <p>Experience developing cloud-based serverless solutions</p> </li> <li> <p>Experience with pandas, numpy and other Python-based data analysis libraries and tooling</p> </li> <li> <p>Knowledge of AWS serverless architectures (Lambda, Batch, ECS Fargate, Glue, Athena)&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</p> </li> <li> <p>Experience with data storage and acquisition patterns for robotics and advanced driver assistance systems</p> </li> <li> <p>Knowledge of different database architectures, including but not limited to relational and NoSQL databases, vector stores, data warehousing and clustered, distributed data stores</p> </li> <li> <p>Experience with the Databricks platform, particularly for serving data, visualizations and jobs</p> </li> <li> <p>Experience with scaling data for ML and AI workloads using Ray</p> </li> </ul> <p></p> <p><strong><span data-contrast="auto">Perks of Being a Full-time&nbsp;Torc’r</span></strong>&nbsp;<br><span data-contrast="auto">Torc cares about our team&nbsp;members&nbsp;and we strive to provide benefits and resources to support their health, work/life balance, and future. Our culture is collaborative, energetic, and team focused. Torc offers:&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</span>&nbsp;<br><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p> <ul> <li data-leveltext="" data-font="Symbol" data-listid="2"
