title: Forward Deployed Engineer
full_description: <div class="content-intro"><p><span style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif;">Workstream is a mission-driven company building the all-in-one HR, payroll, and hiring platform for managing the hourly workforce. There are 2.7 billion hourly workers, making up 80% of the global workforce, but this market has been heavily underserved by technology and deserves better. Workstream has been purpose-built for the hourly workforce from day one so that these businesses and their employees can thrive.</span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif;">Our customers include leading brands from multiple sectors, including Burger King, Carl's Jr./Hardee's, IHOP, KFC, and Culvers. We are a high growth series B company and quickly expanding our product portfolio to deliver on our vision. We are backed by legendary VCs and industry experts like Founders Fund, BOND, and Coatue.</span></p> <p class="isSelectedEnd"><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;">In addition to our core business, Workstream is home to a small, fast-moving Robotics team focused on advancing the next generation of artificial intelligence and robotics. We partner with a leading AI and robotics company to produce high-quality, large-scale egocentric (first-person) video datasets that help train advanced AI models.</span></p> <p><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;">Our Robotics team develops scalable data collection and annotation pipelines that enable the efficient creation of high-quality training datasets, helping AI systems better understand human actions, environments, and everyday interactions. We're also building a new category of connected hardware designed to operate reliably throughout the day in thousands of homes and businesses. By combining cutting-edge data collection, automation, and hardware innovation, this team is helping shape the future of intelligent systems and real-world AI applications.</span></p></div><p><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;"><strong>Grow With Us</strong></span></p> <p><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;">We are looking for a highly technical, customer-obsessed, and execution-driven Forward Deployed Engineer (FDE) to bridge the gap between Workstream’s product platform and our customers’ most complex operational challenges.</span></p> <p><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;">In this role, you will operate at the intersection of engineering, product, and customer deployment—embedding deeply with strategic customers to design, build, and deploy high-impact technical solutions that drive measurable business outcomes. You will own end-to-end deployments from discovery and technical scoping through implementation, iteration, and scaled adoption.</span></p> <p><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;">This is a high-ownership role for engineers who thrive in ambiguity, move quickly from prototype to production, and want to solve real-world business problems rather than just build in abstraction. You will work directly with customers, internal product and engineering teams, and executive stakeholders to shape deployment strategy while identifying reusable patterns that influence Workstream’s broader platform roadmap. This structure mirrors leading forward-deployed models where engineers embed closely with customers, ship quickly, and feed field insights back into core product development.</span></p> <p><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;">This is a full-time, hybrid role requiring presence 3 days a week in our Menlo Park office to foster close collaboration with cross-functional teams.&nbsp;</span></p> <h2><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;"><strong>Why This Role Is Different</strong></span></h2> <p><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;">This is not traditional software engineering, sales engineering, or implementation support. Forward Deployed Engineers at Workstream act more like startup operators or technical mini-GMs for strategic deployments—owning customer outcomes, shipping production systems quickly, and shaping the future product through execution. The best candidates are engineers who want to build, deploy, and influence product direction simultaneously.</span></p> <p><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;"><strong>Day In The Life</strong></span></p> <ul> <li style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;">Own technical delivery across strategic customer deployments from initial discovery through production launch and long-term adoption</span></li> <li style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;">Embed closely with enterprise customers to understand workflows, operational pain points, and technical requirements</span></li> <li style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;">Scope, architect, and build custom solutions, integrations, workflows, and product extensions that deliver measurable customer value</span></li> <li style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;">Write production-grade code across backend, frontend, APIs, integrations, or automation layers as needed to accelerate deployment</span></li> <li style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;">Translate ambiguous customer problems into structured technical roadmaps and execution plans</span></li> <li style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;">Partner cross-functionally with Product, Engineering, Sales, Customer Success, and Leadership to align deployments with business priorities</span></li> <li style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;">Make trade-offs between speed, scope, scalability, and productization while protecting customer outcomes</span></li> <li style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;">Identify repeatable deployment patterns and convert one-off customer solutions into scalable product capabilities</span></li> <li style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;">Serve as a strategic technical advisor to customers, helping shape adoption, implementation strategy, and long-term success</span></li> <li style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;">Surface field learnings, customer pain points, and deployment insights back to Workstream’s core product roadmap</span></li> </ul> <p><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;">Strong full-stack technical capability (Python, JavaScript/TypeScript, APIs, SQL, integrations, or similar)</span></li> <li style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;">Previous experience at high-growth startups, Palantir-style deployment teams, or customer-facing product engineering organizations</span></li> </ul> <p><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;"><strong>What We Offer</strong></span></p> <ul> <li style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;">A mission-driven and value-based company dedicated to empower deskless workers and local businesses</span></li> <li style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; We pay 95% of your premiums for our employees and 85% for dependents</span></li> <li style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;">In office amenities and stocked kitchen</span></li> <li style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;">401K Plan&nbsp;</span></li> <li style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;">Pre-tax commuter benefits</span></li> <li style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;">Learning/development stipend</span></li> <li style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;">Flexible PTO</span></li> </ul> <p><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;"><strong>Salary Range</strong></span></p> <p><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;">In compliance with the California Pay Transparency Law, the base salary range for this role is between $150,000 to $180,000 base in Menlo Park. This range is not inclusive of our discretionary bonus or equity package. When determining a candidate’s compensation, we consider a number of factors including skillset, experience, job scope, and current market data.</span></p><div class="content-conclusion"><p><span style="font-size: 10pt; font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif;"><strong>Know More About Workstream</strong></span></p> <ul> <li style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;"><a href="https://www.workstream.us/blog/funding-series-b">https://www.workstream.us/blog/funding-series-b</a></span></li> <li style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;"><a href="https://techcrunch.com/2021/08/26/workstreams-text-based-recruitment-tool-gets-a-48m-bet-from-bond-and-beyond/">https://techcrunch.com/2021/08/26/workstreams-text-based-recruitment-tool-gets-a-48m-bet-from-bond-and-beyond/</a></span></li> <li style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;"><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;"><a href="https://techbuzz.news/buzzworthy-august-27-2021/">https://techbuzz.news/buzzworthy-august-27-2021/</a></span></li> </ul> <p><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;"><strong data-stringify-type="bold">Additional Information&nbsp;</strong></span></p> <p><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;">Workstream provides equal employment opportunities to all employees and applicants for employment and prohibits discrimination and harassment of any type without regard to race, color, religion, age, sex, national origin, disability status, genetics, protected veteran status, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, or any other characteristic protected by federal, state or local laws. This policy applies to all terms and conditions of employment, including recruiting, hiring, placement, promotion, termination, layoff, recall, transfer, leaves of absence, compensation and training.&nbsp;</span></p> <p><span style="font-family: arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 10pt;">We are committed to the full inclusion of all qualified individuals.</span></p></div>

title: Head of Data Engineering
full_description: <div class="content-intro"><div> <p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal leading-[1.7]"><strong>About Eve<br></strong><br>Eve is redefining legal technology for plaintiff law firms, and we're building the team that will take us there. We help firms handle more cases, recover more for clients, and grow with AI that works across every stage of a case, from intake through resolution. The next generation of great plaintiff firms will be AI-Native, and Eve is how they get there. But what makes Eve different isn't just the product. It's how we build it. If you're someone who takes ownership, stays curious, and wants to build AI that's already changing how&nbsp;&nbsp;law is practiced, this is where you belong.</p> <p><strong>Product-market fit:</strong> Eve is trusted by over 1000+ law firms, and we’re growing fast.<br><strong>Backed by top investors:</strong> We’ve raised over $160M from world-class partners including Spark Capital, Andreessen Horowitz(A16z), Menlo Ventures, and Lightspeed.<br><strong>Built by a world-class team: </strong>Engineers, designers, and operators from places like Scale, Meta, Airbnb, Cruise, Square, Rubrik, and Lyft are building Eve from the ground up.<br><strong>AI-Native from day one: </strong>We’re on the bleeding edge of AI, collaborating directly with teams at OpenAI and Anthropic to build best-in-class AI workflows tailored for legal work.<br><strong>Explosive growth:</strong> We are growing 2X revenue Quarter over Quarter.</p> </div></div><p><span style="text-decoration: underline;"><strong>What You'll Do:</strong></span></p> <ul> <li>Design and build Eve’s <strong>data warehouse architecture</strong> from the ground up, including schema design, data modeling, and pipeline orchestration.</li> <li>Develop and maintain <strong>reliable ETL/ELT pipelines</strong> that integrate data across core business systems (CRM, product, billing, marketing, etc.).</li> <li>Define and implement <strong>core business data models</strong> that standardize how Eve measures pipeline, conversion, revenue, customer health, and attribution.</li> <li>Build a <strong>reliable GTM data layer</strong> that enables marketing, sales, CS, and finance teams to self-serve key insights without ad hoc analysis.</li> <li>Establish <strong>data quality, governance, and monitoring practices</strong> to ensure accuracy and reliability across the data stack.</li> <li>Create <strong>cross-functional intake and prioritization processes</strong> for data requests, balancing infrastructure work with business needs.</li> <li>Partner closely with <strong>GTM, finance, product, and engineering teams</strong> to understand their workflows and translate them into durable data systems.</li> <li>Select and manage Eve’s <strong>data stack</strong> (warehouse, orchestration, transformation, BI tooling).</li> <li>Lay the foundation for <strong>product analytics and behavioral event tracking</strong> across Eve’s platform.</li> <li><strong>Build and scale Eve’s data function over time</strong>, including hiring, team structure, and operating processes.</li> </ul> <p><span style="text-decoration: underline;"><strong>What We're Looking For:</strong></span></p> <ul> <li>Proven experience <strong>building a data warehouse and core data infrastructure from scratch</strong> at a high-growth SaaS or technology company.</li> <li>Deep expertise in <strong>data engineering</strong>, including data modeling, ETL/ELT pipeline design, and warehouse architecture.</li> <li>Strong proficiency with <strong>SQL and modern data stack tools</strong> (e.g., Snowflake/BigQuery/Redshift, dbt, Airflow/Prefect, etc.).</li> <li>Experience integrating and modeling data from <strong>GTM systems</strong> such as CRM, marketing automation, billing, and customer success platforms.</li> <li>Demonstrated ability to <strong>translate business workflows into durable data models</strong> that teams can rely on for decision-making.</li> <li>Comfortable operating in <strong>early-stage environments with messy, incomplete, or inconsistent data</strong>.</li> <li>Strong cross-functional communication skills and ability to <strong>work closely with sales, marketing, CS, finance, and product teams</strong>.</li> <li>Experience <strong>owning architectural decisions</strong> for the data stack, including tooling selection and infrastructure design.</li> <li>Familiarity with <strong>product analytics and event instrumentation</strong> across web or application platforms.</li> <li>Fluency with <strong>AI-assisted development tools</strong> such as Cursor, Claude Code, or GitHub Copilot.</li> <li>Entrepreneurial mindset with a desire to <strong>build and own a data function from the ground up</strong>.</li> </ul><div class="content-pay-transparency"><div class="pay-input"><div class="description"><p><em>Final compensation will be determined based on a variety of factors, including but not limited to relevant experience, skills, interview performance, and the scope and level of the role and candidate.</em></p></div><div class="title">US Base Salary Range</div><div class="pay-range"><span>$280,000</span><span class="divider">&mdash;</span><span>$350,000 USD</span></div></div></div><div class="content-conclusion"><div class="section page-centered" data-qa="closing-description"> <p><strong>Benefits</strong></p> <p>💰 Competitive Salary &amp; Equity<br>💹 401(k) Program with Employer Matching<br>⚕️ Health, Dental, Vision and Life Insurance<br>🩼 Short Term and Long Term Disability<br>🚗 Commuter Benefits*<br>🧑‍💻 Autonomous Work Environment<br>🖥️ Workplace Setup Reimbursement<br>🏠 Telecomm Stipend<br>🏝 Flexible Time Off (FTO) + Holidays<br>🚀 Quarterly Team Gatherings<br>🥪 In office Perks*</p> <span style="font-size: 10pt;"><em>*In office employees only</em></span></div> <div class="section page-centered" data-qa="closing-description"> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;"><em>Eve Legal is an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex (including pregnancy, sexual orientation, or gender identity), national origin, age, disability, genetic information, veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by applicable local laws, regulations and ordinances. If you need assistance and/or a reasonable accommodation during the application process, reach out to your recruiter.<br></em></span></p> <p><span style="font-size: 10pt;"><em>We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process.&nbsp; These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.</em></span></p> </div></div>

title: Data Engineer II
location: New York, New York, United States
full_description: <div class="content-intro"><p><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><strong><span style="font-size: 14pt;">About Us</span></strong></span></p> <p><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">DriveWealth is on a mission to make investing easier. We believe that everyone should have the ability to control their financial future, and that access to financial markets should not be limited by geography, wealth, or legacy systems. We are a global B2B financial technology organization dedicated to democratizing access to financial independence around the world. Our mission is realized through an API-based platform, empowering our partners to offer seamless investing and trading experiences to clients worldwide, all from their mobile devices. Our technology provides partners with a modern, extensible toolkit, enabling traditional investment workflows and innovative techniques like fractional share ownership. DriveWealth has evolved into a global platform offering trading of US equities, mutual funds, ETFs, fixed income, and options.</span></p> <p><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">There’s never been a better time to build a category-defining business and there has rarely been a team better positioned for this opportunity. Our culture blends the pace and agility of a fintech start-up with the impact, stability, and discipline of Wall Street. We encourage creativity and experimentation while ensuring institutional-grade execution and regulatory compliance in everything we do. Join us and help build the future of global investing!</span></p></div><h3><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">About The Team</span></h3> <p><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">We are looking for a Data Engineer who thrives on solving data problems, and enjoys working cross-functionally with product, engineering and analytics teams to deliver trusted, high-impact data solutions. The ideal candidate is excited to take ownership of well-defined data challenges and support the evolution of our data platform.</span></p> <p><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">The Data &amp; Analytics organization at DriveWealth powers the company’s data ecosystem end-to-end. Within it, the Data Platform Engineering team owns two critical pillars:</span></p> <ul> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Data Ingestion - building reliable pipelines that bring data from diverse internal and external sources</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Semantic Data Layer - creating curated, consistent and reliable datasets that enable analytics, reporting and decision making</span></li> </ul> <h3><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">What You’ll Do</span></h3> <ul> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Contribute to the design, build and maintenance of robust data pipelines (batch, streaming and replication) that power analytics, reporting and compliance use-cases</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Translate business needs into data solutions in collaboration with product managers, engineering teams and business stakeholders</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Proactively monitor and address challenges and opportunities, helping to anticipate scaling, performance and quality needs before they become blockers.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Adhere to and promote best practices, including documentation, code reviews and standards for data modelling, orchestration and tooling</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Actively participate in code reviews and knowledge sharing, raising the bar for data engineering craft and helping grow team capabilities</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Support the contribution to self-service data products, enabling data consumers with curated datasets, semantic layers and tools that accelerate insight generation</span></li> </ul> <h3><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><strong>You Bring</strong></span></h3> <ul> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">2-3 years of professional experience in data engineering or related fields, with a track record of building and contributing to data pipelines and platforms.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Technical Skills:</span> <ul> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Proficiency in Python and SQL</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Familiarity with Spark (PySpark and SparkSQL) and distributed data processing</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Familiarity with orchestration and transformation tools (e.g. Airflow, DBT)</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Familiarity with Databricks and cloud platforms (AWS preferred)</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Familiarity with infrastructure as code (e.g.Terraform or equivalent)</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Working knowledge in shell scripting and command line tooling (e.g. Databricks CLI)</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Proven ability to work independently and cross-functionally with product, engineering and business teams</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Experience working in teams with CI/CD pipelines, Git-based workflows and Agile methodologies</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Curiosity, accountability and a drive to improve data quality, scalability and usability across the company</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">BS in Computer Science or equivalent</span></li> </ul> </li> </ul> <h3><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Special Knowledge (Nice to Have, But Not Required)</span></h3> <ul> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Fintech or capital market experience</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Familiarity with regulatory and compliance-driven reporting (e.g. FINRA, GDPR)</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Experience supporting or mentoring junior team members.</span></li> </ul> <h3><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Location</span></h3> <p><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">This role is open to candidates in the following locations: <br></span><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><strong>New York, NY - Hybrid&nbsp;</strong></span></p> <ul> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">This role is expected to come into the office 2-3 days/week on a cadence set by the Hiring Manager/Team.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">If you're not based in one of the locations listed above, this role is not a fit, and we cannot accommodate remote work outside these locations.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Applicants must be authorized to work for any employer in the U.S. DriveWealth does not sponsor or take over sponsorship of an employment visa at this time.</span></li> </ul> <p><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><strong>Pay Range</strong>: $145,000 USD – $165,000 USD</span></p><div class="content-conclusion"><p><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 14pt;"><strong>Working at DriveWealth</strong></span></p> <p><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">We do our best work when we’re in the same room. To maintain the speed our partners expect, our New York, Chicago, and Lithuania teams work in-office 4 days a week. We’ve found that being physically side-by-side is the only way to solve complex problems in real-time and stay truly accountable to the products we ship. When you’re here, you’re working directly with the people making the decisions.<br></span></p> <p><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">To support that work, we provide competitive compensation, equity, and a 401(k) match. We also offer Medical, Dental, and Vision Insurance, Disability Insurance, and Paid Parental Leave, along with a wellness reimbursement, a company-provided phone, and a personal development allowance. Finally, we value the time you spend away from the office with generous PTO, observed holidays.</span></p> <p data-path-to-node="5"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><strong><span style="font-size: 14pt;">Work Authorization</span></strong></span></p> <p><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Applicants must possess the legal right to work in the country where the position is located at the time of application. DriveWealth requires all employees to provide original documentation verifying their work authorization on or before their first day of employment.</span></p> <p><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">For US-based roles: Applicants must be currently authorized to work in the United States on a full-time basis without the need for current or future visa sponsorship. DriveWealth does not provide visa sponsorship or support for employment authorization, including transfers, at this time. Offers of employment are strictly contingent upon an individual’s ability to secure and maintain the legal right to work at the Company.</span></p> <p><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 14pt;"><strong>How We Think About AI</strong></span></p> <p><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">We leverage AI to work smarter and move faster. We seek AI-curious talent who are proactive about using emerging tools to increase signal quality, reduce friction, and improve outcomes to deliver products faster, provide better service to our partners, and to streamline processes. Your ability to leverage our internal tools and technology to drive results is as important to us as your core domain expertise.</span></p> <p><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 14pt;"><strong>Compensation</strong></span></p> <p><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Pay is generally based on the level, complexity, responsibility, location, and job duties/requirements of the specific position. We then source candidates with the requisite skills, expertise, education, training, and experience.&nbsp; If you are selected for an interview, please feel welcome to speak to a recruiter about our compensation philosophy and other available benefits. This role is eligible for base, bonus, equity, 401(k) match, and heavily subsidized benefits and perks.</span></p> <p><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 14pt;"><strong>Equal Employment Opportunity</strong></span></p> <p><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">To build technology and products that are used and loved by people and solve real-world problems, we need to build a team with many different perspectives and experiences. We are an equal opportunity employer. We do not discriminate based on race, religion, color, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, age, marital status, veteran status, or disability status. We encourage candidates from all backgrounds to apply.&nbsp;</span></p> <p><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 14pt;"><strong>Agency Disclaimer</strong></span></p> <p><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">DriveWealth does not accept agency resumes. Do not forward resumes to our jobs alias, employees, or any other organization location. DriveWealth is not responsible for any fees related to unsolicited resumes.</span></p></div>

title: Principal Data Engineer
location: New York, New York, United States
full_description: <div class="content-intro"><p><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><strong><span style="font-size: 14pt;">About Us</span></strong></span></p> <p><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">DriveWealth is on a mission to make investing easier. We believe that everyone should have the ability to control their financial future, and that access to financial markets should not be limited by geography, wealth, or legacy systems. We are a global B2B financial technology organization dedicated to democratizing access to financial independence around the world. Our mission is realized through an API-based platform, empowering our partners to offer seamless investing and trading experiences to clients worldwide, all from their mobile devices. Our technology provides partners with a modern, extensible toolkit, enabling traditional investment workflows and innovative techniques like fractional share ownership. DriveWealth has evolved into a global platform offering trading of US equities, mutual funds, ETFs, fixed income, and options.</span></p> <p><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">There’s never been a better time to build a category-defining business and there has rarely been a team better positioned for this opportunity. Our culture blends the pace and agility of a fintech start-up with the impact, stability, and discipline of Wall Street. We encourage creativity and experimentation while ensuring institutional-grade execution and regulatory compliance in everything we do. Join us and help build the future of global investing!</span></p></div><h3><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">About the Role</span></h3> <p><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">As a Principal Data Engineer, you will be dedicated to building innovative data products that provide actionable insights and empower both our internal teams and partners to succeed. Your core focus will be on curating and maintaining key data sources and statistics that serve both internal and external stakeholders.</span></p> <p><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">You will act as the hands-on technical engine driving this work forward, spending 60–70% of your time writing code while shaping the architectural vision of our data ecosystem. You will architect for massive scale, treat data as software, and build highly performant, resilient models and reporting solutions (using Databricks, dbt, and Python) that fuel data-driven decision-making across the business.</span></p> <h3><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">What You’ll Do</span></h3> <p><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><strong>Advanced Engineering &amp; Coding</strong></span></p> <ul> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">End-to-End Ownership: Own the full lifecycle of data products, from initial conceptualization and architecture through to production deployment, optimization, and maintenance.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Core Development: Design and code complex dbt models and data transformation logic for high-volume financial datasets (e.g., trade transactions, stock ledgers, and clearing/settlement records).</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Python Automation: Write production-grade Python scripts for advanced data processing, anomaly detection, and custom orchestration logic that SQL cannot handle alone.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Performance Engineering: Take ownership of the "hardest problems" regarding query performance. Refactor legacy code and optimize incremental loading strategies to reduce costs and latency at scale.</span></li> </ul> <p><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><strong>Technical Architecture &amp; Standards</strong></span></p> <ul> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">CI/CD &amp; DevOps: Own the technical implementation of our data deployment reporting pipelines (Git, dbt Cloud), ensuring robust version control and seamless integration.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Data Quality as Code: Engineer automated testing frameworks and validation suites (using dbt tests/Python) to ensure data integrity for critical business layers.</span></li> </ul> <p><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><strong>Leadership &amp; Cross-Functional Impact</strong></span></p> <ul> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Technical Project Leadership: Act as the hands-on lead for major initiatives. Scope, design, and manage complex data projects while remaining active in the codebase to ensure high-quality delivery.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Cross-Functional Partnership: Partner directly with stakeholders across Product, Finance, Operations, Risk, and Trading to translate domain-specific requirements into robust data products and reporting solutions.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Mentorship &amp; Guidance: Act as the "go-to" technical resource for the team. Conduct thorough code reviews and help senior and junior engineers solve blockers through pair programming and architectural guidance.</span></li> </ul> <h3><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">You Bring</span></h3> <ul> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">8+ years of professional experience in analytics engineering or data engineering, with a proven track record of building and scaling analytical data ecosystems.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Expert proficiency in SQL, with experience optimizing complex queries and data models at scale.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Advanced proficiency in Python for data manipulation (Pandas/Polars/Spark) and interaction with APIs/AWS services.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Experience using Databricks for analytics workloads, including building and optimizing data models using Databricks SQL and dbt.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Experience with dbt materializations, macros, and package management.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Experience architecting data models for FinTech and Capital Markets, including trade lifecycles, clearing/settlement, risk models, and financial reporting.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">AI-Assisted Engineering: Proficiency in leveraging AI tools (e.g., GitHub Copilot,or similar LLMs) to accelerate code delivery, automate documentation, and optimize engineering workflows.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Proven ability to build data solutions that are reusable and modular, rather than one-off scripts.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Experience treating data as software by implementing unit testing, CI/CD, comprehensive documentation, and SLA monitoring.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Ability to independently diagnose and resolve complex errors or issues within distributed systems (Spark/Databricks).</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related technical field.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Special Knowledge (Nice to Have, But Not Required)</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Experience implementing Airflow or similar orchestrators.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Experience with Sigma Computing (from a data modeling perspective).</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Experience building Data Apps within Databricks.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Experience using AI/LLM tools to enable faster, smarter analytics workflows.</span></li> </ul> <h3><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Location<strong><br></strong></span></h3> <p><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">This role is open to candidates in the following locations: </span></p> <p><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><strong>New York, NY - Hybrid&nbsp;</strong></span></p> <ul> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">This role is expected to come into the office on a cadence set by the Hiring Manager/Team.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">If you're not based in one of the locations listed above, this role is not a fit, and we cannot accommodate remote work outside these locations.</span></li> <li style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Applicants must be authorized to work for any employer in the U.S. DriveWealth does not sponsor or take over sponsorship of an employment visa at this time.</span></li> </ul> <p><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><strong>Pay Range: </strong>$220,000 – $240,000 USD</span></p><div class="content-conclusion"><p><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 14pt;"><strong>Working at DriveWealth</strong></span></p> <p><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">We do our best work when we’re in the same room. To maintain the speed our partners expect, our New York, Chicago, and Lithuania teams work in-office 4 days a week. We’ve found that being physically side-by-side is the only way to solve complex problems in real-time and stay truly accountable to the products we ship. When you’re here, you’re working directly with the people making the decisions.<br></span></p> <p><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">To support that work, we provide competitive compensation, equity, and a 401(k) match. We also offer Medical, Dental, and Vision Insurance, Disability Insurance, and Paid Parental Leave, along with a wellness reimbursement, a company-provided phone, and a personal development allowance. Finally, we value the time you spend away from the office with generous PTO, observed holidays.</span></p> <p data-path-to-node="5"><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;"><strong><span style="font-size: 14pt;">Work Authorization</span></strong></span></p> <p><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Applicants must possess the legal right to work in the country where the position is located at the time of application. DriveWealth requires all employees to provide original documentation verifying their work authorization on or before their first day of employment.</span></p> <p><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">For US-based roles: Applicants must be currently authorized to work in the United States on a full-time basis without the need for current or future visa sponsorship. DriveWealth does not provide visa sponsorship or support for employment authorization, including transfers, at this time. Offers of employment are strictly contingent upon an individual’s ability to secure and maintain the legal right to work at the Company.</span></p> <p><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 14pt;"><strong>How We Think About AI</strong></span></p> <p><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">We leverage AI to work smarter and move faster. We seek AI-curious talent who are proactive about using emerging tools to increase signal quality, reduce friction, and improve outcomes to deliver products faster, provide better service to our partners, and to streamline processes. Your ability to leverage our internal tools and technology to drive results is as important to us as your core domain expertise.</span></p> <p><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 14pt;"><strong>Compensation</strong></span></p> <p><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">Pay is generally based on the level, complexity, responsibility, location, and job duties/requirements of the specific position. We then source candidates with the requisite skills, expertise, education, training, and experience.&nbsp; If you are selected for an interview, please feel welcome to speak to a recruiter about our compensation philosophy and other available benefits. This role is eligible for base, bonus, equity, 401(k) match, and heavily subsidized benefits and perks.</span></p> <p><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 14pt;"><strong>Equal Employment Opportunity</strong></span></p> <p><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">To build technology and products that are used and loved by people and solve real-world problems, we need to build a team with many different perspectives and experiences. We are an equal opportunity employer. We do not discriminate based on race, religion, color, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, age, marital status, veteran status, or disability status. We encourage candidates from all backgrounds to apply.&nbsp;</span></p> <p><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 14pt;"><strong>Agency Disclaimer</strong></span></p> <p><span style="font-family: helvetica, arial, sans-serif;">DriveWealth does not accept agency resumes. Do not forward resumes to our jobs alias, employees, or any other organization location. DriveWealth is not responsible for any fees related to unsolicited resumes.</span></p></div>

title: Senior Data Engineer
location: New York, New York, United States
full_description: <h2><strong>ABOUT THE JOB</strong></h2> <p>The ACLU seeks applicants for the full-time position of <strong>Senior Data Engineer</strong> in the <strong>Technology Department </strong>of the ACLU’s National office in <strong>New York, NY.</strong> This is a <strong>hybrid role</strong> that has in-office requirements of two (2) days per week or eight (8) days per month.&nbsp;</p> <p>The ACLU Technology Department is a broad umbrella covering both the ACLU’s Analytics and its Product &amp; Engineering teams, two robust and innovative divisions that power the work of the ACLU. The department provides trusted, dependable, and impactful analytics, engineering, as well as product management and product design expertise for the ACLU. In partnership with experts across the ACLU, the technology team delivers best-in-class solutions, services, and innovation that advance the ACLU mission and organizational priorities. The tech team strives to ensure the ACLU leads by example in the ethical use of technology by ensuring privacy and security standards are maintained, directional insights are used to inform programming and business strategy, best-in-class products are designed to get the ACLU message out into the world and grow the ACLU supporter base, as well as to help steward high standards for algorithmic fairness, accountability, and transparency. &nbsp;</p> <p>The Product &amp; Engineering division includes engineers, product managers, product designers, and project operations experts who build and maintain engaging digital products and secure technical systems that accelerate the ACLU’s mission as our nationwide guardian of rights and liberties.&nbsp;</p> <p><span data-teams="true">This position is part of a collective bargaining unit. It is represented by ACLU Staff United (ASU).</span></p> <h2><strong>WHAT YOU'LL DO</strong>&nbsp;</h2> <p>Reporting to the <strong>Director of Data Engineering,</strong> the <strong>Senior Data Engineer</strong> will join the Data Pod, which leads the ACLU’s operational data engineering efforts. In this role, you will build and maintain data products and integrations between our operational data warehouse and broader technology ecosystem. Your work will ensure that the ACLU and its affiliates can execute fundraising, advocacy, and engagement strategies while prioritizing data privacy and security.&nbsp;</p> <p>The ideal candidate is a senior-level software or data engineer with significant experience building large-scale, high-volume data products and storage solutions that address complex data and compliance requirements.&nbsp;</p> <h2><strong>YOUR DAY TO DAY</strong></h2> <ul> <li>Design, build, test, deploy, and maintain multi-source, multi-destination data pipelines and products&nbsp;</li> <li>Work primarily within Dagster, dbt, and the AWS ecosystem, with a strong understanding of the data models, APIs, and operational constraints of our systems and integrations&nbsp;</li> <li>Play a key role in the design and implementation of a centralized communications consent management system with a focus on privacy compliance, performance, and extensibility&nbsp;</li> <li>Support the migration of our primary fundraising CRM, with a focus on data integrations between Blackbaud CRM and the broader technology ecosystem&nbsp;</li> <li>Collaborate closely with engineers and product management to refine technical requirements and translate business objectives into scalable data solutions &nbsp;</li> <li>Participate actively in technical design discussions, balancing pragmatism, maintainability, reliability, and delivery timelines &nbsp;</li> <li>Proactively identify and mitigate reliability and performance issues; independently investigate, troubleshoot, and resolve complex bugs and operational challenges&nbsp;</li> <li>Contribute to agile team processes, including sprint planning, ticket refinement, code reviews, testing, documentation, and release support &nbsp;</li> <li>Mentor engineers and contribute to the growth of the team’s technical expertise through collaboration, technical guidance, and knowledge sharing&nbsp;</li> <li>Help foster a culture of continuous learning, thoughtful iteration, and engineering excellence&nbsp;</li> </ul> <h2><strong>FUTURE ACLU'ERS WILL&nbsp;</strong></h2> <ul> <li>Be committed to advancing the mission of the ACLU</li> <li>Center and embed the principles of equity, inclusion, and belonging in their work by demonstrating commitment to diversity with an approach that respects and values multiple perspectives</li> <li>Be committed to work collaboratively and respectfully toward resolving obstacles and conflicts</li> </ul> <h2><strong>WHAT YOU'LL BRING</strong></h2> <ul> <li>Significant professional experience operating with a high degree of technical ownership and autonomy in a collaborative engineering environment, including improving engineering practices, standards, or team processes &nbsp;</li> <li>Significant experience working with Python and AWS to build and maintain data products and services &nbsp;</li> <li>Experience implementing automated data validation and quality assurance practices within product data pipelines&nbsp;</li> <li>Experience integrating data of varying formats, quality, and volume within cloud data warehouse platforms (e.g., Redshift, Snowflake)&nbsp;</li> <li>Experience orchestrating data pipelines using modern workflow frameworks (e.g., Dagster, Airflow)&nbsp;</li> <li>Experience developing and maintaining data transformation workflows using modern tooling (e.g., dbt, pandas)&nbsp;</li> <li>Experience deploying and managing applications and services in a cloud environment (e.g., AWS, Azure) using infrastructure-as-code tooling (e.g., Terraform, CloudFormation)&nbsp;</li> <li>Experience working with both event-driven and batch-processing architectures&nbsp;</li> <li>Strong understanding of software and data engineering best practices, including observability, testing, maintainability, and operational reliability&nbsp;</li> <li>Strong communication, collaboration, and problem-solving skills&nbsp;</li> </ul> <h2><strong>Preferred</strong></h2> <ul> <li>Experience working with Blackbaud CRM or other fundraising CRMs within a nonprofit environment</li> <li>Experience integrating CRM, marketing, advocacy, or digital engagement platforms in complex organizational environments&nbsp;</li> <li>Experience managing AWS infrastructure or administering AWS environments&nbsp;</li> <li>Experience building or supporting systems related to legal, regulatory, or privacy compliance requirements &nbsp;</li> <li>Experience working with identity resolution, entity matching, or constituent data management systems&nbsp;</li> </ul> <h2><strong>COMPENSATION</strong></h2> <div><span class="TextRun SCXW172422681 BCX0" lang="EN-US" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW172422681 BCX0">The ACLU is committed to equity, transparency, and clarity in pay. Consistent with our compensation philosophy, there is a set salary for each role based on geographic work location. The annual salary for this position is <strong>$167,568 (Level E)</strong><span class="NormalTextRun ContextualSpellingAndGrammarErrorV2Themed SCXW172422681 BCX0">, reflecting</span> the salary of a position based in New York, NY.&nbsp; Salaries are subject to a regional pay adjustment if authorization is granted to work outside of the location listed in this posting.&nbsp;&nbsp; </span></span></div> <div>&nbsp;</div> <div><span class="TextRun SCXW172422681 BCX0" lang="EN-US" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW172422681 BCX0">For details on our pay structure, please visit: <span class="EOP SCXW172422681 BCX0" data-ccp-props="{&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335559739&quot;:160,&quot;335559740&quot;:259}"><a href="https://www.aclu.org/careers/ACLU_Geographic_Pay_Structure-July_2024.pdf">https://www.aclu.org/careers/ACLU_Geographic_Pay_Structure-July_2024.pdf</a></span></span></span></div> <h2><strong>WHY THE ACLU</strong></h2> <p>For over 100 years, the ACLU has worked to defend and preserve the individual rights and liberties guaranteed by the Constitution and laws of the United States. Whether it’s ending mass incarceration, achieving full equality for the LGBTQ+ community, establishing new privacy protections for our digital age, or preserving the right to vote or the right to have an abortion, the ACLU takes up the toughest civil liberties cases and issues to defend all people.</p> <p>We know that great people make a great organization. We value our people and know that what we offer is essential not just to their work, but to their overall well-being.&nbsp;</p> <p>At the ACLU, we offer a broad range of benefits, which include:</p> <ul> <li>Time away to focus on the things that matter with a generous paid time-off policy</li> <li>Focus on your well-being with comprehensive healthcare benefits (including medical, dental and vision coverage, parental leave, gender affirming care &amp; fertility treatment)</li> <li>Plan for your retirement with 401(k) plan and employer match</li> <li>We support employee growth and development through annual professional development funds, internal professional development programs and workshops</li> </ul> <h2><strong>OUR COMMITMENT TO ACCESSIBILITY, EQUITY, DIVERSITY &amp; INCLUSION</strong></h2> <p>Accessibility, equity, diversity and inclusion are core values of the ACLU and central to our work to advance liberty, equality, and justice for all. For us diversity, equity, accessibility, and inclusion are not just check-the-box activities, but a chance for us to make long-term meaningful change. We are a community committed to learning and growth, humility and grace, transparency and accountability. We believe in a collective responsibility to create a culture of belonging for all people within our organization – one that respects and embraces difference; treats everyone equitably; and empowers our colleagues to do the best work possible. We are as committed to anti-oppression, anti-ableism, and anti-racism internally as we are externally. Because whether we’re in the courts or in the office, we believe ‘We the People’ means all of us.</p> <p>With this commitment in mind, we strongly encourage applications from all qualified individuals without regard to race, color, religion, gender, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, age, national origin, marital status, citizenship, disability, veteran status and record of arrest or conviction, or any other characteristic protected by applicable law. &nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;</p> <p><em>The ACLU is committed to providing reasonable accommodation to individuals with disabilities. If you are a qualified individual with a disability and need assistance applying online, please email&nbsp;</em><a href="mailto:benefits.hrdept@aclu.org"><em>benefits.hrdept@aclu.org</em></a><em>. If you are selected for an interview, you will receive additional information regarding how to request an accommodation for the interview process.</em></p> <p><strong>The Department of Education has determined that employment in this position at the ACLU does not qualify for the Public Service Loan Forgiveness Program.</strong><strong>&nbsp;</strong></p>

title: Data Engineering Manager
full_description: <div class="content-intro"><p>Dragos is on a relentless mission to defend industrial organizations that provide us with the necessities of modern civilization; running water, functioning electricity, and safe industrial working environments. As the market leader in ICS/OT Cybersecurity, we are dedicated to arming our customers with best-in-class technology, threat intelligence, and services to protect their systems as effectively and efficiently as possible. We’re a remote-first culture with operations in North America, Europe, the Middle East, and APAC. We’re looking for mission-oriented teammates who embody our core values of authenticity, transparency, and trust. Are you ready to make a difference? Come join a mission that can save the world!&nbsp;</p></div><p><strong><span data-contrast="auto">About the Role</span></strong><span data-contrast="auto">:</span><span data-ccp-props="{}"> <br></span><span data-ccp-props="{}">We are looking for a&nbsp;<strong>Data</strong> <strong>Engineering Manager</strong> to lead our data engineering team. The ideal candidate should have deep technical knowledge of data integration processes, exceptional leadership skills, and a proven ability to develop high-performing teams. Key responsibilities include fostering a collaborative culture, driving career growth, and aligning strategy with the overall engineering vision.</span></p> <p><strong><span data-contrast="auto">Responsibilities</span></strong><span data-contrast="auto">:</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p> <ul> <li>Lead and mentor a team of data engineers, driving their technical growth and professional development.</li> <li>Champion the vision and execution of scalable data processing systems.</li> <li>Collaborate with product and engineering teams to consistently define data architecture and solution strategies.</li> <li>Foster a strong technical community by developing close relationships amongst Engineering Managers.</li> <li>Establish and drive engineering best practices, coding standards, and performance optimization strategies.</li> <li>Provide guidance during software design, development, testing, and release.</li> <li>Ensure timely delivery of projects, balancing technical debt and innovation.</li> <li>Ensure support for fielded production deployments.</li> <li>Stay current with emerging data technologies, frameworks, and best practices to drive continuous improvement.</li> </ul> <p><strong><span data-contrast="auto">Qualifications</span></strong><span data-contrast="auto">:</span><span data-ccp-props="{}">&nbsp;</span></p> <ul> <li>7+ years of engineering management experience, consistently building and leading highly effective teams</li> <li>Strong technical background in distributed data systems</li> <li>Prior experience as an engineer with strong working knowledge of technologies such as Airflow, the Elastic Stack, Docker, Kubernetes, and cloud platforms</li> <li>Comfortable with hands-on development or troubleshooting</li> <li>Excellent communication, leadership, and presentation skills</li> <li>Management experience with Agile and working in cross-functional Product Teams</li> <li>Detail-oriented, takes initiative, and dedicated to quality</li> <li>Knowledge of cybersecurity threat detections, threat intelligence, or ICS/OT security</li> </ul> <p><strong><span title: Data Engineer
full_description: <h2><strong>EMPLOYER IS A CONTRACTOR FOR THE U.S. GOVERNMENT. THIS POSITION WILL REQUIRE U.S. CITIZENSHIP.</strong></h2> <h1><strong>Responsibilities:</strong></h1> <ul> <li>Designing data workflows, pipelines, and pathways to support ETL/ELT, while ensuring data-quality and exchange of sensitive information across AWS cloud and on-prem environments.&nbsp;</li> <li>Implementing systems engineering principles to ensure the reliability, scalability, and maintainability of data layer systems, including backup and recovery strategies</li> <li>Architecting, deploying, and operating data streaming technologies (Kafka, Redpanda, Kinesis, etc ) on Kubernetes with an emphasis on declarative definitions to reduce complexity in day-2 operations</li> <li>Working with a platform team to implement best practices for configuration management, security, and performance optimization within Kubernetes and AWS environments</li> <li>Working with a platform team to automate infrastructure provisioning, monitoring, and scaling using tools such as Terraform working with cybersecurity SMEs to incorporate best practices and techniques to defend our data layer against potential threats</li> <li>Ensuring that our data layer systems are compliant with industry and DoD regulations, standards, and best-practices</li> <li>Staying up-to-date with industry trends and emerging technologies related to Kubernetes, containerization, and data engineering</li> </ul> <p><strong>Travel Expectations/Requirements: 6-10 times per year</strong></p> <p><strong>The listed responsibilities are not exhaustive and additional responsibilities may be assigned based on the evolving needs of the organization. We are seeking a dynamic individual who is able to adapt and take on new responsibilities as they arise.&nbsp;<br><br>*</strong><strong>Preferred Experience and Qualifications:</strong></p> <ul> <li>Demonstrated experience (minimum 5 years) in building and maintaining production data pipelines, databases, and data exchange services on Kubernetes Experience in designing, deploying, and operating Kafka / Redpanda data streaming solutions on Kubernetes</li> <li>Experience in creating data pipelines from scratch with the ability to process data in large volumes and manage data stores</li> <li>Experience with containerization technologies such as Docker and container orchestration systems like Kubernetes</li> <li>Knowledge of systems engineering principles to ensure the reliability, scalability, and maintainability of data layer systems Familiarity with API Security, Container Security, AWS Cloud Security Familiarity with cybersecurity principles and best practices for securing data layer systems</li> <li>Excellent problem-solving skills, with the ability to work independently and as part of a team</li> <li>Excellent communication skills, with the ability to convey complex ideas to both technical and non-technical team members</li> <li>&nbsp;The selected candidate will be subject to a pre-employment background check ("CBI") and must be able to obtain and maintain a Secret-level DoD security clearance&nbsp;</li> <li>Experience with machine learning and generative AI models</li> </ul><div class="content-pay-transparency"><div class="pay-input"><div class="description"><p>Full compensation packages are based on candidate experience. Compensation ranges are established using national benchmarking data and apply across all geographic locations within the United States.&nbsp;</p></div><div class="title">Remote - USA</div><div class="pay-range"><span>$124,250</span><span class="divider">&mdash;</span><span>$166,750 USD</span></div></div></div><div class="content-conclusion"><h3>Who We Are</h3> <p>Defense Unicorns delivers mission value by streamlining software delivery so our customers can focus on the most important challenges. We share a vision of freedom and security for the advancement of progress and innovation. Our commitment to this vision, and to our mission-driven customers, means a commitment to speed, user experience and optionality, without compromising security. Our team is composed of innovators, software engineers, and veterans with decades of experience delivering technology programs across the federal market.</p> <h3>What We Do</h3> <p>We create and deliver secure solutions for continuous software integration and delivery. Defense Unicorns consolidates the best practices for security pipelines, testing, and deployment automation in order to meet the high security requirements valued by mission owners. Our solutions are agnostic by design and we believe that growing a robust ecosystem of secure, cloud-native software solutions can help enterprise customers inside and outside the federal market buy and integrate software more easily.</p> <h3>Who We Serve</h3> <p>Defense Unicorns’ customers are mission-focused leaders across public and private enterprises. We proudly support defense and civil agencies across the U.S. government and we work closely with the creators of leading-edge software solutions to deliver value to the mission-owner by improving the security and consumability of commercial software products.</p> <h3><strong>What We Work On</strong></h3> <ul> <li>Kubernetes</li> <li>Cloud Environments (AWS/GCP and Azure)</li> <li>Infrastructure-as-code (like Terraform/Pulumi)</li> <li>Continuous Delivery and automation tooling</li> <li>GitOps</li> <li>Containers</li> <li>CNCF projects and open source products and packages</li> <li>Helm/Kustomize-Value Stream Mapping</li> <li>Building and improving security delivery</li> <li>Building Kubernetes and cloud native applications</li> </ul> <h3><strong>Benefits Our Unicorns Enjoy</strong></h3> <h4>Health:</h4> <ul> <li>Medical/Dental/Vision</li> <li>Premiums are 100% Company Paid</li> <li>Health Savings Account</li> <li>Life Insurance</li> <li>Disability Insurance</li> </ul> <h4>Financial:</h4> <ul> <li>401k Retirement Plan</li> <li>Company Stock Options</li> <li>Home Office Budget</li> </ul> <h4>Leave:</h4> <ul> <li>We offer all full-time Unicorns Flexible Time Off (FTO) plus all Federal Holidays, one week for Thanksgiving, and two weeks for Christmas and New Year’s</li> <li>Paid Parental Leave</li> </ul> <h4>Learning:</h4> <ul> <li>Reimbursement for approved trainings/subscriptions</li> <li>Conferences (travel, lodging, and fees)</li> </ul> <p><em>Don’t have all the preferred experience or qualifications? Studies show that underrepresented groups like women and people of color are less likely to apply to jobs if they don't meet every requirement listed.&nbsp;</em></p> <p><em>At Defense Unicorns, we're committed to diversity. If you're enthusiastic about the role but don't match every criteria, we encourage you to apply. You could be the perfect fit for this or another role! Defense Unicorns is an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, disability, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, age, national origin, veteran status, genetic information, union status and/or beliefs, or any other characteristic protected by federal, state, or local law.</em></p> <p><a href="https://drive.google.com/file/d/1DzT00w2uadYw9TfdorHuEsvPccZvn_g4/view?usp=drive_link" target="_blank"><strong>CCPA DISCLOSURE</strong></a></p></div>

title: FDE Data Engineer- Space
full_description: <h2><strong>EMPLOYER IS A CONTRACTOR FOR THE U.S. GOVERNMENT. THIS POSITION WILL REQUIRE U.S. CITIZENSHIP.</strong></h2> <h2 class="text-text-100 mt-3 -mb-1 text-[1.125rem] font-bold" data-sourcepos="3:1-3:20;96-115">Role Description</h2> <p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal" data-sourcepos="5:1-5:495;117-611">This is a forward-deployed engineering role. You'll work shoulder-to-shoulder with mission heroes: the users, operators, and program engineers who run real workloads in real DoD environments. You'll help take UDS Data Capability from "deployable" to "running in production under classification." You will deploy, integrate, and operate our data stack in the mission hero's environment alongside senior engineers, then carry what you learn back into the product so the next engagement is easier.</p> <p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal" data-sourcepos="7:1-7:579;613-1191">The scope of this work varies by engagement. Some programs require standing up a governed data platform to centralize sensor or operational data from known sources, where the problem is well-defined and the priority is building and shipping. Others involve consolidating data across hundreds of interconnected government systems of record with overlapping schemas, deeply interdependent data flows, and significant architectural complexity. You should be comfortable building independently against defined problems and growing into more ambiguous, complex engagements over time.</p> <p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal" data-sourcepos="9:1-9:431;1193-1623">Forward-deployed means aligned with the mission hero, not always on a plane. Most of the work is remote. You'll travel to sites when the engagement calls for it: initial standup, integration work, incident response, training and knowledge transfer. The rest of the time, you'll be on a video call or in a shared chat with that same mission hero. The role is defined by the relationship with the mission hero, not by where you sit.</p> <p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal" data-sourcepos="11:1-11:209;1625-1833">You are a data engineer who can build across the breadth of a data platform (storage, ingestion, streaming, governance, and access) and deliver working solutions in constrained, mission-critical environments.</p> <h2 class="text-text-100 mt-3 -mb-1 text-[1.125rem] font-bold" data-sourcepos="13:1-13:20;1835-1854">Responsibilities</h2> <ul class="[li_&amp;]:mb-0 [li_&amp;]:mt-1 [li_&amp;]:gap-1 [&amp;:not(:last-child)_ul]:pb-1 [&amp;:not(:last-child)_ol]:pb-1 list-disc flex flex-col gap-1 pl-8 mb-3" data-sourcepos="15:1-23:159;1856-3973"> <li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2" data-sourcepos="15:1-15:326;1856-2181">Deploy and configure UDS Data Capability in the mission hero's environment. Stand up the UDS Store (Iceberg, Rook/Ceph, pgvector, Postgres), wire up UDS Transit for air-gap data movement, configure UDS Govern policies (Pepr/Lula), and integrate UDS Connect (Strimzi/Kafka) where streaming or legacy connectors are required.</li> <li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2" data-sourcepos="16:1-16:352;2182-2533">Build and support integrations with existing mission systems. Connect UDS Data Capability to legacy databases, flat-file drops, SOAP/REST endpoints, message buses, existing object storage, and identity providers (Keycloak, mission-side SSO). Prior experience integrating with these types of systems is more relevant than experience building on them.</li> <li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2" data-sourcepos="17:1-17:312;2534-2845">Contribute to mapping complex data landscapes. Some engagements involve hundreds of interconnected systems of record with overlapping schemas and deeply interdependent data flows. You'll help trace how data moves across systems and identify dependencies alongside senior engineers and government stakeholders.</li> <li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2" data-sourcepos="18:1-18:232;2846-3077">Build pipelines that move data through classification boundaries, including ingestion, transformation, catalog registration, model/dataset packaging via Zarf, cross-domain transit, and eventual consistency across DDIL conditions.</li> <li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2" data-sourcepos="19:1-19:135;3078-3212">Implement data provenance, lineage, and governance practices. Track where data came from, how it transformed, and who can access it.</li> <li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2" data-sourcepos="20:1-20:225;3213-3437">Operate what you deploy. Day-2 ownership includes capacity, performance, backup/restore (Velero), observability (Vector/Loki), incident response, and upgrade paths. Hand off to the mission hero's ops team once it's stable.</li> <li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2" data-sourcepos="21:1-21:209;3438-3646">Generate accreditation artifacts, including STIG evidence, cATO documentation, FIPS validation notes, and policy mappings. You produce the evidence the mission hero's ISSM/ISSO needs to run this in IL4/IL5.</li> <li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2" data-sourcepos="22:1-22:168;3647-3814">Contribute field feedback back to product and engineering. File issues, write postmortems, and surface what's working and what's breaking in the mission environment.</li> <li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2" data-sourcepos="23:1-23:159;3815-3973">Support training and knowledge transfer. Contribute to runbooks, architecture docs, and working sessions that leave the mission hero's team self-sufficient.</li> </ul> <p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal" data-sourcepos="27:1-27:193;4221-4413"><strong>Preferred Locations:</strong> Colorado Springs, CO or Florida Space Coast (Cape Canaveral / Cocoa Beach / Melbourne). Remote candidates will be considered, but local presence is strongly preferred.</p> <p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal" data-sourcepos="25:1-25:245;3975-4219"><strong>Travel Expectations:</strong> Candidates based in Colorado Springs or the Florida Space Coast can expect on-site presence 1-2 days per week. Remote candidates should expect to travel to the engagement site for approximately one week every 4-6 weeks.</p> <p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal" data-sourcepos="29:1-29:249;4415-4663">The listed responsibilities are not exhaustive and additional responsibilities may be assigned based on the evolving needs of the organization. We are seeking a dynamic individual who is able to adapt and take on new responsibilities as they arise.</p> <h2 class="text-text-100 mt-3 -mb-1 text-[1.125rem] font-bold" data-sourcepos="31:1-31:27;4665-4691">Required Qualifications</h2> <p class="font-claude-response-body break-words whitespace-normal" data-sourcepos="33:1-33:29;4693-4721"><strong>Data engineering breadth</strong></p> <ul class="[li_&amp;]:mb-0 [li_&amp;]:mt-1 [li_&amp;]:gap-1 [&amp;:not(:last-child)_ul]:pb-1 [&amp;:not(:last-child)_ol]:pb-1 list-disc flex flex-col gap-1 pl-8 mb-3" data-sourcepos="35:1-39:119;4723-5529"> <li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2" data-sourcepos="35:1-35:153;4723-4875"><strong>Unstructured data at scale.</strong> Experience storing and querying large unstructured datasets using data lake architectures. Spark experience preferred.</li> <li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2" data-sourcepos="36:1-36:188;4876-5063"><strong>Streaming &amp; integration.</strong> Experience with stream processing infrastructure (Kafka, Redpanda, Flink, or equivalent) and bridging data from heterogeneous sources into modern pipelines.</li> <li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2" data-sourcepos="37:1-37:184;5064-5247"><strong>Data warehousing.</strong> Open-source data warehousing platform experience. These environments do not support proprietary platforms, so you need to be comfortable building without them.</li> <li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2" data-sourcepos="38:1-38:163;5248-5410"><strong>Pipelines &amp; orchestration.</strong> Airflow, Dagster, Argo Workflows, or similar. Comfort building, scheduling, monitoring, and recovering production data pipelines.</li> <li class="font-claude-response-body whitespace-normal break-words pl-2" data-sourcepos="39:1-39:119;5411-5529"><strong>Data modeling &amp; SQL.</strong> Fluent in SQL.
